Name: Lyft
Description: Whether it’s an everyday commute or a journey that changes everything, Lyft is driven by our purpose: to serve and connect. In 2012, Lyft was founded as one of the first ridesharing communities in the United States. Now, millions of drivers have chosen to earn on billions of rides. Lyft offers rideshare, bikes, and scooters all in one app — for a more connected world, with transportation for everyone.

Name: Emirates Transport
Description: Your Gateway To Efficient Transport Solutions. Emirates Transport is a leading name in the transportation sector, with a legacy that spans over four decades. Since its inception, it has evolved into a multifaceted organization offering a diverse range of services. The company's extensive fleet includes a significant number of school buses, reflecting its dedication to safe and reliable student transportation. With a skilled workforce and a wide network of facilities across the UAE, we are committed to delivering exceptional service. Joining the Emirates Investment Authority has further strengthened its impact on the nation's economy.

Name: Elife Transfer
Description:
All-in-one global ground transportation marketplace, seamlessly connecting every journey.
Rail | Ride-hailing | Shared Shuttles | Private Transfers | Charter Buses
Global Network – 182+ countries | 1,500+ airports | 20,000+ cities | 70,000+ fleet partners | 20M+ happy travelers | 5M+ flawless rides

The Elife Advantage

24/7 Support: Our multilingual call center is always available via phone, email, and WhatsApp.
Expert Drivers: Our wide network of experienced, local-savvy drivers ensures a professional experience.
Total Transparency: We offer all-inclusive fares with no hidden charges.
Smart Technology: Route and flight tracking ensure on-time pickups, every time.

Vision: Reliable ground transportation services globally with all types of vehicles.
Mission: Empower high quality local fleets

Coorporate Culture: team first
* Partner-centric
* Team collaboration,
* Never "not my job", end-to-end ownership,
* Continuous learning and improvement,
* Hard-working and pragmatic,
* Don’t be a middleman,
* Result-driven

Name: Keolis Group
Description:
Keolis is a global leader in the shared mobility market and a committed partner to public transport authorities. Together, we co-construct safe, smart and sustainable public transport solutions that help to create more attractive places to live and work.

The world's leading operator of automatic metro systems and tramways, Keolis draws on a vigorous and open innovation policy with its partners and specialist subsidiaries - Cykleo, EFFIA, Hove, Keolis Santé and Kisio. The aim of this collaboration is to strengthen its core business and develop new, innovative and bespoke shared mobility solutions: trains, buses and coaches, trolleybuses, on demand transport, PRM-specific services, river and sea shuttles, bike share and rental, car sharing, all-electric autonomous shuttles, etc.

In keeping with our public service commitment, our objective is clear: offer appealing alternatives to private cars. With this goal in mind, we are focused on responding to the challenges of the mobility sector: the ecological transition, the digital transformation of lifestyles, the new expectations of citizens who want more flexibility and simplicity when they travel, operational excellence, security and public health.

Because each of us plays a part, no matter our role or background. 

“That’s the way we move”

More information on our website www.keolis.com and on our social-media.

Name: Alsa
Description:
Con más de cien años de experiencia y una vocación de innovación permanente, Alsa es la organización líder en el sector español de transporte de viajeros por carretera.

La concepción del transporte desde una visión integral y la satisfacción permanente del cliente, son las premisas sobre las que Alsa desarrolla su actividad.

Como operador integral es capaz de atender las diferentes necesidades de movilidad de los ciudadanos mediante un amplio abanico de servicios de transporte en autobús, de ámbito tanto regional como nacional, internacional, urbano y discrecional (alquiler de autocares).

Name: Metrô Rio
Description:
O Metrô do Rio de Janeiro opera desde março de 1979. Em 1997, com a concessão, a administração e a operação das linhas e estações ficaram a encargo do Consórcio Opportrans (Metrô Rio), concessionário pelo período de 20 anos.

No final de dezembro de 2007, a concessão foi renovada até 2038 e o Metrô Rio assumiu a responsabilidade pela construção da Linha 1A, que ligará a linha 2 à Linha 1, acabando com a necessidade de transferência em Estácio, pela compra de 114 carros e construção das Estações Uruguai e Cidade Nova.

É a segunda rede mais extensa do país, com 42 km distribuídos em duas linhas e 38 estações, perdendo apenas para o Metrô de São Paulo. Transporta diariamente cerca de 550 mil passageiros.

Name: Grupo EPR
Description:
A EPR é uma plataforma de investimentos em concessões de rodovias e mobilidade. Nosso propósito é o desenvolvimento sustentável a partir da prestação de serviços de excelência aos usuários e a realização de investimentos consistentes. 

A empresa é a consolidação da parceria da Equipav,  com mais de 60 anos de experiência em infraestrutura, com a @Perfin, gestora de fundos de investimentos em infraestrutura. 

Administramos seis concessões de rodovias, sendo: EPR Via Mineira, EPR Sul de Minas, EPR Triângulo e EPR Vias do Café, no estado de Minas Gerais e a EPR Litoral Pioneiro e EPR Iguaçu, no Paraná.

Name: Daewoo Pakistan Express Bus Service LTD
Description:
Daewoo Express is the first and the biggest foreign investment Company with an advanced and organized network with various international trade links. Being a transport service provider the company owns a large fleet of buses, Technically Advanced Workshops to maintain the fleet for the safety of the passengers, State of the Art Terminals, Training Institutes for Drivers and Mechanical Staff. 

Daewoo Express has been rendering transport facilities since its inception in 1997 to the people of Pakistan. It is appreciated by the masses as well as by the Governments of Pakistan as well as Korea for its consistent success. Media of both the countries often express appreciation for the revolutionary accomplishment of the Company in the transport sector, through various channels.

Name: Arriva Group
Description:
Arriva is the leading passenger transport operator in Europe, employing around 36,200 people and delivering 1.5 billion passenger journeys each year, with businesses across 11 European countries.

Our services include local buses (scheduled and demand-responsive); inter-urban commuter coaches; local, regional and national train services; waterbuses, bicycles and school transport. 

We operate passenger transport services in Czech Republic; Croatia; Hungary; Italy; Netherlands; Poland; Slovakia; Slovenia, Spain and the UK. We also have a rolling stock leasing company in Romania.

Name: HyperloopTT
Description:
Hyperloop Transportation Technologies (HyperloopTT) is an innovative transportation and technology company focused on realizing the hyperloop, a system that moves people and goods safely, efficiently, and sustainably by bringing airplane speeds to the ground. Through the use of unique, patented technology and an advanced collaborative business model, HyperloopTT is creating the first new form of transportation in over a century. 

Founded in 2013, HyperloopTT is a global team of more than 800 engineers, creatives, and technologists in 52 multidisciplinary teams, with 50 corporate and university partners. Headquartered in Los Angeles, CA, HyperloopTT has offices in North and South America, the Middle East, and Europe. 

HyperoopTT is a proud signatory of the United Nations Global Compact, reflecting the company’s commitment to the UN Sustainable Development Goals..

Name: FirstGroup plc
Description:
FirstGroup plc is a leading private sector provider of public transport.

Our services are a vital part of society – transporting customers for business, education, health, social or leisure purposes. We create solutions that reduce complexity, making travel smoother and life easier.

FirstGroup is one of the UK's largest bus operators, serving two-thirds of the UK’s 15 largest conurbations, including major urban areas such as Glasgow, Bristol and Leeds, with a fifth of the market outside London. We are also one of the most experienced rail operators in the UK and the only one to run every sort of railway - long distance, regional, commuter and sleeper operations. We carried more 772,000 passengers a day in 2022/23 across our five rail operations. 

We operate three passenger franchises – Avanti West Coast, Great Western Railway, South Western Railway – and two open access operations, Lumo and Hull Trains. 

We provide easy and convenient mobility, improving quality of life by connecting people and communities.

For information on careers with FirstGroup in the UK click here:
Home (firstgroup.co.uk)

Name: DAKAR MOBILITE
Description:
Dakar Mobilité est le concessionnaire du BRT de Dakar, c’est une société sénégalaise détenue à 70% par Meridiam et à 30% par le FONSIS.
Elle est en charge de l’acquisition d’une flotte de bus électriques, l’exploitation et la maintenance du système BRT de Dakar.
A travers le projet BRT, Dakar Mobilité, apportera une solution durable :
 - Au transport de personnes
-  A la congestion routière
- A la pollution

Name: OK Mobility
Description:
OK Mobility is the global mobility platform with the highest growth and projection in the world. Through rental, subscription, renting and purchasing, OK Mobility offers effective, personalised, sustainable and real time solutions. 

To this end, and in order to respond to all the mobility demands of users, the company has over 70 OK Stores in 20 countries: Spain, Portugal, Italy, Germany, Greece, Malta, Croatia, Montenegro, Serbia, United States, Morocco, Albania, Romania, France, Turkey, Bosnia, Macedonia, Tunisia, Senegal and Gambia.

Name: VicRoads
Description:
VicRoads is passionate about making it easy for Victorians to get on the road.  

We operate registration and licensing services on behalf of the Victorian State Government, registering more than 6.5 million vehicles and licensing 5.1 million drivers of cars, motorcycles, heavy vehicles and boats. 

More than 40 essential registration and licensing services sit under our umbrella. Each year we securely process millions of online transactions and provide personalised support at our 44 licensing, testing and Customer Service Centres throughout Victoria. 

We're pleased to have launched a range of innovative digital services to make it easier for Victorians to manage their registration and licensing needs. These include ourmyVicRoadsapp, which provides secure access to a range of registration and licensing services on your phone. Drivers can now access theirDigital Driver Licencethrough the myVicRoads app. We also launched ourVicRoads Vehicle Report, which allows purchasers to get insights into a vehicle's history and make a more confident purchase. 

As we continue to evolve, we will remain focused on enhancing the customer experience and delivering practical benefits for Victorians, as well as continuing to provide seamless and efficient services. 

We operate as a joint venture partnership with the Victorian State Government, Aware Super, Australian Retirement Trust and Macquarie Asset Management.

Name: SunuBRT Officiel
Description: Bienvenue à bord de SunuBRT, où la mobilité urbaine devient rapide, fluide et respectueuse de l'environnement grâce à nos bus 100% électriques. Rejoignez-nous pour créer ensemble l'avenir du transport !

Name: OK Mobility
Description:
OK Mobility is the global mobility platform with the highest growth and projection in the world. Through rental, subscription, renting and purchasing, OK Mobility offers effective, personalised, sustainable and real time solutions. 

To this end, and in order to respond to all the mobility demands of users, the company has over 70 OK Stores in 20 countries: Spain, Portugal, Italy, Germany, Greece, Malta, Croatia, Montenegro, Serbia, United States, Morocco, Albania, Romania, France, Turkey, Bosnia, Macedonia, Tunisia, Senegal and Gambia.

Name: Grupo JCA
Description: Reconhecido pela história e tradição no transporte rodoviário, o Grupo JCA é composto pelas empresas Catarinense, Cometa, 1001, Expresso do Sul, Rápido Ribeirão. Inovando ao longo do seu percurso, investe na experiência dos clientes, garantindo segurança e conforto ao disponibilizar frotas modernas, avançados sistemas de segurança, além de motoristas treinados e experientes. Com constante investimento em tecnologia, o Grupo JCA foi pioneiro ao implementar o BPE (bilhete de passagem eletrônico) que permite embarque direto na plataforma, além de oferecer sites e aplicativos atualizados para compra, atendimento via chatbot, wi-fi a bordo e entrada individual para USB nas poltronas de determinadas categorias de ônibus. O Grupo JCA atua no transporte de encomendas com a Buslog, otimizando bagageiros exclusivos de seus veículos, com alcance de mais de 200 destinos, e em fretamento, contínuo e eventual, com a Opção Fretamento & Turismo.

Name: Cruz del Sur
Description:
Cruz del Sur forma parte del grupo Ibarcena. Hace 64 años, inicia sus operaciones desde la ciudad de Arequipa. En 1981, la familia Ibárcena adquiere la empresa, con 15 vehículos para la zona de Arequipa.
Desde 1992, desarrolla un servicio de transporte de pasajeros diferenciado que centra su atención en la plena satisfacción del cliente y el valor agregado.  Actualmente es reconocida como empresa líder en el mercado peruano.

Name: Viação Cometa S.A.
Description: A Viação Cometa é uma empresa brasileira de Transporte rodoviário que atua especialmente nos estados de São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Minas Gerais e Paraná.

Name: Grupo Ouro e Prata
Description:
Desde 1939, o Grupo Ouro e Prata percorre os caminhos da qualidade e inovação com o objetivo de proporcionar a melhor experiência de viagem aos seus clientes. O Grupo transporta mais de 5 milhões de passageiros por ano, valorizando sempre a segurança na operação, o encantamento dos clientes, o foco nos resultados, a valorização das pessoas, a melhoria contínua e a responsabilidade socioambiental.


Confira os segmentos atendidos pelo Grupo Ouro e Prata:

Transporte Hidroviário
- CatSul: realiza a travessia hidroviária entre as cidades de Porto Alegre e Guaíba, no Rio Grande do Sul. Além de atuar com rapidez, segurança e conforto, a CatSul atua com com responsabilidade socioambiental auxiliando na redução de poluentes, visto que cerca de 15 mil carros deixam de circular entre as cidades em função do transporte alternativo do catamarã.


Transporte Rodoviário
- Viação Ouro e Prata: há mais de 8 décadas no mercado, atende mais de 400 destinos. Composta por mais de 200 ônibus equipados com tecnologia de última geração, conforto e qualidade sendo uma empresa referência em excelência e inovação no transporte de passageiros.


Transporte de Encomendas
- Viopex Encomendas Expressas: atuante de norte a sul do País, com mais de 400 destinos, atendendo às necessidades dos clientes com qualidade, agilidade e confiança e tecnologia no rastreio de encomendas.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Auto Viação 1001 Ltda
Description: Há 73 anos, a Auto Viação 1001 é referência no transporte rodoviário de passageiros, especialmente no Rio de Janeiro, berço e estado em que concentra a maior parte de suas operações. Faz parte de um dos principais empresa do setor, o Grupo JCA. Ao longo dos últimos dois anos, percorreu quase 80 milhões de quilômetros de estrada para transportar de mais de 10 milhões de passageiros entre as 129 cidades em que opera as regiões Sul e Sudeste do país, totalizando mais de 369 mil viagens realizadas. Sempre focada em oferecer aos clientes a melhor experiência em viagens, a companhia possui uma frota composta por ônibus modernos, com avançados sistemas de segurança, Wi-Fi a bordo, além de tecnologias como venda de passagens via site e embarque com uso de bilhete de passagem eletrônico (BPE). Inovações que, além de prática para os usuários, carregam um legado sustentável.

Name: wawa
Description:
Wawa is a collective mobility experience in a technological platform that works through an APP, and from where people and companies have access to mobility circuits that cover the areas and locations with the highest circulation in cities, relieving vehicle fleets and improving the quality of life of citizens.

This analysis of the transportation needs that exist in the cities where we operate, allows us to offer shared transfers in our own units and those of partners, which optimize the way in which people carry out their daily transfers, thus creating a balance between demand and supply.

This change in the paradigm in the way in which the pains of collective mobility are solved has allowed LaWaWa rapid growth within the Caribbean region of Latin America, currently having a presence in 6 cities in Venezuela, Guatemala and Colombia, serving more than 90,000 users between its B2C and B2B solutions.


Wawa es una experiencia de movilidad colectiva basada en una plataforma tecnológica que funciona a través de una aplicación, desde la cual personas y empresas pueden acceder a circuitos de movilidad que cubren las zonas y ubicaciones de mayor afluencia en las ciudades, aliviando las flotas vehiculares y mejorando la calidad de vida de los ciudadanos.

Este análisis de las necesidades de transporte existentes en las ciudades donde operamos nos permite ofrecer traslados compartidos en unidades propias y de aliados, optimizando la forma en que las personas realizan sus desplazamientos diarios y creando así un equilibrio entre la demanda y la oferta.

El cambio de paradigma en la manera de resolver los desafíos de la movilidad colectiva ha permitido a LaWawa un rápido crecimiento dentro de la región del Caribe latinoamericano, contando actualmente con presencia en seis ciudades de Venezuela, Guatemala y Colombia, y atendiendo a más de 90.000 usuarios entre sus soluciones B2C y B2B.

Name: Southeastern Pennsylvania Transportation Authority (SEPTA)
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of the Southeastern Pennsylvania Transportation Authority (SEPTA). 

SEPTA is the nation’s sixth largest transit system, with a vast network of fixed route services including bus, subway, trolley, trackless trolley, and Regional Rail, as well as ADA paratransit and Shared Ride programs. This network provides service in Bucks, Chester, Delaware, Montgomery and Philadelphia Counties with connections into New Jersey and Delaware. SEPTA is also one of the region’s largest employers, with a workforce of approximately 9,500 employees. 

Our mission is to be a customer-driven organization focused on delivering the best in convenience, cleanliness, courtesy, and communications.

Name: Guanabara
Description:
Em agosto de 1992 nasceu a Expresso Guanabara. Com sede em Fortaleza e com atuação de Norte a Sul, a empresa interliga as principais capitais e cidades do país, chegando a mais de 2000 opções de destinos para seus passageiros. 

A busca pela excelência técnica, o elevado grau de comprometimento com seus funcionários e a qualidade dos serviços oferecidos aos clientes renderam à Guanabara o título de melhor empresa de ônibus do Brasil em 2022, no Prêmio
Maiores & Melhores do Transporte.

Em 2023, a Guanabara deu um grande passo rumo à expansão da operação pelo país. As empresas do setor rodoviário Real Expresso, Rápido Federal, UTIL, Viação Sampaio e Brisa
passaram a adotar uma única identidade corporativa e hoje também fazem parte da marca GUANABARA.

Com diversas categorias de serviço de alta qualidade, foram adquiridos 140 novos ônibus e a operação hoje, em sua maioria, é feita nos modernos Double Deckers. São mais de 400 veículos de última geração, sintonizados com tecnologias de ponta em mecânica, design e conforto. Além do e-commerce e aplicativo, a empresa possui um time responsável pela jornada do cliente no WhatsApp e nas mais de 2500 agências disponíveis. 

A marca GUANABARA também conta com um programa de fidelidade com lojas parceiras; além de possuir um forte compromisso social e ambiental a partir de diversos projetos de
sustentabilidade, como o Gerenciamento de Resíduos Sólidos e muito mais.

Name: MV Transportation
Description:
MV Transportation is a leading transit services provider in the United States, partnering with over 100 transit agencies and municipalities, schools and corporations nationwide.

With nearly 50 years of experience, we empower millions of Americans with seamless transit options every day and as a family-owned company, we foster a strong sense of community with our employees, clients and passengers.

Our commitment to delivering unparalleled service means we provide comprehensive support to our customers, addressing their needs with innovative solutions and transparent communication.

Additionally, we prioritize investing in our 10,000 employees, ensuring extensive training and development at all levels, keeping safety at the forefront of everything we do.

Name: Grupo Comporte
Description:
A Comporte Participações S.A. iniciou suas atividades em 10 de junho de 2002, tendo como finalidade unificar a gestão das empresas que participa ou controla, além de maximizar e consolidar os benefícios decorrentes dessa unificação. 

Atua como uma companhia de capital fechado, participando como sócia ou acionista em empresas que atuam em diversos segmentos de mercado, destacando-se principalmente: 

I - Transporte Rodoviário de Passageiros e Cargas;

II - Empreendimentos Imobiliários.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: vybe cabs
Description: vybe cabs is an innovative urban mobility startup on a mission to redefine transportation in India. With a focus on safety, community engagement, and cutting-edge technology, we aim to revolutionize urban mobility. Our platform prioritizes the well-being of both drivers and passengers, offering unique features such as women-only rides and real-time safety alerts. We are dedicated to providing reliable, secure, and personalized transportation solutions that not only meet customer needs but also contribute to community well-being.

Name: Avanza
Description:
Grupo Avanza es el operador nº 1 en la explotación de infraestructuras de servicios de transporte público urbano por carretera en España, interurbanos de corto/medio recorrido del Área Metropolitana de Madrid y en la gestión de estaciones de autobuses a nivel nacional.
El grueso de nuestra actividad se enmarca en el  transporte de viajeros en autobús, en sus ámbitos urbano, metropolitano, regional y de larga distancia, si bien también estamos presentes en negocios complementarios, tales como tranvía, gestión de estaciones de  autobuses, áreas de servicio o sistemas informáticos de comercialización de billetes.
Nuestra compañía tiene una vocación claramente expansiva, con foco en los segmentos de movilidad (fundamentalmente uransporte urbano e interurbano de corto/medio recorrido). En los últimos años, hemos experimentado un fuerte crecimiento, articulado tanto a través de la compra de nuevas empresas de transporte de viajeros por carretera, como a través de la licitación en distintos concursos públicos, que nos han permitido obtener contratos muy importantes.
Nuestro Grupo tiene asumido un fuerte compromiso con el desarrollo sostenible, y nuestra apuesta en este  entido es doble: Primero, a través de una búsqueda continua de la excelencia en las soluciones de movilidad y transporte y en segundo lugar, a través de la incorporación de medios y procedimientos comprometidos con el medio ambiente.

Name: Irizar S., Coop.
Description:
Irizar is the parent company of a leading business group in the bus and coach sector and a benchmark in the sectors of electronics, communications (ITS solutions) and rotating machinery.

With over 3,300 employees, the Irizar Group operates through five coach and bus production plants (Spain, Morocco, Brazil, Mexico and South Africa) and five other companies involved in different sectors in Spain, as a result of its industrial diversification policy. It also has its own R&D Centre with a long-term focus on the applied research process and the technological development of proprietary products and systems.

The group’s headquarters are located in the town of Ormaiztegi in Gipuzkoa (Spain), where Creatio, the Irizar Group Research and Development Centre, is also located.

With a turnover exceeding 620 million euros a year, our group enjoys a commercial presence in over 90 countries on five continents.

Name: Saudi Alqaid Company
Description:
Saudi Alqaid Company for Transport was established with the goal of enhancing transport services across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Our mission is to provide diverse and superior transportation options, elevate service quality, and promote competitiveness within the industry. We achieve this by offering a modern fleet of vehicles, backed by a highly skilled team dedicated to improving customer satisfaction and service standards.
Our Fleet and Services: We take pride in owning a luxurious fleet of buses and cars, each manufactured with special specifications and high-quality standards. These vehicles are equipped with advanced technological features to ensure safe, comfortable, and luxurious travel. Additionally, we offer customized buses tailored to the needs of individuals with special requirements, ensuring every journey is both comfortable and accessible.
Our Commitment to People: At Saudi Alqaid, we invest heavily in our human resources, providing continuous training and development to our teams. This focus on professional growth allows us to offer exceptional service to our clients and maintain the highest standards in the transport sector.

Our Vision:
To be the leader in the land transport industry in Saudi Arabia.

Our Mission:
To provide distinguished transportation services that emphasize luxury, safety, and an exceptional experience for all passengers.

Our Values:
•	Commitment to quality and high standards
•	Credibility and transparency
•	Continuous development and innovation
•	Collaboration and team spirit
•	Societal responsibility

Our Services:
1.	Transport services for pilgrims, Umrah performers, and visitors to the Holy Mosque.
2.	Employee and worker transportation to and from work sites.
3.	Transportation for sports teams and players.
4.	Transport for conference and festival organizers and officials.
5.	Local and international trucking and logistics services.
6.	Organizing trips and providing tourist transport services.

Name: Grupo Guanabara
Description:
Somos um Grupo com mais de 30 empresas determinadas a promover o desenvolvimento do país. 

Para isso, reunimos empresas de transporte de passageiros, um banco múltiplo; concessionárias de veículos comerciais Mercedes Benz; empresas de solução em tecnologia e desenvolvimento de software, além de atuação no mercado imobiliário.

São mais de 60 anos no mercado e mais de 8 mil colaboradores em todo o Brasil.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Irizar e-mobility
Description:
Irizar e-mobility offers comprehensive electromobility solutions for cities, both in terms of manufacturing zero emissions 100% electric vehicles, and in terms of manufacturing and installing the major infrastructure systems necessary for charging, traction, and energy storage, all with the application of the Group’s completely European technology and with Irizar’s warranty and service quality.

Our product range includes 10.8m and 12m city buses, which have been operating since 2014 in various European cities, 15m buses, articulated buses, and other electric vehicles to service cities, as the Irizar ie truck, all zero-emission.

The Irizar Group aims to promote the use of efficient, clean and accessible transport which is committed to the environment and the well-being and health of people and which enables the creation of better urban environments. Particular emphasis is placed on reducing noise pollution, obtaining low consumption which reduces costs and developing zero-emission vehicles. All these objectives serve to highlight the meaning of our motto, “for a better
life”.

Name: EBEC S/A
Description:
Desde 2023, Let’s e Ebec uniram forças, e essa sinergia oferece aos clientes o que há de melhor dos dois mundos: o portfólio ampliado de serviços da Let's Terceirização de Frota e a expertise da EBEC em customização de veículos 4x4. 

Essa união nos permitiu ampliar a atuação no setor de Gestão e Terceirização de Frotas, agregando experiência e novos segmentos de mercado. 

Chegou a hora de unificar a atuação dos dois negócios sob uma só marca. 
Seguimos agora Todos Let's. 

Leia na integra o comunicado oficial do Diretor de Negócios, Leonardo Ballestrassi e entenda sobre as mudanças: https://lets.com.br/blog/agora-somos-todos-lets/ 

Conheça mais sobre a Let’s acessando o site: https://lets.com.br/ 
Acompanhe também o linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/company/lets-frotas/

Name: Sarawak Metro Sdn Bhd
Description: Sarawak Metro Sdn Bhd (Company No. 201801007738) is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Sarawak Economic Development Corporation (SEDC). Sarawak Metro is the implementer, operator, and maintainer of the Kuching Urban Transport System (KUTS) - the Autonomous Rapid Transit (ART) project being built in Kuching the capital of Sarawak, Malaysia.

Name: Viação Garcia
Description:
A Viação Garcia nasceu em 1934, simultaneamente com o município de Londrina, e cresceu no ritmo acelerado que impulsionou o desenvolvimento do Norte do Paraná, transportando pioneiros, imigrantes, colonizadores, trabalhadores e empreendedores. Com orgulho de fazer parte da história de Londrina, a Viação Garcia comemora seu aniversário juntamente com o do município, no dia 10 de dezembro. Em 2022, chegou aos seus 88 anos de história com destaque entre as maiores empresas do setor no País.
Transições administrativas marcaram as últimas duas décadas da empresa, que foi negociada em 2010 por seus fundadores e, em 2014, vendida pelos novos proprietários aos atuais donos e fundadores da Brasil Sul, os empresários José Boiko e Estefano Boiko Junior. Desde então, a empresa tem dado saltos - com destaque especial para a renovação da frota e padrão de excelência crescente no atendimento aos clientes.
A Viação Garcia compõe o Grupo GBS - formado também pela Brasil Sul, Princesa do Ivaí e Londrisul - e tem como atividade principal o transporte rodoviário intermunicipal e interestadual de passageiros. O Grupo transporta em média 21 milhões de passageiros ao ano em Estados do Sul, Sudeste e Centro-Oeste do País.
São mais de dois colaboradores atuando em 370 pontos para venda de passagens, além das rodoviárias. A estrutura de atendimento ao cliente e de manutenção dos ônibus está presente em 23 filiais. A empresa possui operações também nos segmentos de fretamento para indústrias, turismo, transporte de encomendas rápidas e transporte urbano e metropolitano de passageiros.
A frota moderna conta cerca de 800 ônibus, ligando os estados do Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina, Paraná, São Paulo, Mato Grosso do Sul, Minas Gerais e Rio de Janeiro. A excelência no transporte de passageiros caminha junto com a Viação Garcia desde sua fundação, bem como o reconhecimento por investimentos em novas tecnologias que oferecem mais conforto, comodidade e facilidades aos clientes.

Name: First Bus
Description:
Hello there, we’re First Bus.

We’re one of the UK’s biggest bus operators trusted by millions to do more than just get people from A to B. For us, travel is about those everyday moments that bring people together and create new experiences. We call it ‘Moving the Everyday’ because that’s what we’re here to do.

At First Bus, we focus on what matters most. Our people. We were the first in the sector to achieve real Living Wage employer status because we believe when we take care of our team, they’re in the best position to take care of others.

Sustainability matters to us. We’re on track for a fully zero-emission fleet by 2035 with over 800 zero-emission buses already on the road. In partnership with local authorities, we're working to improve air quality, reduce congestion and make travel easier for everyone.

We’re always looking for ways to improve the experience for those who rely on us. With innovations like Tap On, Tap Off payments, we’re making travel more convenient and secure. We’re not just about transport, we’re about making a difference to the community, the environment and the future of how we travel.

In the UK, we also operate First Bus London, Specialist Passenger Solutions, First Travel Solutions, York Pullman Bus Company and Ensignbus. Beyond the UK, we have Aircoach in Ireland.

We’re always listening, inspired by the people we serve and the moments we’re part of. Together, you’re helping shape what’s next for us.

As part of FirstGroup, we’re connected to something bigger. Our experience and focus on doing the right thing help us keep moving forward with purpose.

Name: Metroselskabet
Description:
Every week, more than 2 million passengers use the Copenhagen Metro, and the number is increasing day by day. Copenhagen currently has four metro lines. An extension of the M4 line northbound is under way, and we are planning a possible new fifth metro line to open in 2035. 
In addition, we are well underway with the construction of the capital's new light rail between Lyngby and Ishøj. The construction of both the current and future lines are projects of an international scale. 
As an employee, you become part of a professional community with complex tasks, skilled colleagues and managers who create a good framework for innovative tasks. We work together and develop through large projects that are characterized by high demands for quality, innovation, and operational stability. You gain more influence and get to contribute from day one when you offer new ideas, suggestions, and solutions. 
We are an international team with different tasks, backgrounds, and life situations. That is why we work together to ensure individual frameworks that suit your task, who you are and where you are in life. None of us are the same, and you must be able to be yourself, also when you are at work. 
The Copenhagen Metro is owned by Copenhagen Municipality, Frederiksberg Municipality and the State, while the The Greater Copenhagen Light Rail is owned by 11 surrounding municipalities and the Capital Region. Read more about The Copenhagen Metro at m.dk

Name: First Transit
Description:
First Transit was acquired in 2023 and is now Transdev.
www.transdevNA.com
Find us on LinkedIn at https://www.linkedin.com/company/transdev-north-america

Name: VR Group
Description:
At VR, we promote responsible transport of the future with our solid experience gained from 160 years of operations. We are a modern passenger, logistics and maintenance service company owned by the Finnish state.

We ensure smooth daily travel in Finland and Sweden and act as a pillar of support for industry in Finland’s logistics. In 2024, our customers made a total of 15.3 million journeys on long-distance trains with us in Finland, and we transported 23.2 million tonnes of goods by rail.

While keeping society moving, we are also promoting well-being. By increasing the popularity of electric rail and city traffic, we are paving the way for a carbon-neutral tomorrow.

In 2024, our net sales were EUR 1,294.7 million and we employed over 8,400 top professionals. Would you like to be one of us?

Name: Vectalia
Description:
Movilidad inteligente |  Servicios auxiliares |  Más de 100 años innovando

En Vectalia, llevamos más de un siglo conectando personas y ofreciendo soluciones de movilidad y servicios auxiliares. Nuestra historia, que comenzó con el transporte de viajeros, ha evolucionado para convertirnos en un referente en movilidad y facility services.

 Lo que hacemos:
 Movilidad de personas: Transporte urbano, interurbano y discrecional. También gestionamos parkings, grúa y ORA. 
 Facility Services: Soluciones en limpieza, azafatas para eventos, seguridad y más.

Con sede en la Comunidad Valenciana y una fuerte presencia en España y Francia y Marruecos, Vectalia se posiciona entre los cinco principales grupos del sector. Apostamos por la innovación y el crecimiento sostenible, adaptándonos a los nuevos desafíos de la movilidad.

 En un mundo en constante cambio, ofrecemos soluciones modernas y eficientes para responder a las necesidades del transporte y los servicios auxiliares del futuro.

Name: Metropolitano de Lisboa
Description:
Página oficial do Metropolitano de Lisboa | Pedidos de informação, sugestões ou reclamações envie e-mail para atendimento@metrolisboa.pt.

Propósito
Ser o eixo central da mobilidade na Área Metropolitana de Lisboa.

Âmbito
Prestar um Serviço de transporte público de passageiros no modo metropolitano ou noutros sistemas de mobilidade em canal dedicado, onde se insere a gestão global da infraestrutura nomeadamente a conceção, a promoção da construção e a exploração, incluindo a exploração de espaços comerciais, orientado para o cliente, em regime de concessão atribuída pelo Estado promovendo a mobilidade sustentável e visando a melhoria da qualidade de vida das gerações atuais e futuras.

Princípios de gestão
• As decisões gestionárias tomadas pelo Metropolitano de Lisboa refletem os seguintes princípios de gestão:
• O superior interesse dos nossos clientes.
• As expetativas das diferentes partes interessadas construindo relações duradouras de confiança com os nossos colaboradores, clientes, parceiros e comunidades.
• O desenvolvimento do negócio de forma socialmente responsável e sustentável articulando-se de forma estreita e concertada com os restantes operadores de transporte público.
• A promoção do transporte público e da mobilidade sustentável.
• O rigor, a transparência e o comportamento ético.
• A qualidade e segurança na prestação do serviço com recurso a soluções inovadoras, eficientes e criando valor nas áreas em que atuamos.

Name: TUM Hyperloop
Description:
TUM Hyperloop is an advanced research program based in Munich’s Isar Valley that develops the technology to make convenient and sustainable ultra-high-speed transportation a reality. Currently, our team is designing and building Europe’s first passenger-size hyperloop demonstrator – a 24-meter-long test segment to evaluate and prove the working principle of all key technologies needed for making the system market-ready.

The program grew out of a student initiative, founded to develop and build prototypes in order to compete in the SpaceX Hyperloop Pod Competitions. Our team developed the winning pods for all 4 competitions and currently holds the world record with an impressive top-speed of 482 km/h.

Name: Kinetic
Description:
Established over 45 years ago, Kinetic has grown to become the largest bus operator in Australia and New Zealand, and a global, multi-modal transport network with operations that span across the UK, Europe and Singapore.

We began in 1978 with Melbourne’s Skybus – a cost efficient, reliable airport transfer service. Today, we manage a global network of bus and rail services, with a team of 36,000 dedicated people and 11,000 buses seamlessly moving over 100 million passengers every year.

We’re the trusted operator of urban, regional, school and charter bus services across Australia and New Zealand. We operate 40 per cent of buses in Queensland, a third of Melbourne’s bus network, and almost half of bus services in Tasmania. In NZ, we’re proud to partner with councils in Auckland, Christchurch, Wellington and Tauranga. 

Our expertise spans continents, operating in five countries across Europe. In the UK, we run the Go Ahead network – alongside joint venture partner Globalvia – which includes the Govia Thameslink rail link, the largest and most complex rail system in the country. 

We believe in improving the communities in which we live and operate, and making a positive impact on people’s lives. 

We’re removing the diesel buses that emit millions of tons of greenhouse gases every year. We’re putting women up front. And we believe in LGBTQI+ inclusion and the freedom to be your true self.

Governments, airports, businesses, schools and councils count on us every day. You too, can count on Kinetic.

Name: Vecttor
Description:
Un trabajo seguro. Un equipo comprometido. Una empresa que responde.

Así es Vecttor. Estamos en Madrid, Barcelona, Sevilla, Málaga y Valencia.

Más de 4.000 conductores ya lo viven. ¿Te sumas?

Name: PT Railink (KAI Bandara)
Description:
PT Railink merupakan anak perusahaan dari PT Kereta Api Indonesia dan PT Angkasa Pura II yang menghadirkan sebuah layanan transportasi publik berbasis “railway” bernama Kereta Api Bandara.

Semenjak merajut tekad pada 28 September 2006, PT Railink berhasil mengoperasikan KA Bandara Kualanamu sebagai KA Bandara pertama di Indonesia pada 25 Juli 2013. Kehadirannya telah mendongkrak rating Bandara Kualanamu di mata Internasional berupa Sertifikasi Bintang 4 berdasarkan penilaian lembaga rating Skytrack pada 2014. Setelah 3 tahun KA Bandara Kualanamu bertumbuh, PT Railink siap menghadirkan KA Bandara baru di Ibu Kota Negara yaitu KA Bandara Soekarno-Hatta (BSH).

KA Bandara Soekarno-Hatta akan melayani rute Manggarai sampai dengan Bandara Soekarno-Hatta sepanjang 36,3 km dengan melewati Stasiun Sudirman Baru, Stasiun Duri, Stasiun Bekasi dan Stasiun Batuceper. Sebanyak 70 jadwal keberangkatan setiap hari dengan headway 30 menit sekali, jam operasi yang terus diperbaharui dengan perubahan jadwal penerbangan, serta kapasitas angkut 33.728 penumpang per hari.

Name: Deutsche Bahn Connect GmbH
Description:
Nachhaltig und klimaschonend - die Deutsche Bahn Connect GmbH entwickelt für Privat- und Geschäftskunden Mobilitätskonzepte, die sie an ihr Ziel bringen. Auch für Städte und Kommunen haben wir individuelle Mobilitätslösungen parat. Dabei greifen wir auf fast 30 Jahre Erfahrung zurück. Wir freuen uns auf den Austausch mit Ihnen!


Impressum
Dies ist eine Seite der Deutsche Bahn Connect GmbH. 

Deutsche Bahn Connect GmbH 
Mainzer Landstraße 169
60327 Frankfurt am Main

HRB 41769

Name: Metropolitan Transit Authority of Harris County
Description:
The Metropolitan Transit Authority of Harris County (METRO) connects one of the fastest-growing regions in the United States. We move people to jobs, health care, education, recreation, and more through safe, clean, reliable, and accessible transportation services.

METRO operates a multimodal system that includes bus, light rail, paratransit, vanpool, and on-demand microtransit across Houston and much of Harris County. Each year, millions of rides link residents, commuters, and visitors to the region’s major employment centers, neighborhoods, and destinations.

Beyond daily service, METRO is a vital partner in welcoming visitors, supporting public safety, and providing mobility during natural disasters.

Communities served include Houston, Bellaire, Bunker Hill Village, El Lago, Hedwig Village, Hilshire Village, Humble, Hunters Creek, Katy, Missouri City, Piney Point, Southside Place, Spring Valley, Taylor Lake Village, West University Place, and large portions of unincorporated Harris County.

Interested in building Houston’s future with us? Explore careers at METRO and join a team committed to moving communities forward every day.

Name: Movil Bus
Description:
Somos una empresa peruana dedicada al transporte con 37 años en el mercado.
Hoy contamos con 5 líneas de negocio: transporte interprovincial, transporte turístico, transporte de personal, de carga y transporte aéreo.

Name: ZUKUNFT NAHVERKEHR
Description:
Ob auf dem Weg zur Arbeit, in die Uni, zum Einkaufen oder zum Treffen mit Bekannten - Menschen wollen und müssen mobil sein, denn Mobilität ist ein Grundbedürfnis!

Wie diese Mobilität gestaltet wird, daran können wir aktiv teilhaben. Die Brancheninitiative ZUKUNFT NAHVERKEHR versteht sich als Plattform für alle, die diese Mobilität der Zukunft sowie den ÖPNV der Zukunft gemeinsam mit uns gestalten wollen und werden. 

Egal ob für Branche, Politik oder Fahrgäste: ZUKUNFT NAHVERKEHR bietet Platz für Austausch, Erleben, Diskussionen und Ideen. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam die Zukunft der Mobilität gestalten!

Name: Rego
Description:
Rego is a leading corporate mobility company in India with a fleet of over 4,117 cabs, 4,240 chauffeurs, and 295+ clients across PAN India. Since 2004, we have grown rapidly by integrating people, processes, and technology, earning an ISO 9001:2015 certification for high-quality service over 20+ years.

Rego offers comprehensive car rental services, including corporate mobility solutions, airport transfers, long-term and luxury car rentals, M.I.C.E transport services, and employee transportation. Our fleet ranges from economy sedans to luxury cars and coaches. We prioritize client satisfaction and chauffeur well-being, with 67% of chauffeurs and 81% of clients staying with us for over a decade.

Committed to sustainability, Rego is expanding its fleet with electric and CNG cars, aiming for a 100% green fleet by 2030. Recognized as one of the '10 Best Transport Aggregators in India,' we use advanced telematics and our Corporate Mobility Automation System (CMAS) to ensure secure, seamless trips. We strive to deliver an exceptional travel experience with each journey.

Name: Academy Bus
Description:
Academy Bus, the largest privately owned and operated transportation company in the US, has been serving the East Coast for over 50 years.  Known industry-wide for our customer service and well-maintained, late-model equipment, we have set standards for ground transportation from Boston to Miami.

Whether you need to transport 20 or 20,000 our diverse fleet of 1100 buses can deliver.  From sightseeing tours to conventions, corporate transfers, sports teams, parades, major sporting events and private charters, Academy has the wheels and wherewithal to ensure the smoothest ride on the road.  Academy Bus, We Know the Way.

Name: Transmimo
Description: Promovemos o uso do transporte profissional de pessoas e do transporte de cargas.

Name: Whirlpool
Description:
Focused on finding both, the most efficient approach but also the best overall solution. 
Self-discipline, resilience and perseverance are the keys to my proven success... it is a passion of mine to inspire and motivate people. 
 
Specialties: "hands-on" mentality, int'l Network within the field of Industrial Automation, build up strong long term relationships, continuous process improvements, cost containment and reductions

Ask me about:
- emerging trends within the factory automation and IIoT world
- Automotive Industry, E-Mobility, sustainability
- solutions for industrial automation (Vision (3-D and 2-D), Navigation, RIFD, industrial Networks, sensors and safety)
- cost reduction in production processes (continuous improvement process)

Name: Roslin
Description:
We are a specialized provider of call center services for the transportation industry. We support transportation operations through professional customer service, dispatch coordination, and operational assistance.

Built by professionals
Our services are shaped in close collaboration with transportation providers operating in the New York metropolitan area, one of the busiest transportation hubs in the United States.

Based on experience
Our approach is driven by hands-on industry experience and continuous feedback from fleets, corporate clients, public-sector partners, and passengers, ensuring reliable and practical operational support.

Name: McGill's Bus Group
Description:
McGill’s Bus Group is the UK’s largest independently owned bus company, proudly family-owned since 1933. With more than 1,800 employees and depots in 10 locations, we operate a diverse network of services across Scotland’s Central Belt, Dundee, Aberdeen, and Inverness under McGill’s, Midland Bluebird and Xplore Dundee brands.
 Our operations include city and rural bus services, intercity coach travel, including strategic partnership routes with global operator FlixBus, open-top city tours, day trips, and private hire services that operate as far as London. In 2025, we partnered with sightseeing brand Big Bus Tours, making Edinburgh the 28th city in their international portfolio. 
As a business, we are committed to delivering high-quality, customer-focused transport while driving innovation in the industry. With over 150 zero-emission electric buses in our growing fleet, we are playing a key role in Scotland’s transition to greener public transport.
Following significant expansion in recent years, including the acquisitions of Xplore Dundee in 2020 and First Scotland East in 2022, McGill’s has trebled in size and continues to invest heavily in people, technology, and sustainability. Our in-house training academies in Johnstone, Dundee, and Falkirk are central to our commitment to staff development.
We are proud to be a multi award-winning company, recognised for excellence in customer service, innovation, and environmental responsibility.

Name: Buses JM
Description: En Buses JM, llevamos más de 70 años liderando el transporte de pasajeros con un fuerte compromiso con la seguridad, la innovación y la eficiencia. Poseemos la electrolinera más grande de la segunda región, apostamos por la electromovilidad y las tecnologías sostenibles para garantizar operaciones seguras y responsables en la industria minera y el transporte interurbano. Nuestro enfoque en la excelencia operativa y el bienestar de nuestros conductores y pasajeros nos posiciona como referentes en el sector.

Name: Place Des Mobilités
Description:
« Place des Mobilités, la ruralité en mouvement ! » est une Communauté d’intérêt dédiée aux mobilités rurales, réunissant des acteurs engagés pour développer des solutions innovantes adaptées aux besoins des territoires ruraux.

La mobilité, souvent perçue comme un droit, est en réalité essentielle pour s'impliquer pleinement dans la société. Elle facilite l'accès à l'éducation, l'emploi, la santé, la vie sociale, culturelle ou politique. De nombreuses initiatives voient le jour en France, mais manquent parfois de cohérence.

 Notre ambition : Développer et animer une communauté d'acteurs engagés pour inventer et se réinventer ensemble au service des zones rurales. « Place des Mobilités, la ruralité en mouvement ! » vise à identifier et déployer rapidement des idées et concepts pour répondre aux défis du changement climatique, économiques et sociaux et préparer l'avenir.

# mobilité rurale, solutions de mobilité, territoires ruraux, innovation, acteurs engagés, développement durable, changement climatique, économie, société, initiatives locales, réseau de transport

« Place des mobilités, la ruralité en mouvement ! » est une initiative de l’accélérateur @SNCF Tech4Mobility

Name: autolinee toscane
Description:
Dal 1° novembre 2021 gestiamo il trasporto pubblico locale su gomma della Regione Toscana.

Ci occupiamo dell’integrazione, del monitoraggio e della gestione di oltre 950 linee, distribuite su 24 mila km di rete e percorse da 2.600 autobus che nei loro tragitti passano per un totale di 37 mila fermate.

La nostra squadra è composta da oltre 5mila dipendenti che, con professionalità e esperienza, ogni giorno mettono in moto la Toscana.

Ci impegniamo quotidianamente per migliorare il servizio e offrire una mobilità moderna e efficiente. L’obiettivo è creare un modo nuovo di muoversi in Toscana.

Name: Viação Catedral
Description:
A Catedral Turismo (Atualmente Viação Catedral) é hoje uma das mais respeitadas empresas no segmento de transporte rodoviário de passageiros com linhas regulares Interestaduais atuando fortemente em 12 Estados Brasileiros (São Paulo, Minas Gerais, Goiás, Tocantins, Bahia, Piauí, Ceará, Rio Grande do Norte, Paraíba, Pernambuco, Alagoas, Sergipe) mais o Distrito Federal, além de atuar com turismo e fretamento.⠀
⠀
Naquela época, a empresa chegou a usar Kombis e até caminhões para o transporte das mercadorias dos feirantes. Logo em seguida comprando os primeiros ônibus usados. Começamos com um. Depois veio outro, e mais outro, e assim foi, Brasil e América do Sul. A empresa cresceu e se profissionalizou. Hoje inclui também carros executivos, vans, micro-ônibus e ônibus de diversos portes e configurações.⠀
⠀
Administração moderna e toda informatizada, manutenção rigorosa da frota e motoristas qualificados são os pontos fortes da Viação Catedral, sempre investindo em capacitação de pessoal e em tecnologias mais modernas. A Viação Catedral faz parte da Associação Nacional das Empresas de Transporte Rodoviário de Passageiros (ANATRIP), com sede em Brasília-DF. Site: www.anatrip.org.br⠀

Name: MTM Transit
Description: MTM Transit offers viable solutions that help public transit agencies connect their community's transportation options: fixed route, ADA paratransit, shuttle service, student and special needs transportation, quality assurance, and transit technology.

Name: Optimum Chauffeurs Tourism
Description:
Optimum is a Dubai based chauffeur service company providing its services worldwide. Be it your participation in an event, corporate meeting or simply a pickup or drop off, you can entrust our drivers to ensure your journey is of optimal quality, keeping your safety and comfort in mind. 

Follow us on Instagram & Facebook: @OptimumDXB

Name: Transports Publics du Chablais SA
Description: Les Transports Publics du Chablais (TPC) emploient plus de 400 collaborateurs-trices sur plusieurs sites dans le Chablais. L'entreprise gère quatre lignes de chemin de fer régionales, ainsi qu'un réseau performant de bus.

Name: Movelia
Description:
Movelia nace en el año 2001 como la primera central de compra de billetes de autobús por Internet, con el respaldo del Ministerio de Ciencia y Tecnología, del Ministerio de Fomento, así como de las principales compañías de transporte de viajeros por carretera. 

Comercializamos líneas de transporte regular de 23 operadores que representan a más de 70 empresas, lo que nos permite ofrecer más de 55.000 combinaciones posibles de trayectos, a través de diferentes canales: web (B2C y B2B), App, taquillas y máquinas autoventa. 

Como distribuidores de billetes de autocar, colaboramos con las agencias de viajes ofreciendo un servicio integral que abarca desde la distribución, al cobro y liquidación. Actualmente presentes en más de 8.000 agencias de viajes.

Movelia sigue creciendo día a día con el fin de mejorar el servicio prestado, convirtiéndose en una importante herramienta para el sector y un nexo de unión para los servicios de las diferentes empresas que  están integradas dentro de nuestra plataforma.

Name: ComfortDelGro Australia (CDC)
Description:
Australia’s leading multi-modal company, ComfortDelGro Australia (CDC) is a trusted and longstanding partner of government and business. We proudly move millions of customers every year and are committed to delivering best-in-class transport solutions. With over 5,700 employees, and a fleet of more than 12,000 vehicles, we provide safe and reliable transport services to metropolitan and regional communities across New South Wales, Victoria, the Northern Territory, Queensland, the Australian Capital Territory, Western Australia and South Australia.

With every journey, we are linking people to places and building communities. Since 2005, CDC has grown steadily to be one of Australia’s largest bus operators, as well as the leading personal transport provider through its taxi and non-emergency patient transport businesses. With the demands on public transport constantly evolving, CDC puts innovation in motion. It is all about providing transport solutions that optimise safety, sustainability, efficiency and effectiveness.

Our parent company ComfortDelGro, which is headquartered in Singapore, also operates in the United Kingdom, New Zealand, China, Ireland, France, Malaysia, Spain, Portugal, Greece and the Netherlands. ComfortDelGro operates a total fleet size of over 40,000 vehicles and 210km of rail network in operation and under development. In addition to buses, taxis, non-emergency patient transport and outdoor advertising, ComfortDelGro Corporation also operates other businesses including rail, automotive engineering services, electric vehicle charging, inspection and testing services, driving centres, car rental and leasing, as well as insurance broking services.

Name: Zukunftsnetzwerk ÖPNV
Description:
Zukunftsnetzwerk ÖPNV - Das Vernetzungsangebot des Landes Baden-Württemberg

„Wir vernetzen und beraten alle Akteure, die den ÖPNV in und um Baden-Württemberg voranbringen wollen.“

Das Zukunftsnetzwerk ÖPNV ist die Informations- und Vernetzungsplattform des Landes Baden-Württemberg für alle Akteurinnen und Akteure des öffentlichen Nahverkehrs, die sowohl den städtischen als auch den ländlichen ÖPNV im Fokus haben. Dabei wird ein enger und praxisrelevanter Informations- und Wissensaustausch zu allen relevanten Fragestellungen des ÖPNV in Baden-Württemberg bereitgestellt.

Mit dem Ziel landesweite Standards sowie einen verlässlichen Nah- und Regionalverkehr zu schaffen, unterstützt das Zukunftsnetzwerk ÖPNV des Ministeriums für Verkehr Baden-Württemberg mit Beratungs- und Informationsangeboten, beim Wissenstransfer, der Fördermittelsuche sowie der Erarbeitung einheitlicher Standards. Die Geschäftsstelle des Zukunftsnetzwerkes ÖPNV ist bei der Nahverkehrsgesellschaft Baden-Württemberg (NVBW) angesiedelt. Das Team des Kompetenznetzes ÖPNV ist Ansprechpartner auf Landesebene für Fragen zum Zukunftsnetzwerk ÖPNV sowie zu Regiobuslinien, On-Demand-Verkehren, neuen Angebotsformen und Gemeinschaftsverkehren. Interessenten, Kommunale Aufgabenträger oder Gruppen, Gemeinden, Verkehrsverbünde, Verkehrsunternehmen oder auch Vereine erhalten kostenfreie Unterstützung.

Impressum: https://www.zukunftsnetzwerk-oepnv.de/impressum

Datenschutz: https://www.zukunftsnetzwerk-oepnv.de/datenschutzerklaerung

Name: Cruz del Sur | CDS Minas
Description: Cruz del Sur | CDS Empresas brinda un servicio diferenciado de traslado de personal para el sector minero e industrial enfocado en la seguridad y comodidad del pasajero. Para garantizar la calidad del servicio, nos basamos en nuestros pilares, siendo estos la seguridad a través de la identificación de riesgos y sistema de gestión en seguridad vial ISO 39001, la innovación en tecnología dentro nuestras operaciones mediante monitoreo y control 24/7 y la expertise de nuestros conductores altamente capacitados.

Name: Empresa de Transportes Andorinha SA
Description: A Andorinha emprega mais de 1200 funcionários, contando com 320 agências distribuídas nas cidades atendidas pelas rotas. Para dar suporte a tudo isso, 18 garagens estrategicamente localizadas, que contam com estrutura moderna e profissionais especializados, para garantir a manutenção da frota que hoje conta com centenas de ônibus. Somado a tudo isso, são mais de 3,7 milhões de quilômetros percorridos, com uma média de 220 mil passageiros transportados todos os meses em rotas nacionais e internacionais. Tudo para garantir a cada passageiro a melhor companhia para uma boa viagem.

Name: Velociti Solutions
Description:
We provide innovative digital solutions and specialist consultancy services focussed on operational efficiency, safety and customer service excellence across the bus and rail industry. With deep sector knowledge gained over the past 30 years, we are trusted bytransport authorities,busoperators andrail operators worldwide.

Omnibus software suite
In the bus sector our Omnibus software suite is designed to meet the specific needs of passenger transport operators by leveraging cutting-edge technology and specialist consultancy services. The end-to-end solutions cover operations ‘before the day,’ ‘on the day,’ and ‘after the day,, providing a pathway to enhancing revenue, increasing patronage, and improving overall efficiency for passenger transport operators.

RailSmart software suite
The RailSmart software suite is an integrated set of tools providing rail operators with a platform to improve safety, enhance operational efficiency, and communicate better. The solutions are enhanced by direct integration with rail industry data sources to enrich the contextual information available to customers and colleagues, helping them make more informed decisions that deliver better outcomes. 

Website:  www.velociti-solutions.com
Phone: 03330 431101

Name: Grupo Barraqueiro
Description:
O Grupo Barraqueiro é o maior operador de mobilidade do país, com presença em Portugal, Brasil e Angola, empregando cerca de 9.000 pessoas e tendo mais de 4.500 veículos. 

Com origens em 1915, diversificou-se a partir da década de 80, expandindo-se em diferentes áreas de negócio e modos de transporte, procurando sempre dar respostas eficazes e eficientes às necessidades dos seus clientes. 

O Grupo valoriza a mobilidade pela sua importância estratégica para a sustentabilidade ambiental e energética, para a coesão social e territorial, a competitividade da economia e para a qualidade de vida das populações. Mesmo num tempo disruptivo, acreditamos que será capaz de continuar a ser relevante na construção do futuro, com trabalho, dedicação e confiança.

Name: Go-Ahead Nordic
Description:
Go-Ahead Nordic er en del av Go-Ahead Group, som driver offentlig transport i Storbritannia, Irland, Sverige og Singapore. 
I Norge kjører vi tog fra Oslo i øst og til Stavanger i vest. Her opererer vi trafikken på Sørlandsbanen, Arendalsbanen og Jærbanen. Her består organisasjonen av i overkant 280 medarbeidere med kontorer i Oslo, Stavanger og Kristiansand. 
I Sverige eier Go-Ahead busselskapet Flexbuss AB med omtrent 600 ansatte. 
Vi fokuserer på å levere lokale tjenester og bygge sterke forhold med lokale samarbeidspartnere. Vi er med andre ord lokale, men verdensvante - som del av et internasjonalt konsern med all den erfaringen og ressurser det innebærer.

Realizamos Traslados para empresas desde hace 20 años. Los más exigentes eligen TRASLADA

Name: Smartzi
Description: Smartzi believes in creating a platform based on trust and fairness for both its riders and drivers. Our technology will simplify the world and bring you closer to the people and occasions that matter. We take the hassle out of your day to day transport by making it simple, comfortable and affordable. Smartzi envisions a society where distances decrease and connections thrive.

Name: Chartered Speed
Description:
We are one of India’s leading passenger mobility companies, redefining bus travel with scale, safety, and innovation. With a self-owned fleet of ~2,000 buses (as of June 30, 2025*), we maintain greater control over operations, ensuring consistent service quality and reliability.

For over 15 years, we’ve been connecting people and cities — offering sustainable, affordable, and efficient transportation across six states and 500+ cities, serving nearly 3.5 lakh passengers daily*. Our network includes 650+ pick-up and drop points and 65 branch offices, powered by 4,000+ employees, including 2,480 skilled drivers. Backed by an integrated technology platform, we deliver seamless, efficient, and safe travel experiences.

Our Businesses

Public Transport: Partnering with state and municipal authorities to design and operate large-scale civic mobility systems, including BRT corridors and city-wide fleets.

School Transport: Safe, punctual, and trusted by parents, with trained drivers and real-time tracking.

Staff Transport: Reliable mobility for corporates, industries, and shift-based teams with flexible scheduling and GPS-enabled vehicles.

Intercity Transport: Comfortable, dependable travel across key city routes for both business and leisure.

Shuttle Services: Efficient last-mile, airport, and campus shuttles with customizable schedules.

Our Core Values

Safety First: Passenger and pedestrian safety at the heart of every journey.

Customer Centricity: Delivering exceptional service and hassle-free experiences.

Sustainability: Driving eco-friendly initiatives, including public bike sharing.

Collaboration & Innovation: Embracing teamwork and technology to shape the future of mobility.

We are on a mission to make bus travel in India more reliable, sustainable, and passenger-focused — every journey, every day.

*Source: F&S Report

Name: Velociti Solutions - Rail
Description:
Make. Change. Work.

We understand rail, from the myriad of organisations to its complex rules and regulations. Through the knowledge we have gained throughout our 20+ years in the industry, we have the foresight to create and implement technological solutions that make a positive impact on the day-to-day running of the rail network.

Since our inception, our innovations take the risk out of digital transformation. Streamlining efficiencies, improving sustainability, and reducing costs are our core objectives when developing our in-house propriety technologies, from RailSmart to BulkSmart. 

We collaborate closely with key players from across the rail industry, from Network Rail to HS2, to understand the challenges they are experiencing and how technology can play a key role in overcoming them. At its heart, our solutions enable transformation to nurture the creation of the green digital railway of the future.
 
Find out more about how 3Squared can support your change today.

Name: Keolis Aquitaine
Description:
Keolis Gironde, spécialiste du transport en bus et autocars pour les groupes à Bordeaux, en Gironde, en Dordogne et sur toute la région de la Nouvelle-Aquitaine. Séminaires, congrès, meetings, transferts aéroport ou gare, visites de châteaux dans le Médoc, découverte du Bassin d’Arcachon ou encore circuits…

Nous sommes en mesure d’organiser votre transport en bus sur toute la région Nouvelle-Aquitaine, tout en vous offrant un suivi personnalisé et adapté à vos besoins. Notre équipe trilingue et nos conducteurs professionnels mettront à profit leur expertise et leur expérience afin de garantir la réussite de votre événement. Que vous soyez un Tour Opérateur, une entreprise, une collectivité ou encore un comité d’entreprise, nous sommes là pour vous accompagner.

Name: Grilo Mobilidade e Tecnologia
Description: A Grilo Mobilidade e Tecnologia é uma plataforma especializada no “last mile” cujo o propósito é de reimaginar a mobilidade urbana. A Grilo busca a democratização da mobilidade sustentável e conecta, por meio de aplicativo, passageiros, empresas, mercadorias e marcas a veículos 100% elétricos. Baseada em pilares de sustentabilidade, economia, segurança, diversão e igualdade, oferece um serviço inovador e com respeito ao meio ambiente e à saúde, com foco na redução da poluição sonora e da emissão de CO2 na atmosfera, além da profissionalização e geração de renda para os condutores.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: INDIAN TRAVEL HOUSE
Description:
Indian Travel House is a leading corporate ground mobility solutions provider, delivering safe, reliable, and professionally managed chauffeur-driven transport services across India.

With decades of industry experience, we support organizations with seamless employee transportation, executive travel, airport transfers, events, and long-term mobility contracts.

Why organizations trust Indian Travel House:

Name: RideTandem | B Corp
Description:
RideTandem provides flexible, reliable, tech-enabled shuttle bus services to and from businesses, schools and universities.

Our shuttle bus services run in areas across the UK that are hard to get to. 
Large organisations, such as Next, Lidl and Royal Mail, rely on RideTandem’s shuttle services to transport their staff. 

Passengers book tickets via an app then track their bus as it heads to their stop and scan on board with their QR code ticket. 

Businesses can see who has booked onto each service and track the vehicle in real time. They also get reports to show the amount of carbon emissions they are using.

Name: Rio Ônibus
Description:
Fundado em 10 de outubro de 1941, o sindicato passou por uma transformação em 2010, quando houve a reestruturação do setor de transportes, capitaneada pela Prefeitura Municipal do Rio de Janeiro.
Por meio de concorrência pública, as empresas de ônibus passaram de permissionárias a concessionárias, com direitos e obrigações contratuais bem definidos. A mudança permitiu uma nova atuação das empresas associadas no sistema de transporte da cidade.
A área metropolitana também foi dividida em quatro regiões, que são atendidas por pelos consórcios de empresas: Intersul, Internorte, Transcarioca e Santa Cruz.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: ENBI
Description: EMPRESA NACIONAL DE BILHÉTICA INTEGRADA.

Name: Northwest BUS
Description:
Journey with us into a captivating tale of intercity travel as we unveil the extraordinary world of Northwest Bus. Imagine a realm where your mobility needs are met with unparalleled excellence and a touch of enchantment.
In the vast desert of Saudi Arabia, amidst the shimmering dunes, lies a transportation marvel that defies expectations. Northwest Bus, the crown jewel of intercity travel, emerges as a beacon of reliability, innovation, and extraordinary service. Our story begins with a harmonious partnership, where the threads of Moventia and Qaid intertwine to weave a grand tapestry of interconnected journeys.
Moventia, a European multimodal public transport operator with a century-long legacy, brings its esteemed expertise and passion for excellence to this magical alliance. With roots deeply embedded in the bustling streets of Barcelona, Spain, Moventia's legacy dances gracefully across borders, embracing a world of possibilities. Their unwavering commitment to confidence, innovation, honesty, commitment, and sustainability enriches the story, infusing every chapter with a vibrant and dynamic spirit.
Qaid, the shining star of Saudi Arabia's one of the largest companies for Transportation, illuminates the realm with its legacy of premium services and unwavering dedication. Like a guardian of the pilgrimage routes, Qaid's journey began in the heart of Makkah, radiating its light across the Kingdom. With an emphasis on fleet quality, comfort, and the nurturing of their people, Qaid's commitment to excellence adds a touch of grandeur to our tale.
As Moventia and Qaid intertwine their destinies, the enchantment deepens. Northwest Bus becomes a vessel of transformation, where dreams take flight, and the realm of intercity travel is forever changed. Together, they embody the true essence of collaboration, melding their unique strengths to create a symphony of seamless connectivity and unrivaled service.

Name: Rouxinol
Description:
Empresa especializada em Fretamento (Transporte de Profissional de Colaboradores)

Name: Velociti Solutions - Bus
Description:
For over 30 years, we’ve been committed to helping bus operators and local authorities improve the commercial, financial and operational performance of their organisations.  

We provide market leading software systems that enable customers to manage income, grow revenue, improve profitability and drive up the quality of their services.  

To achieve our mission, we reach out into many parts of the bus operation.

Commercial
o	Understand revenue from all fares and ticket types, analyse route profitability to inform network planning, and understand passenger demand to improve vehicle utilisation.

Finance
o	Maximise BSOG and concessionary reimbursements, improve contract performance and ensure profitability of tendered routes.

Control room
o	Capture incidents, identify lost mileage and schedule adherence, manage disruptions and understand root causes.

Operations
o	Manage responses to incidents and accidents, identify route reliability problems, resolve customer issues, and support staff management processes.

Engineering
o	Manage fuel usage, improve vehicle efficiency & reliability, identify common defects, reduce unplanned maintenance and ensure vehicle compliance.

This gives us a unique perspective to help customers optimise their network, automate processes, reduce accidents, attract and retain passengers, and drive continuous improvement.

We also specialise in BSOG certification, operational audits, and concessionary travel reimbursement.  Our BSOG consultants will maximise claims by uncovering any missing fuel data, checking mileage and ensuring your services claimed are eligible.  Whilst our Concessions experts will ensure you get full reimbursement for concessionary travel on your network.

With expert knowledge, innovative systems and decades of experience; we're here to help our customers drive their businesses forward.

Name: Réunir
Description:
Réunir est le rêve d’entrepreneurs visionnaires de rassembler des PME du Transport Routier de Voyageurs pour les accompagner, booster leur développement et garantir leur compétitivité. Véritable pilier du Transport Routier de Voyageurs, Réunir est un Groupe Associatif reconnu qui regroupe 206 PME indépendantes réparties sur 350 sites d'exploitation.

 Bien plus qu’un Groupe Associatif, Réunir est une véritable famille pour qui, chaque kilomètre devient une opportunité, chaque obstacle un challenge, et chaque rêve une réalité. Depuis plus de 25 ans, le Groupe Associatif évolue pour permettre à ses Adhérents d’aller toujours plus loin ensemble !

Name: Keolis Belgium
Description: Keolis is an international mobility player with a fleet of more than 2,700 vehicles and 3,300 employees in Belgium. The company develops its activities through some forty branches spread across the country. As a global mobility player, present in 13 countries across 4 continents, Keolis shapes the mobility of tomorrow together with its partners. The 68,500 employees worldwide transport passengers with their buses, coaches and taxis, but also with autonomous metro and tram systems and many innovative alternatives. Keolis also has expertise in digital reservation platforms, digital applications and travel organisations. Finally, Keolis is fully committed to the energy transition and new forms of mobility.

Cab9 is built using cutting-edge technologies with the intent of speed and superior performance, the system supports companies through all business aspects, including dispatch, administration or client handling.

Name: MOIA Operations Germany GmbH
Description:
Wir sind die MOIA Operations Germany GmbH. Das junge Mobilitätsunternehmen im Volkswagen Konzern. Wir betreiben MOIAs neuen Ridesharing-Service seit Sommer 2018 in Hannover und seit April 2019 auch vollelektrisch in Hamburg. 

Vom Management der Betriebshöfe, über das Management unserer Fahrer und den laufenden Betrieb von MOIA sorgen wir dafür, dass Menschen sicher und bequem durch die Stadt kommen. 

Mit einem dynamischen, agilen Team und dem Netzwerk des Volkswagen Konzerns im Rücken helfen wir, unsere Städte von Verkehr, Lärm und Emissionen zu befreien und machen sie so zu einem lebenswerteren Ort für uns alle.

Möchtest du uns bei dieser Reise begleiten? Werde das nächste Mitglied unseres stark wachsenden Teams! Gemeinsam machen wir unsere Städte zu besseren Orten.
