Hier findest du weitere Informationen zu der Position Fahrer/in: www.moia.io/fahrer

Name: Viação Graciosa Ltda.
Description:
A Viação Graciosa atua nos segmentos de Transporte Metropolitano, Intermunicipal e Interestadual de Passageiros, além de atuar nos setores de Cargas, Encomendas e Fretamentos. 

Atualmente a Viação Graciosa conta com mais de 500 colaboradores e uma frota de mais de 150 veículos. A empresa atua em todo o litoral paranaense, marcando sua presença nas cidades de Curitiba, São José dos Pinhais, Ponta Grossa, Paranaguá, Morretes, Antonina, Guaraqueçaba, Pontal do Paraná, Matinhos e Guaratuba, além das cidades de Garuva e Joinville, em Santa Catarina. 

Seus sistemas de venda de passagens, abastecimento, tráfego, manutenção, estoque, estatístico e contábil são totalmente informatizados, e seus processos seguem os padrões de qualidade da norma ISO 9001/2008. 

A Viação Graciosa é certificada pelo PROVOPAR-PR como Empresa Solidária, por sua contribuição em ações sociais no Estado do Paraná em 2009. E desde 2007, a Viação Graciosa também possui o Selo Social de Paranaguá, um certificado oferecido pela Prefeitura Municipal de Paranaguá às empresas que atuam de forma socialmente responsável nas iniciativas oferecidas pelo município.

Name: Blanco y Negro Masivo
Description: Somos una organización dedicada al transporte masivo de pasajeros, con más de 20 años de historia, que se construye día a día con el trabajo de un equipo diverso y profesional de más de 1.000 personas. Cada función, desde la operación, mantenimiento, cuidado y detalle los buses, hasta el soporte administrativo, contribuye a que la ciudad se mueva con eficiencia y confianza.

Name: TER Hauts-de-France
Description:
Notre vocation ? Simplifier les déplacements du plus grand nombre sur le territoire des Hauts-de-France, développer la mobilité de demain, fluidifier le transport des voyageurs et favoriser l’usage des solutions de transport bas carbone. 

En tant qu’acteur engagé, nous plaçons l’accompagnement de tous les publics au cœur du développement d’une mobilité décarbonée dans la Région Hauts-de-France.

A ce titre, nous nous employons à : 
Accompagner les entreprises dans leurs actions de transition vers une mobilité plus respectueuse de l’environnement
Proposer aux actifs des solutions de transport adaptées aux besoins de leurs déplacements entre leur domicile et leur lieu de travail
Favoriser l’accès à l’emploi par la mobilité grâce aux offres TER dédiées aux personnes en recherche d’un emploi

Chaque jour, ce sont près de 3 600 collaborateurs qui s’engagent pour transporter 210 000 personnes à bord des 1 240 trains TER et TER à Grande Vitesse qui circulent quotidiennement sur les 2 500 km du réseau. Vous aussi vous souhaitez participer au développement des solutions de transport d’avenir dans votre région ? Découvrez également sur ce fil toutes nos offres d’emploi !

Name: Coach USA
Description:
Coach USA is hiring!

Are you looking for a rewarding career with growth opportunities? Do you want to go places while meeting people you positively impact? Are you a veteran? If you answered “yes” to any of these questions, we want to hear from you!

At Coach USA, our employees average 15 years with some who have celebrated over 40 years with us. The reason is simple: This is not just another job. We mix passion with purpose, and our employees love what they do and the people they work with. It’s a place where people feel respected and valued.

We believe in rewarding those who choose to work with us and have created a comprehensive benefits package that includes:
- Medical, dental, vision, and life insurance
- Competitive wages
- Paid holidays & personal time off
- Hiring bonuses (dependent on position and location)
- Paid certified training programs
- FSAs and HSAs
- 401(k) and savings plan
- Employee assistance programs
- Disability coverage options
- Enrollment in discount and wellness programs
…and more!

Ready to begin your Coach USA career? We’re seeking candidates in the following areas: 
- Drivers 
- Mechanics
- Cleaners & fuelers
- Dispatchers
- Office staff 
- Management & supervisor positions

United States applicants: https://www.coachusa.com/employment
Canada applicants: https://www.coachcanada.jobs/

Our Story
Coach USA is one of the nation’s largest transportation companies where the top priority is the safety of its customers and employees. We operate over 1,400 vehicles and have over 2,000 employees who serve millions of passengers. Coach USA provides critical local and intercity transport services for communities throughout the United States and Canada via Coach Canada. Coach USA also owns and operates Megabus – the first, low-cost, express bus service to provide intercity travel for as low as a dollar. Since launching in 2006, Megabus has served more than 50 million customers throughout more than 100 cities across the nation.

Name: A-Z Bus Sales, Inc
Description:
A-Z Bus Sales, Inc. is a transportation dealer-distributor serving the education, government, public sector, commercial, and private fleet markets with a broad portfolio of passenger transportation solutions. For decades, A-Z Bus Sales has specialized in clean alternative fuel products and is now proud to be the #1 dealer in the nation for Electric Bus deliveries. A-Z Bus provides sales, service, parts, and financing for both new and pre-owned buses. Founded in 1976, A-Z Bus Sales has built a reputation for long-lasting customer relationships, professionalism and integrity, and the share positions in markets served. Headquartered in Colton, California the company has multiple sales and service locations serving California, Texas and Hawaii.

What truly sets A-Z Bus Sales apart from our competition is our business culture – driven by our core values, which are the underlying principles that guide A-Z Bus Sales today. In addition, A-Z Bus Sales is 100% employee-owned; we care about our employees as much as we do about our customers. We’re also strong social and environmental stewards, giving back to our communities through charitable works and to the environment through our leadership in delivering low and zero-emissions transportation solutions.  We work hard to ensure you receive an experience, product, and partnership no other bus company can rival. When it comes to choosing a partner in transportation, you can count on A-Z Bus Sales’ top bus brands and unmatched integrity to stand the test of time.

Our Portfolio Includes
•	New School Bus Sales

•	Pre-Owned Vehicles Sales
•	EV Infrastructure
•	Grant Assistance
•	Paratransit/Mobility Vehicle Solutions

Name: AUTO VIAÇÃO REDENTOR oficial
Description:
A Auto Viação Redentor foi fundada em 1958,  e desde 1993 as famílias João Gulin e Angelo Gulin  assumiram o controle acionário desta empresa, que  hoje conta com membros da segunda e terceira geração em seu  comando,e uma equipe de aproximadamente 1400 colaboradores .São 265 carros sendo, 37 biarticulados que juntamente com o restante da frota de Alimentadores, Convencionais, Linha Direta, Interbairros, Intercambiável e Acesso  percorrem diariamente 60 mil quilômetros.

Name: NTL India Limited
Description:
NTL India Limited is a trusted leader in corporate mobility, delivering customized and reliable transport solutions to enterprises across India. Since 1999, we have been driving excellence in employee transportation and earning the trust of some of the country’s most dynamic organizations. An ISO 9001:2015 certified company for Quality Management Systems, we continuously elevate our customers’ experience with every journey.

Headquartered in Chennai, NTL has grown from a private enterprise into a Public Limited Company with operations across 15+ major cities and rapid expansion into Tier-2 regions. We proudly serve clients from diverse industries including IT, BPO, healthcare, banking, manufacturing, telecom, and logistics. Our solutions are tailored to meet the unique needs of each sector, delivering consistent, dependable transport every day. 

We have a strong team across India with deep industry experience, dedicated to delivering safe, reliable, and excellent mobility experiences; we customize solutions to fit each client’s requirements, ensuring smooth operations, an improved rider experience, and predictable outcomes.

Name: Parkers Chauffeurs
Description:
National Award Winners ‘Chauffeur Company of the Year’ in the Professional Driver - Quality, Standards & Innovation Awards! 

Parkers Chauffeurs was established in 1997 and, since then, we have earned our number one place by constantly listening and adapting to cater to the ever-changing needs of our VIP clients. From originally supplying our chauffeur service in Newcastle Upon Tyne, we’ve now grown to become the largest Chauffeur company in the North of England providing our services right across the UK. 

We provide a multi award winning service and own an extensive fleet of luxury vehicles including; Range Rover First Edition, Range Rover Autobiography, BMW i7, Mercedes Benz S Classes, Mercedes Benz EQVs, Mercedes Benz V Classes, Mercedes Benz E Classes

We specialise in multi vehicle secure VIP convoys and have some of the most highly trained Chauffeurs within the Industry, also offering over 20 years experience within the Chauffeur Industry.

We are proud of our five star feedback from Clients. We have built partnerships up with many multinational organisations, Blue Chip companies, Embassy’s, Municipalities, FBO’s, HNW clients, Music, TV & Film companies plus many more.

We care as deeply for our clients as we do our environment. So, you can relax securely in with the knowledge that we are planting trees to offset the carbon footprint of your journey. We also own hybrid and electric luxury vehicle options.

When you have to impress with every detail, guarantee absolute discretion and make the best first impression... you have to choose Parkers Chauffeurs.

 Call us on: 0333 666 1 777
 Email us at: enquiries@parkerschauffeurs.com

Name: Bus Industry Confederation
Description:
Our vision is to enhance the sustainability and liveability of Australia’s cities and regions by moving people using bus and coach transportation. We aim to do this by representing the collective interests of our members and to assist them in promoting the safety, efficiency and effectiveness of bus and coach transport in Australia.

We want to to ensure that the businesses in our industry are protected from poor government policy and to actively advocate for better and increased public transport and school services, growth in tour, charter, long distance and other commercial bus and coach services and increased infrastructure funding.

Much of what we do is ensure that governments keep our moving people task top of mind when implementing policy decisions on transport, our cities and regions, and how money is spent.

Our aim is to keep growing public transport so that buses and coaches move more passengers and provide more services, along with growing the tourism, charter and commercial side of bus and coach businesses. This has a direct impact on the profitability and viability of operators, manufacturers, component suppliers and professional services to the bus and coach industry.

Daily, we're charged with making sure that the bus and coach industry continues to have a major role in national and state planning for our Australian communities, cities and regional centres. We also put a lot of effort into on-the-ground issues – both technical and operational – that impact the day-to-day business of bus operators, manufacturers and suppliers.

Name: TILO
Description:
TILO, Treni Regionali Ticino Lombardia, collega in maniera efficiente le località del Canton Ticino con quelle della vicina Regione Lombardia, assicurando il traffico regionale e transfrontaliero in collaborazione con le FFS e Trenord.

Gli azionisti della società sono al 50% le Ferrovie federali svizzere FFS, e al 50% Trenord.

L'obiettivo della società è quello di offrire ai clienti la migliore esperienza di viaggio possibile. Grazie all'esperienza e alla competenza di tutti i partner, TILO in questi anni ha raggiunto risultati sorprendenti affermandosi come punto di riferimento per il traffico regionale insubrico.

Name: Abu Dhabi Transport Company
Description: Abu Dhabi Transport Company (ADT) is a leading provider of seamless and sustainable public transportation services throughout Abu Dhabi Emirate. We are committed to connecting communities, enhancing quality of life, and supporting the emirate's vision for a thriving future.

Description: Atender as necessidades de deslocamento coletivo de pessoas.

Name: BusForFun.com
Description: BusForFun Business is the European leader in B2B integrated mobility solutions, helping complex organizations to run and improve their employees transportation services. Our software is designed to move commuters in a greener, smarter and safer way. The power of our AI technology allows us to quickly build optimized routes to meet your community mobility requirements. BusForFun Business may concretely act as your own “External Mobility Manager”, supporting you in working out your “Home-Work Travel Plan”, as well as providing you with detailed sustainability reports. Moreover, BusForFun Business’ smart mobility web-apps are available for employees, companies and drivers. Trains, buses and other vehicles managed by FlexyMob are completely in control of the commuter’s experience. One more competitive advantage, by using FlexyMob, is the possibility of attracting skilled employees not willing to travel long distances every day. BusForFun is constantly committed to minimizing CO2 emissions to improve every client company’s environmental responsibility. We are deeply committed to achieving Net Zero by 2030, with a transition to a “fully electric” and H2-fleet with our nationwide network of Operating Partners.

Name: RMA Worldwide Chauffeured Transportation
Description: RMA is a world-class chauffeured transportation service company based in the D.C. / Baltimore areas managed by well-trained and dedicated employees. Utilizing progressive technology combined with luxury vehicles, we will maintain our reputation for being first in customer satisfaction.

Name: The Greater Miami Expressway (GMX) Agency
Description: The official LinkedIn account of the Greater Miami Expressway Agency.

Name: Buses Pluss Chile
Description:
Buses Plusschile es una empresa de transporte interurbano de pasajeros vía autobús, compuesta por buses de última generación, con equipamiento de punta en seguridad industrial y exigencias de estándar minero.
Además contamos con personal profesional en su área que nos permite entregar un servicio de calidad en todos nuestros viajes, con el más alto compromiso dirigido a la seguridad, comodidad y puntualidad.
Todos nuestros vehículos cuentan con las más avanzadas tecnologías para entregar la mayor seguridad en cada viaje, además se encuentran equipados con GPS y Sistema de cámara de monitoreo en forma instantánea que nos permiten controlar nuestros estándares de seguridad.

Name: Dopravní podnik hl. m. Prahy, akciová společnost
Description: The city's public transit company was founded on 1 September 1897 as Elektrické podniky královského hlavního města Prahy [The Electrical Companies of the Royal Capital City of Prague]. At that time, aside from operating urban mass transit, it was also in the business of generating and distributing electricity. In 1946, after the nationalization of the energy industry and the gradual splitting-off of power stations gas works and waterworks, Prague's City Companies were changed to the Public Transit Companies of the Capital City of Prague. In later years, the company's name, organizational structure and management changed several times. In 1991, the Public Transit Co. was changed to a joint-stock company, whose sole shareholder is the City of Prague.

Name: Rio Mar - Suporte Logístico
Description:
A Rio Mar é uma empresa consolidada no mercado de transporte executivo e suporte logístico desde 2001, reconhecida pela excelência, segurança e soluções personalizadas que atendem às demandas mais exigentes. Com mais de duas décadas de experiência, nos tornamos referência no setor ao aliar inovação, eficiência e compromisso com resultados superiores.

Nossa operação é fundamentada em padrões internacionais de qualidade, sendo certificada pela ISO 9001, o que garante segurança e confiabilidade em todas as etapas dos nossos serviços. Além disso, priorizamos a pontualidade, o comprometimento e a redução de custos, sempre buscando superar as expectativas de nossos clientes.

Dentre nossas especialidades, destacam-se as trocas de turma e o acesso estratégico aos principais portos, permitindo uma operação logística ágil e integrada. Contamos com uma equipe altamente qualificada e infraestrutura robusta, preparada para lidar com desafios complexos e oferecer soluções que otimizem recursos e tragam resultados assertivos.

Na Rio Mar, cada detalhe é planejado com rigor para entregar serviços que combinam excelência operacional e atendimento personalizado. Mais do que um prestador de serviços, somos parceiros estratégicos, prontos para contribuir com o sucesso das operações de nossos clientes e consolidar nossa posição como líderes no mercado de transporte executivo e suporte logístico.

Name: MediTrans, LLC
Description:
MediTrans is a Coordinated Transportation Network (CTN) that offers a  comprehensive approach to Transportation that prioritizes member experience while balancing quality and cost in order to create safer, healthier communities. 

Our vision is to deliver better health outcomes for members who receive care from our partners by eliminating barriers to healthcare. We accomplish this through building and maintaining a call center, dispatch operation, and a quality network.

Name: Grupo MM SOUZA
Description: O Grupo MM SOUZA, atua há mais de 45 anos no mercado de transporte de passageiros e turismo, com uma frota inteiramente especializada para ocasionar conforto e acima de tudo segurança a todos os passageiros. Nossos profissionais fazem atendimento personalizado, a fim de acolher com respeito e responsabilidade, transpondo informações e sanando todas as dúvidas que possam surgir. Nosso objetivo se resume em transportar pessoas com segurança para qualquer destino, seja até o trabalho – através do fretamento contínuo ou executivos – como também pela linha turismo, que permite um trajeto com toda a tranquilidade e confiança merecidas pelo cliente, para que a viagem dos sonhos seja realizada satisfatoriamente. O Grupo MM SOUZA, está registrada em todos os órgãos necessários para oferecer serviços com dignidade: Artesp, ANTT, Embratur, Emdec, DTP e EMTU. Prova de toda essa dedicação tida ao longo de muito desenvolvimento e melhorias contínuas. Com isso, buscamos alcançar os patamares de melhor empresa de transporte turístico da região, e ser sua preferência na hora de viajar com a família ou com os amigos. Ficaremos muito felizes em fazer parte da sua vida, podendo levar você para conhecer lugares incríveis, na companhia de pessoas especiais, e atravessar as fronteiras desse mundo tão bonito e repleto de curiosidades e encantos naturais..

Name: NETINERA Deutschland GmbH
Description:
NETINERA: Menschen bewegen und Verbindungen schaffen

Für uns ist die Schiene der Verkehrsträger der Zukunft. Als Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen treiben wir mit klimafreundlicher Mobilität die Verkehrswende aktiv voran. Für Mensch und Umwelt.
Mit über 6.500 engagierten Mitarbeiter:innen zählen wir zu den größten privaten Verkehrsunternehmen im regionalen Personennahverkehr in Deutschland. 

Bekannte Unternehmen wie ODEG, metronom, Die Länderbahn, erixx, erixx Holstein und vlexx machen die NETINERA-Gruppe zu einem der führenden Verkehrsunternehmen des Landes.

Als Teil der italienischen Staatsbahn Ferrovie dello Stato Italiane  gehören wir damit zu einem der größten Verkehrsunternehmen Europas.   

Wir setzen neue Maßstäbe. 

Als erstes deutsches Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen haben wir die 35-Stunden-Woche für Schichtarbeiter:innen ab Januar 2028 eingeführt. Zudem sind wir Vorreiter im Einsatz von batterieelektrischen Zügen im Personennahverkehr.

Unsere Mitarbeiter:innen finden bei uns sichere und zukunftsorientierte Arbeitsplätze mit größtmöglicher Flexibilität. 

Wir pflegen eine wertschätzende, offene und unterstützende Unternehmenskultur mit flachen Hierarchien.

Diversität und Inklusion sind fest in unserem Unternehmensleitbild verankert: Wir bieten vielfältige Karrierechancen für Quereinsteiger:innen aller Altersgruppen.

Wir suchen engagierte Mitarbeiter:innen für alle Unternehmensbereiche, ob als Fahrpersonal auf Straße und Schiene, in der Betriebsplanung oder im technischen und kaufmännischen Bereich.

Folgt uns auf unserem Kanal und entdeckt inspirierende Geschichten rund um die Themen #Eisenbahn, #Verkehrswende, #Unternehmenskultur, #Fachkräftemangel, #Verkehr, #Mobilität und #Quereinstieg.

Name: Aargau Verkehr AG (AVA)
Description:
Aargau Verkehr verbindet als öV-Transportunternehmen Menschen und Regionen in den Kantonen Aargau, Luzern und Zürich. Unsere Mitarbeitenden sorgen mit ihrem Einsatz dafür, dass der tägliche Betrieb rund läuft. Manche gut sichtbar, andere genauso wichtig im Hintergrund. Gemeinsam stellen wir sicher, dass unsere Fahrgäste sicher, pünktlich und komfortabel an ihr Ziel gelangen.

Sie bilden den Herzschlag unserer Bahn- und Busbetriebe – wir schaffen ein Arbeitsumfeld, das Freude macht: Mit modernen Bedingungen, spannenden Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten und echtem Teamgeist. Jetzt unsere Karriereseite durchstöbern und Teil unserer öV-Familie werden!

Name: Limos4
Description:
Limos4 is a ground transportation industry leader, providing premium 24/7 chauffeured services across 200+ cities, 60+ countries and 250+ airports. Limos4 clients have the full support from experienced industry professionals, assisted by a proprietary dispatch and booking system - the most advanced of its kind today.

Established in 2010 in Switzerland, and running seamlessly for more than a decade, Limos4 enables travelers to reliably arrange their journeys throughout the world in minutes, whatever chauffeured vehicle type they wish to use.

Limos4’s mission is constantly raising the quality of chauffeured service worldwide through state-of-the-art technologies, human touch and advanced quality assurance protocol.

Our comprehensive service offerings include airport transfers, cruise port transfers, roadshows, long distance rides and event transportation service. Livery solutions, ride statuses and partner evaluation protocols are some of the Limos4 products that bring necessary flexibility and seamlessness in today’s fast-paced world.

Name: Putco (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Welcome to PUTCO

Putco (Pty) Ltd, is a subsidiary of The Larimar Group, with interest in the public passenger transport sector. Our group of companies include Putco,Carleo Insurance Brokers,Truck Centre Durban, the Larimar Training Academy, Voms Industrial, Larimar Financing and Leasing Services and Larimar Properties.

Mr. Franco Pisapia is the Managing Director since September 2004. He is also a Director of Carleo Enterprise (Pty) Ltd and Carleo Investment (Pty) Ltd.
The face of ownership and management of Putco has significantly changed over the years to reflect the country’s demographics. The Larimar group (which is the holding company) is now 51% black-owned of which 27% are black women and 22% of shares are held by employees.

Putco has a fleet of 1 400 buses and transports more than 210 000 passengers daily. The company operates in Gauteng, Mpumalanga and Limpopo.The Putco fleet travels approximately 82 million kilometres per year or 290 000 kilometres per day. We employ more than 3600 employees with an approximate 18,000 persons that depend on the Company for their livelihood.and just under 1 600 are drivers, 69 of which are female drivers.Our operating hours are from 02h30 to 22h00.

Name: Metroline Manchester
Description:
A dynamic and ambitious company, Metroline is proud to serve Greater Manchester.

We’re buzzing to serve Greater Manchester’s community as part of the Bee Network from January 2025. We’ll be operating the Hyde Road, Sharston, Tameside and Wythenshawe depots and their associated routes and can’t wait to have you on board.

Community and people are at the heart of everything we do, and once part of the Bee Network, people living in Greater Manchester will benefit from Metroline’s proven track record of providing excellent customer service, with drivers regularly receiving commendations and industry awards. Passengers in Greater Manchester can expect a community focused service on our buses on the Bee Network, when they enter operation in January.

Name: By Chauffeur
Description: By Chauffeur has developed over the last decade into one of the finest British chauffeur companies in the world, and has become a name synonymous within the industry for professionalism, refinement and luxury.

Name: DATTCO, INC
Description:
Founded in 1924 as MASTCO by the visionary Ruth Mutter, DATTCO has evolved into a third generation DeVivo family enterprise within the transportation industry. Headquartered in the heart of New Britain, Connecticut, we've transformed from a modest three-school-bus operation into a transportation conglomerate. Today, our school bus division shuttles over 140,000 students across Connecticut and Rhode Island daily. We are a one-stop shop for bus/vehicle transportation needs by providing vehicle service, maintenance repairs, fleet management, collision repair, and sales in the northeast. DATTCO operates a motor Coach & Tour Group that supplies charter services and tours across the U.S. In addition, the company operates intercity bus service via Megabus. Our coach and tour division are the official transportation providers for the Connecticut Yard Goats baseball team, Hartford Wolfpack hockey, and the NCAA champions University of Connecticut and Quinnipiac University amongst numerous other colleges and universities. 

DATTCO leadership has taken the initiator role within the state in the transformation to electric vehicles, reducing greenhouse gas emission, and creating cleaner air. We are influencers shaping legislative agendas for a greener future.

DATTCO’s strategic vision has grown to expand its business portfolio to include in its family of brands: DeVivo Companies, Capacity Yard Trucks, Penguin Trailers, Accelerated Property Management, Thermo King Northeast, Northeast Tool Distributors, and New England TruckMaster.

Name: Karunadu Services Private Limited
Description:
Karunadu Services Pvt. Ltd., formerly known as Karunadu Cabs, was established in 2008 with a clear mission: to deliver exceptional and personalized travel services. Over the past decade, we have consistently worked to exceed expectations, building a strong track record of reliability and customer satisfaction. Our commitment to ‘outstanding personalized service’ means offering convenience, value, and satisfaction at affordable prices.

Our company is led by a team of experts with extensive experience in automobiles, logistics, and travel. We serve various sectors, including IT, BPO, engineering, and manufacturing, leveraging our diverse fleet, industry knowledge, and management expertise. Known for our promptness, professionalism, and respect, we uphold honesty, security, transparency, and timely service.

Based in Bangalore, our modern office houses a team of around 90 skilled, trained, and vetted professionals. We provide a comprehensive range of travel solutions, including regular pickups and drops, premium car rentals, airport transfers, shuttle services, and outstation trips.

As a technology-driven company, we are dedicated to offering cutting-edge transportation services to our esteemed clients.

Name: EVENDIS

Laurent SALMON et Ismaël SEMLAL réunissent leur savoir faire dans les domaines du transport de personnes et de la logistique événementielle pour créer EVENDIS.
Ludovic ARMAND fort d’une expérience de plus de 20 ans dans ces deux secteurs les rejoint  en 2019.

EVENDIS accompagne aujourd’hui les plus grandes sociétés françaises et internationales dans tous leurs projets.

Chauffeurs, gestionnaires de planning, coordinateurs, convoyeurs, hôtes et hôtesses mettent leurs compétences au service des clients avec une seule priorité : leur satisfaction.

Nos prestations principales sont:
- Logistique Événementielle

Description: Bergkvara är en av Sveriges ledande aktörer inom kollektivtrafik. Med verksamhet på cirka 40 orter och över 2 500 engagerade medarbetare bedriver vi busstrafik och spårburen trafik inom upphandlad kollektivtrafik samt skoltrafik och kommersiell linje- och beställningstrafik med buss. I vår verksamhet ryms även all typ av service och underhåll av tunga nyttofordon. Vår årliga omsättning är cirka 2,65 miljarder kronor.

Name: NORTRANS
Description:
Somos una empresa con gran experiencia, apasionada y evolutiva
dedicados a satisfacer las necesidades de transporte terrestre de nuestros clientes, desde y hacia las faenas mineras como al interior de las mismas, enfocados en la seguridad, eficiencia, portabilidad y confort creando valor para nuestros clientes.

Name: Voy Santiago
Description: En Voy Santiago confluyen más de 20 años de experiencia en la industria de la movilidad en Latinoamérica. En Chile, como empresa concesionaria de RED Metropolitana de Movilidad, somos pieza fundamental del sistema de transporte público de la ciudad de Santiago. Nuestro equipo humano, inclusivo y diverso, tiene como guía e inspiración la vocación y el compromiso con la calidad en nuestra tarea diaria de conectar personas, lugares y realidades, siempre con el propósito de brindar el mejor servicio a los usuarios y posicionarnos como una de las empresas líderes del sistema.

Name: Viação Cidade de Caieiras
Description:
A Viação Cidade de Caieiras é uma empresa prestadora de serviços de transporte urbano de passageiros, dirigida pelo atual grupo acionista desde 1998. 

Atualmente, a empresa opera em mais de 50 linhas urbanas divididas entre municipais e intermunicipais, que atendem a população dos municípios de Caieiras e Franco da Rocha, interligando-os com a capital, Francisco Morato, Cajamar e Santana de Parnaíba. E, juntamente com outras sete empresas da região, constitui o Consórcio Anhanguera, responsável pelo transporte metropolitano nas regiões Oeste e Noroeste da Grande São Paulo. 

O fretamento, por sua vez, tem seu foco no ramo de transporte empresarial – o fretamento “contínuo” de funcionários – mas atua também no fretamento eventual, popularmente chamado de ‘turismo”.

A empresa possui duas garagens: uma localizada em Caieiras e a outra em Franco da Rocha. A Viação Caieiras faz parte do Grupo NSO, juntamente com a Auto Viação Urubupungá, Viação Santa Brígida e Urubupungá Transportes e Turismo.

Name: Swoop, Inc.
Description:
Swoop’s mission is to drive people to do more by simplifying ground transportation. Trusted by top companies, cities and schools, Swoop simplifies complex transportation whether it's a daily commute or large event.

Additionally, Swoop operates the fastest growing all-in-one SaaS platform (moovsapp.com) for private transportation operators. This pioneering software digitizes and enhances their entire back office - enabling operators to deliver the pinnacle of transportation experiences worldwide.

Awarded best places to work in 2023 by Purpose Jobs.

Name: Faze
Description:
Faze is India's first sustainable, premium ground transportation provider. Faze offers retail and institutional clients the ability to make an impact on their carbon footprint through it's fleet of all-electric luxury vehicles, which are the safest, quietest, and most-advanced cars available on the market. 

Faze through to your next travel destination.

Con más de 50 años en el mercado, brindamos un servicio personalizado con conductores y conductoras que están capacitados y vehículos de última generación, asegurando puntualidad y comodidad en cada trayecto.

Nuestra experiencia nos permite liderar el sector de traslados de lujo, cumpliendo con los más altos estándares de calidad en cada viaje.

Description:
NexGen Falcon Passengers Transport LL C

NexGen Falcon Passengers Transport (NFPT) is owned by Transport professionals established in 2001, with the responsibilities of organizing and conducing transport services, vehicle maintenance, supervision of transport opera on, consultancy etc. currently operation with a ﬂeet of over 140 vehicles and services providers in all emirates.

Name: Checker Cabs
Description:
Checker Transportation Group is Calgary's premier provider of taxis, sedans limousines and shuttle service throughout Calgary and beyond.

Checker Cabs provides more than just standard taxi service. Our wheelchair accessible vans make it easier for persons with disabilities to travel. Our cabs also offer stand-by service for corporate functions and special events to ensure that all guests arrive safely. Our taxis are available to all major hotels within the downtown Calgary core and pick up and drop off service to the Calgary International Airport. Our company offers products such as cab vouchers and reloadable gift cards making payments simple. 

Most recently, Checker Cabs implemented an exciting App to enhance the customers’ experience, making shorter wait times and ease of booking. The app is available at Google Play or the Apple App store (www.thecheckergroup.com/app).

Ambassador Limousine's luxury vehicles, career chauffeurs, dedicated detailing team and reservation centre earn the company an international reputation for providing a seamless experience. While the majority of our guests are from the corporate world, limousine affiliates, tourism and special events, we also provide an exceptional wedding and graduation experience. Aside from supporting the Calgary area, we regularly service Kananaskis, Canmore, Banff and the Lake Louise area.

Name: Ride Skipper
Description:
Ride Skipper is the ONLY on-demand chauffeur and safety driver service to salary all of its employees. Giving you well vetted, well trained, well rested drivers every time you book. 

We have filled a critical gap in the market and redefined industry standards in the region with a team of highly trained professional Drivers.

Our Vision:
To quickly become the leading personal chauffeur service in the UAE, providing unparalleled comfort, safety, and reliability from booking to destination. Our meticulously trained Skippers and innovative app technology set a new industry standard.

Our Mission:
We are dedicated to giving UAE residents the ultimate peace of mind with every ride. Our professional Skippers and user-friendly app guarantee a hassle-free journey, embodying our core values of safety, reliability, professionalism, and comfort - we aim to become the go-to on-demand personal chauffeur service that fits perfectly with the busy lifestyles of residents. 

Why Choose Ride Skipper?

Safety First: Rigorous driver vetting, and continuous assessments ensure top-notch service.
Reliable Service: Seamless booking and 24/7 customer support for a smooth experience.
Professionalism: Expert drivers who know Dubai’s roads and provide a polished service.
Comfort: Enjoy your own car with the added luxury of a clean, stress-free ride.
Our Community Commitment:
We strive to lead a cultural movement towards road safety and responsible driving, enhancing the well-being of our passengers and the broader community.

Join us in this quiet revolution and make Ride Skipper your go-to personal chauffeur service in Dubai. Life just got easier, one ride at a time.

Name: Jyrney
Description:
We’ve developed the most comprehensive mobility solution, bringing together ride-hail, taxi and chauffeur for any business travel platform.

Our AI managed rebooking service ensures we protect your client and passenger relationships so you can concentrate on your core business.

Name: Rento Perú
Description:
Rento es el 1er Marketplace de Movilidad Compartida y Sostenible en Perú.
Permite arrendar gran variedad de autos de una forma rápida, segura, económica y cerca de tu casa.
Ofrece a los dueños de carros un emprendimiento fácil y seguro.
Es un modelo de negocio entre particulares en un Marketplace digital.

Name: PT Prima Armada Raya (PAR)
Description:
PT Prima Armada Raya, salah satu anak usaha dari PT Patra Jasa, adalah perusahaan yang didirikan untuk memenuhi berbagai kebutuhan transportasi untuk bisnis termasuk penyewaan kendaraan, penyediaan pengemudi, penjualan mobil bekas, perbengkelan, dan keagenan suku cadang pengganti mobil.

Kami berkomitmen memberikan pelayanan yang prima, memberikan jaminan keamanan dan kenyamanan yang memudahkan dalam semua kebutuhan transportasi pelanggan kami.

Name: CONSORCIO ESPAÑOL ALTA VELOCIDAD MECA MEDINA
Description: Consorcio Español Alta Velocidad Meca Medina has been carrying out the contract for the execution of the second phase of the Haramain project for the high-speed railway line between Mecca and Medina (Saudi Arabia) since 2012. The project is being implemented with Spanish technology, which provides more than 25 years of experience as a leading country in high-speed execution. It includes the design and installation of the track and systems, the supply of 35 trains and the management, operation and maintenance of the line and stations for 12 years. The consortium is comprised of 12 Spanish companies (Abengoa Inabensa, Adif, Acs Servicios Comunicaciones Y Energia, Consultrans, Copasa, Imathia, Indra, Ineco, OHLA, Renfe, Siemens Rail Automation and Talgo).

Name: Ritzy
Description:
RITZY
Professional Drivers. On-Demand. Anytime. Anywhere.

RITZY is a personal mobility platform addressing critical urban mobility gaps by offering 24/7 on-demand professional drivers and chauffeurs to operate customers' own vehicles.

The Challenge:
1. Drunk Driving remains a leading cause of road accidents and fatalities, with limited alternatives for car owners returning from social events.
2. Unsafe Late-Night Travel, particularly for women and professionals, continues to pose serious safety concerns due to the lack of trustworthy transport options.
3. There is no Structured Platform that provides reliable, verified drivers for personal vehicle use despite increasing demand from urban car owners.

Our Solution:
1. RITZY bridges these critical gaps through a tech-enabled App that allows users to instantly book background-verified, trained, and uniformed drivers to drive their vehicles. 
2. Whether for a short local trip, a late-night commute, or outstation travel.
3. RITZY ensures a safer, more responsible alternative to self-driving or ad hoc arrangements.

Key Differentiators:
1. 24/7 Availability: Round-the-clock driver access, regardless of time, weather, or traffic conditions.
2. Zero-Cancellation Policy: Guaranteed service delivery.
3. Safety & Compliance Protocols: All drivers are background-checked, trained, and monitored with live GPS tracking and SOS escalation.
4. Uniformed Chauffeurs: Professional presentation with high service standards.
5. Transparent Pricing: Upfront, consistent, and competitive rates.

Social Impact & Public Safety Mission:
RITZY is positioned not just as a convenience platform but as a public safety enabler. By providing a credible solution to prevent drunk driving, reduce road accidents, and ensure secure personal travel, RITZY directly contributes to safer roads.

Name: RTSE Solutions
Description:
RTSE Solutions is a cutting-edge transport-oriented engineering consultancy company. Our team possesses a solid technical background in modern and legacy systems engineering practices obtained from years of international experience, allowing the team to offer cutting-edge solutions throughout the lifecycle of complex railway projects. Our team has extensive experience in providing solutions for trains and onboard systems, wayside control systems, power systems, legacy and Communication-Based Train Control (CBTC) signalling systems, and Internet of Things (IoT) based cloud data management systems.

We, as RTSE solutions, are in a unique spot where our team possesses a strong knowledge of legacy railway systems and practices proven to be used for centuries in the railway and a thorough understanding of modern-day technologies that are providing their power in other industries. This unique skill allows our team to bridge the gap and safely and reliably apply new systems and practices into the railway environment by providing confidence to operators throughout the change process. The team has experience working on a series of high-profile international rail upgrade projects across Europe, Asia, and North America. 

Specific Areas of Expertise Include:

Systems Engineering, CBTC and Legacy Signalling, Project Management, Capacity Optimization, RAMS Engineering, Safety Assurance, Rolling Stock Engineering, Innovation and Research, Railway Product Development, and Innovation and Research.

Description:
GTV BUS company has been on the market since
1994. Our expertise in international transport is

of employees ensures a reliable and professional

full commitment allowed us to transform into one of

safety and time saving.

The fleet includes over 300 minibuses and 30
buses. There are about 70 minibuses and 15 buses
in the Netherlands. Drivers drive more than 50,000
km every day, providing transport of approx. 1,500
employees from their home locations to their
workplaces. Always open to your needs, we are ready to take
on any task! The vehicles are always cleaned and
properly prepared for the journey.

2020 represents a breakthrough for GTV bus and European
transport. This year, the company extended its offer with
a functional mobile application. With one of the most
modern applications in Poland, everyone can book
a journey quickly and intuitively, from any place.
The innovative system enables tracking of the entire
journey in real time, with clear notifications reminding
of the necessary documents and providing all key
information about the journey. Moreover, the system is
constantly updated and upgraded with new solutions.

Description:
Considerada a Empresa mais antiga do Município do Rio de Janeiro, a Viação Ideal procura acompanhar a evolução em seu segmento, dispondo de tecnologia de ponta no controle operacional, entre câmeras, sistemas de segurança para monitoramento de velocidade e ações de perigo e sistema inteligente de transporte em todos os seus veículos como a bilhetagem eletrônica. 

Além disso, mantém canais diretos de comunicação com seus clientes (SAC /Fale conosco) e oferece aos seus funcionários, em especial seus motoristas, programas de treinamento dos mais completos e especializados do ramo, contando inclusive com a Fundação Getúlio Vargas entre seus parceiros em desenvolvimento profissional (programa motorista cidadão). 

Atuante em relação à preservação ambiental, a Viação Ideal desenvolve ações para uso racional de água e energia elétrica, coleta seletiva, controle de poluentes do ar e também do solo.

Desde 1933, a Viação Ideal tem superado dificuldades e demonstrado que é possível unir experiência e tecnologia em busca de um melhor atendimento a seus passageiros. E é desta forma que pretendemos manter o respeito e a admiração de nossos colaboradores, clientes e parceiros conquistados ao longo de todo este período, seguindo nossa busca incansável por um serviço de transporte coletivo digno da sociedade a qual servimos.

Most of our passengers will have individual needs, such as epilepsy, ADHD, Asperger's and speech difficulties, so it is vital that we have a professional approach with everything that we do.

24x7 are dedicated to serving the school community, offering efficient modern transport solutions that are second to none. We provide a service that the school community can be proud of.

Name: TAXA 4x35
Description:
You feel it the moment the door closes.

Calm. Clarity. A human being behind the wheel. The seat is yours.

And when we say that, we mean more than just the seat in the taxi.
With us, it means you are never left to yourself. Not even when the ride is over.

That is why more than 3,000 companies in Greater Copenhagen choose us as their regular taxi partner. Not only because we are Denmark’s largest driver-owned taxi company, but because we take responsibility for the entire journey around the passenger.

For our customers, this means their employees and hotel guests are looked after all the way. Also if something needs to be corrected or followed up afterwards.
That they have one direct number to a real person they can call when something goes wrong, instead of being passed around between systems.
That passengers can recover forgotten items by contacting us directly.
And that they meet drivers who are trained and continuously updated, so the experience is consistent and professional. Every time.

At the same time, they are part of a company that supports local culture through partnerships, because good transport is also about taking responsibility for the city life we drive in.

Behind every trip stand around 40 colleagues in our 24-hour call center and about 20 employees in administration, who follow up, take responsibility, and make sure the experience holds together. Even after the taxi has driven on.

If you want to experience the difference, read more at taxa.dk or call 35 35 35 35.

Address: TAXA 4x35, Rosenlunds Allé 8, 2720 Vanløse.

Name: WomenFirst, Inc.
Description:
WomenFirst, Inc. | Canada's Premier Female-Exclusive Rideshare Service

Mission: To provide the safest, most reliable, and most empowering transportation service for women and families across Alberta. We operate on a proprietary "By Women, For Women" model dedicated to community safety and economic empowerment.

Our Foundation:

WomenFirst was founded in Grande Prairie, AB, to address the critical need for secure transportation. Our vision was established from the ground up, recognizing that community trust and driver accountability are paramount to safety in the rideshare industry.

Our Impact:

Inclusive Mobility: We offer a dedicated platform ensuring peace of mind for our riders, whether commuting to work, attending appointments, or traveling late at night.

Economic Empowerment: We create flexible, meaningful, and safe earning opportunities for our network of dedicated female drivers.

Commitment to Alberta: Registered and operating out of Grande Prairie, we are committed to scaling our model to serve more communities across the province, setting a new standard for safety in transportation.

We are more than a rideshare service; we are a community-focused technology platform driving social and economic change.

Con el propósito de implementar en él, toda la experiencia acumulada en los años de servicios brindados hasta la actualidad, en el Transporte Interurbano de pasajeros. 

Para ello amplió su flota móvil con unidades 0 km aptas para caminos de montaña, como son Minibuses 4x4, Camionetas guía 4x4 y vehículos carrozados 4x4 para el transporte de personal de Empresas Contratistas y Proyectos Mineros, que confían en la calidad, confiabilidad y excelencia de nuestros servicios.  

Sumado a ello, se incorporó el Servicio de Traslados Ejecutivos en vehículos livianos 4x2, con el objeto de brindar soluciones de calidad, en las necesidades de transporte de personal para el sector.

Name: Best Transit
Description:
An American Success Story – In 1990, the landmark Americans with Disabilities Act was passed, mandating comparable transportation for passengers with disabilities. Born out of compassion, dedication, and commitment to excellence to help members of the community who seemed to be forgotten. In 2007, realizing the limited transportation options for the elderly, people with disabilities, and mostly vulnerable citizens. Best Transit Inc, established and began to provide Non-Emergency Transport (NEMT) to primarily Medicare and Medicaid recipients. This commitment to providing excellent services to all internal and external stakeholders remains the CORE Value of the organization.

Today, Best Transit Inc still operates under its founders’ guiding principles. The needs of people drive our company, literally and figuratively. People come first—always. And that means providing the right mobility services at the right time and at the right price. The Best Transit Inc has grown substantially now representing numerous public and private transit agencies, Charter Schools, and private companies in performing their transportation needs. We are proud to be one of the largest privately-owned transportation company providing paratransit, fixed route, shuttle, and school bus services.

Our services include corporate shuttles, business conventions, field trips, airport drop-offs, group sightseeing, academic events, sports events, weddings, bachelor parties, religious events, and even more. We also specialize in non-emergency medical transportation; such as pick up and drop at medical facilities. Our fleet includes vehicles that are wheelchair lift-equipped so we can accommodate passengers with special needs. 

We are fully insured, licensed, and an approved vendor of the city of Philadelphia as well as the state of Pennsylvania. Our drivers go through rigorous training and background checks.

Distinctions: USDOT Member, HIPPA Compliant, OSHA Compliant and NHTSA Complaint

Name: Hyperloop Seminar
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn account for the Vacuum Transport Seminar, an innovative research collaboration among TUM Hyperloop (TUM), Swiss Loop (ETH Zürich), Eurotube, and the Institute of Hyperloop Technologies (Hochschule Emden/Leer). Our mission is to advance the knowledge and understanding of hyperloop technologies by fostering collaboration, promoting knowledge exchange, and inspiring the next generation of transportation experts.

As a groundbreaking platform for learning and networking, the Vacuum Transport Seminar hosts a series of monthly events, inviting distinguished student speakers and industry experts to share their latest research and insights on hyperloop-related topics. Our one-hour sessions aim to spark stimulating discussions, encourage innovative thinking, and facilitate the development of practical solutions to address the challenges and opportunities within the hyperloop ecosystem.

By connecting ambitious students, renowned researchers, and industry professionals, the Vacuum Transport Seminar is dedicated to creating a vibrant community of hyperloop enthusiasts and pioneers. We invite you to follow our LinkedIn page to stay up-to-date with upcoming seminars, engage with our members, and contribute to the conversation shaping the future of vacuum transport and hyperloop technologies. Together, let's accelerate the realization of sustainable, efficient, and high-speed transportation for a better tomorrow.

Name: Telepass AB
Description: Telepass utför idag persontransporter i form av Serviceresor, Skolskjuts och beställningstrafik. Serviceresor och skolskjuts utförs i samarbete med bland annat Skånetrafiken, Jönköpings länstrafik och ett antal Skånska kommuner.

Name: Hilton Ames Ltd
Description: For both business and private clients, we aim to provide the very best door-to-door luxury road transport solution across the UK.

Name: Smart Rental Car
Description:
The Smart Rental Car company that offers fleet and subscription car outsourcing services, is a specialized vehicle rental company that focuses on meeting the need of companies and individuals who need a flexible and cost-effective mobility solution.

With the fleet outsourcing option, the company offers its customers the possibility of outsourcing the management of the vehicle fleet, allowing companies to concentrate their resources on core activities, while the vehicle rental company takes care of the maintenance and management of vehicles.

In addition, the company also offers a subscription car service, which allows customers to lease a vehicle for a longer period, typically 12 to 36 months. This option is ideal for people who need a vehicle for personal or professional use, but who don't want to take on the costs of buying, maintaining and insuring their own vehicle.

Name: Kılıçlar Nakliyat
Description:
Samsun Canik bölgesinde faaliyet gösteren şirketimiz, 2006 yılında Kılıçlar İnşaat Yapı Dekorasyon olarak  inşaat sektöründe temelden anahtar teslim hizmet vermeye başlamıştır. Başarılı geçmişimiz ve sağlam kurumsal yapımızla sektörde güvenilir bir isim haline gelmeyi başardık.
 
Müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman öncelikli tutan firmamız, 2010 yılında iskele kiralama hizmetine de başlamıştır. İnşaat sektöründe çalışan birçok müşterimize, güvenilir, kaliteli ve uygun maliyetli iskele çözümleri sunarak projelerinin başarısına katkıda bulunmaktayız.

Gelişen talepler doğrultusunda, 2020 yılında nakliye ve taşımacılık hizmeti vermeye başladık. Kapsamlı filomuz ve deneyimli ekiplerimizle, müşterilerimize güvenli ve zamanında teslimatlar sağlamaktayız. Profesyonel taşımacılık çözümlerimizle müşterilerimizin lojistik ihtiyaçlarını karşılamaya yönelik hizmetler sunmaktayız.

Firmamız, inşaat sektöründe kazandığı tecrübe ve bilgi birikimini, müşterilerine en iyi hizmeti sunmak için kullanmaktadır. İşimizi titizlikle yaparken, kalite standartlarına uyum ve zamanında teslimat prensiplerini göz ardı etmiyoruz. Müşterilerimize her zaman güvenilir, yenilikçi ve çözüm odaklı yaklaşımlar sunarak, beklentilerini karşılamayı hedeflemekteyiz.

Ofisimiz Samsun Canik bölgesinde yer almaktadır ve bölgeye hizmet verirken, aynı zamanda geniş bir coğrafi alanda faaliyet göstermekteyiz. Müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımız, güçlü referanslarımız ve profesyonel ekibimizle sektörde öne çıkan bir firma olmanın gururunu yaşıyoruz.

Biz, müşterilerimizin projelerinin başarısına katkıda bulunmak ve onların güvenini kazanmak için her zaman çalışmaktayız. Sektördeki değişimleri yakından takip ederek, sürekli kendimizi geliştirmeye ve yenilikleri benimsemeye önem veriyoruz.

Eğer siz de güvenilir bir iş ortağı arıyorsanız, işletmeniz için en uygun çözümleri sunabilecek tecrübeli ve profesyonel ekibimizle hizmetinizdeyiz.

Name: Moventis France
Description:
Fondé à Barcelone (Espagne) en 1923, Moventis est implanté en France depuis 2017. 

Filiale du groupe international espagnol de mobilité Moventia, Moventis est dôté d’une solide expérience dans la mobilité collective et territoriale. De part sa gestion familiale, Moventis est une entreprise indépendante se distinguant des groupes traditionnels de transports, une entreprise stable et pérenne qui investit et se développe, une entreprise à impact local.

Moventis s’appuie sur des valeurs d’entreprise extrêmement fortes tournées vers la société, les individus et l’environnement. Une contribution sociétale affirmée qui fait de Moventis un acteur territorial dynamique et engagé.

Au-delà d’être leader sur son territoire d’origine, la Catalogne, Moventis bénéficie d’une présence internationale et opère aujourd’hui sur trois continents : l’Europe, l’Amérique et l’Asie. Un savoir-faire partagé sur une large couverture géographique.

Une expertise multimodale : Dotée d’une solide expérience des transports multimodaux, Moventis intervient pour assurer le transport de voyageurs sous toutes ses formes grâce à une analyse territoriale permettant de combiner, de manière pertinente et coordonnée, l’ensemble des offres de transport sur le périmètre d’une Autorité Organisatrice de Mobilité.

Name: Viação Pretti Ltda.
Description:
O Grupo Pretti nasceu do sonho de um empreendedor, que acreditando no seu sonho e com muita determinação e sacrifício construiu uma das maiores empresas de transporte do estado do Espírito Santo.

Em 1965 surgiu a Viação Pretti, que está sempre buscando renovar o seu compromisso com o povo de Colatina e de todo o estado. Somos uma empresa sólida, com visão de futuro e focamos sempre no conforto de nossos clientes.

Atuamos no transporte de passageiros e atendemos a mais de 170 localidades, nos estados do Espírito Santo, Minas Gerais e Rondônia, sempre obedecendo as mais sérias políticas de qualidade e segurança.

Isso faz com que sejamos reconhecidos a nível estadual e também nacional, com vários prêmios individuais e coletivos. A renovação da frota é uma realidade constante da empresa, pois a satisfação do cliente, a melhoria na operação e na manutenção diária, são fatores importantes para nós, que objetivamos a excelência e liderança no setor de transportes no Estado.

Como Propósitos Empresariais (Ideologia) que servirão de base para a Gestão da Empresa, foram definidos os seguintes:

Missão
Aproximar pessoas transportando com excelência e sustentabilidade.

Visão
Ser reconhecida como a melhor empresa de transporte de passageiros do Estado.

Name: Bus Connection
Description:
Welcome to Bus Connection! The Bus Connection team has 15 years of experience providing ground transportation services to large groups of residents and visitors in Chicago. Our reputation for excellent customer satisfaction is built on the trust we've earned from our clients.

When you choose Bus Connection, you can rest assured that our highly trained chauffeurs will get you where you need to go, even under the most stressful driving conditions. We make transportation in the Chicago area easy and hassle-free.

We specialize in corporate, airport, sports, concert events, weddings, tours, and sports team transportation. With over 4000 happy customers, we are dedicated to providing exceptional service to every one of our clients.

Let us help you save time and elevate your transportation experience. Contact us today at info@bus-connection.com or give us a call at +1 (888) 716-2552.

Name: Newt Mobility

Our vision is to create a broad network of shared and sustainable vehicles that are so exceptional and efficient that Newt becomes the standard for every-day personal transportation. By doing so, Newt would assist in the world’s transition to sustainable energy and better coordinate traffic inside cities, allowing for the communities of tomorrow to match the increase in population.

Name: STMLoop International
Description:
STMLoop International is the first company in Africa focused on the development and implementation of Hyperloop, known as the fifth method of transportation. It consists of a levitating pod that will travel inside sealed tubes in a near-vacuum environment, hence reducing the amount of energy needed to transport people and cargo.

Our team is composed of motivated people that believe that this technology can bring a positive change to our society and we're working hard every day to make this happen. With Hyperloop, we will remove all time boundaries related to transportation, in that way we will let people be where they want, whenever they want, letting them always be connected to their loved ones. This will let people have a new lifestyle, in which the distance won't be a problem when considering if they should travel or not.

But Hyperloop is not only limited to this, it will also help us solve the environmental concern that currently exists attached to this sector. This new method of transportation will work with 100% electric energy, eliminating the use of fossil fuel. With that, we will create a sustainable world, respectful of the environment, as the transportation sector is one of the most contaminants around the world.

Entrepreneurship and innovation also characterize STMLoop International. We allow our team to have time to develop other ideas that can be useful for our society, we're not limited to Hyperloop, as this is a long-term goal. In the meantime, we're also growing our presence in the electric vehicle and renewable energy sectors, to start our contribution to the decarbonization of the world.

In STMLoop, we strongly believe that a change to a cleaner world needs to be done and we are giving our full commitment to this cause at the same time as we aim to increase the wellbeing of the people.

Name: Leros Transportation Group

Sustentamos nuestra actividad en valores como la seguridad, el compromiso, la excelencia y la confianza, promoviendo además una cultura organizacional centrada en la formación continua del talento humano. 

Estamos en constante evolución, combinando experiencia, innovación y responsabilidad social para seguir consolidándonos como una referencia en transporte, logística y turismo a nivel nacional e internacional.

Name: Expresso Palmares
Description:
Em 1953, a empresa Cyrio Haas & Cia iniciou suas atividades no ramo dos transportes, sob o comando de Guilherme Hoff, Raymundo Haas, Urbano Haas e Romeu Haas.

O primeiro serviço oferecido foi a linha Granja Getúlio Vargas – Porto Alegre. Algum tempo depois, a companhia começou a expandir seus negócios, criando os itinerários Palmares do Sul – Porto Alegre, Granja do Casamento – Porto Alegre e Cidreira – Porto Alegre (via Balneário Pinhal). Ainda nesta época teve início a prestação dos serviços de transporte coletivo urbano para a cidade de Viamão.

Em 1957, a empresa trocou de nome e passou a ser chamada de Expresso Palmares. Desde então, preocupou-se em ampliar, cada vez mais, os seus produtos e serviços.

A companhia adicionou novas linhas entre o litoral e a região metropolitana de Porto Alegre e também consolidou a prestação de serviços de transporte coletivo urbano em Palmares do Sul.

Buscando ainda mais alternativas para aprimorar o seu trabalho e melhor atender aos seus clientes, ao longo dos anos a Expresso Palmares incorporou outras companhias transportadoras, como a ELB e a Expresso Dunas Brancas.

O resultado de todos esses anos de dedicação e empenho pode ser comprovado pela constante evolução da empresa.

Atualmente, conta com um quadro funcional de mais de 150 colaboradores, uma frota de 53 veículos entre ônibus e microônibus, e mais de 25 itinerários intermunicipais, atendendo a um total de 19 municípios do Rio Grande do Sul, onde também atua realizando o transporte coletivo urbano na cidade de São José do Norte, viagens de fretamento, transporte escolar e turismo.

Name: Blacksburg Transit
Description:
Blacksburg Transit, better known as BT by our riders, is the public transportation provider for Blacksburg, Virginia Tech, Christiansburg, and parts of Montgomery County in southwest Virginia.

Blacksburg Transit began operations in 1983 with six 30 foot buses, one van and seven full time staff operating out of a trailer. Total ridership for the first year of service was 690,000.

Today BT serves a diverse customer base in the New River Valley through a variety of public transportation services including: fixed route, demand response, senior based transportation, commuter shuttles, paratransit, and connector services to regional transportation providers. Ridership for fiscal year 2024 exceeded 4.2 million passenger trips.

Our services include the following:

-Fixed routes that operate on a published time schedule and follow a designated route. The routes in Blacksburg are fixed routes, connecting major residential areas to the Virginia Tech campus and commercial areas. In Christiansburg, two semi-fixed routes, the Explorer Blue and Gold, connect the residential areas to the downtown business district and the northern shopping district.

-Demand response services pick up and drop off passengers at locations of their choosing. Reservations are required and in the case of BT Access certification of eligibility is required. In Christiansburg the Go Anywhere service is available for the general public to use.

Information about BT:
-BT is a department of the Town of Blacksburg
-BT is an equal opportunity employer.
-All BT vehicles are fully accessible, no matter the size!
-Service is offered every day except for New Year’s Day, Memorial Day, Independence Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas. Service levels vary based on the academic calendar of Virginia Tech. 

For more information browse the pages on our website, or call us at 540-443-1500.

Name: Transports Elèctrics Interurbans, S.A. (TEISA)
Description:
TRANSPORTS ELÈCTRICS INTERURBANS S.A. fou fundada el dia 13 de març de l’any 1920 al municipi de Banyoles. El seu nom prové de l’origen de la força motriu dels seus primers vehicles propietat de TEISA, que aprofitaven l’energia elèctrica per moure la seva flota d’òmnibus.

TEISA ha sabut afrontar els canvis que han anat sorgint de la demanda social, estant sempre a l’avantguarda de totes les novetats tècniques per poder donar el millor servei en les millors condicions.

Amb aquest sentiment TEISA ha tingut sempre la voluntat de millorar per tal de poder oferir servei a tots els viatgers. D’aquesta manera ha apostat per l’ampliació de les destinacions i la millora constant de la flota de vehicles.

Juntament amb el servei regular de transport de passatgers, TEISA ofereix altres serveis de transport, com són els serveis escolars, els desplaçament d’obrers fins al seu lloc de treball, els serveis especials per a viatgers discapacitats i els serveis discrecionals arreu del país i Europa.

TEISA també realitza serveis interurbans amb vehicles urbans en alguns municipis com Girona, Salt, Sarrià de Ter i Sant Julià de Ramis, a més de ser U.T.E. concessionària del T.P.O. d’Olot, que disposa d’una sèrie de línies urbanes que operen dins la població d’Olot.

Tenint en compte els reptes del futur i amb l’objectiu de respectar el medi ambient, TEISA està apostant per vehicles de baixa emissió (normativa Euro) i utilització de noves tecnologies, expenedores i combustibles més nets per a millorar els i la comoditat dels viatgers i dels ciutadans.

Description:

In tale ambito, la Società svolge la propria attività in varie aree di business, quali:
 - Trasporto pubblico locale, urbano ed extraurbano;
 - Autolinee a lunga percorrenza (nazionali);
 - Turismo e noleggi;
 - Spedizionieri.
La Società nasce dalla divisione di SITA S.p.A. (costituita nel 1912) che ha conferito le proprie attività di trasporto pubblico locale svolte dalle Direzioni Regionali Campania, Basilicata e Puglia alla SICUREZZA TRASPORTI AUTOLINEE - SITA SUD S.r.l.
Il "core business" dell’Azienda è rappresentato dalle attività di trasporto pubblico locale con autobus, con specifico riferimento al settore extraurbano e urbano, che la Società gestisce attraverso le già sopra citate Direzioni Regionali della Campania, Basilicata e Puglia.

Le autolinee a lunga percorrenza, che comprendono le linee c.d. statali, rappresentano un utilizzo complementare di mezzi, risorse ed esperienze acquisite, rivolte ad intercettare flussi interessati da potenziale sviluppo di traffico.
Il settore del turismo e dei noleggi rappresenta un’altra significativa linea di business. Questa  linea di business è principalmente localizzata in Puglia.

La missione dell’Azienda si può riassumere nella definizione di "soddisfazione del bisogno di trasporto persone su gomma, con la migliore qualità, sicurezza e sostenibilità".

Description:

Em 2014,  adquiriu a tradicional Viação Garcia de Londrina, passando a integrar um dos maiores grupos de transporte rodoviário do País. Mantém foco contínuo na otimização de custos, melhorias de processos e modernidade operacional. O grande diferencial da companhia sempre foi a gestão.
A sede administrativa e a garagem central do grupo estão em um ponto estratégico no norte do Paraná -  em Londrina - para gerenciar todas as rotas oferecidas pela companhia aos passageiros. A empresa vem construindo, nestas quase duas décadas, uma história de expansão e consolidação que tem, como pilares, a excelência no atendimento e a segurança nas estradas. O destaque é a dinâmica renovação de sua frota, composta sempre por veículos de novíssima geração, e serviços diferenciados que garantem conforto e bem-estar aos passageiros. A capacitação constante dos colaboradores é outro ponto de sustentação da empresa para a excelência no atendimento.

Name: Slidr
Description:
Slidr is a sustainable transportation solution designed to reduce congestion and make mobility easier, greener, and more accessible. Our 100% electric shuttle services provide first and last-mile connections to mass transit, encourage visitors to park once, and help people avoid using their cars for short trips. 

By partnering with innovative cities and forward-thinking advertisers, we've provided over 1 million rides without burning any gas. Our commitment to sustainability and community is at the heart of everything we do, offering both eco-friendly, on-demand, and fixed route options that create local jobs and connect communities.

Name: GilsanBus
Description:
At GilsanBus, we take pride in being leaders in the bus transportation industry in Sevilla and beyond. With a decades-long track record, we have set a standard of excellence in the sector.

Our passion for buses goes beyond the industry; it is a fundamental part of our identity. As the Gilsan Brothers, we have dedicated our lives to providing quality transportation solutions that connect people to exciting and memorable destinations.

We specialize in a wide range of services, from unforgettable weddings to educational school trips, cruise transfers in Sevilla, MICE tourism, national and international tours, and participation in world-renowned tourism fairs. We are certified with ISO 9001-UNE13816, ISO 39001-ISO 14001, ISO 45001, and the "Q de Calidad," demonstrating our commitment to safety, quality, and sustainability.

As members of the Sevilla Congress & Convention Bureau, we actively promote Sevilla as an event and conference destination, and our presence at international tourism fairs has established us as an industry leader.

Our dedication to excellence and innovation has led us to explore new technologies, such as augmented reality applied to bus tourism, positioning us at the forefront of the industry.

Joining GilsanBus means joining an unparalleled travel experience. Connect with us on LinkedIn and discover how we can make your journeys unforgettable!

Name: The Rapid
Description:
The Rapid (Interurban Transit Partnership) is the authority that provides a variety of public transportation services for the Grand Rapids metro area and beyond. It is organized and operates under Michigan Public Act 196 of 1986.

The Rapid operates fixed route, demand-response services for people with disabilities and those living outside the fixed-route service area, and car and vanpooling programs among other services.

The activities of The Rapid are overseen by a 15-member board of directors that represent the six municipalities in The Rapid service area.

Name: Guaguas Global
Description:
SALCAI UTINSA S.A. (GLOBAL), es la empresa que presta el servicio regular de transporte interurbano de viajeros en la isla de Gran Canaria.  Nace en el año 2000, como consecuencia de la fusión entre las dos operadoras de transporte interurbanos existentes en la isla, SALCAI y UTINSA. 

Desde el 6 de octubre de 1973 hasta el 17 de marzo de 2000, las dos compañías que ahora forman GLOBAL operaban por separado como consecuencia de una decisión gubernamental que puso fin, entonces, a un prolongado conflicto laboral surgido de la quiebra de la empresa que prestaba el servicio, AICASA.  Eran tiempos complejos para muchísimos sectores, complejidad a la que no fue ajeno el transporte.  La crisis de AICASA produjo una huelga muy dura que provocó la intervención oficial y que dio lugar al nacimiento de dos empresas diferentes.

Casi 27 años después, aquella división promovida por las instituciones para dar una salida a una crisis concreta, quedó invalidada por el impulso de las propias administraciones públicas canarias, que instaron a las dos compañías a entenderse para poder así formar una empresa de gran calado, capaz de mejorar sustancialmente la calidad del servicio público de transportes en la isla de Gran Canaria.
Location: Las Palmas de GC, Las Palmas

Name: EliteClass Transporte Executivo
Description:
EliteClass Transporte Executivo | Excelência em Mobilidade Corporativa em Todo o Estado de São Paulo

A EliteClass é uma empresa especializada em transporte executivo, oferecendo soluções personalizadas para atender às necessidades de mobilidade de empresas em todo o estado de São Paulo. Nosso compromisso é proporcionar um serviço que alia pontualidade, segurança e conforto, garantindo que colaboradores, gestores e executivos cheguem aos seus destinos com eficiência e tranquilidade.

Abrangência Estadual

Com sede em Indaiatuba, a EliteClass possui uma estrutura logística que permite atender a demandas em todas as regiões do estado de São Paulo. Seja para deslocamentos urbanos, intermunicipais ou para aeroportos, estamos preparados para oferecer um serviço de transporte executivo de alta qualidade, adaptado às especificidades de cada cliente.

Serviços Oferecidos
	•	Transporte Corporativo: Atendemos às necessidades de mobilidade de empresas, oferecendo transporte para reuniões, visitas técnicas, eventos e outros compromissos profissionais.
	•	Transfers para Aeroportos: Realizamos traslados para os principais aeroportos do estado, garantindo pontualidade e conforto.
	•	Eventos e Casamentos: Oferecemos transporte para eventos sociais, garantindo que os convidados cheguem com segurança e estilo.
	•	City Tours e Turismo Corporativo: Organizamos passeios personalizados para grupos corporativos, proporcionando uma experiência única de lazer e integração.

Frota e Motoristas

Nossa frota é composta por veículos modernos e confortáveis, incluindo sedãs executivos, SUVs e vans de luxo. Todos os veículos passam por manutenção regular e são equipados com tecnologias que garantem a segurança e o conforto dos passageiros.

Nossos motoristas são profissionais treinados, uniformizados e comprometidos com a excelência no atendimento. Além disso, oferecemos motoristas bilíngues, conforme a necessidade do cliente.

- Telefone / Whatsapp: (19) 98412-2307

Name: OnniBus
Description:
YOUR BUS TICKET STORE & THE GREAT VALUE WAY TO TRAVEL INTER-CITY ACROSS FINLAND.

OnniBus.com is the leading inter-city express bus service operator in Finland.
OnniBus launched its operations on 1 January 2012, offering daily service between Tampere and Pori, operating with one bus. Since then, OnniBus has become one of the biggest brands in Finland, revolutionizing the entire mass transport industry by making the bus travel once again competitive alternative travel mode against trains and private cars. 

In July 2014 OnniBus launched its double decker bus service network and was able to offer fares with better value. In October 2018 OnniBus became part of Finnish family owned bus company Koiviston Auto group, based in Lahti. Koiviston Auto’s inter-city bus network became part of OnniBus network under brand name OnniBus FLEX. Company strives to develop its state-of-the-art digital platform and sales channels.

OUR PHILOSPHY

We know that customers travel to places where they receive a warm welcome and stay where they are looked after, so our philosophy is to combine excellent service with a passion for making our customers happy, with great value and flexible pricing. With offering two distinct service brands, OnniBus.com and OnniBus FLEX, we can offer services for different kind of routes and travel periods in Finland.

We want you to stay with us, and next time to bring your friends along too. Our mascot Onni shares our passion for public transport and makes sure that we always strive to make your journey with OnniBus.com as good as it can be.

Name: Piaggio Commercial Perú
Description:
Fundado en 1884 por Rinaldo Piaggio, desde 2003 el Grupo Piaggio está controlado por Immsi S.p.A., un holding industrial que cotiza en la bolsa italiana.

La gama de productos del Grupo Piaggio incluye scooters, ciclomotores y motocicletas comercializados bajo las marcas Piaggio, Vespa, Gilera, Aprilia, Moto Guzzi, Derbi y Scarabeo. El Grupo también opera en el sector del transporte ligero de tres y cuatro ruedas.

El Grupo Piaggio tiene su sede en Pontedera (Pisa, Italia) y cuenta con plantas de producción en todo el mundo: en Pontedera (Pisa), que produce vehículos de dos ruedas de las marcas Piaggio, Vespa y Gilera, vehículos ligeros de transporte para el mercado europeo y motores para scooters y motocicletas; Noale (Venecia), centro técnico para el desarrollo de motocicletas y base de Aprilia Racing; Scorzè (Venecia), que produce vehículos de dos ruedas de las marcas Aprilia y Scarabaeo; Mandello del Lario (Lecco, Italia), que produce vehículos y motores Moto Guzzi; Baramati (en el estado indio de Maharashtra), que produce vehículos ligeros de transporte de tres y cuatro ruedas para el mercado indio, motores diésel y turbodiésel para los vehículos comerciales del Grupo y, desde principios de 2012, la scooter Vespa a la venta en el mercado indio; Vinh Phuc (Vietnam), que produce scooters Vespa y Piaggio para el mercado local y el área de la ASEAN.
El Grupo Piaggio también opera en China con una empresa conjunta.

En Latinoamérica consolida su participación como Piaggio Commercial en México a través de Moto Galeria SA de CV, en 2019, obteniendo el 20% de market share en 4 años de operación, llevando el crecimiento a consolidar su operación en el continente abriendo en Estados Unidos en 2022, especificamente con el modelo Ape Xtra, e ingresando al mercado peruano con la gama Ape City, Ape City NXT + y Ape Xtra en el 2024.

Name: Entreprises LK
Description:
Créée en 1934, LK KUNEGEL est une société de transport routier de voyageurs alsacienne et familiale, dont le siège se situe à Colmar. 

L'entreprise regroupe aujourd’hui 9 entreprises de transport réparties du Nord au Sud de l’Alsace, et assurent au quotidien les déplacements de milliers de personne : transports scolaires, lignes régulières, transports urbains, transports de salariés, locations d’autocars avec conducteurs… et bien plus encore. 

Les Entreprises LK totalisent 550 autocars et près de 830 collaborateurs. 

- Entreprise labellisée Alsace Excellence 
- Membre du Club ETI Grand Est.

Name: Odysse Ltd.
Description:
We’re building London’s first fully integrated electric fleet service for ride-hailing, powered by AI, data analytics, and advanced operations.

We are developing machine learning systems that will learn from ride patterns to predict demand. This will allow us to stay ahead of the curve, positioning vehicles where they’re needed and ensuring drivers are in the right place at the right time.

With more than one million miles already completed and a target of 100x growth, we’re on a mission to redefine how cities move.

Name: Consórcio Transvida
Description:
O Consórcio Transvida, é composto por quatro empresas: Ambiental Transportes de Passageiros, Transppass Transporte de Passageiros, Viação Campo Belo e Rvtrans Transportes Urbanos, sendo esta última, a líder do Consórcio.

Description: El grupo LINEcar es el principal operador de transporte de viajeros en Castilla y León y uno de los principales operadores en el ámbito nacional.
