Name: Éirebus Ltd
Description:
The Eirebus Group provides destination management services, luxury private coach charter and scheduled commuter services in Ireland and the UK. A family-run business, Eirebus is one of Dublin’s largest operators, with a fleet of 80 deluxe vehicles. In the UK, we operate 40 coaches from our Edinburgh Coach Lines headquarters in Scotland, with a secondary base in Southampton, England. 

Our destination management divisions in Ireland and Scotland offer bespoke leisure & business tour programmes to inbound individuals and groups. We also operate the internationally recognised Gray Line franchise in Scotland.  

In Dublin, our multi-award winning Swords Express and Fingal Express commuter services carry well over one million passengers per year, with 140 daily departures. We are proud to have been awarded "Passenger Transport Company of the Year" at the 2013, 2014, 2015, 2017 & 2019 Irish Logistics & Transport Awards, "Commuter Coach Operator of the Year" at the 2018 Fleet Bus & Coach Awards and "Best Livery & Corporate Identity" at the 2020 Fleet Bus & Coach Awards 

We are members of the Irish Tour Operators Association, the Coach Tourism & Transport Council of Ireland, Dublin Convention Bureau, the Confederation of Passenger Transport UK, the European Tour Operators Association, Meeting Edinburgh and the Scottish Destination Management Association. We employ more than 150 people in the UK and Ireland. 

Websites

SwordsExpress.com
FingalExpress.com
Eirebusdmc.com
Graylinetours.com
Edinburghcoachlines.com
Thistledmc.com

Name: Concierge Car Worldwide
Description:
Concierge Car is a modern world’s transportation needs treatment specialized company that gathers agility, punctuality, comfort, security, technology and hotel concepts into a complete service. As a hotel concierge, we are ready to serve any transportation need in a cordial, efficient and totally personalized way.
Concierge Car offers transport solutions for many situations of your day, providing vehicles with available drivers working on the following segments:
*Concierge Corporate
*Concierge Transfers
*Concierge Tours

• Concierge Corporate
Solutions to corporative transportation, by driving executives to events, meetings, congresses and airports. We have bilingual drivers, early schedules and punctuality. Our vehicles bring Wi-Fi systems to access the Internet, books/magazines to read along the way and little snacks, providing more comfort and productivity.

• Concierge Transfers
Shuttle service to Congonhas, Guarulhos (Cumbica) and Viracopos Airports. We control the flights’ schedule, providing total comfort, security and flexibility to our clients.
__________________________________________________________________________________________

A Concierge Car é uma empresa especializada no atendimento das necessidades de transporte do mundo moderno, reunindo agilidade, pontualidade, conforto, segurança, tecnologia e conceitos de hotelaria.
Como o Concierge de um hotel, estamos prontos para atender qualquer necessidade de transporte de maneira cordial, eficiente e totalmente personalizada.
A Concierge Car oferece soluções de transporte para diversas situações do seu dia-a-dia, disponibilizando veículos com motoristas monolíngues e bilíngues atuando nos seguintes segmentos:
* Corporativo
* Transfers 
* Tours Guiados
* Outro serviços

Name: Empress Elite Limousine
Description:
Empress Elite Limousine, headquartered in vibrant Atlanta, Georgia, stands as your premier transportation partner. With a stellar 14-year track record, we're committed to redefining the luxury travel experience.

Our seasoned chauffeurs are dedicated to delivering unparalleled service, ensuring every journey is exceptional. Our extensive fleet boasts sedans, SUVs, limousines, and vans, tailored to meet your specific requirements.

Whether it's a crucial business meeting, airport transfer, or a memorable occasion, Empress Elite Limousine has your back. Punctuality and reliability are our watchwords, ensuring you always arrive on time.

At Empress Elite Limousine, we believe in nothing less than excellence. Our mission is to exceed your expectations, making every ride memorable. Get in touch today and savor the opulence and convenience of our Atlanta private car services.

Name: Societatea de Transport București STB S.A.
Description:
With over 150 years of experience, Societatea de Transport Bucharest STB S.A. is the largest operator of public surface transport in Romania and also the main operator of public surface transport in the Municipality of Bucharest and Ilfov County, having one of the most extensive transport networks in Europe, with a route length of 1651 km double track .

As the main transport operator, STB SA is able to meet the various mobility needs of citizens through a wide range of transport services provided with a fleet of approximately 2000 vehicles (buses, trolleybuses and trams), in recent years investments have been made major both in the renewal of the inclusive fleet with hybrid buses, and in the adoption of modern, digitized payment and information solutions aimed at increasing the quality of the transport services offered.

The tariff offer was made more flexible by implementing the concept of metropolitan lines (which brings together all urban, regional and express lines), as well as by applying the time tariff, creating several types of subscriptions and integrating the tariff offer with that of Metrorex, but also with the train in within a pilot project implemented on the Bucharest - Otopeni link.

To pay for travel, STB S.A. uses a modern charging system, based on contactless card technology. Also, payment for the trip can be made via SMS, through the 24Pay mobile application, as well as with the contactless bank card.

At the same time, to improve the travel experience, STB S.A. made the InfoTB app available to users for real-time travel planning, including information on metro connections.

The mission of STB S.A. is to provide surface urban public transport services for the citizens of the Capital, guided by sustainability criteria, contributing to a development that responds to mobility needs in a dynamic continuum.

Especialista em trajetos seguros no Rio de Janeiro e nas principais cidades do país.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Regionale Verkehrsbetriebe Baden-Wettingen (RVBW) AG
Description:
Die RVBW AG ist ein öffentlich-rechtliches, regionales Busunternehmen im öffentlichen Verkehr im Kanton Aargau. Mit modernen Bussen und gut ausgebildetem Personal bringen wir jährlich über 14 Millionen Fahrgäste sicher und umweltfreundlich an ihr Ziel.

Mit dem 15-Minuten-Takt, auf Parallelstrecken sogar 7 1/2 Minuten-Takt, reist ein Grossteil unserer Fahrgäste „ohne Fahrplan“. Dank der Zusammenarbeit mit den Transportpartnern Indermühle Bus AG und Twerenbold Bus AG können wir ein öV-Angebot einer Grossstadt gewährleisten.

Über 200 motivierte Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter freuen sich im Dienste der RVBW und ihren Transportpartnern für Sie da zu sein.

Name: Keolis Argenteuil Boucles de Seine
Description:
Le nouveau territoire d’Argenteuil Boucles de Seine est organisé autour des 9 communes de l’est de la communauté d’agglomération Saint-Germain Boucles de Seine et de la ville d’Argenteuil.

KEOLIS Argenteuil Boucles de Seine, filiale du Groupe KEOLIS, exploite ce territoire qui compte 46 lignes régulières et qui assure des dessertes intra et intercommunales permettant de rejoindre les 10 gares du territoire et de nombreux lieux d’intérêt (lieux d’études, établissements de santé, équipements de loisirs et sportifs, zones d’emplois).

Name: Emanuel Transportes
Description:
Somos uma empresa com décadas de experiência na área do transporte. 
Atualmente, oferecemos serviços de fretamento, transporte escolar e aluguel de máquinas e equipamentos. 

Acreditamos que cada trajeto tem um propósito.
Mais do que percorrer distâncias, seguimos um caminho guiado pela fé, segurança e compromisso.

Porque O Caminho Importa!
Seguiremos transportando vidas com excelência!

Name: Mie Ride
Description:
Company Overview:

Mie Ride is a revolutionary ride-sharing app that offers a fixed-price model for commuters, eliminating unpredictable surge pricing and reducing transportation costs. We provide a seamless ride experience for both passengers and drivers with features like in-app calling, texting, and flexible booking options. Serving a variety of routes across Ontario, Mie Ride focuses on convenience, affordability, and efficiency for daily commuters, students, and businesses.

What We Do:

• Fixed Pricing: No surprise fees. Pay the same amount every time.
• Seamless Experience: Book rides quickly with transparent pricing and route information.
• Commuter-Friendly: Ideal for job commuters, students, and anyone needing regular, reliable transportation.
• Driver Support: Fair compensation, easy withdrawal options, and a great working environment for drivers.

Mission:

To transform how people travel by offering affordable, predictable, and eco-friendly transportation options for everyone. We’re committed to making commuting stress-free and budget-friendly, all while supporting drivers with competitive earnings.

Core Values:

• Reliability: Offering consistent, dependable rides for commuters across Ontario.
• Innovation: Continuously enhancing our app to provide the best service for both users and drivers.
• Affordability: Fixed, fair pricing that makes commuting easier on your budget.
• Community: Supporting drivers with flexible opportunities and providing a safe, reliable ride experience for passengers.

Name: Irmãos Mota - Construção de Carroçarias S.A.
Description:
Founded in January 1980, Irmãos Mota S.A, has more than 30 years of history as an international reference in the construction of vans and buses for passenger transport. With a high capacity for customization of the structure of the ATOMIC models, Irmãos Mota S.A offers the best solutions for the tourism, long distance, urban and school transport segments. With a production of around 200 units/year and a revenue of around 22 million euros, Irmãos Mota, S.A. is currently one of the leading national companies in the sector in Portugal.

Our focus is to design, innovate and develop cutting-edge technology and solutions, in order to place our products at the forefront of the sector.

Name: LeShuttle
Description: Whether you’re new or travel with us regularly, there are many benefits to choosing LeShuttle (formerly Eurotunnel). You can travel between our terminals in Folkestone and Calais in just 35 minutes via the Channel Tunnel, giving you more time to explore. Our train locomotives are fully electric, making us greener than travelling by plane or ferry. We even have our own nature reserve. Whether you're going solo or bringing the whole gang, with one ticket you can take up to 9 people, bring the little ones, the dog and as much as you can pack we're ready for you!

Name: Local Locadora de Ônibus
Description: Empresa de transporte de pessoas com foco no transporte de funcionários da indústria localizada na Região Metropolitana de Porto Alegre - RS. Atualmente conta com uma frota de 120 veículos entre ônibus, microônibus e veículos leves.Grandes indústrias da região fazem parte da lista de clientes, sendo diariamente transportadas em torno de 5.000 pessoas.

Name: Keolis Porte des Alpes
Description:
Bienvenue dans l'univers de Keolis Portes des Alpes, votre partenaire de mobilité locale de choix ! Nous sommes fiers de desservir les départements de l’Isère et de la Haute-Savoie avec une expertise et une attention de proximité.

Chez Keolis Porte des Alpes nous employons près de 245 collaborateurs déployés sur 5 sites et nous disposons d’une flotte d’environ 190 véhicules. 

Nous nous efforçons de fournir une expérience de mobilité durable, sécurisée, confortable et fiable à tous nos clients voyageurs. Notre équipe de professionnels expérimentés est dévouée à répondre à vos besoins de transports, que ce soit pour vos déplacements quotidiens, que vous soyez un étudiant, un travailleur, un voyageur occasionnel ou un touriste qui découvre notre belle région.

Nous sommes fiers de jouer un rôle clé dans votre vie quotidienne. Nous sommes là pour vous aider à vous déplacer, à explorer et à profiter de votre environnement avec une confiance totale.

Rejoignez la page de Keolis Portes des Alpes pour suivre toutes les actualités !

Name: TROPPER
Description:
En Tropper, creemos que el transporte va más allá del traslado. Somos una empresa comprometida con ofrecer soluciones seguras, eficientes y humanas para el transporte de personal y ejecutivo en los estados de Aguascalientes, San Luis Potosí, Guanajuato y Querétaro.

Nuestro propósito es claro: conectar a las personas con sus destinos, con su trabajo, con su vida. Lo hacemos a través de un servicio personalizado, puntual, confiable y con estándares de calidad que se adaptan a cada cliente, ya sea una gran corporación o un evento único.

En cada trayecto, no solo llevamos pasajeros: llevamos sueños, equipos de trabajo, talento, compromiso y futuro. Por eso invertimos en tecnología, capacitación, monitoreo y atención especializada, con una flota moderna y una red operativa sólida y cercana.

Somos parte del cambio hacia una movilidad más responsable, más segura y más consciente. Porque en Tropper, moverse no es solo llegar… es avanzar.

Name: BUBO VIP transfer
Description:
Sme prepravná spoločnosť, ktorá ponúka luxusný transport limuzínami s dôrazom na najvyšší komfort počas Vašej cesty. Naša firma vznikla v roku 2016 spojením skúsených vodičov, ktorí sa rozhodli posunúť štandard prepravných služieb na novú úroveň. Odvtedy máme za sebou stovky spokojných zákazníkov a neustále sa usilujeme o dokonalosť v každom detaile našich služieb.

Či už cestujete ako jednotlivec, väčšia skupina alebo potrebujete prepraviť zamestnancov – s nami sa vždy dostanete do cieľa bezpečne, pohodlne a spoľahlivo.

Name: FlotaOspina.
Description: Somos una empresa de transporte terrestre de pasajeros comprometida con brindarles viajes seguros, cómodos y confiables.

Name: Gamla Uppsala Buss AB
Description:
Gamla Uppsala Buss (GUB) is one of Sweden's largest publically owned bus companies and is currently owned by Region Uppsala.

Our main business is to operate the city bus traffic in Uppsala on behalf of our owner Region Uppsala. Other parts of our operations include driving library buses on behalf of Uppsala kommun, a little bit of coach traffic, and leasing speciallly adapted buses to Uppsala's mobile kindergarten. Aside our main business GUB also has a teaching facility for educationg bus drivers. Today, the company employs more than 500 people.

To GUB, the environmental benefits in public transport alone are not sufficient. Therefore we have an active environmental policy and have been certified according to ISO 14001 for 25 years. All employees at GUB are part of our environmental efforts, bus drivers as well as technicians and administrators.

Name: Fédération des transporteurs par autobus
Description: La Fédération des transporteurs par autobus regroupe plus de 600 entreprises privées de transport par autobus de tout acabit, œuvrant dans plusieurs secteurs d’activités tels que le transport interurbain, urbain, nolisé-touristique, scolaire, adapté, aéroportuaire, médical et par abonnement. Elle a pour mission de favoriser la mobilité efficace et sécuritaire des personnes et ainsi, contribuer à l’image, la valorisation et la stabilité du transport collectif des personnes.

Name: Auto Viação Tijuca
Description:
A Auto Viação Tijuca S.A., carinhosamente chamada de Tijuquinha, é uma tradicional empresa carioca fundada em 1961 e pioneira na regulamentação do transporte público.

Com 64 anos de atuação no transporte urbano, atendemos milhares de passageiros diariamente, sempre priorizando a qualidade da nossa frota, o bem-estar dos colaboradores e a excelência no serviço. Além disso, oferecemos soluções de mobilidade na Cidade Maravilhosa.

Name: DCAcar
Description:
DCAcar – On Time, Every Time

DCAcar is more than just a car service — we are one of Washington, D.C.’s leaders in executive transportation. Ranked as the 5th largest executive transportation provider in the region by the Washington Business Journal (2025), we’ve built our reputation on reliability, professionalism, and a relentless focus on customer experience. In 2024, we were honored by the U.S. Chamber of Commerce CO—100 list as a Customer Champion, recognized among America’s Top 100 Small Businesses for outstanding service and innovation.

We specialize in executive black car service, corporate transportation, airport transfers, and event logistics. Serving Reagan National (DCA), Dulles (IAD), and BWI, as well as large-scale events across the DMV region, our services are trusted by Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, diplomats, universities, and private clients who demand precision and discretion.

Our fleet includes late-model executive sedans, luxury SUVs, Sprinter vans, mini-buses, and full-size coach buses — giving us the flexibility to serve everything from VIP one-on-one travel to large delegations. 

Proven performance matters. In 2024 alone, DCAcar completed 324,000 trips, covering more than 13.8 million miles and delivering 20,600+ hours of service. With a 99.62% on-time record across 32,487 pickups and 1,046 five-star reviews, our results speak louder than words.

Behind the numbers is our team — professional chauffeurs who embody consistency, licensed and insured to the highest standards, supported by 24/7 VIP live agents. At DCAcar, there are no phone menus, no wait times — just people ready to help when you need them most.
Founded by CEO Davit Zakaryan, DCAcar is proudly immigrant-owned and built on integrity and service. We give back by supporting major cultural institutions, including George Washington’s Mount Vernon and the People’s House Museum.

Name: DROMOS GmbH
Description:
Dromos: Setting the new technology paradigm for the next century in urban passenger and freight transport

Dromos deploys 21st century tech to build a completely new autonomous urban transport system for high throughput in cities. The paradigm for the next century consists of individual, personal vehicles operating in high frequency drip-feed.

Dromos mesh networks use narrow, lightweight infrastructure. We boost capacity by 10x compared to today’s systems.

Dromos carries 10,000 people in the space of a bike lane per hour, or 25,000 cubic meters of parcels & freight, directly into the heart of cities.

Name: SERVITAC SAS
Description:
We are a special passenger transportation company with more than 21 years of experience, providing the best to our clients and collaborators.

We have reached every corner of Colombia with our fleet of vehicles, standing out with our high safety, quality and environmental standards, with the aim of providing excellent service on the road. 

So travel safe, travel with Servitac!


Somos empresa de transporte especial de pasajeros con mas de 21 años de experiencia, brindando lo mejor a nuestros clientes y colaboradores.

Hemos llegado a todos los rincones de Colombia con nuestra flota de vehículos,  destacando con nuestros altos estándares de seguridad, calidad y ambiental, con el objetivo de brindar un excelente servicio en la vía. 

Así que viaja seguro, viaja con Servitac!

Name: Pilotfish Networks AB
Description: Pilotfish is a highly innovative, green company from Gothenburg, Sweden, focused on cloud-based solutions for public transport. We are fast-growing, and we lead the change from proprietary, vendor locked systems towards standards that open up for a whole new ecosystem of hardware and software suppliers. Our vision is to improve public transport so much that it becomes the preferred choice of travel. Pilotfish offers an open Vehicle Communication Platform and Fleet Management Applications to Public Transport Customers. Pilotfish technology is based on standards and IT-architecture from the organisation ITxPT.

Name: DrivenBus
Description:
DrivenBus is an RTA-approved, app-based minibus pooling service designed to transform the daily commute in Dubai. Whether you’re heading to work, school, or leisure destinations, we provide a cost-effective, sustainable, and reliable alternative to traditional transportation options.

Why Choose DrivenBus?

Convenience: Book your seat via our easy-to-use app and enjoy hassle-free rides.
Affordability: Save money by sharing your journey with others.
Eco-Friendly: Reduce your carbon footprint by opting for shared mobility.
Safety First: Our service is fully approved by the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA), ensuring compliance with the highest standards.

With DrivenBus, you’re not just getting from point A to B—you’re joining a smarter way to travel.

Download the DrivenBus app today and discover how we’re revolutionising minibus pooling in Dubai.

Name: VIAÇÃO URBANA GUARULHOS
Description:
A Viação Urbana Guarulhos, também conhecida como VUG ou ainda Viação Urbana, é uma empresa de transporte de passageiros da cidade de Guarulhos no estado de São Paulo que opera as linhas municipais, como concessionária da Guarupass, fundada em 02 de Março de 2013.

Tem sua sede localizada na Rodovia Presidente Dutra, com uma área de instalação adequada para comportar sua frota, oferecendo manutenção adequada, abastecimento e lavagem, estoque de peças de reposição e área administrativa para controles operacionais e de gestão.

Desde 2010, a cidade de Guarulhos foi dividida em 3 áreas no transporte municipal, onde a Viação Urbana passou a atuar na área 1, fazendo linhas nos bairros do Vila Galvão, Vila Rio, Cocaia, entre outros.

Name: Bus and Coach Association NZ
Description:
The Bus and Coach Association (BCA) New Zealand has been the authoritative voice of New Zealand’s bus and coach industry since 1931. 

Our members operate all of the public transport bus services, 98% of the Ministry of Education school buses and the vast majority of long distance, tour and charter services throughout New Zealand, employing over 13,000 staff and contributing more than $1.8 billion annually to New Zealand’s GDP.

Our membership also includes vehicle manufacturers and a wide range of supply chain and support organisations.

We provide advice to government decision makers and our members, while advocating for safe and sustainable transport options for New Zealand.

Name: Transdev Centre-Val de Loire
Description:
Avec une implantation internationale dans 19 pays, le Groupe Transdev propose des solutions de mobilité intégrées, fiables et multimodales contribuant au développement harmonieux des territoires et au bien-être des habitants. Parce que bouger est essentiel pour se rencontrer, travailler… notre raison d'être est de permettre à chacun de se déplacer chaque jour grâce à des solutions sûres, efficaces et innovantes au service du bien commun. 

Activement engagés dans la transition énergétique et la réduction de la fracture sociale, nous connectons et reconnectons les communautés entre elles et les territoires ruraux et urbains, en apportant des réponses adaptées aux besoins de nos clients et passagers.

Le développement des compétences de nos collaboratrices et collaborateurs est une priorité : par la formation continue, la mobilité professionnelle, et en partageant les meilleures pratiques des équipes à travers le monde. De la conception d'un réseau de transport, à son fonctionnement quotidien en passant par la recherche de réponses innovantes pour la mobilité de demain, la palette des métiers au sein de Transdev offre des possibilités d'évolution professionnelle qui sont autant de découvertes de cet univers passionnant.

 With a global presence in 19 countries, the Transdev Group offers integrated, reliable and multimodal mobility solutions that contribute to the harmonious development of local aeras and the well-being of their inhabitants. Our purpose is to empower freedom to move every day thanks to safe, reliable and innovative solutions that serve the common good. 

Actively engaged in the energy transition and the reduction of the social divide, we connect and reconnect communities and rural and urban areas by providing solutions adapted to the needs of our customers and passengers.

Developing the skills of our employees is a priority: through continuous training, professional mobility, and by sharing best practices among teams around the world.

Name: Keolis Roissy Pays de France Ouest
Description:
Keolis exploite des réseaux de transport public pour le compte de 300 Autorités Organisatrices dans le monde. Le Groupe est aujourd’hui présent dans 16 pays et sur 4 continents. Leader mondial du métro automatique et du tramway, il est également n°1 du transport sanitaire et n°2 du stationnement en France. Chaque année, 3 milliards de voyageurs utilisent nos services de mobilité partagée.

Keolis Roissy Pays de France Ouest (KRPFO) est une nouvelle entreprise créée dans le cadre du gain de la DSP 6. Elle exploite pour le compte d'Île-de-France Mobilités, les 61 lignes de bus desservant l'Ouest de la Communauté d'Agglomération Roissy Pays de France. KRPFO emploie plus de 400 collaborateurs et compte près de 210 véhicules.

Name: Autocars Menguy-Burban
Description:
L'esprit de MENGUY BURBAN, c'est plus de 90 ans d'histoire au service de ses clients.
Nous avons grandi avec et grâce à vous, passant de TPE familiale locale au statut de PME opérant sur tout le continent européen.
Ce qui nous conforte dans notre humble idée de ce que peut être la réussite, c'est avant tout la satisfaction de tous nos clients. Ceux qui nous mandatent, et ceux qui partent en route avec nous. Nous nous sommes nourri à chaque instant de leurs retours, leurs remarques et surtout leur satisfaction.
L'intégralité de nos équipes est formée et équipée pour pouvoir garder en tête ce seul objectif : vous satisfaire chaque jour, avec une qualité et une sécurité irréprochable.
L'histoire MENGUY BURBAN, c'est aussi une histoire Française. Nos équipes, nos emplois et nos investissements sont tous nationaux, malgré la concurrence rude des réglementations de certains autres pays. Rester acteur du tissus local, et être chaque jour ambassadeur du savoir-faire et du savoir-être à la Française a toujours été une priorité.
Pierrick Burban Président Directeur Général

Name: Hessische Landesbahn
Description:
Mehr als eine Bahn? Ja, das sind wir!
Wir sind nicht nur eines der erfolgreichsten regionalen Verkehrsunternehmen für den ÖPNV und Schienengüterverkehr, sondern betreiben in eigenen Werkstätten die Instandhaltung für unsere Fahrzeuge und Infrastruktur. Mit unseren Schienenfahrzeugen und Bussen sind wir in ganz Hessen und angrenzenden Bundesländern unterwegs und bringen dich sicher und schnell ans Ziel. Ob Stadt oder Land, die HLB ist an 8 Standorten ganz in deiner Nähe vertreten. 

Wir zählen auf Dich - zusammen die HLB von Morgen gestalten! 
Mit uns gewinnst Du einen zuverlässigen und beständigen Arbeitgeber, der Dich jederzeit unterstützt. Wir stehen Dir mit Rat und Tat zur Seite, dabei setzen wir auf eine vertrauensvolle und langfristige Zusammenarbeit, um gemeinsam mit dir die HLB von Morgen zu gestalten. Hierbei wirst du aktiv in alle Entscheidungsprozesse mit einbezogen. 

Du bist einzigartig? Genau wie wir!
Wir bieten Dir individuelle Entfaltungs- und Weiterentwicklungsmöglichkeiten an und helfen Dir, Dein volles Potenzial auszuschöpfen, denn wir sehen jeden Menschen als Individuum und fördern seine persönlichen Stärken.

Wir lieben Vielfalt - genauso wie Du? 
Wir beschäftigen 1500 Mitarbeiter in 100 Berufen mit 38 Nationalitäten. Diese Vielfalt an Menschen und Berufsgruppen empfinden wir als Bereicherung und ist tief in unserer Kultur verankert. Trotz dieser Unterschiedlichkeiten sprechen wir eine gemeinsame Sprache und erreichen zusammen Großes - unsere Vielfalt ist unsere Stärke.

Unsere Mission: Nachhaltig fahren - und Deine? 
Durch unsere langjährige Erfahrung in der Verkehrsbranche verstehen wir unser Handwerk perfekt. Die Mobilität zukunftsfähig zu gestalten ist eine zentrale Aufgabe des Unternehmens. Mit Hilfe von klimaschonenden Antriebstechnologien und der Vernetzung von Verkehrsträgern gestalten wir die Verkehrswende aktiv mit.

Haben wir Dein Interesse geweckt? Dann besuch uns auf www.hlb-online.de!

Name: EK Private Chauffeur Concierge
Description:
Courteous, highly dynamic and dedicated chauffeur with a proven track record of increasing efficiency, quality and customer satisfaction. Adept at driving and taking care of luxury and electric cars including Rolls Royce, Bentley, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Bugatti, Maserati, McLaren, Aston Martin, Porsche, Mercedes Benz, Tesla, Jaguar, Range Rover, and BMW, as well as various VAN veh

Emmanuel Kontchou is the President and Founder of EK Private Chauffeur Concierge. He was inspired to create this business after nights of going out with my college friends on campus. He was the one my friends called upon when they needed a ride. As He was not a part of the drinking and partying scene on campus, He was frequently available to act as a “designated driver”. He found that he thoroughly enjoyed chauffeuring friends around and providing them with safe transportation. I was determined to turn this gratifying service into a business. In 2013, He made my dream a reality and launched EK Private Chauffeur Concierge in Frederick, Maryland.

In today’s world, local limousine and taxi services and web-based companies like Uber and Lyft are focused on making fast money. EK Private Chauffeur Concierge , however, bring you back to a time where safety, understanding, loyalty, and trust were the key components of a business relationship.

He passion is delighting every client, especially the most discerning. With his unique insights into the Washington, DC Metro area and New York, and my impressive “little black book”, He has made it happen for some of the world’s most influential business leaders and CEOs, presidents and politicians, prominent royalty, fashion icons, and professional athletes. EK Private Chauffeur was created to provide the highest level of Chauffeur and Private Chauffeur services as a premier facilitator of corporate businesses and domestic or international travelers. Our mission is to provide a world-class travel service with luxury, privacy, and personalization in mind.

Name: Pro Driver Media Ltd
Description:
Professional Driver is a controlled circulation, business-to-business
magazine with a monthly frequency (12 issues a year) and a circulation of 78,259.
The publication was launched May 2009, and was bought by its management team in January 2020. The sector accounts for significant sales of large cars, with a rich mix of up-market saloons, luxury SUVs and MPVs. The market is
significant too - total licensed vehicle numbers in England increased by 9.3% to 242,200 from 2013-14. In addition, there are approximately 21,000 taxi
and private hire vehicles in Scotland and 9,000 in Wales. In England, there has been an overall 31.2% increase in licensed vehicles since 2005.
Professional Driver circulates to all UK fleet operators of private hire and chauffeur vehicles and, outside London, taxi operators. The readership
includes extremely large fleets such as Addison Lee, several thousand UK operators with in excess of 50 cars, and smaller niche operators, right down
to one-car licenced chauffeur operators.

Award-winning, targeted content The companies operating in the sector are highly professional, and have a need for information, news, features and advice designed to help them operate both profitably and professionally.
Our targeted editorial mix offers market-specific news, features, operator profiles, road tests written specifically for chauffeurs and operators,
and business advice stories. The magazine is a business-to-business title, but presented in a more consumer-oriented format than most automotive B2B titles. 
Professional Driver QSi Awards
Our Quality, Service and Innovation (QSi) reader awards were launched in 2013. This initiative recognises the best companies and drivers in the
private hire and chauffeur sector. There are 11 categories, and Gold, Silver and Bronze awards are presented in each one. Entries were of an extremely
high standard, and around 350 people attend an annual black tie dinner, held at the Celtic Manor Resort Hotel in November.

Auf dem Weg zu einem Job, der Sie zu immer neuen Zielen führt? Willkommen im Team der VIAS. Seit knapp 20 Jahren sind wir erfolgreich auf der Schiene unterwegs. Ob in Nordrhein-Westfalen, Hessen oder Rheinland-Pfalz: Unsere Netze stehen für nachhaltige Mobilität und zuverlässigen Personennahverkehr – und für eine faszinierende Arbeitswelt, die begeisterten Bahnern, Technikern, ITLern und Klimarettern vielseitige Entfaltungsspielräume bietet. •K- Kempton Park
•T- Tembisa
•V- Vosloorus
•R- Rieger Park

Name: Tyrers Coaches
Description:
This year, 2022 sees Tyrers Coaches celebrating 50 Years as a leading, independent bus & coach operator covering the Northwest of England. 

We specialise in high-capacity school transport, taking over 4,000 students, daily, to and from school & college. 

We also support schools by offering luxury, safe travel, for their students on day trips, excursions, and tours. Alongside the schools, we provide transport solutions for private groups, clubs, associations, and corporate clients. 

Our drivers are highly trained, professional & courteous, our support team are ready and able to put together a bespoke package to suit your needs, at a very competitive price.

Recent fleet investment has seen an enormous increase in the availability of fully accessible vehicles catering for individuals with additional mobility needs; as well as bringing more of our fleet to meet the current emissions standards, as we strive towards a net zero fleet.

If you’d like to speak with us about how we can help you with your transport needs today, email sales@tyrerscoaches.co.uk today with your requirements, or give us a call on 01257 480979.

Name: Neoways
Description:
At Neoways we're on a journey to enable new ways of mobility, creating a seamlessly and sustainably connected world with hyperloop. From Europe for the world!
 
Founded in 2024 as a spin-off from the TUM Hyperloop research program at the Technical University of Munich (TUM), Neoways is a Munich-based European deep-tech start-up at the forefront of the hyperloop development.

Having repeatedly secured the title as four-time champions of the SpaceX Hyperloop Pod Competitions, our team has established its engineering expertise in the field. As leading members of TUM Hyperloop, we have successfully developed and certified Europe's first full-scale hyperloop demonstrator for passenger transportation and successfully performed the first passenger ride under vacuum conditions.

Our extensive expertise spans system integration, vehicle development, infrastructure design as well as levitation and propulsion technologies. At Neoways, we excel in bringing together complex systems to redefine efficient and sustainable transportation solutions.

Name: Legend Executive Chauffeurs

Name: Centro - Central New York Regional Transportation Authority
Description:
The Centro companies are subsidiaries of the Central New York Regional Transportation Authority (CNYRTA).  This Authority, formed in 1971 by the State legislature, was empowered to operate public transportation in the seven counties of Cayuga, Cortland, Jefferson, Madison, Oneida, Onondaga and Oswego. Currently, the counties of Onondaga, Cayuga, Oswego and Oneida are members of the CNYRTA. 

Centro is supported through a fare received for our service and matching funds obtained from County, State, and Federal governments.  The Centro system currently includes five transit companies: CNY Centro, Inc. in Syracuse, Centro of Cayuga, Inc. in Auburn, Centro of Oswego, Inc in Oswego, Centro of Oneida, and Centro Call-A-Bus, Inc.  In addition, CNYRTA operates the Regional Transportation Center.

Name: EG Chauffeurs | Multi-Award-Winning Chauffeur Company - Rated Excellent on Trustpilot

To date, EG Chauffeurs has won 7 awards and is rated the UK's No.1 chauffeur company on Trustpilot.

Name: Tarni Resources
Description:
At Tarni Resources, our vision is in our name. Tarni, meaning 'breaking waves' in Language, can be adapted to turning the tide or breaking the mould. 

Tarni Resources is an Indigenous-owned organisation providing practical and meaningful solutions to overcome challenges facing Indigenous people. These challenges often stem from the geographical and cultural divides that are unique to First Nations people and remote communities.

Our Remote Rideshare, LTL Transport, and Consulting and Advisory services, together with our strategic partner network throughout Australia, combine to provide us with an impact-driven approach to doing business. One which we believe has the capacity to break waves and change the tide for Indigenous people and Indigenous-owned businesses in Australia.

To learn more about our services, please download our Capability Statement by hitting the 'Learn More' button, and get in touch with our friendly team via the contact details on the back page today.

Name: 2TMC Autocars
Description:
2TMC, entreprise familiale créée en 2003 et enrichie en 2025 via la fusion avec les "Voyages Sessiecq" (acteur de la mobilité locale depuis 1953), est devenue au fil des années l’un des principaux transporteurs du département de la Loire...

Une équipe de plus de 150 professionnels dont 130 conducteurs et conductrices pour vous accompagner au quotidien et 15 permanents pour assurer les fonctions commerciales, d'exploitation, de ressources humaines, de comptabilité ainsi que le suivi du parc de véhicules dans nos ateliers.
Un siège social et centre d’exploitation sur 7 000 m2 à Sury-le-Comtal et un centre d’exploitation sur 13 500 m2  à Montbrison.

Une activité de transports variée dont :
- des lignes régulières Cars région Loire
- des lignes de marchés 
- des circuits scolaires 
- des navettes urbaines (Montbrison, St Just St Rambert et Feurs)
- le transport de personnel d’entreprises
- les services extra-scolaires (UNSS, sorties scolaires…)
- les transferts locaux, régionaux et navettes aéroports
- les transports touristiques : voyages à la journée, séjours de courte ou longue durée en France et en Europe.

Notre parc de véhicules : un parc de minicars et cars adaptés à l’effectif de chaque groupe pouvant accueillir jusqu’à 63 passagers. Des véhicules de tourisme, pour vos déplacements exigeant un excellent standing, voyages d’affaires ou de loisirs, séminaires et congrès ainsi que pour vos excursions ou séjours en France ou en Europe. Des véhicules mixtes, pour vos transferts ou petites excursions. Des véhicules scolaires adaptés aux transports scolaires.

Notre objectif permanent : la qualité du service...
Un parc de véhicules sans cesse renouvelé dont la moyenne d’âge est de moins de 4 ans, des formations dispensées à nos conducteurs, axées essentiellement sur la sécurité, l’écoconduite et le respect strict de la réglementation européenne sur les temps de conduite et de repos.

Name: Rhode Island Public Transit Authority
Description:
Join our passionate team of transit professionals.  Grow a reputable and stable career to support your family, help to improve the environment and serve the greater community in Rhode Island. Our active and retiree benefit package is generous, so start building your future today!

RIPTA Offers:
Competitive Salaries, Full Benefits Package to include Paid Time Off, Life Insurance, Wellness Incentives, Deferred Compensation Plan and a Defined Pension Benefit Plan

The Rhode Island Public Transit Authority, commonly known as RIPTA, is a quasi-public, independent authority. Established in 1966, RIPTA is authorized to operate public transit services throughout the State of Rhode Island. RIPTA provides transit and paratransit services 36 of 39 Rhode Island communities, operating 7 days a week.  RIPTA is one of the few transit agencies nationwide who did not cut service during the COVID-19 pandemic. 

RIPTA’s Mission is to provide safe, reliable and cost effective transit service with a skilled team of professionals responsive to our customers, the environment, and committed to transit excellence.

Es por ello que los conductores deben asistir Obligatoriamente a la Capacitación de Manejo Defensivo, que se realiza periódicamente con la empresa Cesvi, con pruebas teóricas, practicas de maniobras y conducción en condiciones adversas , como actuar en situaciones críticas etc.
EXHAUSTIVA SELECCIÓN
El equipo de New Travel, cuenta con profesionales, quienes realizan las entrevistas a los conductores , analizan y corroboran su experiencia en el rubro, su situación socio cultural, etc.
TRAZO DE RUTAS Y RECORRIDOS
Buscando optimizar sus costos y tiempos en cada recorrido, el bienestar, seguridad y confort de sus empelados se traducirá en un beneficio inmediato en su productividad.
TECNOLOGÍA - GESTIÓN - MEDIO AMBIENTE - SEGURIDAD
Son las bases de nuestro sistema de Gestión, incorporando contantemente nuevas tecnologías, de
control, comunicación, seguridad, limpieza y desinfección de las unidades.

Hyperloop Supaero's approach is based on cutting-edge technology and an innovative vision, led by multidisciplinary engineers. We collaborate globally, leveraging diversity to address challenges and create safe, scalable solutions. 

Hyperloop Supaero's goal is to create innovative transport systems that reduce carbon emissions and help protect the environment. To achieve this, our multidisciplinary engineering team is working to build scalable prototypes that represent the technology we want to develop.

Name: VMI BRASIL LOCAÇÕES
Description:
Em 2019, tornava-se realidade um dos maiores projetos do Grupo Barão, a VMI BRASIL LOCAÇÕES. 
Com vários anos de experiência no ramo de veículos para transporte de passageiros em todo o território nacional, o grupo Barão percebeu que poderia proporcionar muito mais para seus clientes e empresas que utilizam deste modelo de veículo em todo o Brasil e com toda essa experiencia, força de vontade e grande senso de servir e empreender foi possível ampliar e evoluir para desbravar um novo seguimento.

Pautada em princípios éticos e com uma visão baseada em um dos principais ensinamento de Jesus Cristo que é servirmos uns aos outros a VMI BRASIL LOCAÇÕES atua servindo e prestando um serviço de excelência no seguimento de locação de Micro Ônibus Novos para transporte de colaboradores em todos os tipos de terrenos e segmentos com veículos fabricados de acordo com várias normas de segurança como a R66 e a RAC 02 e tecnologia veicular do diferencial autoblocante que possibilita um único modelo de veículo operar em áreas restritas da mineração, ferrovias, reflorestamento, solos degradados e áreas urbanas.

Através de uma locação gerida, uma equipe especializada e frotas de veículos novos, A VMI BRASIL vai muito além da locação. Disponibilizamos o melhor em segurança, qualidade, eficiência, economia, suporte, gestão e apoio técnico/administrativo e operacional.
O desejo de evolução é algo vivo e constante dentro da VMI BRASIL LOCAÇÃO e por este motivo nos preocupamos continuamente com a qualidade e eficiência dos serviços prestados a nossos clientes, com a qualidade de vida e de trabalho de todos os nossos colaboradores bem como com o respeito e cuidado ao meio ambiente e a todos aqueles que nos cercam.

VMI BRASIL LOCAÇÕES, servir bem para servir sempre.

Name: TRI DELTA TRANSIT
Description:
Eastern Contra Costa Transit Authority (ECCTA), operating as Tri Delta Transit, was formed in the San Francisco Bay Area in 1977 as a Joint Powers Authority (JPA). As an essential service, Tri Delta Transit has provided public transportation to the communities we serve for 45 years. 

With an operating budget of $32 million, Tri Delta Transit provides nearly two million pre-pandemic trips each year to a population of approximately 315,000 residents in the 225 square miles of Eastern Contra Costa County. The agency operates 16 fixed-routes on weekdays, six on weekends, senior and paratransit services, non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT), and the on-demand shuttle service, "Tri MyRide". Tri Delta Transit operates maintenance in-house, but contracts with First Transit for the operation of the transportation fleet.

Name: INTERCAR
Description:
Avec ses 425 employés et son chiffre d’affaires de plus de 30 millions de dollars, le Groupe INTERCAR est le deuxième plus gros transporteur interurbain au Québec et l’une des plus importantes entreprises dans le transport scolaire.

Les activités du Groupe Intercar débutent en 1959 mais, en 1990, Jasmin Gilbert et sa sœur Jocelyne font faire à l’entreprise un bond en avant spectaculaire avec l’acquisition des réseaux de transport interurbain de la Compagnie Voyageur au Saguenay et sur la Côte-Nord du Saint-Laurent. 

L’étape suivante de l’évolution du Groupe INTERCAR, déjà bien implanté dans le transport scolaire au Saguenay–Lac-Saint-Jean, a été le lancement de ces mêmes activités dans la région de Québec. En 1998, c’est la création de Transport Adapté Intercar et l’acquisition de deux sociétés de transport scolaire.

Pour la première fois, en 2000, les autocars du Groupe INTERCAR ont commencé à desservir la région de Sept-Îles.La société a maintenant la responsabilité de toutes les liaisons interurbaines dans l’immense triangle Sept-Iles/Dolbeau/Québec.

Buscamos continuamente a excelência em todos os aspectos de nossos serviços, desde o acesso dos passageiros ao aplicativo e do gestor ao portal web até a criação e adequação de rotas personalizadas.

Colocamos nossos clientes em primeiro lugar, trabalhando de forma colaborativa e valorizando o relacionamento na busca da construção de parcerias sólidas e duradouras, baseadas na confiança, ética, transparência e integridade.

Ajudamos as empresas a reduzir seus custos através da roteirização que permite a otimização da logística do transporte de colaboradores, seja na implementação de um projeto ou na identificação de melhorias de uma operação já existente.

Contamos com uma equipe dedicada de especialistas em transporte corporativo, pronta para oferecer suporte e assistência em todas as etapas do processo.

Name: PITX (MWM Terminals, Inc.)
Description:
The Parañaque Integrated Terminal Exchange (PITX: MWM Terminals, Inc.) is the first landport in the Philippines. A Private Public Partnership project with Megawide and Department of Transportation.
 
PITX is an intermodal transport terminal in Metro Manila, which serves as a transportation hub for city and provincial buses and other public utility vehicles.
 
PITX aims to provide a seamless interchange for commuters traveling to and from the city and provinces of the country.
 
The landport facilitates convenient and efficient transport connections, improves commuter experience, and contributes to the modernization of public transportation infrastructure in the country.
 
Aside from its contribution to the commuting public, the facility also features commercial and office towers, which provides opportunities for businesses, captures the manpower pool from the southwest part of Luzon, and a convenient access for commuters.

At Meruhi Mobility, operating under the brand name of Vridez, we specialize in providing seamless transportation solutions tailored to your business needs. Our expertise encompasses corporate employee transportation, corporate travel planning, outstation travel solutions, airport pickups and drops, and local travel support.

Here's a snapshot of our services:

Corporate Employee Transportation: From daily commutes to inter-office transfers and client meetings, our reliable fleet ensures your team arrives punctually and safely. We offer dedicated shuttles for large organizations, ensuring efficient transportation across multiple locations.

Corporate Travel Planning: Our travel experts handle all aspects of corporate travel, from accommodations to logistics. We can assist with organizing seamless travel itineraries for executive teams attending meetings and conferences.

Airport Pickup and Drops: We provide timely and seamless airport transfers, ensuring a positive first impression for your employees and clients. From standard to luxury options, we cater to diverse needs.

Outstation Travel Solutions: Catering to team off-sites, client visits, or project-related travel, our well-maintained fleet and experienced drivers ensure a comfortable journey.

Local Travel Support: Our on-demand transportation assistance helps your team navigate the city efficiently, ensuring prompt arrival at meetings and events.

At Vridez, our diverse fleet includes economy, premium, and luxury vehicles, updated regularly with the latest features. We're dedicated to tailoring our services to your specific needs for a seamless travel experience.

Le Groupe Keolis est un acteur majeur international du transport public de voyageurs qui propose des solutions de transport adaptées aux besoins des territoires et des clients voyageurs. Présent dans 13 pays,  le Groupe réalise un CA de 6,7 milliards d’euros et emploie plus de 68 000 personnes (chiffres 2022).

En France, Keolis est leader urbain et exploite 90 réseaux. Notre groupe couvre aussi en interurbain 74 départements et 140 villes sont dotées de parkings EFFIA.
A l'international, Keolis est référent mondial pour l'exploitation de tramway, pionner dans l'exploitation de métros automatiques, opérateur majeur dans le ferroviaire et acteur de premier plan pour l'exploitation de bus et de cars dans de nombreux pays. Keolis est présent dans 13 pays : Australie, Belgique, Canada, Chine, Danemark, Émirats arabes unis, États-Unis, France, Inde, Pays-Bas, Qatar, Royaume-Uni, Suède.

Grâce à notre présence sur toute la chaîne des déplacements et au soin que nous mettons à connecter ces modes entre eux, nous assurons aux utilisateurs de nos transports des trajets toujours plus fluides et confortables.  

Issues de notre culture et de notre histoire, le Groupe Keolis s’est doté de valeurs représentant notre force et notre spécificité d’acteur majeur de la mobilité dans le monde. 

We imagine, We care, We commit : trois valeurs partagées par nos collaborateurs et illustrant nos atouts auprès de nos clients Autorités Organisatrices et de nos voyageurs.

Davantage d'informations sur www.keolis.com, vous pouvez aussi nous suivre sur les réseaux sociaux.

Name: Companhia Carris Porto-Alegrense
Description:
Mais antiga empresa de transporte coletivo do país em atividade, a Carris nasceu com a autorização do imperador Dom Pedro II, via decreto, publicado em 19 de junho de 1872. Na época, a Capital dos gaúchos era uma pacata província de apenas 44 mil habitantes, que recém havia completado 100 anos de fundação.

Inicialmente operando bondes puxados a mula, em 1908 a companhia inaugurou o serviço de bondes elétricos, que foi desativado somente em 1970. Em 1928, a Carris passou também a oferecer o transporte por ônibus para as localidades onde as linhas de bonde não chegavam.
Em 1999, a Associação Nacional dos Transportes Públicos concedeu à Carris o prêmio de melhor empresa de ônibus urbano do país.Conquistou ,em 2003, o Prêmio Nacional de Gestão Pública do Governo Federal.

Todos os anos, desde 2000, a pesquisa Top of Mind da Revista Amanhã aponta a Carris como a empresa de ônibus mais lembrada pelos porto-alegrenses. Desde que a categoria é pesquisada, a Carris sempre aparece em primeiro lugar.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande Do Sul

Name: SOVETOURS
Description:
On ne se connaîtrait pas déjà ?

Depuis 40 ans, nos 330 autocars sillonnent les routes des Pays de la Loire et c’est sûrement pour cela que vous nous connaissez déjà un peu.

Ancrés au cœur du territoire vendéen que nous aimons, nous transportons chaque jour avec passion et un certain sens du devoir, plus de 30 000 voyageurs : vos enfants, vos voisins et peut-être vous-même !

40 ans déjà que Sovetours existe et c’est vrai que notre entreprise fait aujourd’hui partie des « grands » de son secteur.

Reconnus par nos partenaires et nos clients, nous sommes également heureux et fiers d’apporter à nos collaboratrices et collaborateurs une stabilité de l’emploi pour bien vivre leur métier.

Entreprise de référence, Sovetours a également su conserver ses valeurs d’origine, celle d’une PME familiale. Bon sens, réactivité, simplicité, voilà notre état d’esprit.

Sovetours est une entreprise qui avance et qui aime se remettre en question pour réussir aujourd’hui et demain. Ici, chacun a le droit à la parole, chacun est écouté avec l’objectif partagé de faire bouger les choses dans le bon sens !

Souriez, vous êtes chez Sovetours !

Quel que soit votre métier, quand vous entrerez chez Sovetours vous allez d’abord apprécier les relations avec vos collègues. Ici on se parle, on échange et on sourit !

Vous découvrirez aussi un environnement professionnel de qualité et des outils de travail modernes mis à votre disposition. Enfin, tout au long de votre « vie chez Sovetours », vous serez suivi, écouté et considéré. Parce que oui, nous pensons réellement que notre réussite passe aussi par la vôtre.

Envie de changement ? Bougez pour Sovetours !

Name: Lider Limo doo
Description:
Lider Limo pruža vrhunsku uslugu iznajmljivanja luksuznih vozila  sa vozačima,  prilagođenu svim potrebama i očekivanjima naših klijenata.

Nudimo najbolji vid transporta za turiste, ljude iz sveta biznisa, porodice sa  decom, za putovanja, venčanja, poslovne transfere, proslave i sve druge druga vrste dešavanja.

Vozni park poseduje više modela luksuznih vozila Premium, Lux, Biznis klase za pojedinačnu, poslovnu, kao i minivanove za grupnu i porodičnu vožnju.

Sva vozila za rentiranje redovno se održavaju, servisiraju i unapred pripremaju za letnju i zimsku sezonu.

Rezervacije vozila, kao i ostale naše usluge dostupne su lokalno, kao i na teritoriji cele Evrope, tokom dogovorenog kraćeg ili dužeg vremenskog perioda.

Tim profesionalaca kompanije Lider Limo obezbeđuje vrhunski kvalitet usluge, bezbednost i sigurnost u vožnji.

Svako vozilo raspolaže besplatnom Wi-Fi mrežom, POS terminalom za plaćanje putem platnih kartica, kao i pratećim aksesoarom.

Naši vozači su iskusni profesionalci. Služe se najmanje jednim svetskim jezikom, dostupni su 24/7 i odlični su turistički vodiči, upoznati su sa alternativnim i najbržim rutama  koje štede vaše vreme i novac.

Name: Expresso Nordeste Linhas Rodoviárias LTDA
Description:
Na Nordeste a tradição e a modernidade se aliam para oferecer os melhores serviços de transporte coletivo do Brasil, proporcionando pontualidade, segurança, conforto e tranquilidade.

Isto reflete aos 58 anos de atendimento com qualidade e de muita experiência no trato com as pessoas, tornando-se esses alguns dos seus principais diferenciais de mercado: transportar pessoas e seus sonhos.

Na busca constante de inovações, os investimentos se concentram em tecnologias e na melhoria permanente da frota.

Junto a isso uma equipe formada por mais de 1000 colaboradores diretos e indiretos, altamente qualificada e constantemente treinada se dedica a garantir aos usuários a satisfação total desde a compra dos serviços, aos cuidados que se seguem no embarque, no transporte das bagagens e no desembarque aos destinos.

Nos veículos, a manutenção é rotineira, preventiva e corretiva assegurando veículos devidamente higienizados, em perfeitas condições de uso e muito confortáveis. Isso garante o cumprimento das jornadas, rotas e horários de cada itinerário. Além disso, seus carros modernos contam com suporte especializado em todo o Brasil.

Comprometida com a qualidade de vida e o bem-estar das pessoas, a Nordeste participa de campanhas sociais, esportivas, e na defesa do ambiente externando o compromisso com a sustentabilidade, que já acontece internamente através da busca da qualidade contínua, onde todos da Empresa participam dos processos que mudam atos, pensamentos e os cuidados com a vida.

Name: Klein Transportation
Description:
At Klein Transportation, we are your partner in travel providing a memorable experience - “Half the Fun is Getting There!”
Our commitment extends beyond the road—it’s about the people we serve, the communities we touch, and the family we’ve built. As we navigate the highways, we hold our values close to our hearts. Together, we’re more than a motor coach and school bus company. We’re a family, a force for good, and a compass pointing toward a brighter future.

Klein Transportation, also known as Klein’s Bus Service, Inc. is one of the few bus companies in the region that has been family-owned and operated for over 65 years.  As a leader in the Motorcoach industry, Klein employs approximately 70 individuals from the tri-county area of Southeastern Pennsylvania.

Klein Transportation provides transportation services to colleges, universities, corporations, tour companies, school districts, senior living facilities and private citizen groups.  Our company has four divisions; Klein Charter Services, Klein Tours, Klein School Transportation Services, and Klein Casino Line Runs. 

Under the Klein Charter Services umbrella, a fleet of late model MCI and VanHool full size motorcoaches and late model IC school buses provide services to anywhere on the North American continent.  Klein is an active member of the Pennsylvania Bus Association, Greater Northeast Motorcoach Association, Bus Association of New York, American Bus Association, United Motorcoach Association and SYTA as well as an NCM/Spader 20 Group.  The connections made in these associations allows Klein to be extremely flexible with scheduling, send out buses anywhere, at any time, and be sure that rare breakdowns and service problems are handled with the utmost speed and care.

Omnibus software suite

Name: Hyperlink
Description:
At Hyperlink, we set out to build a fully operational Hyperloop pod from scratch. The team unites ambitious and hardworking students studying different courses and gives them a platform to work, learn, and develop new skills together.

Our 2 main aims are developing the Hyperloop technology and contributing to its sooner commercial implementation as well as competing in international competitions like the SpaceX Hyperloop Pod Competition.

What's exciting about Hyperlink is the fact that the concept of Hyperloop is relatively new and isn't yet fully implemented anywhere in the world. Thus, research & development, brainstorming, and testing new ideas are crucial parts of our work.
 
Hyperlink is split into two divisions: Engineering and Business.

The Engineering division is focused on designing and building the pod itself. The division is split up into teams, each concerned with a specific subsystem of the pod. All teams work closely together, exchanging ideas and ensuring that all systems remain compatible and complement each other.
 
The Business division is focused on acquiring sponsorships, securing partnerships with external organisations as well as media creation and marketing. Business is a vital part of Hyperlink as sufficient funding and partnerships with industry are crucial to building a high performing pod.

If you'd like to apply, visit our website!

Name: Svenska Taxiförbundet
Description:
Taxi spelar tillsammans med andra resetjänster inom delad mobilitet en viktig roll som komplement till kollektivtrafiken. Taxi kan bidra till ett klimatsmart transportsystem i takt med att den storskaliga kollektivtrafiken byggs ut i Sverige.

Svenska Taxiförbundet företräder Sveriges taxiföretag. Taxinäringens marknad omfattar företagsresor, privatresor och upphandlade samhällsbetalda resor som sjukresor, färdtjänst, skolskjuts och kompletteringstrafik.

Hela taxibranschen sysselsätter cirka 40 000 medarbetare. Den totala omsättningen för branschen  uppskattades till cirka 14 miljarder år 2019. Under pandemin 2020 har branschen tappat cirka 40 procent av sin omsättning.

Konkurrens på lika villkor och ett ökat miljö- och trafiksäkerhetsarbete i branschen, är exempel på frågor som Förbundet driver. Vi har också tagit en aktiv roll i kollektivtrafikbranschens arbete med syfte att öka andelen kollektivtrafik och därmed bidra till en hållbar tillväxt för Sverige.

- Faire connaître le diplôme Mastère Spécialisé des Systèmes de Transport Ferroviaires et Urbains
- Œuvrer pour le reconnaissance du mastère par les professionnels du secteur
- Conserver les liens entre les élèves après la fin du cursus
- Créer un lien entre promotions
- Créer un réseau d’entraide
- Développer des partenariats avec des formations et associations équivalentes en France et à l’étranger
- Organiser des visites, rencontres, débats sur le ferroviaire

Name: Kovanen

Name: Bus54

The platform serves four key stakeholders: passengers, for whom it streamlines the booking process; transport operators, providing end-to-end digital operations; financial institutions, facilitating access to eco-friendly bus financing and insurance; and bus manufacturers, ensuring the provision of modern, efficient buses.

Name: Seta S.p.A.

L’azienda unitaria operante nel territorio dell’Emilia occidentaleè responsabile di tutto il sistema di produzione del servizio di TPL su gomma dei tre bacini provinciali: dall’esercizio dei trasporti bus urbani ed extraurbani, alla manutenzione dei mezzi, alla vendita dei titoli di viaggio, alla gestione delle biglietterie e dei servizi per l’utenza. 

SETA S.p.A., su base annua gestisce29,7 milioni di vetture chilometridi Trasporto Pubblico Locale su gomma e trasporta circa76,9 milioni di passeggeri, a fronte di958 mezzimarcianti e di un organico medio di995 dipendenti (di cui 116 donne), per un valore della produzione di123,7 milioni di euro.  

La nostra mission:
Assicurare il diritto alla mobilità a tutti i cittadini, migliorando la qualità della loro vita e dell’ambiente urbano. 

La nostra vision:
Operare nell’interesse pubblico, in sinergia con gli Enti Locali Territoriali, fornendo servizi di qualità incentrati sulle esigenze del cliente.

Name: Tarifverbund Passepartout
Description:
Damit Kundinnen und Kunden in den Kantonen Luzern, Nidwalden und Obwalden einfach und bequem den öffentlichen Verkehr nutzen können, gibt es den Tarifverbund Passepartout. Das Team mit drei Mitarbeitenden vertritt die Interessen der 12 Transportunternehmungen, die im Passepartout ihre Transportdienste erbringen. Zu ihnen gehören zum Beispiel die BLS, Postauto, SBB, VBL oder Zentralbahn. In ihrem Auftrag übernimmt Passepartout die Vermarktung und regelt den Tarif des öffentlichen Verkehrs in diesen drei Kantonen. Unterstellt ist der Tarifverbund Passepartout den drei Bestellerkantonen Luzern, Nidwalden und Obwalden.

Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter https://passepartout.ch.

Name: Karpool
Description:
Karpool isn’t just a carpooling app. It’s a smarter, safer, and more social way to commute—built for the everyday journey.

We’re creating a new category in commuting: recurring carpool groups with verified riders and fair cost-sharing. Unlike ride-hailing or ad-hoc lifts, Karpool is about building commute communities—connecting people with similar routes, schedules, and intentions.

- Drivers offset their fuel and maintenance costs by opening empty seats on routes  they already take.
- Passengers save significantly compared to ride-hailing, with the added bonus of reliability, safety, and connection.
- Everyone travels with verified riders, matched based on proximity and schedule for smoother, repeatable routines.

Born from a real commuter’s frustration with costly, lonely drives and traffic-packed roads, Karpool was built to challenge the norm and reimagine daily transport as a shared, uplifting experience—not a solo grind.

We are not a taxi service.
We are not just ride-sharing.
We are Karpool: a cost-sharing community for recurring commutes—designed to reduce single-occupancy vehicles, ease congestion, and enable real-world connections.

Join us in building a more sustainable, more human way to get to work, campus, or anywhere you go often

Name: DFB Mouten Furka Steam Railway
Description: After the opening of the Furka Base Tunnel in 1982, railway enthusiasts prevented the demolition of the tracks leading over the mountain. In 1983 they founded the Furka Mountain Route Association (VFB) with the aim of restoring, maintaining and operating the high-alpine and unique railway. Over one hundred years old steam locomotives operate on the historic route, which together with their wagons have been restored to match the era. This valuable rolling stock looks like it has been created again today. Some of the steam locomotives had been sold from Switzerland to Vietnam in 1947 and were brought back from the jungle in an elaborate operation in 1990 and put into operation. Volunteers, mainly in the Aarau workshop, have professionally restored the various passenger and company cars from different origins and equipped them for use on the mountain route. Volunteers from different professions also take care of the maintenance of the route and the facilities as well as all areas of administration, marketing and IT. DFB AG itself works in its processes and structures like a modern small and medium-sized enterprise (SME). The Furka Mountain Line Steam Railway is organized as follows today: DFB AG: The Furka Mountain Line Steam Railway is a public limited company, license holder and operator of the railway according to the professional and safe guidelines of the Federal Office of Transport. The institution is responsible for the operation, construction and maintenance of the vehicles and systems. Furka Mountain Route Association (VFB): The Furka Mountain Route Association today has over 7,000 memberships with sections in Switzerland, Germany and the Netherlands. The main tasks of the association include voluntary work, fundraising and public relations. Furka Mountain Route Foundation (SFB): The Foundation owns the facilities and some of the vehicles. ARMOR RADIO TAXI est une société de transport. Créé en 1972 avec seulement une licence de taxi. L’entreprise s’est développée au fil des années afin de répondre aux demandes de la clientèle privée et professionnelle. 

A ce jour, nous effectuons du transport de taxi traditionnel, transport medical (VSL), transport de colis urgent ainsi que du transport de sang, et prélevants.
Également sous contrat avec certains services de l’Etat, nous collaborons également avec plusieurs sociétés au niveau régional, national et international.

Name: Transportes Sagitario SRL
Description:
Transportes Sagitario inicia sus operaciones en la ciudad de Cajamarca en el año 2001. Nos especializamos en el servicio de transporte de trabajadores a nivel nacional.

Actualmente Transportes Sagitario cuenta con flotas modernas de ómnibus, minibús, sprinter, camionetas y volquetes las cuales cumplen con los más altos estándares de calidad y seguridad para garantizar un servicio seguro y confortable, además de políticas y filosofía ambiental acor- des con las necesidades de nuestra sociedad. 

Nuestro objetivo fundamental es asegurar la aceptación y satisfacción de nuestros clientes, mediante un servicio de Transporte de Personal con eficiencia integral, conducta, y atención acorde a sus requerimientos y teniendo como lema. “La Cultura se construyen gracias a la capacitación y aceptación para el desarrollo personal y social”.

Name: TST - Transportes Sul do Tejo
Description: Transportes Sul do Tejo

Name: SETA S.p.A.

Name: HSI Servicios Industriales
Description:
Transportamos la fuerza laboral de cada industria de forma segura y confortable.

Somos parte de Grupo HER. Contamos con el apoyo logístico y operativo en diferentes regiones del país y un plantel de conductores profesionales en constante capacitación.

Nuestra flota está compuesta por vehículos modernos de distintas capacidades: 14, 19, 24, 26 y 46 asientos.

Name: Canary Shuttle | Alsa
Description: Somos un equipo de profesionales dedicados a ofrecer un transporte de calidad en las Islas Canarias. Nuestras guaguas naranjas garantizan fiabilidad y comodidad. Ofrecemos traslados compartidos y económicos desde el aeropuerto a su hotel, además de servicios personalizados para empresas y eventos. Nos comprometemos a brindar una experiencia excepcional.

Name: Indian Trails
Description:
Indian Trails operates one of the largest and newest fleets of deluxe motor coaches in Michigan. Each is a 2016 or newer model with 34 to 56 passenger capacity and boasting near-zero-emissions. Our services include charters, tours, shuttles, airport transfers and daily scheduled routes throughout Michigan and into Milwaukee and Duluth. We carry more than 1,000,000 passengers annually.
 
With more than 110 years of experience, we have earned the reputation as one of the highest quality carriers in the country. Chartering a motor coach is an important decision. Indian Trails provides your group with exceptional customer service & courteous staff, a safe/well-maintained vehicle, and professional drivers.
 
Indian Trails has extensive experience operating shuttle services for large or small groups. Convention groups, associations, corporations, sporting events, family reunions, and even churches have all relied on Indian Trails to transport their groups safely and efficiently. Whether it is a group of 50 or 10,000 people, our knowledgeable staff will assist you with every phase of planning.

Name: San Gabriel Transit, Inc.
Description: San Gabriel Transit, Inc. was founded in 1953 and is one of the first companies to provide public paratransit services in Southern California.  The Company has built a strong reputation by effectively operating some of the most difficult demand response operations in the industry. Our highly experienced and dedicated team assures our commitment to our clients so that we achieve and maintain a highly effective transportation system. The Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) mandates that the Los Angeles County transit agencies provide a paratransit transportation program for all persons in Los Angeles County who are unable to access fixed route bus service. We presently contract with Access Services Inc. (ASI) to operate the paratransit service in the Eastern Region of Los Angeles County, including reservations, scheduling, dispatch, management, maintenance, and the vehicles and drivers for all of the certified riders in the Eastern Region.

Name: ReservAway
Description: Reservaway.com is the only platform offering a genuine comparison of car rental products from all major companies. We cater to every traveller's needs with a wide range of options, including flexible cancellation policies and various add-on services. Our commitment to transparency means you'll always see upfront pricing with no hidden fees. Combined with our 24/7 customer support, Reservaway.com ensures a seamless and personalised rental experience tailored to your journey. Choose Reservaway.com for a car rental experience that's as transparent as it is convenient.

Name: Autocares Bustelo
Description: Iniciando su andadura con una flota de tres autocares en el año 1996 y con la experiencia profesional en el transporte de viajeros adquirida en sus más de 30 años, ha consolidado su presencia en el sector gracias al buen hacer en sus servicios y a la confianza depositada en la empresa por parte de sus clientes.

Name: Advectus Executive Chauffeur
Description:
Advectus Executive Chauffeur is a family business specialising in corporate aviation ground transportation.

We began as a small family firm in 2013 and have been growing at a steady rate, earning a solid reputation as a reliable, efficient and discreet operation. In a short time, we have established excellent working relationships with base handlers and flight trip support companies, such as Signature, Harrods LTN and STN, World Fuel Services and Farnborough Airport, as well as dealing directly with flight departments around the world. We also work in partnership with trip support company Flight Pro International as their ground transportation provider in and around London.

Our professional relationships extend to the crews and passengers of many global corporate organisations, who arrive in the UK from all corners of the world expecting to be conveyed to their hotel, business meeting or function, shopping and sightseeing, with the minimum of fuss. It’s that superior level of service they remember about us at Advectus. See our Testimonials page.

We are proud to be a member of the NBAA and support all it offers to the business aviation sector globally.

Name: Vroume
Description:
Vroume is one of the most up-to-date platform to respond to a world that needs to commute.
Being the first ever carpooling social network in Africa, the Indian Ocean and the Republic of Mauritius, Vroume places carpooling at the heart of ecological impact.
Protecting our Planet, reducing traffic issues and creating a better world are the core values that we share with you.
Join us and make the difference.

Name: INCUBATE SOFT TECH PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
IncubateSoft is a full-scale Transport and Logistics technology organisation, actively involved in delivering Intelligent Transport solutions, Digital Mobility solutions and IoT.
With a vision to continuously innovate and institutionalize technology for better business and human performance, Incubate is led by technology enthusiasts and has an expert team to integrate Electronic and Data solutions across various industries and works with both Public and Private Organizations.

Name: VL – kollektivtrafiken i Västmanland
Description:
Oavsett om du är på väg till jobbet, skolan, kompisen, mormor eller hem vill vi att du ska kunna ta dig dit enkelt, prisvärt och hållbart med oss. Och varje dag görs mer än 35 000 buss- och tågresor runt om i Västmanland, så du kan ju tänka dig att vi har ett stort pussel att lägga!
 
VL ägs av Region Västmanland, och det är regionens kollektivtrafikförvaltning som ansvarar för att utveckla kollektivtrafiken i Västmanland.
 
Här får du ta del av det viktigaste som händer hos oss: hur vi jobbar med att utveckla kollektivtrafiken och infrastrukturen i länet, aktuella tjänster vi rekryterar till just nu – och allt däremellan!

Name: Asociația de Dezvoltare Intercomunitară pentru Transport Public București-Ilfov
Description: Asociația de Dezvoltare Intercomunitară pentru Transport Public București – Ilfov s-a constituit sub forma unei structuri de cooperare a autorităților publice locale din regiunea București – Ilfov, cu personalitate juridică de drept privat și statut de utilitate publică recunoscut prin efectul legii destinate exercitării și realizării în comun a competențelor autorităților administrației publice locale referitoare la furnizarea/ prestarea serviciilor de transport public, stabilite în sarcina acestora potrivit dispozițiilor Legii nr. 51/2006 a serviciilor comunitare de utilități publice, ale Legii nr. 215/2001, a administrației publice locale, republicată, cu modificările și completările ulterioare, și ale Legii-cadru a descentralizării nr. 195/2006.

Name: Sun Tran
Description: At Sun Tran we pride ourselves on being more than just a bus company. Sun Tran employees are proud to be a part of Tucson, Arizona, and its close-knit community. Community involvement is one of the factors that distinguishes Sun Tran as an award-winning transit service and makes Tucson a better place to call home.

Name: Graz-Köflacher Bahn und Busbetrieb Gmbh
Description:
Ein modernes Unternehmen mit Tradition
Die GKB im Überblick
Die GKB ist ein Traditionsunternehmen und ein Herzstück der Weststeiermark – und gleichzeitig als moderner und innovativer Verkehrsspezialist mit 450 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern ein Motor für die wirtschaftliche Entwicklung und ein Kulturfaktor für die Weststeiermark. Die Graz-Köflacher Bahn und Busbetrieb GmbH ist die größte öffentliche Privatbahn Österreichs!
