Name: Koiviston Auto Helsinki Oy
Description:
Koiviston Auto Helsinki Oy (former Helsingin Bussiliikenne Oy) is part of Koiviston Auto Group.

Koiviston Auto Helsinki Oy provides contract bus services in the area of Helsinki Region Transport (HSL).

Name: Your Coach Hire (YCH) Limited
Description: We provide coach hire for all events in the UK, everything from corporate, school, weddings and stag & hen do’s. We have a team of transportation experts who have been working in the industry for many years. We have a vast selection of coaches for hire and minibuses for hire. As part of our services, we have a range of luxurious, VIP coaches & minibuses ranging from 16 to 94 seaters. If you need anything, please don’t hesitate to get in touch, we’d be happy to help.

Name: Cosmenbus
Description:
Cosmenbus, fundada en 2020, ha construido su camino con el compromiso de ofrecer soluciones de movilidad seguras, sostenibles y de calidad a los viajeros. Inspirada en la filosofía de ALSA en los años 90 y sustentada por décadas de experiencia familiar en el transporte de viajeros, nuestra compañía representa hoy un modelo moderno y en constante evolución dentro del sector. 

Nuestra historia no es reciente, sino la continuidad de una visión con raíces sólidas. Vinculada desde sus orígenes a ENCOSA (Empresa Cosmen S.A.) y al legado del fundador de ALSA, Cosmenbus es el resultado de generaciones dedicadas a la movilidad. Hoy, con 8 empresas integradas en nuestra organización, seguimos apostando por el crecimiento, la innovación y el compromiso. 

Contamos con un equipo de grandes profesionales, jóvenes y bien preparados, comprometidos con el bienestar y las necesidades de nuestros viajeros.

Name: Interlink GmbH
Description:
Die Interlink GmbH ist seit vielen Jahren deutschlandweit im Bereich Mobilität tätig. Unser Team unterstützt Kunden und Kundinnen von der Entwicklung innovativer Projektideen bis hin zur vollständigen Implementierung. Gegründet im Jahr 2004, hat unser Unternehmen seinen Sitz in Berlin und betreibt zusätzliche ein Projektbür in Kiel.

Unsere Expertise umfasst alle Bereiche des Umweltverbundes, einschließlich Verkehrsunternehmen, Verkehrsverbünde, Aufgabenträger, Ministerien, Gebietskörperschaften, Projektentwickler*innen, politische Institutionen und touristische Unternehmen. Zu unseren Kernkompetenzen gehören (a) die integrierte Verkehrsplanung, insbesondere die Erstellung und Umsetzung von Mobilitätskonzepten mit Fokus auf Umweltfreundlichkeit, (b) die klassische ÖPNV-Angebotsplanung sowie (c) das autonome Fahren im ÖPNV. Darüber hinaus arbeiten wir - über fachliche Themen hinweg - auch intensiv in den Bereichen Kommunikation und Projektmanagement.

Unser Team besteht aus hochqualifizierten Mitarbeitenden mit umfassender, langjähriger Erfahrung in verschiedenen relevanten Bereichen. Gemeinsam arbeiten wir praxisorientiert und entwickeln maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für unsere Kundinnen und Kunden. Unsere Expertise erstreckt sich über den Umgang mit Genehmigungsbehörden, politische Öffentlichkeitsarbeit, Projektträger-Organisationen und die direkte Interaktion mit Endkundinnen und -kunden.

Besuchen Sie unsere Webseite, um mehr über unsere aktuellen Projekte und unser engagiertes Team zu erfahren.

Name: BEST Transportation Chauffeured Services
Description:
BEST Transportation has been redefining chauffeured travel in St. Louis since 2002. As part of a third-generation, family-owned business and the sister company of St. Louis County & Yellow Cab, we blend decades of trusted service with a forward-looking approach to luxury travel.

Our meticulously maintained fleet featuring sleek sedans, executive SUVs, elegant sprinter vans, and premium motor coaches caters to corporate executives, weddings, private charters, and high-profile events. Every detail, from vehicle presentation to professional chauffeurs, reflects our commitment to going the extra mile in luxury and service.

Recognized for excellence, BEST Transportation has earned awards from The Knot, BBB Torch Awards, Make-A-Wish Foundation, and more. These honors reflect the values that drive us forward: quality, reliability, and genuine care.

 With over 90 years of transportation leadership through our Family of Companies, we’re proud to deliver award-winning service backed by a close-knit team that treats every client like family.

Name: FREEDOM SAS
Description:
Freedom SAS es una empresa neuquina especializada en el transporte de personal para empresas en zonas operativas de Neuquén y Río Negro.

Nos enfocamos en brindar un servicio seguro, puntual y confortable, con unidades modernas y atención personalizada.

Entendemos que la calidad no es un extra, sino la base sobre la que se construye la confianza.

 Operamos en: Neuquén y Rio Negro.
 Servicios adaptados a la necesidad de cada cliente.

 Consultanos: administracion@freedomsas.com.ar | 299-416-2358

Name: NeSPaT
Description:
NeSPaT provides complex service in organizing logistics for patients in clinical trials. Started at 2013 we have come a long and exciting journey from handling a few requests to processing over 5,000 orders per month.

Our business model is based on combining deep local expertise with wide coverage. 

By local expertise we mean a comprehensive knowledge of the specific features of each country, providing services and support in local languages and careful selection of end-vendors. As a result, we provide expertise in optimizing logistics and cost of services.

Wide coverage means that we operate fully in 18 countries (Belgium, Bulgaria, Canada, Czech Republic, France, Georgia, Germany, Hungary, Moldova, Poland, Romania, Slovakia, Spain, Switzerland, Turkey, UK, Ukraine, USA) and continue to expand our geographical reach.

Name: HYBUS
Description:
HYBUS, a brand operated by Saraca Transtech Pvt. Ltd., envisions transforming intercity travel with safe, clean, and technology-driven luxury bus services. 

With current operations on the Bangalore-Tirupati route, HYBUS leverages advanced safety features and proprietary operational technologies to ensure exceptional customer experience and profitability.

Name: Metro Cars - The Original and Official
Description:
A founding company in the luxury transportation industry, Metro Cars has been synonymous with safe, reliable, quality transportation since 1990. Our strict standards serve as a benchmark from which others are measured. Metro Cars is the only company that can offer "one call for all your transportation needs!" Our exclusive Metro Collection of vehicles includes sedans and SUVs, executive vans, shuttles and luxury motor coaches. And, we are the exclusive airport transportation provider at both Detroit Metropolitan Airport and the Gerald R. Ford International Airport in Grand Rapids.

 
At Metro Cars, we take our reputation for safety, style and reliability seriously. To ensure your safety, we provide:
• Security Screened Chauffeurs
• Drug Tested Chauffeurs
• Uniformed Chauffeurs with ID Badges
• Insured Vehicles

You’ll always arrive in style with Metro Cars, because we offer the largest fleet of quality vehicles on the road today.

Metro Cars is led by the brightest and most talented transportation experts in the country. Our experience includes:
• Large-scale transportation operations with a combined corporate wide fleet of nearly 350 professionally maintained, chauffeur driven vehicles.
• State-of-the-art reservation and communication center and vehicle conditioning system, which ensures your transportation needs will always be met on time.
• All aspects of ground transportation and logistics.

For over 30 years, Metro Cars has been trusted by residents and corporations to provide safe, reliable transportation with unsurpassed service. And while we’re proud to be affiliated with some of the largest businesses and hotels in Southeast Michigan, at Metro Cars, every customer is treated like a VIP.

Name: MGB Transportes Ejecutivos Monterrey
Description:
Somos una empresa 100% mexicana con 15 años de experiencia en transporte de personal ejecutivo y corporativo para el sector industrial de la ciudad de Monterrey.

Ya sea trasladarse del aeropuerto, visitar una empresa o transportarse a una reunión de negocios, en MGB Transportes estamos seguros que podemos brindarle el servicio que sus ejecutivos necesitan. 

Tenemos amplia experiencia en el traslado de ejecutivos
tanto nacionales como extranjeros que semanalmente nos visitan en la ciudad, mayormente por motivos de negocios. 

Desde su llegada en el aeropuerto, hasta el
traslado a sus hoteles, empresas, visitas, reuniones, cenas, etc. estamos listos para atenderlos de forma segura y amable.

Name: Grupo EOM
Description: Importante empresa de transportes de servicio especializado, ubicados en diferentes departamentos del país.

Name: Lux Travely
Description:
At Lux Travely Inc, we strive to provide the highest level of luxury transportation to meet your needs and exceed your expectations. We understand that our clients are discerning individuals who value professionalism, reliability, and comfort. That is why we make it our mission to deliver an unparalleled experience with every journey. In recent times, we have witnessed unprecedented challenges and changes in the world around us. The COVID-19 pandemic has impacted the travel industry, and we have adapted our operations to ensure the safety and well-being of our passengers and chauffeurs. We have implemented rigorous cleaning and sanitation protocols, following the guidelines provided by health authorities, to provide you with a safe and secure environment during your travels.
As we move forward, we remain committed to delivering excellence in service. We continuously invest in our fleet of luxury vehicles, ensuring they are equipped with the latest amenities and technology to enhance your travel experience. Our team of highly trained chauffeurs undergo regular training to provide you with the utmost professionalism and ensure a smooth and enjoyable journey.

Name: Kwoon Chung Bus Holdings Limited
Description:
Given that logistics and tourism are two of the four pillar industries in Hong Kong and Mainland China market is enormous and fast growing, the Group has full confidence in its continuing development in various businesses.

When the late Mr. Wong Kwoon Chung launched a car cleaning service in 1948, he would not have envisaged that Kwoon Chung Bus Holdings Limited and its subsidiaries would become one of the largest non-franchised bus operators in Hong Kong. The expansion in Mainland China, in particular the cross-boundary bus service, can also be described as dramatic. After over half a century of development, the Group has made its name in the transport history of Hong Kong as a comprehensive bus service provider.

Name: ENS GROUP - ENS ATIK YÖNETİMİ
Description: ENS GROUP, personel ve öğrenci taşımacılığı, iş makinesi ve araç kiralama sektörlerinde öncü bir şirkettir. Müşterilerine kaliteli ve güvenli hizmet sunmak amacıyla yola çıkan ENS GROUP, sektöründe lider firmalar arasında yer alır.

Name: L'esprit mobile
Description:
À l’initiative du canton du Jura, de MOBIJU, des CFF, des Chemins de fer du Jura, de Noctambus et de Vagabond, le concept L’esprit mobile a pour but de favoriser, de développer et de valoriser l’usage des transports publics dans leur ensemble.

Ainsi, sous l’égide de L’esprit mobile le canton et ses partenaires souhaitent encourager la population et les entreprises jurassiennes à opter pour les transports publics en proposant des offres, des promotions et des événements qui participent à l’attrait de modes de transports et de voyage plus écologiques, plus économiques et plus durables. 

L’esprit mobile est à l’image d’un canton et de ses habitants, inspirants, sensibles, ouverts, solidaires. Parce que L’esprit mobile c’est être capable de penser autrement, de changer ses habitudes, de s’adapter aux enjeux environnementaux et sociétaux et de s’ouvrir au monde comme à de nouveaux horizons. 

Mais ce n'est pas tout, c’est aussi et surtout un réseau de plus de 30 lignes de bus et de trains sur l'ensemble du canton.

Name: Corporate Transportation Group, LTD.
Description: CTG pushes the boundaries of passenger ground transportation. We run dedicated microtransit operations, manage broker programs, coordinate corporate travel, and deliver NEMT medical transportation—powered by modern tech that streamlines workflows and elevates the experience for riders and drivers. With 30+ years of hands-on operations and a broad U.S. footprint, we combine deep industry expertise with cutting-edge solutions to deliver reliable, accessible, and scalable mobility for organizations and communities. For customers, that means consistent quality and accountability; for talent, it’s a place where transportation pros and technologists solve meaningful problems and grow their careers.

Name: Macon Transportes S.A
Description:
A Macon é uma das maiores e mais respeitadas empresas de transporte de passageiros e mercadorias em Angola, com uma trajectória sólida marcada por segurança, conforto e compromisso com os nossos passageiros. Actuamos em várias províncias do país, conectando pessoas, histórias e oportunidades todos os dias.

Com uma frota moderna, tecnologia embarcada e canais digitais de venda como app, website e WhatsApp, oferecemos uma experiência de viagem eficiente, confiável e adaptada às novas necessidades do cliente angolano.

Trabalhamos continuamente para inovar no sector de mobilidade, investir na formação da nossa equipa e expandir os nossos serviços para alcançar mais destinos, com qualidade e responsabilidade social.

MACON, SEU DESTINO NOSSO OBJECTIVO!

Name: Carrs Chauffeur Hire Loch Lomond
Description: Carrs Chauffeur Hire Loch Lomond, is one of the leading ground transport company for Scotland with over 15 years experience, we have a fleet of Executive Saloons, Luxury MPVs, Range Rovers  and minibuses.  We offer airport transfers, hotel transfers, business travel, wedding cars, special occasion trips, sighting, bespoke and golf tours, away day transport all with one or multiple vehicles and highly experienced knowledgeable drivers.

Name: VIP Connections Travel and Transfer
Description: VIP Connections provide a friendly and professional transport service looking after private and business clients. We cover all UK airports, Cruise terminals and Cities. We run up to date Mercedes vehicles that are second to none.

Name: Özmer Logistics
Description:
Özmer Logistics, one of Turkey’s leading companies, was founded in 2005. Özmer Logistics offer combined transportation by road, sea, air and rail, as well as forwarding and warehousing services.

Today, Özmer Logistics operstes with a road fleet consisting of 102 assets that meet international technical standarts and 180 approved suppliers, along with the company has access to 30,000 square meters of indoor and outdoor container storage and warehouse space Özmer facilities.

Name: Rocket City Shuttles
Description: Rocket City Shuttles offers the BEST! Best customer service, Best vehicles, Best logistics and the very Best personnel to help ensure your event is a success!

Name: Citrus Connection
Description: Citrus Connection is a transportation company based out of 1212 George Jenkins Blvd, Lakeland, FL, United States.

Name: Santo Antônio Transportes
Description:
A Santo Antônio Transportes é uma empresa especializada no transporte de passageiros, oferecendo soluções de mobilidade para diferentes necessidades. Com uma frota moderna e bem equipada, garantimos conforto, pontualidade e segurança em todas as viagens. 

Missão: Atender as necessidades de deslocamento da população respeitando as premissas legais e prestando serviços de qualidade, responsabilidade e satisfação para clientes, colaboradores, acionistas e sociedade.

Visão: Sermos uma referência no setor de transporte por meio da excelência operacional melhoria contínua, desenvolvimento profissional dos colaboradores e satisfação dos clientes.

Valores: 
- RESPONSABILIDADE
Ser comprometido no desempenho de suas funções.

- EMPATIA
Capacidade de compreender o sentimento ou reação de outra pessoa imaginando-se nas mesmas circunstâncias

- ÉTICA PROFISSIONAL
Ter atitudes que visam uma boa conduta profissional, respeitando as leis, normas e procedimentos.

- TRANSPARÊNCIA
Ser claro e verdadeiro em suas atitudes no trabalho

- INOVAÇÃO
Ser criativo visando o aperfeiçoamento e novas ideias

- PROATIVIDADE
Ter iniciativa, propor melhorias, evitar ou resolver um provável problema antes mesmo que ele aconteça

Name: SulPolo Locação e Transportes
Description: A Sulplo é uma empresa especializada em transporte de pessoas com mais de 27 anos de serviços prestados, oferecendo um transporte com qualidade, conforto e segurança, acessíveis e em tempo oportuno, com  desenvolvimento sustentável.

Name: Black To Black Premier Chauffeur Services
Description: Experience Canada's Premier Chauffeur Service Where Luxury Meets Reliability.

Name: Zanchettur Coletivos LTDA
Description:
Nós somos a Zanchettur Coletivos, e nossa missão é tornar a sua viagem mais fácil e agradável.

Como especialistas em transporte de passageiros, cuidamos de todos os detalhes para que você possa se concentrar em seus negócios. Oferecemos soluções flexíveis e personalizadas para atender às suas necessidades específicas, desde rotas já existentes até novas operações.

Sabemos que a logística de transporte pode ser uma dor de cabeça para muitos empresários. Mas para nós, é uma paixão. Afinal, acreditamos que uma experiência de transporte de qualidade pode fazer toda a diferença no desempenho e na satisfação dos colaboradores.

Nossa equipe altamente treinada e experiente está sempre pronta para lidar com qualquer situação, desde a indústria, florestal, ferrovias e barragem. E com pontos de apoio regionais próximos às suas operações, garantimos que estamos sempre prontos para atendê-lo.

Name: Ovando Tours, SRL
Description: Somos una empresa líder en el sector de transporte de personal en la República Dominicana, comprometidos con brindar soluciones de movilidad seguras, eficientes y confiables. Con una flota moderna y un equipo altamente capacitado, nos especializamos en satisfacer las necesidades de transporte de empresas, instituciones y eventos en todo el país. Name: Y Ride
Description:
YRide is a California-based ridesharing platform built on a simple principle: rideshare should be fair for drivers and affordable for riders.

Today, our subscription model ensures drivers keep 100% of their fares while riders enjoy transparent, surge-free pricing. We are proud of our zero-commission structure and absolute fare transparency, creating a relationship of trust between drivers and riders.

But our vision goes beyond today. As the industry moves toward autonomous vehicles, YRide is building the only path where drivers don’t get left behind—they evolve. With our platform, demand, and financing partnerships, drivers will transition from earning fares to owning and operating their own autonomous fleets.

Fair today. Autonomous tomorrow. A future where drivers thrive, not vanish.

Name: Neurodiversity in Transport
Description:
The Neurodiversity in Transport Centre of Excellence (NTCoE) are a new professional group that champions and promotes the benefits of neurodivergent practices and acceptance for passengers and employees across the transport sector in the UK. We cover road, rail, air and sea modes in which each mode has different requirements and strengths for the passenger and the employee. 

We cover, ally and support those from all neurodivergent conditions including Autism, ADD, ADHD, Dementia, Dyscalculia, Dyslexia, Dyspraxia, OCD, PDA, PTSD, Tourette's Syndrome and much more. We also work with operators on advising as to how they can be more neuroinclusive from an operational and frontline perspective. 

We are run entirely by volunteers in which we have a real passion to make transport as neuroinclusive as possible. Many of us also have many years of lived experience in which we want to use to help make the world a better place when it comes to travel.

Description:
SRTC Limo Worldwide chauffeur service Celebrates 10 Years of Growth and Expansion

SRTC Limo Worldwide chauffeur service is celebrating a major milestone—10 years in business in 2026. What began as a one-car, owner-operator venture founded by Guri alongside his father has grown into a premier transportation company with more than 20 vehicles, multiple locations, and a global client base.

Today, SRTC Limo Worldwide chauffeur service operates branches in Seattle wa and Spokane Wa , serving clients throughout Washington State and beyond, with trusted affiliate partnerships worldwide. Known for its high service standards, professional chauffeurs, and attention to detail, SRTC has built a reputation not only as a local leader but as a globally trusted transportation provider for VIP and high-end clientele.

As part of its 10-year celebration, the company has launched Spokane Limo & Black Car Service, expanding its footprint across Spokane, Coeur d’Alene, and the Inland Northwest, with service extending into Idaho and Montana. This expansion reflects SRTC’s continued commitment to meeting growing demand in emerging markets while maintaining the same level of excellence the brand is known for.

SRTC Limo Worldwide provides VIP, corporate, and family-level transportation for all types of events and occasions—not limited to corporate travel. Their diverse fleet includes luxury sedans, SUVs, sprinter vans, limousines, and buses, offering tailored transportation solutions for everything from executive travel and special events to family vacations and group transportation.

After a decade of steady growth, SRTC Limo Worldwide continues to set the standard for luxury ground transportation in the Pacific Northwest and beyond.

Name: Pet Leva
Description:
Uma empresa especializada em transporte de Pets, que está no mercado desde 13 de setembro de 2017, tendo atuado até 26/07/2022 com o nome UberDogs e até 10/10/2023 com o nome TransPet Brasil. 

Levamos seu animalzinho com conforto, segurança e amor por onde precisar: Escolinha, hotelzinho, veterinário, passeio, mudança, compra, venda, adoção, resgate, fisioterapia, acupuntura, viagem, casamentos, aeroportos e tudo mais que precisar para se mover com seu Pet pela cidade! 

A Pet Leva surgiu da necessidade identificada em nossa sociedade de que houvesse um transporte especializado para animais de estimação, haja visto que nosso mundo está cada vez mais petfriendly! Então decidimos atuar no segmento de prestação de serviços de mobilidade urbana voltado para pets sozinhos ou acompanhados de seus tutores.

Nossa proposta é atender a essa crescente demanda proporcionando ao animal e seu dono, conforto e segurança. Para isso o transporte é realizado em um carro climatizado e limpo. 

O animal fica preso ao cinto de segurança desenvolvido especificamente para ele e que hoje temos disponível em nossa loja para os tutores que quiserem adotar o uso em carros particulares conforme o preconizado legalmente no artigo 56.º do Código da Estrada (considerados como carga) e no Decreto-Lei n.º 315/2003.

Caso o tutor tenha preferência por caixa de transporte ou cadeirinha, poderá levar o equipamento juntamente com o pet.

Sozinho, em sua companhia ou de mais membros da família, ou até acompanhado com outros pets. Atendemos em toda a grande BH, e também fazemos transportes intermunicipais e interestaduais.

Oslo Taxibuss AS (OTB) er en del av Oslo Taxi-konsernet. Oslo Taxi ble etablert i 1921 og er i dag et av Norges største konsern innen persontransport, målt i antall passasjerer. Name: BRT-ABC
Description:
O BRT-ABC chega para preencher antiga demanda dos moradores do Grande ABCDMR por um transporte de ligação com os modais de transporte de massa – Sistema Metroviário.
Mais do que ser uma ligação, o BRT é um meio de transporte rápido, moderno e eficiente, além de levar menos tempo para ser construído, ter um custo menor que os demais transportes de massa, e produzir a menor interferência arquitetônica no meio em que é introduzido. É mais qualidade de vida para as pessoas que usam o transporte público.
O BRT, sigla em inglês que significa Bus Rapid Transit, ou seja, ônibus de trânsito rápido, é um novo conceito em mobilidade urbana por via rápida e exclusiva.
Para garantir a rapidez do serviço, contará com faixa exclusiva de circulação, segunda faixa para ultrapassagem na maior parte do trajeto, embarques e desembarques rápidos por plataformas elevadas em estações providas de ar-condicionado, wi-fi e informações em tempo real sobre as linhas, além de integração física com outros modais, e pagamento antecipado fora do ônibus da área de embarque.

Serão 16 paradas e dois terminais. A extensão será de 17,3 km entre o centro de São Bernardo do Campo e o Terminal Sacomã (São Paulo).
O sistema prevê  82 ônibus articulados elétricos de 23m.
As viagens de e-Bus (ônibus 100% elétrico) serão realizadas por 12 ônibus no Expresso (até 40 minutos – do Terminal São Bernardo ao Sacomã); 34 no Semiexpresso (até 43 minutos – seis paradas, e nos terminais São Bernardo do Campo, Tamanduateí e Sacomã); e 30 no Parador (até 52 minutos – todas as paradas).
Location: Sã Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Diesen Anspruch setzen wir bereits heute in Berlin, Bremen, Brüssel, Dresden, Düsseldorf, Frankfurt, Hamburg, Hannover, Köln, Leipzig, München, Nürnberg und Stuttgart um – bequem, sicher und digital, kundenfreundlich.

Unserer Fahrzeugflotte ist konsequent und erfolgreich auf alternative Antriebsarten umgestellt. Mit unseren Wasserstoff-, Hybrid- und Elektro-Fahrzeugen der neuesten Generation bringt unser geschultes Fahrpersonal Fahrgäste pünktlich und sicher zum Ziel, und verringern aktiv Schadstoffemissionen.

Bis 2024 wollen wir eine rein emissionsfreie Flotte unterhalten. Die damit verbundene erforderliche Ladeinfrastruktur baut SafeDriver ennoo stetig aus. Darüber hinaus nehmen wir abseits der Großstädte die komplexen Herausforderungen an, die an zeitgemäße Verkehrslösungen auf dem Land gestellt werden.

Unsere Angebote im Überblick: 

Personenbeförderung.
Der digitale Wandel prägt die Zukunft der Mobilität. Weg vom Auto als persönliches Fortbewegungsmittel, Share Economy, digitale Vernetzung und innovative Verkehrskonzepte. ennoo bringt am Puls der Zeit täglich Fahrgäste mit neuesten Technologien an ihre Ziele.

e-Scooter Charging.
e-Scooter haben sich als beliebte Alternative etabliert, um schnell von A nach B zu kommen. Durch unsere Arbeit ist gewährleistet, dass die Elektroroller immer Saft haben und den größtmöglichen Fahrspaß bieten.

A l’instar de l’activité transport de voyageurs et de services, le secteur des transports guidés (Métro, Tramway et Transport par câbles) a été rattaché au nouveau Groupe Transport Terrestre de Voyageurs TRANSTEV Spa.

Name: IKV Ilm-Kreis
Description:
Mit 60 Linienbussen, 3 Kombibussen und über 180 Mitarbeitern sind wir ein kommunales Unternehmen im Süden des Freistaates Thüringen. Wir planen, gestalten und organisieren den Linienverkehr im Ilm-Kreis. Gemeinsam mit unseren Nachauftragnehmern fahren wir jährlich über 4 Mio. Fahrplankilometer - damit umrunden wir gemeinsam mit unseren Fahrgästen die Welt über 95 Mal.
In unserer eigenen Werkstatt warten und reparieren wir unsere Fahrzeugflotte und bilden Lehrlinge aus. Jährlich investieren wir in neue Fahrzeuge, unseren Betriebshof sowie die Außenstellen und die Weiterbildung unseres Fahrpersonals.
Unser 30-jähriges Betriebsjubiläum feierten wir im Jahr 2023.
Seit 1993 hat sich einerseits ganz viel und andererseits ganz wenig verändert.
Sehr viel hat sich im Bereich der Fahrzeugtechnik getan. Unsere Fahrzeuge sind über die Jahre moderner, sparsamer, umweltfreundlicher und komfortabler geworden. Klimaanlagen, Barrierefreiheit, elektronische und akustische Informationssysteme sind mittlerweile Standard und diesen bauen wir immer weiter aus.
Sehr wenig hat sich an unserer Grundhaltung verändert: Unser Buslinienverkehr muss zuverlässig, sicher und pünktlich unsere Fahrgäste befördern. Dieser Anspruch galt für uns schon vor über 30 Jahren, genauso wie heute und in der Zukunft.
Seit Mitte Januar 2026 treten wir nach außen als IKV auf. Die neue Marke steht für "Ilm-Kreis verbindet". Unser Unternehmen wird weiterhin als IOV Omnibusverkehr GmbH Ilmenau firmieren. Wir möchten mit dieser Neuausrichtung einen moderneren, klareren und einheitlicheren Auftritt, der die enge Verbundenheit mit dem Ilm-Kreis stärker nach außen trägt, erreichen – denn wir sind ein Unternehmen im und für den Ilm-Kreis. Im Laufe des Jahres 2026 werden wir verschiedene Elemente unseres visuellen Auftrittes schrittweise anpassen – von der Dienstkleidung über Fahrzeuge bis hin zu den Medien, Aushängen und Informationsmaterialien.

La nécessité de sortir de notre dépendance à un système tout voiture requiert la mise à disposition de l’ensemble des citoyens, d’alternatives devant répondre à des caractéristiques primordiales pour permettre un réel report modal.

Ainsi ces services de mobilité se doivent d’être faciles à utiliser, rassurants et attractifs.

Nos compétences peuvent être mobilisées par des acteurs publics, privés ou associatifs dans le cadre d'un plan d'actions de transition ou par des structures académiques pour sensibiliser leurs étudiants ou renforcer leur programme d'enseignement.
