• Freight transport
• Customer experience and innovation

The strategy and vision of our newly renamed Vy Group is simply: «The best journey». This expression captures how we are shaping our business around our customers’ needs in order to deliver the best journey for our customers.

Name: 407 ETR
Description:
Highway 407 ETR is the world’s first all electronic toll highway spanning 108 kilometres in the Greater Toronto Area. We provide fast, safe and reliable travel for commuters, businesses and communities.
Our commitment goes beyond the road—we invest in Ontario’s economy, support local communities, and protect the environment. From traffic alerts and customer service to infrastructure innovation and social impact, we’re proud to serve the region we call home. Proudly majority Canadian-owned

Name: Zeelo
Description: Zeelo are the #1 shuttle provider across the US, UK and Ireland. Getting riders to work and school efficiently and reliably. We manage transportation for 1000+ corporations and schools

Name: Nobina Sverige AB
Description:
Nobina är Sveriges äldsta och Nordens största företag för kollektivtrafik med buss.

Varje år har vi mer än 200 miljoner påstigande kunder i den linjelagda, offentliga busstrafiken. Det betyder att nästan var tredje bussresa i Sverige sker med Nobina!

Nobina Sverige finns idag på cirka 100 platser runt om i landet med 7000 engagerade medarbetare som arbetar för att förenkla kundens vardagsresor - det är din upplevelse som styr vår verksamhet.

Vi vill vara attraktiva både för våra kunder och uppdragsgivare. Därför ska allt vi gör inom Nobina Sverige kännetecknas av tre saker: enkelhet, vänlighet samt prisvärdhet (gentemot våra kunder) och resurseffektivitet (gentemot våra uppdragsgivare).

Name: Dublin Bus (Bus Átha Cliath)
Description:
Dublin Bus is the largest Public Transport provider in Ireland. Over the last five years Dublin Bus has carried more than 700 million customer across Dublin’s bus network. We have a fleet of over 1000 buses which follow 125 Routes, including 19 high frequency routes. We employ 3,600 people, 2,500 of which are bus drivers. These employees represent 71 different countries.

As Ireland’s largest public transport provider, our purpose is to deliver high quality public transport services which meet the needs of people, support the economic growth of our city and also meet our social and environmental aspirations which are representative of a progressive European capital city.

Name: Saritur
Description:
Uma empresa se faz com espírito empreendedor, com gente e com tecnologia; o Grupo Empresarial Saritur, acredita firmemente nisso, tanto que, em sua história, a tradição e a modernidade caminham juntas.

Fundada por José Carvalho e seus filhos, a SARITUR iniciou suas atividades em janeiro de 1977, transportando empregados de indústrias e de prestadoras de serviço. A partir de 1980, por concessão do poder público, passou a operar também linhas intermunicipais de transporte coletivo de passageiros de longa distância e em 1990, o transporte urbano de passageiros.

Nas décadas seguintes, o empreendimento continuou crescendo.

Desde o início, confiar no trabalho, na honestidade e em educação contínua para vencer quaisquer obstáculos são os ideais que norteiam os caminhos do Grupo.

No transporte intermunicipal a Saritur está presente nas principais regiões do Estado, entre elas; Central, Alto São Francisco, Vale Paraopeba, Rio Doce, Alto Jequitinhonha, Norte de Minas, Campos das Vertentes, Vale Mucuri, Sul de Minas e Triângulo Mineiro.

O Grupo Empresarial Saritur, presta serviços de transporte coletivo urbano nos seguintes municípios: Belo Horizonte, Brumadinho, Contagem, Coronel Fabriciano, Ipatinga, Itaúna, Lavras, Ribeirão das Neves, Timóteo, Varginha.

Atualmente seus negócios são:
– transporte urbano de passageiros,
– transporte rodoviário de passageiros,
– transporte de cargas e encomendas,
– fretamento de especiais para todo o Brasil,
– fretamento fixo, transporte de funcionários para empresas.

O Grupo Empresarial Saritur foca no transporte de passageiros e faz investimentos nesta área para garantir a satisfação do cliente.  A melhoria continua já faz parte dos processos internos, e a empresa usa a opinião de seus clientes e de seus colaboradores para evoluir sempre.

Name: Fresh Bus
Description:
Welcome to Fresh Bus, your passport to the future of bus travel! 

At Fresh Bus, we're committed to making your journey as smooth, safe, and enjoyable as possible. Our electric buses offer a quiet and comfortable ride while being eco-friendly and carbon-neutral. With luxurious Recliner AC seating, personal USB charging docks, ambient lighting, and advanced air quality monitoring, we deliver a premium travel experience.

Safety is our top priority. Our drivers undergo rigorous vetting and training, and we offer real-time assistance through our app and customer support centre. Booking is a breeze with our app, website, and more, providing real-time updates, bus tracking, exciting offers, and live customer support.

Join us on this eco-friendly, premium, and safe journey. Choose Fresh Bus for a remarkable travel experience.

Name: Viggo
Description:
En Viggo sabemos que la FUERZA LABORAL de una empresa es la ENERGÍA que la mueve, por lo que cuidamos a diario el transporte del equipo humano de nuestros clientes con altos estándares de seguridad y atención al pasajero.
Como expertos en transporte industrial, nos motiva la calidad y la eficiencia de nuestros servicios y flota para brindar un traslado seguro, confiable y con la continuidad operacional que nuestros clientes necesitan.
En Viggo, somos fuerza en movimiento.

Name: PostBus Ltd.
Description: The leading bus company.

Name: WeDriveU
Description:
WeDriveU is the leader in shared mobility solutions for communities, campuses and workplaces, serving millions of annual passenger journeys across the U.S.  Our transportation solutions encompass fixed route transit service, paratransit, microtransit, shuttles and on-demand solutions. We're a subsidiary of Mobico Group, a global mobility leader serving over one billion annual bus and rail passenger journeys on four continents.

WeDriveU is a great place to build a rewarding career, with many current job opportunities available on our operations and corporate teams. We're an equal opportunity employer that celebrates the unique background, experience and contributions of all team members. We're committed to creating an inclusive environment free of discrimination or harassment where the thoughts and ideas of all employees are appreciated and respected. 
We're a proud member and partner of organizations such as the American Public Transit Association (APTA), North American Transit Alliance (NATA), Association for Commuter Transportation (ACT), International Parking & Mobility Association (IPMI), LIT, Best Workplaces for Commuters, Movability Austin, South West Transit Association, Texas Transit Association, NC Public Transit Association, and numerous other organizations.

Name: Auto Viação Catarinense
Description:
A Catarinense foi a primeira empresa brasileira de transporte de passageiros registrada no poder concedente e, desde 1928, é sinônimo de seriedade e serviços de qualidade.

Sua frota de 350 ônibus transporta 460 mil passageiros em uma média de 9.400 viagens por mês, atendendo linhas intermunicipais, interestaduais e internacionais que cruzam cidades das regiões Sul e Sudeste, bem como do Paraguai.

Empregando atualmente 1300 funcionários, a Catarinense harmoniza perfeitamente o transporte de passageiros com o de cargas e o fretamento turístico.

Name: Utah Transit Authority
Description: Utah Transit Authority is a multimodal public transportation agency serving six counties and over 80 cities along the Wasatch Front.

Name: Modern Bus Company
Description:
Nesma ( which is a lead partner of TNC Consortium ) has been awarded the Contract for “Procurement, Operation and Maintenance” of Makkah Bus Project Phase 1. The duration of the Project is Design and Construction of the O&M facility in 18 months; followed by Operation and Maintenance for 8.5 years.

The project involves “Design and Construction” of the Depot: which consists of 7 operation buildings & administration block; and Accommodation zone for 1400 staff.

The “Procurement Scope” is a supply of 400 German buses (MAN) ( 240 standard buses of 12m and 160 articulated buses of 18m ) and supply of On-board & Off-board ITS ( Intelligent Transportation System ) equipment as per the latest technology.

The On-board ITS equipment are: Voice Radio Communications, Computer-Aided Dispatch (CAD) / Automatic Vehicle Location (AVL), Automatic Passenger Counters (APC), Automated Annunciation System (AADS), Electronic Fare Payment System ( Validators ) and Onboard Cameras.

The Off-board ITS equipment are: Electronic Payment System ( TVMs & PoS ), VoIP Terminals, Non-Revenue Vehicles, Bus in a Box, Maintenance Management System (ORACLE), Driver Simulator, Trip Planner Application, Web-Based Hand-Held RTPI Application, GIRO-Hastus scheduling and planning software, Vehicle Component Monitoring System and Paper cast screens on all the bus stops.

The “Operation Scope” includes the operation of 400 buses on 12 routes with a total length of 565 km covering 500 bus stops all around the Holy city of Makkah Al Mukarramah for a period of 8.5 years.

The “Maintenance Scope” is the maintenance of the buses, ITS, 500 bus shelters and Facility Management of the Depot and Accommodation for a period of 8.5 years.

Name: Pássaro Marron
Description:
Com mais de 80 anos de atuação, somos uma das mais importantes empresas de transporte na região Sudeste, referência nas linhas municipal, intermunicipal e interestadual.
Operamos com uma frota de 407 ônibus atendendo a mais de 50 municípios, transportando cerca de 20 milhões de passageiros por ano.
E o crescimento e a melhoria na qualidade dos serviços não param!

Name: transports publics fribourgeois
Description:
The Transports publics fribourgeois are the lead actor in mobility in the canton of Fribourg (Switzerland), operating a railway network, a regional bus network and two urban bus networks.
This one company carries more than 80% of passengers throughout the canton of Fribourg. Consequently, mobility is the key point of the TPF group since 1868. Today it covers the entire canton of Friborg, with its trains, regional buses and urban lines. To be even closer to its users, the TPF group transforms its stations into places of residence and activity, and invests in innovation. It is organized as a holding company to ensure transparency on its activities and financing.

Name: Flecha Bus
Description:
En Grupo Flecha, impulsamos el movimiento del país. Desde 1959, operamos con la responsabilidad de brindar soluciones integrales de transporte, movilidad y logística.

Nuestras Unidades de Negocio Gestionamos una red estratégica que une a la Argentina.  Pasajeros: A través de nuestras marcas líderes como Flecha Bus, Chevallier, Empresa General Urquiza, La Veloz del Norte y Zenit, garantizamos una cobertura federal incomparable.  Logística: Potenciamos el comercio con Flecha Carga (ex Buspack), nuestra empresa especializada en envíos, encomiendas y transporte de paquetería, brindando soluciones rápidas y seguras para clientes corporativos y particulares.

Combinamos tradición e innovación con una flota de vanguardia y tecnología aplicada a la seguridad y la eficiencia operativa.

Nuestra Visión Ser el operador logístico y de transporte referente en todo el territorio nacional y consolidar nuestra expansión regional en el Mercosur.

Name: Public Transportation Company
Description:
PTC is a joint venture company between SAPTCO group (www.saptco.com.sa) and RATP Dev group (www.ratpdev.com). PTC was awarded in 2014 by ADA (Arriyadh Development Authority) for the contract of Procurement, Operations & Maintenance of the King Abdulaziz Project for Riyadh Public Transport (http://www.ada.gov.sa).  

PTC will operate 80 routes, 1,000 buses & 4,000+ employees..  join us!

Name: Keolis Canada
Description:
Keolis Canada develops mobility solutions adapted to the changing needs of travellers and to the expectations of local communities: intercity transportation, urban transportation, light rail, autonomous electric shuttles and airport transportation.

With its team of more than 800 employees, Keolis Canada transports nearly 20 million passengers and more than 1 million parcels annually and operates a fleet of 285 buses and 15 light rail vehicles. Keolis Canada is part of the Keolis Group, which is 70% owned by SNCF and 30% by the Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec (CDPQ) and has 68,500 employees in 16 countries and a turnover of 5.4 billion euros (8.7 billion Canadian dollars) in 2017. 

As the world's leading operator of automatic metro and light rail systems, the Keolis Group relies on a sustained and open innovation policy with all its partners to develop new, innovative and tailor-made shared mobility offers: trains, buses and coaches, trolley buses, collective VTCs, river and maritime shuttles, self-service bicycles, car-sharing, autonomous electric shuttles and urban cable cars. Today, more than 5 billion passengers have used one of the shared mobility services offered by Keolis worldwide.

Name: LETEC
Description:
Fort de ses 6.000 collaborateurs, LETEC est un acteur majeur de la mobilité en Wallonie. 

Chaque jour, nous garantissons à nos clients des solutions adaptées à leurs besoins, afin de leur assurer des déplacements accessibles, responsables et efficaces. En permettant aux Wallon(ne)s de se déplacer pour accomplir leurs activités quotidiennes, nous contribuons activement au développement économique, culturel et social de la Région. 

Travailler chez LETEC, c'est contribuer concrètement à bâtir une mobilité qui ressemble et qui rassemble.

À la recherche d'un job qui a du sens ? Ne cherchez plus  postulez sur LETEC.BE

Name: Skånetrafiken
Description:
With Skånetrafiken, Skåne’s public transport service, you can travel to pretty much any town in Skåne. Furthermore, using the Öresund train, you can travel across the strait to Copenhagen, as well as all the way to Gothenburg,  Halland, Kronoberg and Kalmar counties.

Skåne shall be open for everyone. We open up for possibilities and experiences. We open up for meetings, and a sense of belonging and community. We aim to make it easy to travel by any of our 14,000 daily bus and train departures.

Please do follow us here to keep up to date with our news and upcoming vacancies. Working with us, you can deal with exciting social planning. Develop our public transport and infrastructure. Influence the everyday lives of hundreds of thousands of people. 

If you are looking for work as a train host, train driver or bus driver, you will find vacancy information on the websites of the respective transport companies. All our bus and train services are outsourced and run by private bus and train companies.

Name: TRANSPORTES RINCÓN S.R.L.
Description:
Somos

Una empresa de transportes de pasajeros que une las principales ciudades petrolíferas de la cuenca neuquina y el sur de Mendocino.

Por la ubicación geográfica de nuestro recorrido atravesamos Vaca Muerta que es la principal formación de Shale en la Argentina, llegando a Rincón de los Sauces, la ciudad que da nombre a nuestra empresa y la que propicio nuestro desarrollo.

Nuestras unidades, son impulsadas por la marca Mercedes Benz que nos proporciona la firma Alenco. El 95% del parque es renovado antes de cumplir los 3 años en ruta, para minimizar los inconvenientes mecánicos.

Name: Bus Éireann
Description:
Bus Éireann was formed in 1987 as a subsidiary of CIÉ to provide bus services throughout Ireland, with the exception of Dublin City. Bus Éireann employs almost 2,800 people directly and operate a fleet of over 1,100 buses and coaches.

We offer a wide range of services catering for different customer groups and market sectors:
•	Expressway Inter- urban coach services
•	Eurolines coach services to Britain and Europe
•	City Bus Services - in Cork, Galway, Limerick and Waterford
•	Town services in Athlone, Balbriggan, Drogheda, Dundalk, Navan and Sligo
•	Commuter bus services radiating from Dublin, Cork, Limerick, Galway and Waterford
•	Local bus services throughout Ireland
•	School Bus Services - on behalf of the Department of Education & Science
•	Ancillary Services - coach and bus hire.

Name: Oltursa - Transporte y Carga
Description:
OLTURSA, se fundó hace 40 años, empezando sus operaciones  hacia la primavera del año 1981.  Una de las características que siempre marcaron el rumbo de la empresa ha sido la innovación  constante con tecnología de punta, la excelencia en el servicio  y la inversión permanentemente en nueva flota respaldada siempre por las marcas SCANIA, MERCEDES BENZ, VOLVO,  MARCOPOLO, IRIZAR Y COMIL con el fin de garantizar la seguridad de los pasajeros, los cuales siempre son tratados  como amigos.

Premiada en el 2010 con la orden al mérito del MTC por su innovación en seguridad y calidad de servicio, Oltursa es la línea de transportes con mayores índices de satisfacción del cliente debido a un servicio que siempre está a la vanguardia en cuanto a seguridad y calidad de atención abordo.

Uno de los últimos premios recibidos ha sido el otorgado por la camara de comercio de lima obteniendo el primer puesto al ser elegida como la mejor empresa de transporte de pasajeros.

Name: Transdev Canada
Description:
Transdev est un chef de file du transport collectif au Canada. 

Son expertise repose sur de nombreux savoir-faire complémentaires comme la gestion de réseaux de transport en commun, le montage et la conduite de grands projets ou les services aux passagers.
 
Transdev Canada est un leader du transport multimodal pancanadien avec plus de 6000 employés qui fournissent des services de transport en commun urbains, suburbains, interurbains, scolaire, ferroviaire, adapté, médical, à la demande etc. Avec plus de 50 ans d’expérience et plus 3700 véhicules sur la route, nous sommes l’intégrateur de mobilités qui permet à chacun de se déplacer chaque jour grâce à des solutions sûres, efficaces et innovantes au service du bien commun. 

Depuis sa création, le groupe Transdev connaît une croissance constante et forte en Europe, en Amérique du Nord et dans le monde. 

///

Transdev is a leader in public transit in Canada. 

Its expertise is based on a number of complementary fields, such as public transit system management, major project development and management, and passenger services.
 
Transdev Canada is a leader in multimodal transportation across Canada, with more than 5,000 employees providing urban, suburban, intercity, school, rail, paratransit, medical and on-demand transit services. With over 50 years' experience and more than 3,500 vehicles on the road, we are the mobility integrator that enables everyone to get around every day, thanks to safe, reliable and innovative solutions that serve the common good. 

Since its creation, the Transdev group has experienced constant, strong growth in Europe, North America and around the world.

Name: Grupo Ruiz
Description:
Grupo Ruiz es hoy uno de los primeros grupos de movilidad en España y uno de los más antiguos, ya que sus orígenes se remontan a finales de 1890.

Nos dedicamos a transformar la forma en que nos movemos, creando un impacto positivo en el mundo y en las comunidades que servimos. Contamos con una trayectoria sólida y un enfoque visionario que nos ha consolidado como referentes en el sector del transporte.

Nuestro firme compromiso con la sostenibilidad y el medio ambiente es la piedra angular de nuestras operaciones. A través de una visión innovadora y la mejora constante, nos enorgullece reducir las emisiones y ofrecer una movilidad de máxima calidad.

En la actualidad, gestionamos numerosas concesiones administrativas de transporte urbano e interurbano, así como actividades en hostelería y restauración, aparcamientos, arrendamiento de vehículos con y sin conductor, servicios de limpieza viaria e inmuebles, además de talleres de reparación de vehículos industriales y turismos. Nuestra gran vocación de diversificación nos ha llevado a convertirnos en un holding internacional con más de 3000 trabajadores, sirviendo a millones de clientes en España y en el extranjero.

Name: Tawasul Transport L.L.C
Description:
Tawasul Transport LLC, founded in 2007 under DAS Holding, is one of Abu Dhabi’s leading mobility companies. We operate across three strategic divisions: Tawasul Taxi, Tawasul Limousine, and Tawasul Autonomous, delivering safe, modern, and innovative mobility solutions.

Our taxi fleet of 1,350 eco-friendly vehicles and 1,750 trained multilingual drivers serve the community with high-quality standards. Supported by advanced facilities, workshops, a modern training center, and a real-time Monitoring & Control Center, Tawasul is committed to excellence and leadership in smart mobility.

Name: Keolis Sverige AB
Description:
Vi hämtar leriga förskolebarn efter utflykten, ser till att nattsuddarna kommer hem och plockar troget upp arbetspendlarna om mornarna. Vårt trafiknät fungerar som stadens blodomlopp, det transporterar invånarna kors och tvärs så att de kan fortsätta med sina dagliga liv. 

Hos Keolis sätter vi säkerheten främst. Vi sätter resenären i fokus, vi tar ansvar och respekterar varandra. Dessa är de värderingar vi vill ska prägla vår arbetsplats. Vi verkar i en framtidsbransch där vi bidrar till ett hållbart samhälle genom att förbättra och utveckla kollektivtrafiken för våra resenärer.  Vår verksamhet behöver många kompetenser som t.ex. trafikplanerare, analytiker, ekonomer, ingenjörer, mekaniker och inte minst bussförare. Det är högt i tak hos Keolis och våra ledare är lyhörda för nya idéer där medarbetarna kan utvecklas. Vi söker ständig nya medarbetar som vill vara med på vår resa mot framtidens kollektivtrafik. Vill du vara med på vår resa?! Besök http://www.keolis.se

Keolis Sverige är ett helägt dotterbolag till den internationella kollektivtrafikkoncernen Keolis Group. Vår affärside är att genom lokalt anpassad och hållbar stadstrafik skapa värde för resenärerna, samhället och ägarna. Vi är 6 300 medarbetare och omsätter 4,1 miljarder kr. Keolis är ett av Europas ledande kollektivtrafikföretag med verksamhet i 14 länder på fyra kontinenter. Keolis erbjuder ett komplett utbud av lokalt anpassade och hållbara lösningar för kollektivtrafik.

Name: Metropol
Description:
Metropol, Área de Negocio de Transporte en Argentina de Grupo Metropol, es hoy una de las empresas más importante del país en su rubro. Se destacan su liderazgo y experiencia en gerenciamiento y managment. La tecnología es un factor diferencial para la gestión y el desarrollo de todas sus actividades.

Las 27 líneas recorren 120 millones de kilómetros por año movilizando a más de 230 millones de pasajeros dentro del Área Metropolitana de Buenos Aires. Las cuales son controladas desde un Centro de Monitoreo modelo para la región, que brinda información en tiempo real de la ubicación de toda nuestra flota y de los mapas de demanda pasajeros. Lo que permite generar datos certeros para su aplicación móvil de arribo predictivo, Ya llega Metropol.

Cuenta con 22 bases operativas, en las que trabajan más de 4.300 personas para manejar, mantener y administrar una flota de más de 1.800 unidades con un promedio de antigüedad menor a los 6 años. Metropol es una gran empresa que asumió el compromiso transformar el transporte público con el objetivo de que los pasajeros se movilicen más cómodos y seguros.

MISIÓN
Brindar soluciones de calidad superior en la movilidad masiva de personas, innovando permanentemente, cumpliendo los objetivos de los involucrados.

VISIÓN
Ser una empresa de movilidad masiva de personas, reconocida por la práctica de sus valores y por su capacidad de gestión y transformación positiva de los negocios.

Búsquedas laborales: https://grupometropol.hiringroom.com/jobs/microsite/lanuevametropol

Name: La Fabrique des Mobilités
Hualpén
Description: Somos una empresa de transporte privado de personas con operaciones a lo largo Chile, con presencia en diversos sectores productivos y una de las más importantes en este segmento del mercado nacional.

Name: Moove Cars
Description:
Moove Cars somos la compañía líder del sector de movilidad urbana a través de Vehículos de Transporte con Conductor en Europa y actualmente, en hemos abierto en Estados Unidos donde operamos con vehículos autónomos, a través de la marca AVOMO. 

Actualmente estamos presente en 4 países europeos: España con 13 ciudades, Italia con 2, Francia y Países Bajos con una. En total, son más de 19 centros operativos en activo.

Somos más de 8.500 compañeros  y siempre estamos buscando nuevas oportunidades para incrementar la plantilla y el negocio.

Name: Public Transport Association Australia New Zealand (PTAANZ)
Description: PTAANZ is the premier peak body for public transport in Australia and New Zealand.

Name: GRUPO INTERBUS
Description:
El GRUPO INTERBUS está formado por más de 18  empresas dedicadas al transporte de viajeros/as por carretera en servicios regulares urbanos, interurbanos, nacionales regulares de uso general, especial y discrecional, e internacionales.

La historia del Grupo se remonta a 1972, cuando los hermanos Aguado García adquieren González Cristóbal, tras la que se desarrollan sucesivas compras y fusiones hasta llegar a lo que es hoy en día el GRUPO INTERBUS. Sumando así, más de 50 años de experiencia.

Actualmente está integrado por empresas como Interurbana de Autobuses, Damas, Herederos de J. Colmenarejo, UTE VJA-089, El Gato,  UTE Transporte Urbano Puerto de Santa María,  Autobuses Hermanos Arriaga, Damas Extremadura, Inter-Arriaga, Servicios de Coches de Lujo de Álava, Servicio Urbano In Suital, Damas Sur 089, Autopullmans Palacio, UTE Urbano Fuengirola, Líneas Regulares de Navarra, y otras empresas más boutique del sector.

El Grupo está en pleno crecimiento y cuenta con una flota de más de 800 vehículos con las últimas novedades en materia de seguridad y confort, trasladando a millones de personas al año y ofrece a sus clientes/as la atención profesional que se merecen con ayuda de los más de 1.700 empleados/as que integran el GRUPO INTERBUS. 

Podrás encontrar más información del GRUPO INTERBUS en: https://www.interbus.es/
Location: San Sebastián de los Reyes, Madrid

Name: Savaari Car Rentals
Description: We are Savaari Car Rentals, an online cab booking aggregator, providing customers with reliable and premium Intercity and Local car rental services. Over the last decade, we are uniquely placed as the largest chauffeur driven car rental company in India in terms of geographical reach. We are in 1800 cities across India - to help you travel to wherever your heart desires.

Name: Urbi - Mobilidade Urbana
Description:
Acreditamos que a mobilidade urbana é um fator decisivo para a melhoria da qualidade de vida nas cidades.

Nosso desejo é contribuir para a melhoria da mobilidade em Brasília, por meio da excelência na prestação de nossos serviços.

Atuamos com seriedade e transparência, embasados em uma gestão de qualidade, experiência, responsabilidade e paixão pelo que fazemos.

Investimos nas pessoas e acreditamos em seu potencial como agentes transformadores.

Buscamos evoluir sempre para estabelecer uma relação de confiança com a sociedade, por meio de uma mobilidade eficaz e perene.

Name: Dakar Dem Dikk
Description:
DAKAR DEM DIKK est une Société Anonyme de droit sénégalais à Participation Publique Majoritaire (SAPPM). Près d’un siècle d’histoire révèle l’incroyable richesse des innovations qui ont révolutionné la mobilité au fil du temps. 


https://www.instagram.com/dakar_dem_dikk/
https://twitter.com/dakardemdikk1
https://www.facebook.com/demdikkofficiel
https://youtube.com/@DemDikkTV
https://www.tiktok.com/@demdikkofficiel

Name: Urbi - Mobilidade Urbana
Description:
Acreditamos que a mobilidade urbana é um fator decisivo para a melhoria da qualidade de vida nas cidades.

Nosso desejo é contribuir para a melhoria da mobilidade em Brasília, por meio da excelência na prestação de nossos serviços.

Atuamos com seriedade e transparência, embasados em uma gestão de qualidade, experiência, responsabilidade e paixão pelo que fazemos.

Investimos nas pessoas e acreditamos em seu potencial como agentes transformadores.

Buscamos evoluir sempre para estabelecer uma relação de confiança com a sociedade, por meio de uma mobilidade eficaz e perene.

Name: TBR Global Chauffeuring
Description:
TBR Global Chauffeuring (TBR) is a ground transportation company with an obsession for quality control and service. 

Established in 1991 and headquartered in Glasgow, TBR has developed and expanded into a truly global organisation, operating in 3000 cities with offices across the world, including London, Manchester, Boston, Hong Kong, Dubai, Singapore and Shanghai.

The leading provider of ground transportation for international financial roadshows, specialist event organisers and the global corporate travel market, TBR has a strong client focus and highly trained chauffeurs, serving high profile events, blue chip organisations and major investment banks.

For more information, visit www.tbrglobal.com

Name: Wayla Italia
Description:
Wayla nasce per lanciare il primo servizio di van-pooling urbano in Italia.

La mission è quella di fornire un’alternativa innovativa di trasporto cittadino a residenti e turisti delle principali città del nostro Paese, permettendo loro di spostarsi in maniera economica ma sicura, e contribuendo così ad offrire una soluzione sostenibile alle gravi lacune che sono sempre più evidenti nei sistemi italiani di mobilità urbana.

Name: Public Transport Association Australia New Zealand
Description: PTAANZ is the premier peak body for public transport in Australia and New Zealand.

Name: E-470 Public Highway Authority
Description:
E-470 is a toll highway that runs along the eastern perimeter of the Denver metropolitan area. The 47-mile beltway extends from State Highway C-470 at I-25 in Douglas County south of Denver, runs east and then north through Aurora, passes along the western edge of the Denver International Airport, and turns back towards the west, terminating at I-25 on the north end of the metropolitan area just south of 160th Avenue. 

The E-470 Public Highway Authority is a political subdivision of the State of Colorado.  The Board of Directors consists of eight voting member jurisdictions:  Adams, Arapahoe, and Douglas counties and the municipalities of Aurora, Brighton, Commerce City, Thornton, and Parker.  Affiliate, non-voting members:  Cities of Arvada and Greeley, City and County of Broomfield, and Weld County.  Ex-officio members:  Colorado Department of Transportation (CDOT), Denver Regional Council of Governments (DRCOG) and the Regional Transportation District (RTD).

Name: Electric Mobility Association of Kenya (EMAK)
Description: Pioneering organization dedicated to promoting and advancing the adoption of electric mobility solutions throughout Kenya. We firmly believe that embracing electric vehicles (EVs) and sustainable transportation is vital for the nation's economic growth, environmental sustainability, and energy security. EMAK aims to be at the forefront of this transformative journey, advocating for supportive policies, fostering collaborations, and facilitating the development of a robust electric mobility ecosystem

Name: STS Group
Description:
STS Group offers a broad spectrum of transport and technical services for the education and corporate business sectors. Our purpose is to shape a better world by being a reliable partner of choice for passenger transport solutions across the GCC through our core values of Safe, Timely, Smart.

As a vision-driven brand, we take a long-term view of everything we do. Our dynamism and passion for innovation have helped us achieve sustainable success in a short period. Headquartered in Dubai in the United Arab Emirates, the STS Group employs over 3,000 team members across the GCC.

We take a long-term view of everything we do, and our dynamism and passion for innovation have helped us achieve sustainable success in a short period. Headquartered in Dubai in the United Arab Emirates, the STS Group employs over 3,000 team members across the GCC.

Having set new standards and benchmarks for safety and excellence of service quality, the STS Group is a symbol of strength and distinction reflected in the way we work.

Our current portfolio includes some of the most respected and influential transport brands in the region. Our focus on passenger safety technologies and best practices enable us to enjoy healthy customer retention levels and prolific business relationships.

School Transport Services
Securi Tech Services
Staff & Tourism Services
STS Auto Services

STS is ISO certified and has won numerous awards and recognition throughout the years:

Dubai Chamber CSR Label (2017)
APEA 2017 (Asia Pacific Entrepreneur Awards)
Mohammed Bin Rashid Al Maktoum Business Award 2014
DQAP Award 2011 (Dubai Quality Appreciation Program) 
ISO and OHSAS in 2011 and rectified in the Year 2014
DAST 2010 and 2012 (Dubai Award for Sustainable Transport)

STS is also a proud member of RoSPA: The Royal Society for the Prevention of Accidents.

Name: Transport UK Group
Description:
Transport UK is a dynamic private sector transport operator serving millions of rail and bus passengers every day across the UK. It operates Greater Anglia, West Midlands Trains, East Midlands Railway, and Merseyrail as well as 9% of London’s bus routes.

Led by a dedicated team of industry experts with unrivalled experience in the sector, Transport UK is playing a vital role in shaping the future of integrated public transport.

Name: Hyperloop UPV
Description:
We, Hyperloop UPV, are a multidisciplinary team of 50 students from the Universitat Politècnica de València, brought together by the common goal of designing, implementing and perfectioning the hyperloop technology. 

Our nearly decade-long journey stands out for a unique blend of innovation, creativity, and dedication. Each season we face the enormous challenge of creating a new vehicle, adding new ideas, and improving from one year to another. In order to achieve this, we work in close collaboration with the companies that support us, taking advantage of our diversity of talent, and perspectives to efficiently  address the technical and logistical difficulties posed by hyperloop.

The team’s determination to explore new possibilities grows every season, with the end goal of turning hyperloop technology into a reality. This project not only enhances the education of students from different backgrounds, but also bridges the gap with the professional world through sponsors and international events. The synergies forged between university and society enhances the team’s young talent. It is with this excitement that we work at Hyperloop UPV.

Name: Sagalés
Description:
Sagalés es una empresa con más de 380 años de historia, referente en el transporte de personas y comprometida con una movilidad sostenible, segura e innovadora.

Su actividad principal es el transporte regular de viajeros por carretera, origen de la marca y eje de su crecimiento. Cada año, más de 23 millones de personas confían en sus servicios urbanos, interurbanos, escolares, discrecionales y turísticos.

A lo largo de los años, ha ampliado su ámbito de actuación para ofrecer soluciones integrales de movilidad. Entre sus servicios complementarios se incluyen el transporte sanitario y marítimo, la gestión de sistemas de bicicleta pública, agencia de viajes, talleres y mantenimiento y la gestión de estaciones de autobuses y aparcamientos.

Sagalés cuenta con un equipo de más de 1.600 profesionales y una flota propia de más de 800 vehículos adaptados a las necesidades actuales de movilidad. Su ámbito de actuación abarca gran parte de Cataluña, las Islas Baleares y el País Vasco, con bases operativas en el Vallès, Osona, Bages, Barcelonès, Maresme, La Selva, Lleida, Mallorca, Ibiza y Bilbao.

Gestiona más de 50 concesiones de transporte regular, más de 320 líneas de transporte escolar y diversas estaciones de autobuses. Desde su división discrecional, ofrece soluciones a medida para congresos, cruceros, circuitos internacionales y traslados locales.

Con su agencia de viajes, diseña y comercializa rutas turísticas y excursiones de un día, incluyendo salidas a pistas de esquí, museos, centros culturales y comerciales.

Orientada a la mejora continua y la adaptación a las nuevas necesidades de movilidad, Sagalés trabaja cada día para ofrecer un servicio eficiente, responsable y cercano, impulsando una movilidad que conecta personas y territorios de forma inclusiva, accesible y respetuosa con el entorno. La innovación, el compromiso con la sociedad y el cuidado por los detalles están presentes en cada proyecto, con el objetivo de generar un impacto positivo y duradero.

Name: UGO Angola
Description:
Somos o serviço de mobilidade (transporte personalizado) com o maior número de passageiros activos em Angola. Garantimos viagens seguras para mais de um milhão de angolanos, durante 24/7, 365 dias por ano.

Em 2022, a UGO iniciou a sua atividade em Angola, Luanda com uma frota de cerca de 1.000 novas marcas de viaturas com motoristas profissionais e uma equipa multilingue de Call Center, disponível 24 horas, 7 dias por semana, com o objetivo de prestar o melhor serviço ao cliente.
Location: Luanda, Jardim de Rosas, Belas, Camama, Luanda

Name: CMAC Group
Description:
Established in 2007, CMAC Group facilitates safe and reliable passenger transport and accommodation services for clients ranging from airlines to train operators, corporations and breakdown companies - moving over 5 million passengers internationally every year.  

By combining technology with an experienced Service Delivery team, we will ensure your expectations are exceeded whatever the challenges, 24/7/365 days a year.

Name: Shift Mobilidade
Description:
Fundada em 2011, a Shift Mobilidade é líder no segmento de fretamento eventual. Atualmente com mais de 200 funcionários, a Shift opera em todo o Brasil e no exterior.
Com investimentos em frota própria a Shift Mobilidade Corporativa olha para o mercado de uma maneira diferente. Une expertise, tecnologia e comprometimento em todos os serviços que oferece, para proporcionar a cada cliente uma experiência única em transporte de passageiros, garantindo segurança, agilidade e economia sempre.
Tecnologia e modernidade estão presentes em todas as etapas dos serviços oferecidos. Desta forma, a Shift leva para as empresas a qualidade que procuram e o atendimento personalizado, focado nas necessidades e metas.

Name: Carey International
Description:
Carey International is a global leader in personalized mobility, where human connection, discretion, and intelligent technology come together to deliver calm, trusted travel experiences—where legacy meets innovation since 1921.

Spanning more than 1000 cities worldwide, Carey’s exclusive global franchise network offers a consistent experience and unmatched duty of care across a broad portfolio of services including:

•	Chauffeured driven services for business and leisure travelers 
•	Enterprise management solutions for corporate travel programs
•	Specialized logistics management for Meetings & Events, Road Shows, 
        Private Aviation Ground Transport, and Hotel Services
•	Transportation technology and mobility services for online distribution 
         platforms
•	Preferred partner programs for travel advisors, event planners, and 
        professional concierge

Visit www.carey.com to learn more.

Name: Vijayanand Travels
Description: Vijayanad Travels is a well-established ground passenger transportation company that specializes in providing safe and luxurious travel services in southern and western India. We operate on over 350 routes and serve more than 100 destinations. We use a fleet of high-quality buses from top manufacturers such as Volvo Eicher, Ashok Leyland, and Tata. We have a team of experienced drivers and provide customers with a range of options including AC and Non-AC sleeper, AC and Non-AC Semi-Sleeper/Seater buses and more, to cater different needs and preferences.

Name: Student Transportation of America
Description: Founded in 1997, Student Transportation of America operates more than 22,000 vehicles throughout the U.S. and Canada, delivering safe and reliable transportation and fleet services to public and private schools. STA is committed to moving the industry toward a greener future and positively impacting the health of passengers and the planet through their use of electric vehicles, alternate fuels, and other green fleet initiatives. To learn how STA may be able to help your district, you can visit www.rideSTA.com.

Name: Kuruma Travels
Description:
At Kuruma Travels Pvt. Ltd., we embody a vision to "Make the World one place to pursue everyone's goals." Our journey began with a mission to serve the unique needs of Japanese expatriates and corporations in India. "Kuruma," derived from the Japanese word for "Car," signifies our commitment to providing top-notch electric vehicle automotive solutions.

We are a proud electric vehicle Ground Transportation, which has developed a niche in the domain in the last 10 years to assure the quality and punctuality of the vehicles. With a great team of English-speaking, well-dressed, and groomed drivers. We are serving some of the renowned corporates (especially Japanese) known in India & Global

Rooted in the ancient Sanskrit principle, "Atithi devo bhavaḥ" - "The Guest is God," our philosophy places the highest value on every traveler. We regard each guest as a deity, embodying the principles of kaizen (continuous improvement) and self-accountability

We ensure passenger comfort to the minutest detail by implementing the latest technology and 24x7 customer support centers. Our technology brings uniformity and control to our operations. 

We take immense pleasure in welcoming you to a journey of superior service standards with sustainable transportation solutions. Your search for a Car rental company ends with us here. Please feel free to contact us for peace of mind. Info@kurumatravels.com // 8588895115

We take immense pride in relieving you of travel-related stress and offering comprehensive services that encompass every aspect of your journey. 
Our services -

1.         Corporate Car Rentals 
2.         Luxury Cars and Limousines 
3.         Luxury Vans and Buses
4.         Electric Vehicle fleet  
5.         Travel ancillary services

Your journey with Kuruma Travels awaits, where your goals become our mission!

Our presence across major Indian cities–

New Delhi
Gurugram
Bangalore
Hyderabad
Chennai
Pune
Mumbai

We stand as your trusted partner for travel management.

Name: ÇAKAN LOJİSTİK
Description:
Çakan Lojistik olarak, müşteri memnuniyetini en yüksek öncelik olarak benimsemekteyiz. Bu prensiple hareket ediyor, müşterilerimizin beklentilerini aşmayı ve onların tedarik zinciri yönetimindeki ihtiyaçlarını en iyi şekilde karşılamayı ilke ediniyoruz. İşte bu vizyonla, tüm dünyada müşteri portföyümüzü genişleterek, sadece fark yaratmakla kalmayıp aynı zamanda lojistik sektöründe örnek bir şirket olma hedefiyle ilerliyoruz.

Çakan Lojistik ailesi olarak, sektördeki en son gelişmeleri yakından takip ediyor ve bu değişen dinamiklere hızla adapte oluyoruz. Müşterilerimize en iyi ve en güncel çözümleri sunabilmek için sürekli olarak kendimizi geliştiriyor, teknolojiyi yakından izliyor ve süreçlerimizi optimize ediyoruz. Böylece müşterilerimize rekabet avantajı sağlamalarına yardımcı oluyoruz.

Çakan Lojistik olarak amacımız, müşterilerimizin işlerini büyütmelerine destek olmak ve tedarik zinciri yönetimlerini daha verimli hale getirmelerini sağlamaktır. Bu doğrultuda, uzman kadromuz, geniş hizmet yelpazemiz ve küresel ağımızla müşterilerimize özel ve özelleştirilmiş lojistik çözümleri sunmaya devam edeceğiz. Müşteri memnuniyeti ve sektördeki liderliğimizle, Çakan Lojistik olarak geleceğe daha güvenle bakıyoruz.

Name: Organización Suma S.A.S.
Description: Somos una Organización con capital Colombiano, de la ciudad de Bogotá con más de 45 años de experiencia en sector de Transporte Público, que participó y ganó en licitación abierta por TransMilenio S.A. para la implementación del nuevo Sistema Integrado de Transporte Público de la ciudad de Bogotá en la zona Ciudad Bolívar.

Name: ITTSABUS
Description: Somos una empresa Trujillana que inició sus operaciones en 1992, trabajamos para brindar un servicio eficiente, seguro y de calidad en el transporte de pasajeros y encomiendas a toda la región norte del país.

Name: Transdev GmbH
Description:
Mobilität, die mehr bewegt!

Transdev ist mit mehr als 5.000 Mitarbeitern der größte private Nahverkehrsanbieter im lokalen Bahn- und Busbereich in Deutschland. Unsere 40 aktiven Tochtergesellschaften bringen mit unseren modernen Fahrzeugen jährlich ca. 250 Millionen Fahrgäste sicher und komfortabel an ihr Ziel. 

Infos zum Unternehmen: www.transdev.de

Zu unseren Tochtergesellschaften: 

Bahn: 	
Auf der Schiene erbringt Transdev deutschlandweit Verkehrsleistungen im Regionalverkehr mit rund 43 Millionen Zugkilometern.
Weitere Informationen zu unseren Bahnen finden Sie hier: www.transdev.de/tochterunternehmen/bahn

Bus:	
Neben Betrieben in Rheinland-Pfalz und Hessen, gehören auch Tochtergesellschaften in Nordrhein-Westfalen, Baden-Württemberg und Bayern sowie in den neuen Bundesländern zur Transdev-Gruppe.
Hier erhalten Sie einen Überblick über alle Nahverkehrsleistungen der Transdev GmbH im Busbereich in  
Deutschland: www.transdev.de/tochterunternehmen/bus

Unsere aktuellen Stellenangebote finden Sie hier: www.transdev.de/karriere/stellenangebote

Wir wollen die Richtigen für uns gewinnen - motivierte wie kreative Mitarbeiter, die unseren Erfolgsweg weiter mit uns gehen möchten. 

Erfahren Sie mehr über unseren Recruitingprozess: www.transdev.de/karriere/ihre-erfolgreiche-bewerbung

Impressum: 
www.transdev.de/impressum

Name: ABC Companies
Description: ABC Companies is a leading provider of transportation solutions, offering vehicles for 8-81 passengers, along with parts, service, and financing to support fleet operators across North America. Family-owned and operated since 1972, ABC is driven by its mission to advance the transportation industry through innovative, collaborative solutions that redefine the standard. Guided by its core values of Integrity, Trust, Collaboration, and Innovation, ABC is committed to delivering customer-focused, high-quality solutions that enhance safety, performance, and reliability.

Name: Valley Metro RPTA
Description: At Valley Metro RPTA we develop and deliver an integrated regional transit system with excellence, in collaboration with member agencies and through public and private partnerships. In doing so, we improve the quality of life and the environment, and support economic development.

Name: KLASS WAGEN
Description:
Klass Wagen is a leading car rental company in Eastern and Central Europe, trusted by thousands of customers every year. With a modern fleet and offices in major cities and airports, we provide reliable mobility solutions tailored to both business and leisure travelers.

Our commitment is to make car rental simple, transparent, and customer-focused. By combining competitive prices with outstanding service, we ensure every journey starts and ends with confidence.

Website: www.klasswagen.com
E-mail: reservations@klasswagen.com
Facebook: www.facebook.com/KlassWagen.KW

Name: Auto Viação Urubupungá
Description:
A Auto Viação Urubupungá é uma empresa prestadora de serviços de transporte urbano de passageiros, dirigida pelo atual grupo acionista desde 1973. 

Atualmente, a empresa opera em mais de 70 linhas divididas entre municipais, intermunicipais e seletivas, que atendem a população dos municípios de Cajamar, Santana de Parnaíba e Osasco, interligando-os com a capital, Barueri, Diadema e São Bernardo do Campo. E, juntamente com outras sete empresas da região, constitui o Consórcio Anhanguera, responsável pelo transporte metropolitano nas regiões Oeste e Noroeste da Grande São Paulo. 

A Urubupungá possui duas garagens: uma localizada em Osasco e a outra em Santana de Parnaíba. A empresa faz parte do Grupo NSO, juntamente com a Viação Santa Brígida, Urubupungá Transportes e Turismo e Viação Cidade de Caieiras.

Name: Grupo Adamantina
Description: Expresso Adamantina is a transportation/trucking/railroad company based out of Rod. Comandante João Ribeiro de Barros, Km 646 + 600mts, Dracena, Sp, Brazil.

Name: Arriva Spain
Description:
El Grupo Arriva es líder en el transporte multimodal de viajeros en con presencia en 11 países europeos. Tras más de dos décadas en el mercado español, Arriva ha consolidado su presencia erigiéndose como un operador de transporte colectivo terrestre de referencia que traslada más de 40 millones de viajeros cada año. 
Conectamos personas de manera fiable, segura y sostenible, con lo que es importante para ellas.

Name: GoldenPass
Description:
UN MONDE DE DECOUVERTES ET D'EMOTIONS

La compagnie du chemin de fer Montreux - Oberland bernois (MOB) est un acteur incontournable du tourisme et des transports en Suisse. Elle regroupe trois lignes de chemin de fer, constituant un réseau d’environ 100 km de voie métrique, qui partent de la Riviera en direction des montagnes environnantes (Montreux - Oberland Bernois, Vevey-Les Pléiades et Montreux-Rochers-de-Naye). Aux trains, avec ou sans crémaillères, viennent s’ajouter trois funiculaires (Veyey-Mt-Pèlerin, Les Avants-Sonloup, Territet-Glion) mais également des restaurants d’altitude ainsi que plusieurs autres sociétés affiliées ou partenaires. Elle lancera  prochainement le Goldenpass Express, qui reliera Montreux et Interlaken sans changement, grâce à un bogie à écartement variable.

Name: HSL Helsingin seudun liikenne
Description:
HSL Helsingin seudun liikenne vastaa 66 prosentista Suomen joukkoliikennematkoista. HSL:llä on tärkeä rooli pääkaupunkiseudun asukkaiden arjessa: meidän liikenteessämme tehdään yli miljoona matkaa päivittäin bussilla, junalla, metrolla, ratikalla tai lautalla. Liikevaihtomme on noin 600 milj. euroa vuodessa. Meitä joukkoliikenteen ammattilaisia on reilu 400 ja olemme ylpeitä työstämme. Liity joukkoomme kehittämään helppoa, toimivaa ja luotettavaa Helsingin seutua.

HSL Helsinki Region Transport is responsible for about 60% of all public transport journeys in Finland. HSL plays a key role in the everyday lives of the metropolitan area residents:  every day, over one million journeys are made on our bus, train, Metro, tram and ferry services. Our annual turnover is about 600 million euros. HSL employs over 400 public transport professionals that are proud of their work. Join us to develop well-functioning Helsinki region with reliable services for easier everyday life.

Name: BUSUP Brasil
Description:
A BUSUP é uma provedora de serviços de mobilidade corporativa, especializada na gestão eficiente e flexível do transporte de funcionários. Presentes na Europa e nas Américas, somos a primeira empresa no mundo a oferecer transporte compartilhado e flexível.

Com mais de 7 anos de existência, a BUSUP é uma empresa global, prestando serviços para grandes corporações como Amazon, O Boticário, Ambev, Via Varejo, Mercado Livre, DASA, Carrefour, etc.

Graças ao nosso algoritmos e modelo de negócio inovador, a conseguimos trazer eficiência e conforto para passageiros, clientes, operadores e administração pública.

Atualmente, atendemos mais de 110 clientes, com mais de 1.900 rotas diárias e transportando mais de 39.800 vidas por dia.

Nosso compromisso:
- Econômico: reduzindo o custo por passageiro e o custo de atrair e reter talentos;
- Social: facilitando o acesso ao emprego e melhorando a qualidade de vida dos funcionários;
- Sustentável: reduzindo o tráfego e as emissões de CO2.

Devido à natureza dos nossos serviços, a BUSUP gera um grande impacto positivo no meio ambiente. Somente em 2022, nossos serviços possibilitaram a retirada de circulação de 1,8 milhão de carros, economizando um total de 72.100 toneladas de CO2 transportando os colaboradores dos nosso clientes. Isso representa uma redução de 75% na pegada de carbono dessas viagens.

Além disso, a BUSUP tem sido reconhecida em premiações como um dos melhores benefícios sociais oferecidos por empresas.

Name: Transdev SUD
Description: Transdev collabore quotidiennement avec ses partenaires et clients pour développer des solutions de transport multimodales, novatrices et performantes, au service des voyageurs.

Name: EV Society
Description:
Electric Vehicle Society's membership is comprised of EV owners and enthusiasts across Canada who are dedicated to transforming our car culture to low carbon modes of transportation.  EV Society is a leading non-governmental group that delivers country-wide owner to potential-owner engagement based on experience, knowledge, and boundless enthusiasm.  
 
Members are living the electric vehicle business-case; integrating purchase, operational needs, and day-to-day challenges into their lives along with the sheer excitement and joy of being part of the change that will better our future.

EV Society chapters hold regular meetings to discuss everything from EV advocacy to the latest news and events. Members and non-members are welcome to attend any meeting. Visit our website for details.

Name: CleverSolutions
Description:
Willkommen bei CleverSolutions!

Wir sind spezialisiert auf den effizienten Betrieb von On-Demand-Verkehren. Unser Team besteht aus ehemaligen CleverShuttle-Leistungsträgern mit langjähriger Erfahrung in über 30 On-Demand-Projekten. 

Unser Ansatz ist konsequent kundenorientiert und partnerschaftlich. Wir agieren unternehmerisch und pragmatisch, mit einem klaren Fokus auf die Zufriedenheit unserer Auftraggeber und Fahrgäste. 

Erfahren Sie, wie wir Verkehrsunternehmen und Kommunen in Deutschland dabei unterstützen, den öffentlichen Nahverkehr effizienter zu gestalten.

Name: Tchao Tchao
Description:
Devenez un voyageur itinérant et éveillé

 Tchao Tchao ce sont des kits et des accessoires pour transformer votre voiture en mini-van. 

 L’installation prend seulement 5 minutes grâce à des modules qui se clipsent sans effort. 

 Aujourd’hui plus de 70 véhicules sont compatibles avec nos kits Tchao Tchao.

 Installée à Angers, l’entreprise utilise uniquement des matériaux locaux avec du peuplier produit à moins de 200 km et l’assemblage des kits est réalisé dans un ESAT dans une démarche responsable et inclusive. 

 En tant qu’ancien biologiste, j’ai aussi à cœur de développer avec ces kits l’envie des utilisateurs de mieux observer et apprécier les paysages et la nature qui les entourent.

► Pour démarrer l’aventure ensemble, c'est par ici  : www.tchao-tchao.com

  Nous ouvrons bientôt notre capital pour réinventer ensemble notre manière de voyager    

   pré- inscription Tudigo  : https://invest.tudigo.co/tchaotchao

Name: Rimatur Transportes
Description: Há mais de 40 anos a Rimatur atua no transporte corporativo (fretamento contínuo) e de turismo. É reconhecida como uma das maiores e melhores empresas do país no segmento. Qualidade e segurança que refletem na satisfação de clientes e passageiros.

Name: talixo
Description:
Talixo is the leading global operator of pre-booked rides, helping travelers enjoy easier journeys from door to door.

Trusted by the world’s biggest travel brands, Talixo provides turn-key private transfers to OTAs, wholesalers, travel agencies, tour operators, TMCs and corporates, with millions of rides booked each year.

Our cloud-based fleet management technology, helps local fleets in 1,100+ cities and 130+ countries increase utilization and efficiency, resulting in sustainable, best-in-class prices and customer-centric features, like enhanced booking flexibility and real-time GPS driver tracking, that give today’s travelers the modern experience they expect.

Your One-Stop Transfers Shop
Fill the gaps in your traveler experience, without the hassle. Talixo handles every part of your pre-booked ride offering, from booking to invoicing.

Competitive, High-Quality Rides Worldwide
Quality and price are a balancing act - our proprietary tech does
the legwork to give you the best of both.

Works with What Works for You
API, GDS, agency account or online booking tool. However you sell, we can have you up and running in no time.

The Global Standard for Ground Transfers
We offer a globally standardized service with vetted, fully-licensed local fleets across 1,100+ cities and 130+ countries. So your customers can book with confidence wherever they're traveling.

Name: TAXIS G7
Description:
TAXIS G7, leader européen du taxi, met en relation ses clients avec une flotte de plus de 7700 véhicules grâce à un système de géolocalisation ultra-performant. 

Acteur incontournable de la mobilité urbaine, TAXIS G7 offre des véhicules adaptés aux besoins de ses clients particuliers et professionnels : FamilyCab avec siège bébés, MaxiCab pour les déplacements de groupes, GreenCab pour des déplacements respectueux de l’environnement, WiFi et iPad à bord de nombreux véhicules Club Affaires pour des clients business exigeants. 

Expertise, efficacité, innovation, commande multi-canale : autant d’atouts qui permettent à TAXIS G7 de réaliser chaque année  plus de 14 millions de courses.

Name: Viação Motta
Description:
Atuando há 50 anos no ramo do transporte rodoviário, a Viação Motta foi fundada em 31 de Março de 1967, na cidade de Presidente Prudente/SP, com a missão de transportar pessoas com segurança e qualidade. A Empresa iniciou a operação nos estados de São Paulo e Mato Grosso.

Ao longo dos anos, por prestar um excelente serviço a Motta se tornou uma empresa especializada no ramo de transporte fazendo importantes ligações e, hoje, opera em 61 linhas, cruzando 79 municípios, entre os estados de São Paulo, Mato Grosso, Mato Grosso do Sul, Paraná, Minas Gerais, Goiás, Rio de Janeiro e no Distrito Federal, percorrendo anualmente 20 milhões de quilômetros.

Para atender os passageiros com conforto e comodidade, a Motta tem mais de 200 agências distribuídas em sua área de atuação, além dos canais de vendas pela internet, WhatsApp e serviço de atendimento ao cliente (SAC).

Sempre atenta as questões de responsabilidade socioambiental, a Empresa assume o compromisso de reduzir a utilização de recursos naturais em seus processos e produtos, realizando ações com foco no desenvolvimento sustentável.

Atualmente, a Viação Motta vive um período de transformações rumo a novos horizontes tendo como prioridade a qualidade no atendimento e a satisfação do passageiro.

Name: KAI ñu dem

Kai Ñu Dem - opérant sous l’entité légale YEEG SAS - est une entreprise de transport de personnes pour particuliers et entreprises.

Dotée d'une flotte de véhicules neufs, de chauffeurs certifiés et d'une technologie avancée, elle offre des solutions de transport sûres et optimisées, en courses ponctuelles, navettes aéroport ou mises à disposition courte et moyenne durée.

KAI se distingue par des services premium et son ambition de redéfinir la mobilité urbaine. Actuellement présente à Dakar avec des services vers toutes les régions du Sénégal, elle a des plans d'expansion en Afrique de l'Ouest d'ici 2025.

KAI est le partenaire idéal pour tous vos déplacements.

Name: Uride
Description: Uride is Canada's fastest growing ridesharing company. Uride was created to fill the massive transportation void that exists in small and mid-market communities that have yet to experience ridesharing. Our goal is to eliminate drinking and driving across Canada. We will do this by continuing to provide fast, affordable, seamless rides for our passengers. In our launch city, Thunder Bay, we had the longest wait times for a taxi in Canada and the second highest fares. Drinking and driving had gone up drastically prior to Uride entering the market. We were born and raised here, and we care about the people. We don’t want to ever see friends, family, or strangers stranded waiting for a ride ever again. We will continue to work tirelessly to provide the best service we possibly can for communities across Canada.

Name: Circuit
Description:
Circuit is a sustainable transportation solution that reduces congestion and makes mobility easier, greener and more accessible. Our on-demand, 100% electric shuttle services provide first/last-mile connections to mass transit, encourages visitors to park once, and gets people out of their cars for short trips.

Working closely with innovative cities and forward-thinking advertisers, we've provided over 6M rides without burning an ounce of gas. Our commitment to sustainability and community is at the core of everything we do, and we're proud to offer an eco-friendly, on-demand option that creates local jobs and connects communities.

Join the millions of riders who have already experienced the ease and convenience of Circuit's micro-transit service. Visit us at ridecircuit.com to get started.

Name: liO - Les transports de Ma Région
Description:
En 2018, la Région Occitanie a créé liO, un grand service public des transports pour l’Occitanie.
liO est le réseau interurbain qui maille les 13 départements de notre région, qui relie nos territoires et ses presque 6 millions d’habitants. 

L’offre liO est constituée des 5 piliers du transport public :
> Les trains liO, anciennement appelés TER
> Les autocars réguliers liO (hors transport urbain) et les autocars scolaires liO
> Le transport à la demande (TAD)
> Les pôles d’échanges multimodaux qui relient ces modes de déplacement entre eux
> Les mobilités actives et douces : le vélo, le covoiturage, etc.

liO pour lien entre les territoires d’Occitanie.

We believe there is a better way to transport people. Driverseat franchise partners specialize in transportation solutions for events, tours, weddings, airport trips and more.
By out-caring the competition every step of the way, corporate clients and consumers have enjoyed customized solutions at competitive price points.

Essentially we make transportation affordable, accessible and convenient. 
Our many stellar client reviews say it all, our care based approach wins every time!

Name: Go Green Limousine LLC
Description:
About Us

At Go-Green, we are committed to driving the future of sustainable transportation. Our mission is to provide eco-friendly, reliable, and innovative limousine services that not only reduce carbon footprints but also empower communities. We believe in the power of change and strive to make a positive impact on the environment and society.

Our Services

Luxury Limousine Services: Experience the ultimate in comfort and style with our fleet of eco-friendly luxury limousines. Perfect for corporate events, weddings, proms, and more, our services cater to your every need with professionalism and elegance.

Corporate Transportation: Enhance your business operations with our reliable corporate transportation solutions. We offer tailored services for employee transportation, airport transfers, and special events, ensuring punctuality and comfort.

Special Event Packages: Make your special occasions memorable with our exclusive event packages. From weddings to galas, our team is dedicated to providing impeccable service that exceeds expectations.

Empowerment Initiatives: We are proud to champion women’s empowerment and equal opportunities. By hiring and supporting female drivers, we aim to create a diverse and inclusive workforce that reflects our values.

Join us in our journey towards a greener, more sustainable future. Choose Go-Green for your transportation needs and be part of the change.

Name: RedCoach
Description:
Founded in 2010, RedCoach is a high-end, affordable express motorcoach that has been servicing Florida for more than a decade. Today, RedCoach is one of the most trusted luxury line run services for business and leisure travelers alike, with daily routes throughout Florida and Texas. Equipped with the latest technology, RedCoach provides travelers with a truly unique motorcoach experience with its fleet of luxury vehicles that offer the utmost safety for its passengers. Fitted with 26 seats, RedCoach offers spacious seating that reclines up to 140 degrees. Since its inception, RedCoach has transported more than a million passengers, and it continues to add new routes to fulfill its mission of providing an affordable, luxurious and safe travel experience for its customers. RedCoach is committed to redefine the way people think about bus travel forever. 

Markets serviced include:
Florida: Fort Lauderdale, Gainesville, Miami, Naples, Orlando, Tallahassee, Tampa West Palm Beach and more.
Texas: Austin, College Station, Dallas and Houston.

Amenities:
First-class cabins feature only 26 or 27 imported leather, fully reclinable seats (140 degrees) with footrests. Business-class liners offer 38-seat cabins.
Free Wi-Fi on every coach and standard 110V power outlets available to all passengers
No fee for two checked bags (50 lbs. each) and one carry-on bag.

Environmentally friendly 
Bus emission of CO2 gases linked to global warming is lower than any other mode of travel.
Bus miles per gallon of fuel are more than twice the fuel efficiency of commuter and intercity rail and more than four times greater than domestic air carriers and transit buses.
Buses emit only 50 grams of CO2 per passenger mile, compared to commuter, intercity, light rail, air carriers, and transit buses that produce more than three times that amount.

Name: VR City Traffic Sweden
Description:
VR City Traffic Sweden är en del av finska VR Group sedan 2022. Vår verksamhet omfattar upphandlad kollektivtrafik, tåg, buss och spårvagn, i Sverige. Vårt systerbolag, VR Long Distance Traffic Sweden (tidigare MTRX) bedriver linjetrafik med tåg mellan Stockholm och Göteborg. 
VR Group, som ägs av finländska staten, har 160 års erfarenhet av att köra tåg, spårvagnar och bussar och är ledande inom spårburna och elektrifierade transporter. Med totalt 9 000 medarbetare i Finland och Sverige är VR idag dessutom en av Nordens största aktörer inom kollektiv- och fjärrtrafik, logistik och underhåll.
VR City Traffic Sweden sköter Skånes Pågatåg, Östgötapendeln och bussar och spårvagnar i Stockholmsregionen. Med 1 500 engagerade medarbetare, 400 bussar, 122 tåg och 65 spårvagnar, skapar vi moderna och klimateffektiva transportlösningar, där säkerheten alltid kommer i första hand. Som resenär hos VR ska du uppleva att vi gör allt för att din resa ska kännas trygg och servicegraden hög.

Som en del av VR Group blir vi större, starkare och ännu bättre på att utveckla och erbjuda effektiva och gröna lösningar, lösningar som blir allt viktigare för klimatomställning och välstånd. Att ersätta dieselbussar med eldrivna är bara ett exempel på vad VR gör just nu.    

VR:s mål är att bli bäst i Norden, att växa och vinna nya marknadsandelar. Det gör vi genom att hitta nya innovativa lösningar som får ännu fler att resa kollektivt. Häng med på vår resa!

Name: Ingo Female Transporters Ltd
Description:
Ingo Female Transporters Ltd is a women-led transport and mobility enterprise redefining the future of urban and intercity travel in Uganda and beyond. We exist to provide safe, reliable, and high-quality transport services while breaking gender barriers in one of the world’s most male-dominated industries.

Our services include:
 Airport pick-ups and drop-offs
 Local and intercity travel
 Management of Uber and ride-hailing operations
 Female chauffeurs for hire
 (Coming soon) INGO App – Uganda’s first women-only driver platform

At Ingo, we believe that mobility is more than movement, it’s an engine for economic empowerment, safety, and gender equality. By connecting clients to trusted, professional female drivers, we not only deliver exceptional service but also create dignified employment opportunities and build safer, more inclusive cities.

Our mission is to increase women’s participation in the transport sector, drive systemic change in how mobility works, and position transport as a catalyst for social and economic transformation. Over the next five years, we aim to scale our model across East Africa, expanding opportunities for women and transforming the region’s transport landscape.

Join us as we drive change, one ride, one woman, one city at a time.

 Contact: ingofemaletransporters@gmail.com
 Website: www.ingofemaletransporters.com
 Kampala, Uganda

But that’s not all – we also operate a specialist fleet of coaches, accommodating up to 53 passengers for both UK and European journeys. Whether it’s local travel, corporate hire, or international trips, we deliver first-class service with efficiency and expertise.

Name: Eyre Bus Service
Description:
Eyre Bus Service, Inc., a full-service transportation company offers convention services, airport transfers, shuttle services, group motor coach charters, fixed route commuter service, and emergency transportation services.

We have been providing Excellence in Travel for over 70 years.  We strive each and every day to provide our customers with the best in customer service through interaction with our motor coach operators.  We have invested millions of dollars in our fleet to assure you have a very comfortable ride and high-level experience on our motor coaches.  We are very proud of the people who work at our Company.  We strive to provide an unwavering commitment to safety and customer service in everything we do.

Our drivers are given an intensive training program that prepares them to be the most professional motor coach operators on the road.  Our Company has received the highest safety rating from several government agencies. Eyre has received numerous awards and is a company of great vision. Eyre was recognized by the International Motor Coach Group as the Operator of the Year.  Our employees from operators to mechanics to cleaners to office personnel, rely on our values to make the right decisions for our customers, co-workers and company every day. 

Our mission statement is “Excellence in Travel”, that is what every employee is working for everyday.
The support of this comes from a commitment from the owners and all employees to the Eyre Values.
• Respect for fellow co-workers
• Positive attitude
• Professionalism
• Integrity

Whatever it is you're looking for, Eyre can help you create the trip of your dreams. The Eyre team will take you there!

Name: Communicor Worldwide Limousine
Connexxions Bus
Description:
Founded in 2019, Connexxions Bus is a Florida and Tennessee based motorcoach company providing dependable and comfortable charter transportation for a wide range of group travel needs. With locations in Orlando and Nashville, we specialize in serving schools, corporate groups, sports teams, and convention travelers with tailored transportation solutions across both states and beyond.

At Connexxions Bus, we work closely with our clients to customize each trip based on their schedule, group size, and destination. From single-day transfers to multi-day itineraries, our team ensures every detail is covered, from planning efficient routes to providing timely communication and responsive support. Whether it’s a local shuttle or an out-of-state tour, we’re committed to making group travel easy, reliable, and stress-free.

Name: 4 Länder Mobil GmbH (2023-2025 ÖV Bodenseeraum)
Description:
Mit dem Bodensee Ticket (www.bodensee-ticket.com) und der S-Bahn Bodenseeufer (www.s-bahn-bodensee.com) schaffen wir als Kooperation der Akteure des öffentlichen Verkehrs in der Vierländerregion Bodensee Nutzen für Kundinnen und Kunden sowie die Region in der grenzüberschreitenden Mobilität.

Angestoßen durch die Internationale Bodensee-Konferenz (IBK) haben fünf Schweizer Kantone, das Land Vorarlberg und vier deutsche Landkreise zusammen mit den Verkehrsunternehmen im Januar 2023 die Geschäftsstelle ÖV Bodenseeraum lanciert. 
Zum 1. Januar 2026 wurde daraus die 4 Länder Mobil GmbH mit neun Gesellschaftern und insgesamt 29 beteiligten Akteuren des Öffentlichen Verkehrs aus der gesamten Vierländerregion Bodensee.

Ihre Aufgabe ist die Kommunikation und Vermarktung des grenzüberschreitenden öffentlichen Verkehrs im Bodenseeraum mit den bestehenden Marken Bodensee Ticket und S-Bahn Bodensee. Zudem entwickelt sie die Kundeninformation, die Tarifangebote und den Vertrieb grenzüberschreitender Fahrausweise über alle gängigen Distributionskanäle weiter.

Die 4 Länder Mobil GmbH ist Teil der IBK-Strategie für eine zukunftsfähige Mobilität und wird begleitet von der IBK-Kommission Verkehr. Sie arbeitet mit allen Verkehrsunternehmen und Verbünden in der Region zusammen, die auch Ansprechpartner für Kundinnen und Kunden des grenzüberschreitenden öffentlichen Verkehrs bleiben.

Name: Brazos Transit District
Description:
We are a general public transportation provider. We operate Fixed Routes, ADA Paratransit Service, and Demand and Response. Brazos Transit District was founded in 1974 and covered the seven counties of the Brazos Valley. We now serve 20 counties in Central and East Texas covering over 14,000 square miles with a population of 1,401,195.  We are a Political Subdivision of the State of Texas and receive funding through the Federal Transportation Administration (FTA) and the Texas Department of Transportation (TxDOT).

Brazos Transit District maintains an active membership in the Texas Association of Community Transit (ACT) and the Community Transit Association of America (CTAA).

Name: Transtyle Inc
Description:
Since 1992, Transtyle has been a cornerstone in the transportation industry, offering services that range from black car luxury rides to large-scale bus transport for tours and government contracts. Known for our impeccable fleet of high-end Setra motorcoaches and sprinter vans, we're the go-to service provider for touring companies and government agencies alike.

Our ethos is to offer not just a ride, but an experience that underscores safety, comfort, and exceptional customer service. We're dedicated to delivering more than what's expected; we want to make your journey memorable.

Core Services:

Luxury Bus Transportation
Black Car Services
Contract Services for Government Agencies
Tour Company Collaborations
Special Events & Occasion Rides

Safety First:
Our drivers are the heart of our operations. Each driver is rigorously trained and vetted, focusing on three core elements: safety & vehicle maintenance, customer satisfaction, and up-to-date knowledge on DOT rules and trends. We also have a stringent continuing education policy in place to ensure that our drivers are always at the top of their game.

Fleet & Facilities:
Our fleet comprises state-of-the-art Setra motorcoaches and sprinter vans that are meticulously maintained and upgraded to offer the best in class comfort and safety features. Whether it's an intimate black car service for a night out or a large coach for a tour group, we’ve got you covered.

Idling Policy:
Committed to environmental sustainability, we have strict policies against excessive idling, thereby reducing our carbon footprint and also complying with state laws, particularly in California, where idling could result in hefty fines.

Serving Multiple States:
We operate in multiple states. Wherever you are, Transtyle is your trusted transportation partner.

Join us for an unparalleled transportation experience that is not just about getting from Point A to B, but about enjoying the journey itself. Welcome to Transtyle.

Our team is made up of experienced professionals who are passionate about delivering complex, bespoke passenger road transport solutions. We are dedicated to providing our clients with the best possible service and support from implementation through to delivery and invoicing.

Name: Touradventure
Description:
Transporte Corporativo - Tours- Eventos - Productoras de Cine y Publicidad
 Organizamos y coordinamos las rutas según los requerimientos de los trabajadores, buscando las más rápidas para que puedan trasladarse a sus domicilios y trabajos de forma expedita y segura, siendo monitoreados online durante todo el viaje. Somos una empresa con una basta experiencia en el transporte de pasajeros, con más de 7 años en el rubro, entregando diversos servicios para empresas a diario y durante las 24 hrs. Nuestra experiencia nos ha permitido trasladar al aeropuerto masivamente a empresas mineras, productoras de cine, publicidad y televisión. Hemos realizado también traslado masivo y particular de grupos para eventos y turismo en forma sistemática.
En TourAdventure entendemos la importancia de la puntualidad y comodidad en los traslados empresariales. Confía en nosotros para llevar a tus trabajadores a donde necesiten estar!

Pero no solo nos dirigimos a los aventureros individuales; también invitamos a las empresas a unirse a nosotros en nuestras escapadas corporativas únicas. Ya sea que estés buscando fortalecer el equipo, inspirar la innovación o simplemente escapar de la rutina de la oficina, nuestros programas personalizados están diseñados para satisfacer tus necesidades empresariales mientras te sumerges en la belleza del mundo natural.

Así que únete a nosotros en TourAdventure y descubre un nuevo nivel de viaje. Desde grupos de amigos hasta equipos empresariales, estamos aquí para hacer realidad tus sueños de aventura. Reserva tu viaje hoy mismo y prepárate para vivir experiencias que nunca olvidarás!

Tours y Transporte de pasajeros 24 horas.

Name: Wexford Bus
Description:
Wexford Bus is a privately owned public transport service provider and is now recognised as the most reliable and efficient bus service provider on the following routes:

We serve passengers traveling between Wexford, Oylgate, Enniscorthy, Ferns, Camolin, Gorey, Arklow, Cherrywood (Loughlinstown flyover for Luas Green Line), UCD, Dublin City, and Dublin Airport.
