Name: Verkehrsbetriebe Luzern AG
Description:
Wir bewegen Luzern.

Als führendes Mobilitätsunternehmen prägen wir seit über 125 Jahren den öffentlichen Verkehr in und um Luzern. Mit einem Team von rund 600 Mitarbeitenden befördern wir während 365 Tagen rund 50 Millionen Fahrgäste im Jahr – immer bedacht auf Sicherheit, Qualität und Kundenzufriedenheit. 

Für die Mobilität von morgen bekennen wir uns zu einem emissionsfreien öV. Wir entwickeln deswegen unsere Fahrzeugflotte, unsere Infrastruktur und unser Angebot kontinuierlich weiter – zugeschnitten auf heutige und künftige Bedürfnisse unserer Kundinnen und Kunden.

Name: GRTC
Description: The Greater Richmond Transit Company (GRTC) is an expanding mid-sized transit agency serving Virginia’s capital and the greater Richmond region. GRTC is uniquely integrated with the community and presents a range of opportunities – from launching innovative new service designs and building large capital projects to expanding throughout the region and continuing to grow ridership. Located just ten minutes from downtown, GRTC’s headquarters power 30,000 transit trips a day, with more routes & regional connections in development – as well as a second bus rapid transit line that will complement the Pulse, our ITDP Bronze Medal-winning flagship system that serves as the spine of our network.

Name: Ascendal Group
Description:
At Ascendal, we believe it is time to re-think how cities work. A city’s transport system is its life-blood and it needs to be healthy for a city and its people to thrive. Unfortunately, there are too many examples around the world where this is not the case, be it due to a poor balance between the public and private sector, a lack of competition, corruption, incompetence, or a lack of resources.

The public transport industry has traditionally been one-dimensional. At Ascendal we
are re-thinking how cities work to unlock their potential through focused mobility;
revolutionary urban design and real estate; game-changing technology; new
and innovative financing structures and results-driven strategic advisory. This
holistic view targets helping people to move more intuitively, focusing on passengers
rather than on infrastructure and assets.

Public transport and a city is all about people. Our primary objective in Ascendal
is to improve people’s lives and that’s how we have attracted the best people in the
industry. We are change agents with a vision of bringing cities to life.

Name: Avipan - Auto Viação Panambiense
Description:
Empresa Auto Viação Panambiense, AVIPAN situada na cidade de Panambi ao noroeste no estado do Rio Grande do Sul. Segunda empresa do estado em adquirir o sistema eletronico de bilhetagem.

Missão:

Promover satisfação, bem-estar e segurança no transporte coletivo de passageiros.

Visão:

Ser a melhor empresa de transporte do Estado, agregando
valor aos clientes e seus colaboradores.

Valores Corporativos:

> Engajamento
> Integridade
> Disciplina
> Cordialidade

Histórico da empresa:

Tudo começou em primeiro de março de 1969 na rua Andrade Neves (próximo a feira do produtor) com uma Kombi, em uma cidade que começava a sentir a necessidade do transporte de passageiros tanto no transporte público, escolar e das empresas.

O aumento populacional da época levou a Avipan a adquirir ônibus para atender a demanda e posteriormente surgiu a necessidade de um espaço maior, onde atualmente está localizada.

Com muito trabalho conquistou o lugar de destaque que mantém até hoje na prestação de serviços à comunidade. Atualmente a empresa conta com uma equipe de 48 colaboradores, uma frota de 32 ônibus para transporte urbano, intermunicipal e fretamento.

*Valores:
Nosso Time e nossa Reputação são nossos ativos mais preciosos. Por isso:
- Desenvolvemos Líderes que cuidam das Pessoas. Para que estas cuidem da VERSATILY.
- Acreditamos que a Inovação e a Criatividade, nascem de um time desenvolvido e valorizado.
- Entendemos que pessoas melhores fazem uma organização melhor. E organizações melhores constroem um mundo melhor.
- Promovemos o trabalho seguro para proteção da vida.
- Apoiados na nossa imagem. Amparados pela Reputação. Prosperamos.

Name: Regionalverkehre Start Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Direkt im Regionalnetz, direkt am Kunden
Die Mobilität der Zukunft liegt auf der Schiene. Schon heute schlägt das Herz des Nahverkehrs im weitverzweigten S- und Regionalbahnnetz. Millionen Menschen nutzen täglich die Angebote auf der Schiene, um stressfrei, umweltfreundlich und kosteneffizient ans Ziel zu kommen.
Die aktuelle SPNV Ausschreibungspraxis und die Länderhoheit haben zu einer neuen Dynamik im Eisenbahnverkehr geführt. Zahlreiche Unternehmen betreten die regionalen Märkte und wetteifern um Aufträge, Kunden und die Markthoheit. Diese unterschiedlichen Angebote sind für Fahrgäste schwer zu durchschauen, jeder neue Marktteilnehmer beeinflusst den Aufbau zukunftsfähiger und flexibler Mobilitätsstrukturen.
Die Regionalverkehre Start Deutschland GmbH mit Sitz in Frankfurt am Main bricht diese Situation auf. Wir bewerben uns mit bedarfs- und lösungsorientierten Konzepten um die Ausschreibungen für regionale Schienenverkehrsverträge und betreiben die gewonnenen Verkehrsnetze mit einem klaren Blick für aktuelle und zukünftige Beförderungsbedarfe. Wir engagieren uns mit passgenauen Lösungen direkt vor Ort, brechen das traditionelle Bestandsdenken auf und schaffen so Freiraum für Lösungen, die das Schienennetz, den Kunden und die Zukunft der Beförderung enger miteinander verknüpfen.
start wurde 2016 als Tochter der DB Regio AG gegründet. Obwohl wir in unserer Arbeit jederzeit auf die Kompetenzen unserer Konzernmutter zurückgreifen können, ist start zuallererst ein agiles Unternehmen mit Start-up-Atmosphäre. 
Unser Anspruch an die Wertschöpfung liefert die vom Aufgabenträger definierte Qualität zum bestmöglichen Preis. Das Ergebnis ist ein klarer, anforderungsgerechter und kosteneffizienter Personennahverkehr, der insbesondere in ländlichen Gebieten eine unverzichtbare Alternative zum Straßenverkehr darstellt. Die Attraktivität der Schiene wird nachhaltig gesteigert und für den Fahrgast zum wichtigsten Argument für den Umstieg.

Impressum: startgmbh.com/impressum

Name: LITRA - Informationsdienst für den öffentlichen Verkehr
Description:
Die LITRA setzt sich als Verband für den öffentlichen Verkehr in der Schweiz ein. Und das seit fast 90 Jahren. Für unsere fast 220 Mitglieder stehen wir ein für eine ganzheitliche, lösungsorientierte und zukunftsgerichtete Verkehrspolitik. 

Wir setzen uns auf nationaler Ebene für den öV ein. Wir wollen ein leistungsfähiges, umweltgerechtes und integriertes schweizerisches Verkehrssystem, eine lösungsorientierte Weiterentwicklung der Verkehrspolitik sowie eine innovative Verkehrswirtschaft. 

Ziel unserer Organisation ist ein starker Verkehrsstandort Schweiz mit Infrastrukturen modernen Zuschnitts und europaweit wettbewerbsfähigen Verkehrsunternehmen. 

Verkehrswege bilden Lebensadern und sind eine Grundvoraussetzung sowohl für die wirtschaftliche Entwicklung als auch den Zusammenhalt unseres Landes.

Name: Avanti Travels
Description:
Welcome to Avanti Travels, where we redefine travel with our first-class and affordable taxi service and bespoke executive chauffeur service for wherever your travel takes you. Every journey, whether for business, leisure, or daily commutes, is elevated, seamless, and exceptional. Our commitment to professionalism, quality, and care ensures every mile is meaningful.

Private Hire Taxi Services-
Avanti Travels offers unmatched private hire taxi services designed for your comfort and convenience, all at budget-friendly, low cost prices. Whether for school runs, airport transfers, or daily commutes, we deliver exceptional service and value in every ride.

CÂNDIDO, Grupo que atua no ramo de transportes Urbano de passageiros com mais de 1.000 Ônibus nas Cidades de Campina Grande, João Pessoa e Natal, transportes de combustíveis, concessionárias de automóvel Volkswagen e de caminhões e ônibus STA, nas cidades de João Pessoa – PB, Campina Grande – PB, Natal – RN e Mossoró – RN.

Contamos atualmente com uma frota de 250 ônibus, micro-ônibus e vans, todos de alto padrão, equipados com e/ou sem ar condicionado, WC, som e poltronas reclináveis. 

Nossas estruturas de garagens são completas e contam com oficinas mecânicas, abastecimento e higienização de frota, para realização de manutenção preventiva, corretiva e preditiva internamente, visando maior disponibilidade dos equipamentos, maior vida útil e menor índice de intercorrências em nossas viagens por problemas mecânicos.

Name: Bus Centre of Excellence
Description:
The Bus Centre of Excellence (BCoE) is funded by the Department of Transport (DfT) and is part of the Chartered Institution of Highways and Transportation (CIHT). It is a place for bus professionals to come together to share best practices and develop skills.

Membership is completely FREE and whether you work for a local authority, an operator, supplier or a consultancy, the Bus Centre of Excellence is your one-stop shop for resources and support. To register as a member and find out more about us please visit our website.

As a BCoE member, you can:
1. Attend our webinars, in-person events and conferences – most of them for FREE.
2. Join one of our Networks: Bus Knowledge Sharing and Incident Network (for bus safety related issues), the Public Sector Forum, the Franchising Network, and Zero Emission Buses Drop-in Sessions with First Bus Decarbonisation team (only for bus operators and those working in the public sector). To join our Networks please email bcoe@ciht.org.uk
3. Skills Development: Access to 8 FREE and other heavily discounted e-training courses
4. Networking opportunities at various events with fellow bus professionals.
5. Be alerted to the latest bus policy updates, industry resources, insights and trends.

Name: Teleport
Description:
Teleport is a rideshare application built on an open protocol that enables different companies, drivers, and riders to work together. By utilizing a network of local, lean rideshare companies, drivers earn more and riders pay less, while the surplus stays within local economies. To ensure a safe and fair system, Teleport's protocol uses blockchain technology to give network participants a meaningful say in governance. Our system has already been tested in Lisbon and Miami, and we're preparing for an imminent launch in multiple US locations.

Teleport's team includes experienced operators, designers, and engineers who have worked on distributed protocols, consumer products, games, and mobile applications at companies such as Dropbox, Amazon, Uber, Coinbase, Nextdoor, and Cruise. Our investors include some of Uber's earliest employees and the founders of billion-dollar marketplace corporations.

 Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/teleportxyz

Name: KhartouMap
Description:
Although hundreds of routes run daily serving over 70% transit-dependent residents, very little to no information exists about Khartoum’s public transit system, not even an official system map. The KhartouMap initiative aims to improve the quality and quantity of information available about the public transit system in Khartoum. Starting with the data collection and processing of transit route data to generate digital and physical system maps, and working with the local government and transport authorities to create the country’s first GTFS.

Simultaneous with the system mapping effort, a core part of KhartouMap is to conduct the country’s largest mobility survey, with the aim of collecting detailed information about origins and destinations on the mapped transit routes, personal travel behavior, and transit accessibility. All the route mapping and mobility survey data collected through this project will be made publicly available and introduced to the public in a series of events and hackathons planned for early 2023 to build local capacities and spur innovation in transit-tech solutions.

We see KhartouMap as an ambitious mobility project with significant cultural and practical relevance in the everyday lives of Sudanese people that’s going to put Khartoum, Sudan on the map - literally and figuratively! Follow this page for project updates and feel free to contact us if you'd like to volunteer with us.

Name: skyTran
Description:
skyTran is a patented, high-speed, low-cost, elevated Personal Rapid Transit (PRT) system. The skyTran network of computer-controlled, 2-person “jet-like” vehicles employs state-of-the-art passive Magnetic Levitation (Maglev) technology. The system transports passengers in a fast, safe, green, and economical manner. skyTran intends to revolutionize public transportation and, with it, urban and suburban commuting.

skyTran is a NASA Space Act company, headquartered at the NASA Ames Research Center near Mountain View, California. NASA uses Space Act Agreements as the primary means for partnering with the community. skyTran greatly benefits from such an arrangement by having access to a wide range of NASA technologies and capabilities and being able to combine NASA expertise, assets, and information with its own core competencies.

Name: STRMTG (Service technique des remontées mécaniques et des transports guidés)
Description:
Le Service Technique des remontées et des transports guidés (STRMTG) est un service à compétence nationale, rattaché à la Direction générale des infrastructures des transports et des mobilités (DGITM) du ministère en charge des Transport. Ses domaines de compétences sont :

•	les remontées mécaniques et tapis roulants de montagne,
•	les transports publics guidés (tramways, métros, chemins de fer touristiques et secondaires),
•	les systèmes de transports routiers automatisés.

Les bureaux de contrôle du STRMTG, basés sur tout le territoire français, assure l’intégralité des missions d’instruction et de contrôle pour le compte des préfets.

Trois types de missions exercées par le STRMTG
1.	Service technique central
o	Observatoire national du parc (statistiques et suivi des installations),
o	Promotion et diffusion des référentiels techniques (guides, recommandations),
o	Études, recherches et expertises pour faire évoluer la réglementation (propositions à l’administration centrale),
o	Délivrance des avis, attestations et agréments réglementaires (vérificateurs, maîtres d’œuvre, OI-SGS, OQA…),
o	Animation, assistance et conseil aux services ministériels,
o	Relations avec les organismes scientifiques, techniques et professionnels,
o	Actions de formation et de partage d’expérience au profit des personnels du ministère,
o	Surveillance du marché des composants et sous-systèmes de sécurité (articles L. 2214-2 et L. 2214-3 du code des transports).
2.	Missions pour le compte des préfets
o	Contrôle technique et sécurité des installations,
o	Instruction technique des dossiers réglementaires.
3.	Organisme notifié n° 1267
o	Évaluation de la conformité des composants et sous-systèmes des installations à câbles aux exigences essentielles du règlement (UE) 2016/424.

Fort de plus de 130 agents répartis entre son siège et ses bureaux de contrôle, le STRMTG veille à la sûreté et à la qualité des transports de son champ d’action, en France.

Name: Bicycle Queensland
Description:
We are the pre-eminent voice for community cycling in Queensland. With about 12,000 members statewide and 40,000 supporters on our database, we exist to help Queenslanders cycle safely. We are dedicated to the promotion of bike riding as a driving force for individual health and well-being, and the empowerment of sustainable development.

Over the past 40 years BQ has grown from a small collective of cycling enthusiasts to one of the largest and most influential community cycling organisations in Australia. This year, we begin the important work of expanding our advocacy to encompass new services and programs, driving outcomes through collaborations and partnerships. We will canvass community views and investigate perceptions and trends, informing public policy development across all levels of government. We will engage in research and translate our findings into practice, showcasing cycling’s transformational power as an uplifting force for community and individual health. We will reach out into regional areas, growing our membership base and ensuring all cyclists, irrespective of where they live, have access to comprehensive insurance and legal advice. We will motivate Queensland’s next generation to cycle more often, providing practical support and training to synthesise their cycling skills.

Like you, we want our community to be fit and active, expanding the horizons for health and lifestyle across our great state. We want to encourage people to cycle for sport, for fun, to socialise, and to experience our communities and natural environment. We want to bring the people of Queensland closer together through the creation of a single integrated transport network, accessible to everyone.

Ultimately, our aim is to inspire all Queenslanders to ride safely with us, in our collective quest to make Queensland Australia’s healthiest and most vibrant lifestyle destination.

Name: Expresso Rio Guaíba
Description:
Public transport services between the cities of Porto Alegre, Eldorado do Sul and Guaíba.

"A Expresso Rio Guaíba Ltda, foi fundada em 9 de outubro de 1961, tendo como objetivo o atendimento da comunidade por meio da exploração dos serviços de transporte coletivo entre os municípios de Guaíba e Porto Alegre, cuja ligação rodoviária através da BR-116, foi viabilizada após a inauguração da Travessia Eng. Régis Bittencourt (BR-116/Sul). Antes o transporte entre essas duas localidades era feito unicamente via fluvial no Lago Guaíba.

A sede da empresa foi construída em Guaíba, onde permanece até os dias atuais. Sua frota era inicialmente constituída por 03 ônibus marca Mercedes-Benz e carroceria Eliziário, anos 1959 e 1961 que executavam duas linhas: uma via estrada federal (BR-116) e outra via estrada Estadual (Sans Souci). Foram sócios-fundadores a Empresa Citral Ltda, Expresso Frederes S/A e os Srs. Cristiano M. Silveira, Hilário Scherer e Augusto Calcagnotto. No ano de 1966 o controle acionário passou para a família Piccoli que o mantém até os dias atuais.

Com o desenvolvimento da região, a Expresso Rio Guaíba Ltda., atenta às necessidades de seus usuários, passou a oferecer uma gama mais diversificada de serviços, agregando novas linhas, novas tecnologias, ampliando sua frota e colocando mais horários à disposição da comunidade.

Atualmente, a empresa opera em dois segmentos do transporte intermunicipal de passageiros: Metropolino e Rodoviario.

Servindo a ligação entre os municípios de Porto Alegre, Eldorado do Sul, Guaíba, Barra do Ribeiro, Tapes, Arambaré, e Camaquã.

Além da sede em Guaíba, a empresa possui filial em Porto Alegre e bases operacionais em Barra do Ribeiro, Camaquã e Eldorado do Sul.

Name: Grupo JTP Transportes
Description:
Fundada em 2005, a JTP Transportes é uma empresa brasileira com um propósito claro: oferecer os melhores serviços de transporte, garantindo excelência e quebrando paradigmas no atendimento à população. Acreditamos que nossa principal responsabilidade é com os cidadãos, que, por meio de seu trabalho árduo, pagam impostos e merecem serviços de alta qualidade em troca. 

Com sede em Alphaville, Barueri/SP, onde ficam as áreas Administrativa, Financeira, de Contratos, Tecnologia, Supply, Centro de Controle Operacional e Gente & Gestão, nossa estrutura permite agilidade e alinhamento estratégico. Nossas unidades operacionais estão localizadas em Embu das Artes e Bragança Paulista, no estado de São Paulo, além de Porto Velho, em Rondônia. 

Especializados em Transporte Escolar e Urbano, contamos com uma equipe altamente capacitada e dedicada a proporcionar a melhor experiência para os usuários. Cada etapa, desde a preparação até a manutenção de nossa frota, é realizada com rigor, para que não apenas atendamos, mas superemos as expectativas daqueles que dependem de nossos serviços. 

Onde há JTP, há compromisso com a excelência, porque sabemos que, para quem confia em nossos serviços, a mobilidade vai além do simples transporte. É nossa missão entregar o melhor para aqueles que mais amamos!

Name: Total Transit Enterprises
Description:
Total Transit Enterprises branded as Totalride was acquired by National Express Transit in 2019. See Below for History of the Company:

Total Transit, Inc. was founded in March 1984 by Craig and Christine Hughes with the purchase of a 16 car airport fleet. The brand name, Discount Cab, became recognizable as the green taxis seen throughout the Phoenix and Tucson metropolitan areas. The company evolved through the years, changing with the times and growing to include a demand response division, a public transportation division and a transportation management division. Total Transit, operating as totalride, serves the Arizona market today as the managing entity for the following lines of business:

Our Demand Response Division has built a reputation for delivering high value services via the effective use of innovative and progressive on-demand paratransit solutions that provide retail, ridesharing, non-emergency medical transportation, and paratransit overflow services.

Our Public Transportation Division provides fixed and flex route bus operations, express bus, shuttle, charter and other transit related services for private and public entities as well as transit authorities. Additionally, totalride provides services to public and private schools – traditional route service, field trips, activity bus service, and specialized transportation for at risk and special needs students.

Our Transportation Management Division provides fully outsourced “turn-key” transportation management services on behalf of state agencies, managed care organizations (MCOs), metropolitan planning organizations (MPOs), transit authorities, school districts, and other social services agencies.

Book your ride in advance for meetings, events, or airport pickups - perfect for punctual professionals.

 Flying in or out?
We offer dependable Airport & Hotel Transfers, door-to-door service for travelers and guests.

 Have something to send?
Use our Delivery & Butler Services for fast, secure item delivery, from documents to medication and groceries.

 Want to advertise?
Boost your brand visibility with in-app and car-top advertising, seen by thousands across Guyana.

 Business owner?
Our Corporate Transport Solutions offer centralized billing, scheduling support, and premium service. Why pay for an entire fleet when you can have ours at your disposal? 

 Let’s move smarter - connect with us today.

Name: Trans-Missions
Description:
Mettre les pouvoirs publics au cœur de la mobilité
Trans-Missions conseille les pouvoirs publics pour développer une offre de mobilité durable, efficace et adaptée aux besoins des voyageurs.

Le partenaire du secteur public
Nous comptons parmi nos clients des collectivités, des Autorités Organisatrices de la Mobilité (AOM), des associations de transport et des ministères, en France et à l’étranger.
Nous sommes indépendants des opérateurs de transports, des constructeurs de matériel roulant et des groupes financiers et conseillons uniquement le secteur public, pour lui permettre de développer pleinement ses prérogatives en matière de mobilité.

Un conseil polyvalent et engagé
Riche de sa diversité, notre équipe est pluridisciplinaire, internationale et passionnée par les sujets de mobilité durable. Composée de juristes, économistes, ingénieurs et géographes, notre équipe propose des solutions conciliant les enjeux politiques, économiques, juridiques et techniques. Elle apporte ainsi la garantie d’une réponse globale et de qualité adaptée aux besoins de nos clients.

Name: GRUPO ANTARES S.A.
Description:
At Grupo Antares S.A., we specialize in providing executive and corporate transportation solutions tailored to the needs of businesses, organizations, and high-profile events. With a modern and well-maintained fleet, we ensure a premium, comfortable, and secure travel experience.

Our services include:
 Airport Transfers: Reliable and punctual transportation to and from the airport.
 Corporate Mobility: Executive transportation for business professionals and delegations.
 Event Logistics: Tailored mobility solutions for congresses, conventions, and large-scale events.
 VIP & Private Chauffeur Services: High-end vehicles with professional drivers for personalized travel.
 Long-Distance & International Transfers: Safe and efficient transport beyond city limits, including cross-border travel.
 Fleet Rental with Driver: Premium vehicles for corporate and institutional use.

Our bilingual drivers and dedicated coordination team ensure a smooth and stress-free experience. We prioritize safety, punctuality, and discretion, making us the preferred transportation partner for companies and organizations in Paraguay and beyond.

Let’s move forward together!

Name: Buses Altas Cumbres
Description:
¿Quiénes somos?
Somos una empresa orgullosamente maulina, con más de 10 años de experiencia en el transporte de pasajeros en Chile, tanto en el ámbito público cómo privado. Realizamos viajes para transporte público desde Santiago hasta la región del Maule, y en transporte privado desde la región de Atacama hasta la región de los Ríos, movilizando a más de 3 millones de pasajeros al año. 
Nuestros clientes y nuestros más de 450 colaboradores son el corazón de Altas Cumbres y junto a ellos trabajamos día a día para entregar un servicio de excelencia, certificándonos en cuatro normas ISO que nos amparan como una empresa de calidad, segura en sus procesos, consciente y respetuosa con el medio ambiente y la seguridad vial. 
En conjunto, trabajamos para entregar a nuestros pasajeros una excelente experiencia de viaje.

Nuestra Historia
Comenzamos nuestros servicios de transporte de personal en el año 2012, prestando servicios a trabajadores de minería, lo cual nos permitió entender de mejor forma las necesidades y expectativas de nuestros clientes. 
Iniciamos en el trasporte público interprovincial a principios del año 2014, lo que nos ha hecho ampliamente reconocidos y apreciados por nuestros clientes. 
Empezamos nuestras operaciones con sólo 4 buses doble piso que cubrían la ruta entre Constitución, Talca y Santiago, y gracias al esfuerzo y compromiso de cada uno de nuestros colaboradores hemos extendimos nuestros recorridos a Linares y Parral. 
En el año 2019 dimos comienzo a una importante faena de minería en Calama y actualmente nos expandimos y contamos con un centro de operaciones en El Salvador. 
Trabajamos arduamente para entregar el servicio de calidad y excelencia que nuestros pasajeros merecen. Esperamos continuar creciendo y llegando a muchos otros destinos para comenzar junto UN GRAN VIAJE.

Name: Rutatlantica
Description:
Desde 1975, en Rutatlantica nos especializamos en el transporte de pasajeros de media y larga distancia, ofreciendo servicios regulares hacia la Costa Atlántica y el Norte de Argentina.

A lo largo de nuestra trayectoria, hemos ampliado nuestras unidades de negocio incorporando el alquiler de ómnibus, el envío de encomiendas y la organización de viajes de turismo, siempre con el mismo compromiso: brindar seguridad, puntualidad y confort en cada viaje.

Name: GRUPO AISA
Description:
Desde hace más de 70 años AISA presta sus servicios a los usuarios del transporte por carretera. Combina su larga experiencia con las últimas novedades y los más modernos avances tecnológicos, tanto en sus autobuses como en los equipos auxiliares, prestando especial atención al confort y seguridad de los viajeros, puntualidad y eficacia en todos sus servicios.
En la actualidad, Grupo AISA cubre mas de 100 líneas comprendidas en 15 concesiones. Recorriendo 14 provincias, y 7 Comunidades Autónomas.

Name: Transmargoo Turismo e Fretamento
Description:
Transportamos vidas com segurança, excelência e propósito.
Na Transmargoo, acreditamos que cada trajeto vai além do destino, é uma oportunidade de oferecer qualidade, confiança e inovação no transporte de pessoas.
Buscamos constantemente aprimorar nossos serviços, valorizando nossos colaboradores e clientes, e promovendo uma convivência organizacional humana, motivadora e eficiente.

Description:

busaolegal.com.br

Name: Keolis Secteur Atlantique
Description: Filiale du groupe Keolis, Keolis Atlantique est une société de transports de voyageurs interurbains. Grâce à ses 4 centres d'exploitations implantés dans 2 départements (Loire-Atlantique et Morbihan). Keolis Atlantique réalise du transport de voyageurs par autocars ainsi que la maintenance de près de 500 cars dans l’ouest de la France.

Name: Eurobus AG
Description:
EUROBUS ist der Schweizer Spezialist für Busreisen mit dem vielfältigsten Angebot an Pauschal- und Gruppenreisen, ergänzt von einer hochwertigen Auswahl an individuellen Tagesfahrten. Wir stehen für hervorragende Qualität, Innovation und Tradition. Unsere 500 Mitarbeitenden sorgen mit 260 Bussen bei Ferienreisen in ganz Europa und im öffentlichen Verkehr täglich dafür, dass jede Reise zu einem Erlebnis wird und unsere Sie jedes Mal sicher ans Ziel kommen.

Qualität: Wir verfügen über die modernste Busflotte der Schweiz und sind das einzige Busunternehmen mit dem Qualitätsgütesiegel Stufe III von Schweiz Tourismus. Unser höchstes Ziel ist es, die Ansprüche unserer Kunden Tag für Tag zu übertreffen.

Innovation: Wir möchten allen Reisenden ein optimales Preis-Leistungsverhältnis bieten. Deshalb reisen Sie bei uns in einer von drei hochwertigen Reiseklassen.

Umwelt: Wussten Sie, dass Busreisende am wenigsten CO2 pro Kopf ausstossen, im Vergleich zu Auto-, Flugzeug- oder Bahnreisenden? Zur weiteren Verbesserung unserer Umweltbilanz arbeiten wir ausserdem mit myclimate  zusammen.

Tradition: Das Unternehmen besteht seit mehr als 100 Jahren. Dank unseren verschiedenen Standorten in der Deutschschweiz sind wir lokal verankert und können Ihnen immer einen Abfahrtsort in Ihrer Nähe anbieten.

Name: Davey Coach Bus Sales
Description:
For nearly 30 years, Davey Coach Sales has been a leader in new and used buses for sale and short and long-term lease/rental across North America. With headquarters in Denver and sales and service locations in Colorado, California and Indiana, Davey Coach is one of the largest fully-integrated shuttle bus dealerships from the Midwest to the West Coast. 
Davey Coach offers an extensive inventory of new and used buses for sale, lease, and rent. Our selection of shuttle buses for sale are available with hundreds of options to suit any set of needs including church buses, airport shuttles, limousine buses, childcare and assisted living transportation, and much, much more! Whatever your need, Davey Coach can outfit a bus that fits!

Name: Lane Transit District (LTD)
Description: LTD, nationally recognized for its innovative transportation services and programs, provides more than 10 million trips per year on its buses and EmX Bus Rapid Transit line in Lane County, Oregon. Encompassing the Eugene-Springfield metro area, LTD is a special district of the state of Oregon and led by a seven member board of directors appointed by Oregon’s Governor. LTD also operates RideSource, a paratransit service for people with disabilities. In all that we do, we are committed to creating a more connected, sustainable, and equitable community.

Name: Kiwitaxi.com
Description:
Kiwitaxi is an international online booking platform for private transfers and chauffeur services operating in over 100 countries. From airport pickups to full-day car rentals with a driver, we help travelers move comfortably and stress-free—whether they're heading to a hotel, a meeting, or exploring a new city.
At Kiwitaxi, we believe in combining high standards of service with a human touch. Our mission is to make every trip smoother and more enjoyable, powered by real people who care.

Name: Viação Progresso
Description:
Tudo começou no ano de 1949, em Rio Largo, Alagoas, quando o Sr. Manoel Monteiro da Silva fundou a Viação Progresso com apenas uma marinete e uma linha.

Em 1º de junho de 1981, o Sr. Manoel e seu irmão, Antônio Monteiro, adquiriram a antiga Bomfim Urbana (nome fantasia da empresa Mencil Menezes e Cia) em Aracaju-SE e começaram a operacionalizar com muito respeito e compromisso aos clientes, reunindo experiências que se renovam por meio de atualizações constantes e investimentos em tecnologia. 

Em 1985 a empresa começou a utilizar o nome Viação Progresso, trazido da experiência e do sucesso alcançado por Sr. Manoel em Alagoas.

Name: FAMATUR
Description: FAMATUR desde 1991 realizando transporte profissional de pessoas em serviço EVENTUAL & FRETADO, com Van, Micro-ônibus e Ônibus padrão convencional e executivo. À partir de 2022 iniciaremos a operar com transporte de cargas em veículos VUC, Leve, Médio e Pesado.

Name: Maisavia
Description:
Notre entreprise qui fête cette année ses 50 ans, est avec 285 collaborateurs un des premiers opérateurs de Rhone-Alpes dans le transport routier interubain de voyageurs.
nous mettons à votre disposition une flotte de 235 autocars de 4 à 65 fauteuils pour tous vos déplacement en france et à l'étranger.

Name: Metro Ligero Oeste, S.A.
Description:
Metro Ligero Oeste (MLO) is a concessionary company that provides a public transport service to the Madrid region. Since July 2007, it has connected Boadilla del Monte, Pozuelo de Alarcón and Alcorcón municipalities to the Madrid region's underground, rail and bus network, coordinated by the Consorcio Regional de Transporte de Madrid (CRTM).

We believe in the concept of space-saving mobility that improves quality of life, connecting all local means of transport, while respecting the environment. We aim to provide convenient, rapid and sustainable public transport for all. All our vehicles and stations are equipped with WiFi for the convenience of travellers on all journeys.

We believe in constant commitment to the social environment, helping to improve quality of life by using increasingly efficient, environmentally friendly vehicles whilst giving special consideration to travellers with reduced mobility.

We see communication with travellers as being a major priority for the company. So we are constantly providing travellers with information and responding to their questions via social networks and our own web site Metro Ligero Oeste.

We also believe in corporate responsibility and the need to promote projects based on road safety and environmental education and sustainable transport, as well as corporate volunteer and supporting those at risk of social exclusion.

Keep up to date with MLO via the social networks:

Facebook: https://es-es.facebook.com/MLOeste
Twitter: https://twitter.com/MLOeste
Flickr: https://www.flickr.com/photos/mlooeste

Name: METACAR Mobility Systems
Description:
Metacar vous ouvre son capital ! Investissez dès 100€ (défiscalisable) via une campagne de financement : https://www.wiseed.com/projet/74586069

Pour le transport de marchandises / personnes : comment maximiser efficience et rentabilité tout en limitant l’impact écologique ? 

Grâce au transport partagé et à la REDISTRIBUTION GROUPÉE et OPTIMISÉE ! 

A l’instar des vélos, trottinettes, chariots d’aéroport, caddies de supermarché, mais qui n’existe pas aujourd’hui pour les voitures… 

Eurêka ! @METACAR développe un système viable grâce au partage et à la redistribution optimisée de petits véhicules individuels et modulaires , une innovation de rupture, technologique et systémique pour :
 La mobilité des personnes : KIWEE Mobility, fondée sur l’autopartage de proximité
 La logistique urbaine de marchandises : KIWEE Delivery, fondée sur des trains de remorques emboitées détachables et déposables facilement en aire urbaine.

Une logistique de flotte optimisée : Jusqu’à 10 véhicules    qui s’emboitent en train routier
 1 seul opérateur pour redistribuer jusqu’à 10 voitures
 1 seule borne de recharge pour 10 voitures

Name: LandJet
Description:
LandJet transforms business travel into a productive and seamless experience. Our private, chartered transportation service is tailored for professionals who value efficiency, focus, and connectivity while on the move.

Designed to be your mobile office, LandJet's modern Sprinter vehicles provide everything you need to stay productive and prepared, whether you're heading to a client meeting, collaborating with your team, or preparing for the day ahead.

Why LandJet?

Work Without Disruptions: Stay connected with reliable Wi-Fi, conference-ready setups, and an environment built for focus.
Time Well Spent: Turn travel time into an extension of your workday with tools and space designed to keep you on track.
Safety You Can Count On: Clean, secure, and professional—our commitment to providing a safe environment ensures peace of mind.
LandJet isn’t just transportation; it’s a solution for business professionals who need to make the most of their time. Wherever your work takes you, LandJet is here to get you there—efficiently, comfortably, and ready to take on what’s next.

Name: DREAM S.R.L
Description:
Con el objetivo de prestar servicios de excelencia en el transporte logístico para el desarrollo de la actividad minera, nace DREAM SRL, radicada en la comunidad de Jáchal, San Juan. 
Nuestra empresa cuenta con una amplia flota de nivel internacional, colaboradores capacitados y experimentados en el transporte y logística, lo que nos permite brindar un servicio con calidad y seguridad. 
En DREAM SRL estamos comprometidos con el desarrollo socioeconómico de las comunidades de Jáchal e Iglesia y trabajamos para potenciar las comunidades lindantes con las explotaciones mineras, fieles a las directivas que parten del Gobierno de San Juan, a las cuales se adhieren desde un primer momento en aras de lograr el crecimiento comunitario.
Location: San José de Jáchal, San Juan

Name: bwegt – nachhaltige Mobilität für Baden-Württemberg
Description:
bwegt ist die Initiative des Landes Baden-Württemberg für nachhaltige und klimafreundliche Mobilität mit öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln. Gemeinsam mit unseren Partnern bewegen wir im Regional- und Nahverkehr jedes Jahr eine Milliarde Menschen.

Hier vernetzen wir alle, denen nachhaltige Mobilität wichtig ist: Unternehmen und Institutionen, Nachhaltigkeits- und Mobilitätsmanager:innen und all die Menschen, die öffentliche Verkehrsmittel aus Überzeugung nutzen – in der Freizeit oder auf der Fahrt zur Arbeit.

Was uns bewegt: neue Entwicklungen aus der ÖPNV-Branche, die Mobilitätswende und entsprechende Initiativen, vielversprechende Innovationen und Technologien sowie Daten, Fakten und Dialoge rund um nachhaltige Mobilität.

Jetzt einsteigen!

Name: 011 TRANSPORTES E TURISMO LTDA
Description:
A 011 Transportes é uma empresa prestadora de serviços no segmento de transporte de passageiros e pequenas cargas com abrangência em todo território nacional.
Com início das atividades no ramo de transportes no ano de 2001, acumulamos mais de 17 anos de experiência que nos consolidaram no mercado com a imagem de uma empresa SÉRIA, PROFISSIONAL, EFICIENTE e COMPROMETIDA com nossos Clientes, Parceiros e Fornecedores.
Nossos colaboradores são altamente treinados e capacitados para executarem suas devidas funções com excelência não apenas no operacional como também no atendimento, logística e monitoramento. Profissionais motoristas com cursos de transporte coletivo de passageiros, direção defensiva, direção preventiva, primeiros socorros e relacionamento interpessoal.
Nossos veículos possuem TODAS as LICENÇAS e CADASTROS necessários para transporte de cargas e passageiros em todo o território nacional além de seguros e monitoramento específicos para cada modalidade de transporte específica:

- ANTT – RNTRC - Registro Nacional de Transporte Urbano e Rodoviário de Cargas

NOSSOS HORÁRIOS
Segunda a Sexta das 08:00hs às 19:00hs

Name: Coach Hire Direct
Description:
We help Coach Operators increase their turnover by an average of £180,000 per year. We provide real-time local Coach Hire enquiries.

Simply choose the town you want to cover and we'll do the rest. All enquiries are generated through Google Ad Campaigns - average conversion rate of 20%. 

All enquiries are delivered to your email in real-time.

Key Benefits
1.	Receive new customers local to you – Our bespoke targeting means that you only receive qualified leads from customers searching for coach hire near you.
2.	High conversion rates – Our partners typically see a 15-25% conversion rate
3.	High lead volumes – we can generate between 10-300 leads per area a week. 
4.    The leads are a combination of yours, day private hire, school trips and business shuttles. 

How we work with our partners

1.	Select the area 
2.	Let us know the volume of enquiries you would like per month

What details are provided?

The following fields are provided

•	Pick up from
•	Destination
•	Pick up date
•	Pick up time
•	Return date
•	Return time
•	Passengers numbers
•	Name
•	Phone
•	Email
•	Special requirements


Do you sell enquiries to multiple companies?

We will only work with one coach company per town, the leads are only provided to your company for a quote.

Whether you’re a nationwide company or a solo driver, we help you find the right customers.

How are the enquiries generated?

All enquiries are generated on bespoke landing pages, the traffic is generated through Google.

If you would like to increase your bookings get in touch today 
E: info@Coach-Hire-Direct.co.uk

Name: Busmen Panamá
Description:
Somos una empresa de origen mexicano con más de 13 años de presencia en el rubro de transporte privado en Panamá, nos especializamos en ofrecer servicios de transporte de personal, empresarial, ejecutivo, turístico entre otros, siendo el proveedor más puntual de toda la región, con un 99% de cumplimiento. 

Estamos conformados por tres sucursales y con más de 300 colaboradores con una alta experiencia en operación y logística de transporte, nuestro mayor objetivo es brindar un servicio de alta calidad

Name: GO Riteway Transportation Group
Description: GO Riteway provides transportation solutions to meet any need, for every occasion including everything from single vehicle transportation for one event to multiple vehicles for multi-day events to long term partnering for ongoing transportation needs of institutions, companies and schools and even airport transportation services. Our fleet includes limousines, motorcoaches, shared vans, school buses, sedans and luxury executive coaches.

Name: Verbus
Description: Verbus est un opérateur historique du transport routier de voyageurs dans le Grand Sud-Ouest. La société compte aujourd’hui 750 collaborateurs et un parc de 700 véhicules. Engagée pour un développement durable, elle propose une mobilité partagée comme alternative à la voiture individuelle. Les énergies éco-responsables telles que les biocarburants, le GNV et l'électricité représentent à ce jour 30% de ses consommations ; un chiffre en constante augmentation.

Name: Nobina Danmark
Description:
Nobina er Nordens største og mest erfarne operatør indenfor kollektiv trafik. Vores kompetencer indenfor tilbudsarbejde og aktiv forvaltning af offentlige trafikkontrakter kombineret med vores fokus på at levere kvalitet, gør os til brancheførende indenfor lønsomhed, kontraktudvikling samt skabelse af et sundere erhverv. 

Nobina leverer dagligt kollektiv transport til over én million mennesker. Både når de skal til og fra job, samt skole, fritidsaktiviteter eller på ferie. Vi er stærkt repræsenteret i både Danmark, Norge, Sverige og Finland. 

Nobina gør rejsen enklere og komfortabel for vores passagerer. Vores succes er med til at skabe et bedre samfund ved at øge mobiliteten, reducere miljøbelastningen og sænke samfundsomkostningerne. De overordnede finansielle mål for vores virksomhed er at generere en stabil og rentabel vækst.

Name: Ritchies Transport
Description: Ritchies is one of New Zealand’s most successful urban and charter transport operators – a proven and dependable service provider with a strong performance history. Established in 1935 in the small South Island town of Temuka, Ritchies has grown to become the second-largest passenger transport company in New Zealand, with a fleet of more than 1,700 vehicles and over 2,200 employees.

Name: VFD
Description:
VFD, votre transport au quotidien 
Chaque jour, vous croisez les cars VFD sur des lignes régulières ou scolaires. VFD transporte avec ponctualité et rigueur vos enfants à l’école, et vous emmène sur votre lieu de travail pour le compte de multiples collectivités locales.

VFD, votre transport des vacances et des loisirs 
VFD vous accompagne sur la route des vacances et de vos loisirs avec le sourire. Navettes aéroport, dessertes des stations de sports d’hiver, navettes en station…

VFD c’est : 
8.4 millions de KM parcourus par an
42 lignes régulières et 3 millions de voyageurs

 3 secteurs géographiques :  Nord Isère – Centre Isère – Sud Isère

Name: The Kings Ferry Ltd
Description:
The Kings Ferry is the leading private coach hire specialist in the south east, with an outstanding reputation for hire coach and commuter services. The company is renowned for its ability to provide the very best luxury coach hire service while adhering to Duty of Care legislation. This gives you complete peace of mind.

As an award winning hire coach specialist, we provide private hire coaches and corporate coach hire. From family weddings to music festivals, our luxury hire coaches offer outstanding safety, comfort and up-to-date technology.

Our fleet incorporates all vehicle sizes, from 29-seat hire coaches right up to 74-seat double-decker coaches, providing you with the flexibility to meet your transport needs. Perfect for events and functions requiring hire coaches in London or coach hire in Kent.

Name: InTransit Mobility Engineering
Description:
Ett ökat klimat- och kapacitetsfokus ställer högre krav på tillgänglighet och
robusthet i det kollektiva resandet. Vi har satt som vår mission att vara en
viktig möjliggörare och att göra vårt yttersta för att bidra till en kollektivtrafik i världsklass . 

Genom vår gedigna kunskap och långa erfarenhet av att skapa maximal nytta i kombination med högsta kostnadseffektivitet för kollektivtrafiksystemet, säkerställer vi att våra kunder, och våra kunders kunder –  såväl publika som privata – får bästa tillgänglighet till lägsta kostnad genom investeringens totala livslängd. 

Vi är verksamma  i hela Skandinavien och
tillsammans hjälper vi städer och regioner att växa.

Name: Unibuss AS
Description: Unibuss er et av Norges ledende kollektivtransportselskap, med en sterk posisjon i Oslo og et tydelig engasjement for det grønne skiftet. Selskapet er eid av Sporveien, som igjen er eid av Oslo kommune. Unibusskonsernet omfatter også Unibuss ekspress. Vi er størst på bybuss i Oslo og i front på elbuss-drift. Våre verdier er Pålitelig - Engasjert - Samhandlende, og vårt mål er å være "Best på buss - best sammen". Vi er en nyskapende og teknologidrevet organisasjon med høyt tempo, korte beslutningsveier og et arbeidsmiljø preget av mye engasjement og samarbeid. Vi er en multikulturell arbeidsplass med 1300 ansatte fra over 50 nasjoner.

Assim, foi criada a Viação Praia Sol voltada inteiramente ao transporte coletivo intermunicipal de passageiros em 1 de janeiro de 1989.

Name: Irish Citylink
Description:
Irish Citylink has been providing luxury inter-city coach travel in Ireland since 2003.

Our distinctive blue and yellow liveried coaches have become synonymous with high quality, reliable and affordable coach travel. The company has expanded its network of routes over the years and now operates high frequency express services linking Ireland's major cities,towns and airports.

Based in Galway, Irish Citylink operates six main routes offering 100 daily departures. We offer Express services from Galway to Dublin City and Dublin Airport, Express services from Galway to Limerick, Cork City & Cork Airport, Express services from Limerick to Dublin Airport,  Commuter services from Galway to Athlone/ Dublin City & Dublin Airport and Commuter services from Galway to Clifden.

Name: Land Airline
Description:
Land Airline is a boutique premium ground transportation company based in Miami, created with a clear purpose: to redefine how people and brands experience mobility.
We are much more than a transportation company. We are an operational partner that solves the logistical needs of our partners and their end clients, providing certainty, planning, and excellence where others see complexity.

Our mission is to change the negative perception of transfers, so they stop being something people simply endure to reach their destination, and instead become a natural, enjoyable, and coherent part of the overall experience. With every ride, we work to turn mobility from an obstacle into value, comfort, and reputation for those who trust us.

Name: The Transportation Alliance
Aircoach
Description:
Aircoach is Ireland's leading private bus and coach operator and provides a range of high frequency, quality scheduled coach services to and from Dublin City Centre and Dublin Airport. 
We operate 6 key services connecting Dublin Airport with Dublin City Centre and its suburbs, as well as non-stop express services connecting Dublin Airport with Cork and Derry/L'Derry via Belfast. 

Across the UK and Ireland, First's bus businesses provide approximately 2.5 million journeys a day for customers across a broad range of operating environments. This wide range of services includes commercial urban bus networks, inter urban routes, Park & Ride services, private hire, rail replacement services and further key airport connections including Heathrow RailAir, Glasgow Shuttle and Bristol International Flyer.

Aircoach is committed to delivering high quality public transport services and has been instrumental in increasing the level of public transport usage in Ireland over the last number of years. We also have extensive experience of providing car park and shuttle bus services including operating all car park shuttle bus services on contract to Dublin Airport Authority. We are forecasting to carry over 2 million passengers this year on our high quality services to and from Dublin City Centre and Dublin Airport.

Our current services include:

Dublin Airport Bus – Dublin City Centre – Donnybrook - Leopardstown
Dublin Airport Bus - Dublin City Centre 
Dublin Airport Bus - Port Tunnel - Ballsbridge – Booterstown – Blackrock – Dalkey
Cork - Dublin City Bus – Dublin Airport
Derry/L'Derry Bus - Maghera - Belfast International Airport - Belfast – Dublin Airport – Dublin City

Name: Shebah Rideshare
Description:
Conceived and built in Australia, Shebah is Australia's leading all-women rideshare app designed to help women flourish as earners, carers and social butterflies. At every stage, every age, and every hour, Shebah is here to help.

We want to guarantee safety for all passengers, equal opportunity for our drivers, and comfortable rides that raise the industry standard. 

shebah.com.au

Name: White Sands Transportation
Description: White Sands Transportation chauffeured services is  a black car company committed to excellence in the industry of professional transportation. Our chauffeured vehicles arrive safely, on time, and ready to exceed expectations. Our limousine service communicates clearly with our valued clients, especially when the plans change last minute. Whether you are vacationing on Hilton Head Island or traveling to Savannah or Charleston, we have you covered.

+ de 54 anos conectando pessoas a seu destino com segurança

Name: Via Ouro Coletivos
Description:
A Via Ouro fundada em maio de 2004 é uma empresa que atua no transporte municipal de passageiros, com uma moderna frota de veículos convencionais e microônibus, atendendo as necessidades da população do município de Nova Lima- Minas Gerais .

Além da preocupação com o máximo de qualidade na prestação de serviços a Via Ouro desde sua fundação vem investindo na qualidade de vida da sua equipe de trabalho, porque acredita que pessoas satisfeitas fazem toda a diferença, nos novos desafios e propostas dos resultados finais do conjunto de todo o seu sistema.

A preocupação com o seu papel social se estendem na colaboração das necessidades da comunidade de Nova Lima , da qual faz parte. A Via Ouro está sintonizada também com princípios de preservação da natureza, contribuindo para o futuro da vida no planeta. O uso consciente da água potável, é uma das ações adotadas.

Na era do conhecimento e na economia, a Via Ouro está focalizada em temas como crescimento auto-sustentável e gestões de pessoas voltadas para a qualidade dos seus talentos acreditam que trabalhadores do conhecimento são capazes de compartilhar idéias e tendências que levam a empresa e sua equipe ao sucesso.

Name: MelyaGo
Description: MelyaGo, première application de covoiturage en Algérie.

Name: JJ Kavanagh
Description:
Over  years in business and still looking to the future!

The largest and oldest privately owned coach operators in Ireland. We are proud to drive and and challenge what has been done before to provide the best and most innovative experience for our passengers.

Name: Victorian Bus Inspections
Description:
Victorian Bus Inspections may be a new name to you, but we have been around for over 35 years, under the name of Peninsula Diesel Repairs. We have been Heavy Vehicle Roadworthy inspectors for 15+ years and Light & Heavy Bus Inspectors for 6 years. Our busy truck & bus workshop is located in Mornington where we count many of the largest companies on the Peninsula as our clients.

We have found since purchasing our portable roller brake tester 2 years ago that there is a need in the bus industry for an alternative option for Bus Annual Inspections throughout Victoria. We have spent the last 2 years finetuning our processes in collaboration with our clients & Vicroads to be ready to offer you an excellent service for your Annual Bus Inspections onsite Victoria Wide.

Name: LMR Serviços.
Description: Desde de 2013, a LMR Serviços vem realizando o planejamento logístico e estratégico de deslocamento de colaboradores, executivos (nativos e/ou expatriados) de  empresas nacionais e multinacionais de diversos segmentos, sempre prezando pela qualidade e segurança, com motoristas e atendentes bilíngues, garantindo o atendimento personalizado para cada cliente.

Name: Centre Area Transportation Authority (CATA)
Description: The Centre Area Transportation Authority (CATA) is the public transportation system serving State College, PA and the main campus of Penn State.  We operate three distinct programs - CATABUS conventional bus service; CATAGO! microtransit service, CATARIDE paratransit service primarily for seniors and persons with disabilities; and CATACOMMUTE services that include vanpools and carpool matching for long-distance commuters.

Name: Buster
Description:
Buster is the easiest way to book a bus.

Our services are across the U.S. & Canada.

Answer a few questions about your trip, see all the options in one place, and instantly book. 

No more cash, quote forms, or phone calls needed to book a ride.

Whether you are planning an event for a corporation, non-profit, team, or school trip, Buster’s got your back. We search thousands of vehicles for every trip, and show you the options so you can make the best choice, at the best price. Easily compare vehicle photos, amenity packages, and prices. We only work with operators who meet a high standard to become Buster Verified - checking on safety, service, cleanliness, and vehicle quality - so you can rest assured it’ll be a smooth ride.

Buster is part of the Global Charter Services family of companies, which includes Buster, BusBank, CorporateShuttle by BusBank, and FestDrive. Our team is based remotely as well as in our offices in Manhattan and Chicago. We’re looking forward to working with you!

Name: Viação Gadotti
Description: Auto Viação Gadotti is a government administration company based out of 268 Rua Rudolfo Walter - Itoupava Central, Blumenau, Brazil.

Name: Mekka Traffic Group
Description:
Koncernen Mekka Traffic Group är en av de största aktörerna inom den svenska kollektivtrafiken. Vi bedriver busstrafik och spårburen trafik inom upphandlad kollektivtrafik samt skoltrafik och kommersiell linje- och beställningstrafik med buss. I vår verksamhet ryms även all typ av fordonsservice för tunga nyttofordon. Koncernen är etablerad på ett 30-tal orter runt om i Sverige, har drygt 2000 medarbetare och omsätter ca 2,1 mdkr.

I koncernen ryms bland annat Bergkvarabuss (https://www.linkedin.com/company/bergkvarabuss-ab), Traveller Buss (https://www.linkedin.com/company/traveller-buss) och Stockholms Spårvägar (https://www.linkedin.com/company/ab-stockholms-sp-rv-gar/).

Name: Nobina Care
Description:
Nobina Care är en del av Nobina-koncernen. Nordens största företag inom kollektivtrafiken. 
Vi är marknadsledande inom särskilda persontransporter. Genom att uteslutande arbeta med upphandlad trafik vill vi finnas till för människor som av olika anledningar inte har möjlighet att resa på annat sätt. Vi brinner för ett samhälle där alla kan röra sig fritt, oavsett förutsättningar eller behov. Tillsammans med våra resenärer och uppdragsgivare är vi stora nog att göra skillnad, på riktigt. Vi är verksamma i Sverige under varumärkena Samtrans Omsorgsresor, Telepass och Göteborgs Buss.

Name: Polbus-PKS
Description:
Polbus-PKS sp. z o.o., z siedzibą we Wrocławiu, to polska firma oparta na blisko 80-letniej tradycji i doświadczeniu w przewozach pasażerskich oraz wynajmie autokarów i busów dla różnych podmiotów rynku. Zarządzamy także dworcami autobusowymi we Wrocławiu i Oleśnicy.
Ponad 300 specjalistów codziennie wspiera nasze działania na terenie aglomeracji wrocławskiej i okolicznych powiatów. Dysponujemy największą flotą autokarów na Dolnym Śląsku.

Każdy kilometr to historia pasażera, który nam zaufał
- co roku przejeżdżamy ponad 3,5 mln km
- rocznie przewozimy ok. 1,8 mln pasażerów
- docieramy do 155 miast w 24 krajach

Oferujemy kilometry doświadczenia i niezawodność na każdej trasie
- 150 pojazdów, w tym autokary luksusowe (autokary 49-, 53- i 57-miejscowe, a także busy 19-miejscowe)
- stację obsługi autobusów
- dyspozytorów pracujący w systemie 24h
- mobilne pogotowie techniczne 24h (także za granicą)
- holownik 24h (na terenie Polski)

Dowozimy pracowników – na miejsce, na czas, na pewno
- codziennie realizujemy 80 kursów dla firm z Polski, USA, Japonii, Korei Południowej, Niemiec, Francji, Wielkiej Brytanii, Belgii czy Australii (m.in.: LG, Toyota, 3M, ZF, CEVA Logistics, WAGO)
- obsługujemy przewozy pracownicze w systemie 24/7/365
- oferujemy dedykowany zespół koordynatorów przypisany do firmy klienta
- zapewniamy pojazdy zastępcze i dodatkowe
- gwarantujemy wsparcie sprawdzonych podwykonawców przy zwiększonym obciążeniu lub transportach z dalszych rejonów
- oferujemy możliwość rozszerzenia usługi o obsługę wydarzeń firmowych

Jeśli rozważasz wynajem autokaru lub busa na potrzeby transportu zbiorowego - od komunikacji pasażerskiej, przez przewozy komercyjne i pracownicze, po turystykę krajową i zagraniczną - skontaktuj się z nami, aby uzyskać więcej informacji na temat potencjalnej współpracy (użyj przycisku w sekcji poniżej lub skontaktuj się z nami bezpośrednio).

Name: PAX Training
Description: Train, Test, and Certify your entire team to ensure they grasp their roles and responsibilities, encompassing best practices in customer service, safety, and defensive driving, all tailored to their specific functions within the passenger ground transportation industry. Our training courses are designed to elevate your team's performance, ensuring they are prepared to meet the diverse needs of your clients.

Name: Nombalais MOBILITE
Description:
Activité historique de Nombalais GROUPE, Nombalais MOBILITE vous offre des solutions de mobilité sur-mesure en France et à l’étranger.
Lignes régulières, lignes scolaires, transports urbains, transports périscolaires, transports occasionnels, location d’autocars avec conducteurs, location de minibus.

Nous couvrons la desserte de nombreux établissements scolaires sur le secteur de la Vendée et de la Loire Atlantique (St-Gilles-Croix-de-Vie, Aizenay, Palluau, Challans, Machecoul, Pornic, Bourgneuf).

Depuis 2014, nous assurons les lignes régulières « Gillo’Bus », transport en commun proposé par la Ville de St-Gilles-Croix-de-Vie, et « HilagoBus » pour la ville de St-Hilaire-de-Riez.

Nous proposons la location d’autocars avec conducteurs à destination de l’ensemble des pays de l’Union Européenne. Ce service peut aller jusqu’à la réalisation d’offres touristiques complètes en collaboration avec Nombalais EVASION au profit du monde éducatif, des associations, des clubs, des comités d’entreprise ...

Nous proposons la location de véhicules du minibus pour tous les déplacements touristiques ou sportifs, à la journée, week-end ou semaine.

La compétence de notre personnel et notre parc d’autocars en renouvellement permanent vous permettent de voyager l’esprit tranquille. Mécanicien, carrossier, chef d’atelier, agent d’exploitation scolaire/tourisme, conducteur scolaire/tourisme, responsable qualité, commercial. Une palette de métier à votre service pour vous garantir le maximum de sécurité.

Nombalais MOBILITE est engagé auprès de REUNIR (premier réseau des PME du transport routier de Voyageurs en France). Notre souhait : évoluer vers une mobilité en accord avec les préoccupations environnementales.

Nombalais MOBILITE, c’est une activité touristique : LES PETITS TRAINS DE VENDEE depuis 1993.

Name: GoFast Drive Taxi Moto
Description:
Nous sommes
GoFast Drive est une plateforme française spécialisée dans le transport de personnes, offrant des services en moto-VMDTR (Véhicule Motorisé à Deux ou Trois Roues) et en voiture-VTC. Fondée à Nice, où se trouve son siège social, l’entreprise est active en région Parisienne. Tous nos services respectent strictement la réglementation française en vigueur. 

Nos Services:
Nous proposons des solutions de transport adaptées aux défis de la mobilité urbaine moderne. Nos motos et scooters électriques facilitent les petits déplacements en ville, où la circulation dense est devenue une réalité quotidienne. 
Avec GoFast Drive, nous sommes convaincus que la moto reste le moyen de transport le plus rapide et le plus écologique pour naviguer dans les centres urbains. Avec l’arrivée des scooters électriques, nous participons activement à une révolution de la mobilité durable, permettant à nos clients de se déplacer rapidement tout en respectant l’environnement.

The Transport Made Simple Group is an independently owned collection of passenger transport businesses. Our brands include:
Central Connect - A high quality operator of local bus services, working in partnership with local authorities to provide communities with reliable and affordable public transport.
Simonds - With 96 years of history, Simonds delivers exceptional coach and minibus hire solutions as well as high quality local bus services across Norfolk and Suffolk. Simonds also offers an extensive programme of tours and day excursions.
And Flagfinders - From three strategically located depots, Flagfinders provides great value coach hire solutions in Essex and Suffolk. We are specialists in moving very large passenger groups, and our modern fleet of coaches and double deck buses allows us to offer a flexible and reliable transport option for groups working to a budget.

Step into comfort. Travel with distinction. Discover the Serb Co. standard.

Name: Met Boston Limo
Description:
With a 30-year legacy of excellence, Met Boston Limo has grown from a regional leader to a global force in luxury ground transportation. Our reach extends across continents, coordinating seamless transfers for Fortune 500 executives, managing complex roadshow logistics, and orchestrating transportation for international conventions with 1000+ attendees.

From our New England headquarters, we direct one of North America’s largest ground transportation networks, backed by a modern fleet over 1,500 vehicles and seasoned team of over 150+ reservationists worldwide. 

Whether you’re planning multi-city roadshows, coordinating convention shuttles, or managing corporate travel programs, we deliver consistent quality across every location.

Our expertise spans:
• Global roadshow logistics in major financial hubs
• International convention and conference transportation
• Corporate travel programs across multiple countries
• Executive transportation in 100+ cities worldwide

Partner with Met Boston Limo for transportation solutions that match your global ambitions. Connect with us to discuss your next project.

Name: White glove chauffeur service

White Glove Chauffeur Service is a multi award-winning VIP chauffeur service based on the Suffolk–Essex border, delivering luxury transport for corporate travellers, VIP clients, and premium events across London and the UK.

Name: Djoubo
Description:

Que vous voyagiez seul, en couple ou en famille, notre mission est de rendre chaque trajet simple, confortable et sans stress.

Pour plus d'informations : www.djoubo.eu

Name: Transportes Apoquindo
Description:
Transportes Apoquindo. es una empresa líder en el transporte ejecutivo con más de 38 años en el mercado. Nuestra flota, la más grande del país, está diseñada para ofrecer comodidad, seguridad y puntualidad a nuestros clientes. Name: Syndicat Mixte des Transports du Douaisis
Description: Créé en 1977, le SMTD a vu à la fois son territoire et ses compétences s’élargir, pour devenir aujourd’hui l’acteur majeur de la mobilité durable pour un territoire de plus de 220 000 habitants.

Name: Real Brasil - Transporte e Turismo
Description: Fundada em Janeiro de 1991, a Real Brasil é uma empresa familiar, no segmento de Transporte Coletivo Rodoviário de Passageiros sob regime de fretamento contínuo e eventual, utilizando uma frota de última geração e uma equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados, objetivando oferecer aos clientes, um serviço de qualidade, notoriamente reconhecido no mercado.

Name: Best Ride
Description:
Founded in 2020 with the mission to become the go-to rideshare app customers turn to when they want the lowest price at the quickest arrival time. 

What started off as an idea to help everyday Australians reduce their transportation costs has quickly escalated to over $1M in savings for our customers nationwide.

With thousands of active users per month we were recently recognised by the Daily Telegraph as 'One of the latest and best apps to use in Australia'. 

Building on the foundations of providing our customers with real-time data comparison and fast/easy service selection with security and privacy at its core, our vision is to achieve $1B in savings globally by 2030.

We aim to achieve this by making the app affordable and accessible for both users at an individual level and also partnering with businesses to significantly reduce their staff ground transportation costs while providing a low-cost, high-value employee benefit to all their staff.

Name: Autocorb
Description:
Garantizamos un servicio seguro, fiable y de calidad.

En Autocorb nos dedicamos al transporte de personas por carretera en sus ámbitos urbano, interurbano y discrecional desde 1922.

Nuestra empresa tiene la base en Corbera de Llobregat (Barcelona) y opera a nivel local, nacional e internacional, en dos áreas de actividad. Por una parte, Autocorb es empresa concesionaria de líneas regulares de transporte de pasajeros y, por otra, dispone de autocares y minibuses de alquiler.

Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer a nuestros clientes un transporte seguro, fiable y de calidad a un precio competitivo. Nuestra organización cuenta con la experiencia, los conocimientos, el equipo humano y los medios técnicos para satisfacer las expectativas cada vez más exigentes de nuestros clientes.

Name: LR Move
Description:
LR MOVE | Réinventons la mobilité pour tous

LR MOVE est une startup innovante spécialisée dans le transport adapté et l'accompagnement des personnes à mobilité réduite (PMR). Nous proposons une solution inclusive qui permet aux personnes en situation de handicap, aux seniors et aux patients nécessitant une assistance de se déplacer en toute sécurité, confort et autonomie.

 Transport accessible : Nos véhicules adaptés assurent des trajets sécurisés pour les déplacements quotidiens, médicaux, touristiques et de loisirs.
 Accompagnement sur mesure : Nos accompagnateurs de mobilité assistent nos clients à domicile, lors de rendez-vous médicaux, en voyage ou même pour des activités sociales (restaurants, sorties, événements).
 Engagement et impact : LR MOVE contribue à une société plus inclusive en facilitant l’accès aux services et en améliorant la qualité de vie des PMR.

 Basés principalement sur le Grand Tunis, nous pouvons étendre nos services à d’autres régions pour des missions spécifiques.

 Notre vision : Un monde où la mobilité ne représente plus un obstacle, mais une liberté pour tous.

 Rejoignez-nous dans cette mission !

Name: CETURB/ES - Companhia de Transportes Coletivos de Passageiros do Estado do Espírito Santo
Keolis Nord Val d'Oise
Description:
Situé dans la partie Nord-Est du Val-d'Oise, territoire du Haut Val d'Oise organise principalement la desserte en bus de 345 754 habitants répartis sur 52 communes.
Les communes du territoire sont rattachées à trois Communautés de Communes : 
La Communauté de Communes du Haut Val-d'Oise (CCHVO) pour les 8 communes situées au Nord-Ouest, la Communauté de Communes de la Vallée de l'Oise et des Trois Forêts (CCVO3F) pour les 8 communes situées au Centre-Ouest et la Communauté de Communes de Carnelle Pays-de-France (CCCPF) pour les 19 communes situées à l’Est, et plusieurs autres intercommunalités réparties au Sud du territoire.
Ce territoire compte 28 lignes de bus qui assurent des dessertes intra ou intercommunales, régulières et scolaires, et permettent de rejoindre :

De nombreux lieux d’intérêt tels que la zone d’activité de Persan, le centre commercial du Grand Val et l’Université de Cergy, 36 établissements scolaires dont l’Université de Cergy et plus de 35 gares du réseau (4 lignes RER A, B,C et D) et (3 lignes de Transilien H, J et L).

Name: Teletrans
Description:
Teletrans is a leading company in executive transportation that offers a high-quality service of chauffeur and limousines in Latin America and the main cities of the world.
We are specialists in corporate transfers for business people who need airport transfers, roadshows, groups and events transportation, executive transportation and chauffeured limousine services 24 hours a day, 7 days a week throughout the year.

Tout a commencé lors d'une rencontre stratégique entre Mouhamed, un chauffeur expérimenté de Dakar, et Moustapha, un entrepreneur visionnaire. Ensemble, ils ont identifié un besoin croissant d'excellence dans les déplacements, de la routine quotidienne aux voyages professionnels en passant par les excursions touristiques. 

𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐫𝐞 𝐇𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐢𝐫𝐞 :
C'est ainsi qu'est née l'idée de YECSI. Nous avons délibérément créé un réseau de VTC composé de véhicules récents, confortables et sécurisés, afin de répondre aux attentes internationales en matière de transport. Nous accordons une grande importance aux détails, offrant des commodités telles que la WIFI à bord et des rafraîchissements pour rendre chaque trajet à Dakar encore plus agréable. Nous nous engageons à maintenir des tarifs équitables, en particulier pour nos navettes aéroport fréquemment empruntées. 

𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞𝐬 :
En plus de nos services VTC, nous proposons des solutions de location de voitures avec ou sans chauffeur professionnel, entièrement adaptées à vos besoins, à Dakar et dans tout le Sénégal. 

𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐫𝐞 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 :
Chez YECSI, notre engagement est de rendre vos déplacements plus confortables et plus fluides. 
N'hésitez pas à nous contacter au +𝟮𝟮𝟭 𝟳𝟴 𝟱𝟯𝟲 𝟭𝟬 𝟰𝟬 pour obtenir des informations sur nos tarifs compétitifs et nos disponibilités. 

Nous sommes là pour vous aider à planifier votre prochain voyage en toute tranquillité d'esprit !

Após a lava-jato o setor inteiro teve que se reinventar e diversos competidores ficaram pelo caminho. 
Identificamos, então, a necessidade ainda existente no no Mercado de Óleo e Gás de que houvesse uma empresa com foco em praticidade e orientada ao cliente, com um atendimento simples, rápido e eficaz. 

Chegamos prezando pelas normas de segurança e custo-benefício ao contratante. 
 Ao longo dos anos e através de serviços bem trabalhados a empresa conseguiu se posicionar como uma agregadora de soluções ao mercado e mostrar diferenciação pelos seus serviços. 

 Ao decorrer dos anos a empresa expandiu-se no mercado e atualmente trabalha com o transporte executivo de pessoas para, principalmente, o mercado de Óleo e Gás.

Name: Macon Transportes S.A.
Description:
A MACON nasceu em meados (maio) de 2001, um projeto privado, através da união de empresários que investiram em autocarros dedicados ao transporte urbano de passageiros na capital do País (Luanda), como primeira Empresa privada neste segmento, para atender a necessidade das populações, que reclamavam por transportes públicos.

Nos primórdios da sua criação, a sua atividade, se confinou principalmente na província de Luanda, no serviço urbano de passageiro. A implantação dos seus serviços também se efetivou através da prestação de serviços de transportes personalizados, apoiando empresas do mercado (fretamento) e ainda alugueres de viaturas para vários fins.

Com o advento da paz, Angola entrou no período de reconstrução nacional, primando o executivo na reabilitação e construção das estradas nacionais e pontes, permitindo a circulação de pessoas e bens, então condicionada pelo fator conflito armado.

Acompanhando os novos ventos da paz, a MACON desencadeou sua primeira restruturação interna, redefinindo vários serviços e procurando fazer ligações interprovinciais, saindo da zona de conforto, preenchido pelo serviço urbano.

Com seu crescimento, a MACON abraçou a vertente de transporte intermunicipal e interprovincial, evoluindo para a sua internacionalização. 

A partir do ano de 2005, a MACON começa as suas primeiras rotas interprovinciais, ligando as províncias Luanda ao Cuanza Sul, Cuanza Sul a Benguela, Luanda a Benguela, Luanda ao Bengo, e vice-versa. Esse movimento de crescimento da empresa foi se expandindo até a cobertura das 17 províncias, à excepção de Luanda a Cabinda (18ª província), pela descontinuidade geográfica.

A MACON hoje, falando desde a sua implantação, atende os serviços urbanos de Luanda, intermunicipais na província de Cabinda, interprovinciais (na circulação e ligação entre as 17 províncias) e internacionalização – ligação terrestre, através das fronteiras, com Países Limítrofes/vizinhos, por agora, Namíbia e República Democrática do Congo.

Description:

Name: Arrowhead Transit
Description:
About Us
Mission: To provide affordable, safe, accessible public transportation and supports independent living and self-reliance.

Vision: Arrowhead Transit will reduce barriers to all people served while making connections with the communities we serve regarding healthcare, education, employment, recreational opportunities.


Arrowhead Transit, established in 1974, acts as the primary provider of public transportation in the Arrowhead Region of Minnesota. As the largest rural public transportation system in the state, we are committed to delivering reliable services to residents across 10 counties in Northeastern Minnesota: Aitkin, Itasca, Koochiching, St. Louis, Lake, Cook, Carlton, Pine, Chisago, and Isanti.

Our services cater to the diverse needs of our travelers, commuters, and community members. From scheduled services to our Volunteer Driver Program, we ensure convenient and accessible public transportation options for all. Our drivers undergo comprehensive training, covering defensive driving techniques.

At the core of our services is Dial-A-Ride, a flexible and personalized public transportation solution for those seeking adaptability in their commute. Unlike traditional routes, Dial-A-Ride offers inner-city public transportation with the flexibility you need, providing a quick and efficient journey tailored to your requirements.

Using Dial-A-Ride is straightforward. Call 1-800-862-0175, and our dispatchers will guide you through the process, gathering information about your location, desired destination, and preferred travel times.

Arrowhead Transit takes pride in its extensive coverage area, spanning 10 counties and covering a vast 20,525.74 square miles. To put it into perspective, that’s approximately seven times the size of the seven-county twin cities metro in Minnesota, making us the largest rural transportation service in the state and the second-largest in the country.

Arrowhead Transit is operated by Arrowhead Economic Opportunity Agency.

Name: The Flutter Express
Description:
The Flutter Express offers a convenient, round-trip 56-passenger motor coach bus service, equipped with an onboard lavatory, to both Boston and New York City on Tuesdays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays. We provide comfortable, stress-free, and affordable transportation for healthcare seekers, their family members, companions, and supportive community. 

Riders traveling for healthcare appointments may purchase a “Healthcare Seeker” ticket at a flat rate of $79.00. We also partner with local nonprofits to offer discounted or free rides. 

New York City Service
Departs from Yankee Trails in Rensselaer at 6:00 a.m., with additional pick-up stops at 6:30 a.m. in Albany and 7:15 a.m. in Catskill. Traveling directly to New York City's York Ave. & E. 70th St. and York Ave. & E. 68th St. in NYC's Lenox Hill neighborhood, near world-renowned healthcare destinations like Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center, NY-Presbyterian Weill Cornell Medical Center, Hospital for Special Surgery, and other specialized adult and pediatric centers.

Boston Service
Departs from Albany at 6:30 a.m. and Yankee Trails in Rensselaer at 7:00 a.m., traveling directly to Brookline Avenue & Jimmy Fund Way, in Boston’s Longwood Medical Area, stops along Brookline Avenue in front of Dana-Farber Cancer Institute and Boston Children’s Hospital, and many other top-tier medical facilities.

Each roundtrip ticket includes:

A bottle of water each way
A snack each way
One Flutter Kit to help make the journey more comfortable
Free Wifi, tray tables, leather seats, and more!

On your return from New York City or Boston, enjoy a complimentary movie or game, or simply sit back, relax, and rest on your way home.

To keep The Flutter Express sustainable and available, we welcome everyone who values kindness and community to ride with us to NYC and Boston. Because with every ticket purchased, you're not just reserving a seat, you’re helping someone in need reach the care that could change their life.
