Name: RRTHV
Description:
En 1881, peu après la promulgation de la loi sur le tramway, le Conseil général de la Haute-Vienne a évoqué l’établissement de lignes départementales.

La première évocation au Conseil général sur l’établissement de lignes départementales eut lieu au cours de la session de septembre 1881, peu après la promulgation de la loi sur les tramways. Le 1er octobre 1948, le Département fait connaître à la Compagnie sa décision de mettre en place la Régie Départementale des Transports de la Haute-Vienne (RDTHV), à compter du 1er janvier 1949, et de la suppression à cette même date des Chemins de fer départementaux de la Haute-Vienne (CDHV). Ainsi, aux tramways alors en service, succèdent le 28 février 1949 les autocars.

La loi pour la Nouvelle Organisation Territoriale de la République (NOTRe) du 7 Aout 2015 a confié de nouvelles compétences aux régions : c’est ainsi que le 1er janvier 2017, la RDTHV passe sous l’autorité de la région Nouvelle-Aquitaine pour l’organisation, dès 2017, des circuits scolaires. En 2017, c’est donc la fin de la RDTHV et le début de la RRTHV (Régie Régionale).

Name: JalesTur Transportes e Turismo
Description:
A JalesTur Transportes e Turismo é uma empresa especializada em serviços de fretamento contínuo, eventual e turismo, oferecendo soluções completas para o deslocamento seguro, confortável e eficiente de pessoas. Com uma frota moderna, processos rigorosos de manutenção e uma equipe treinada e qualificada, garantimos viagens tranquilas, pontuais e alinhadas às necessidades de cada parceiro. Nossa missão é unir produtividade e experiência, proporcionando transporte confiável para empresas, escolas, indústrias, eventos e roteiros turísticos.

Guiados pelo nosso slogan — “Produtividade que move, Excelência que Impressiona” — trabalhamos diariamente para superar expectativas por meio de inovação, responsabilidade e agilidade. Nosso objetivo é conectar pessoas e destinos com eficiência, segurança e cordialidade, construindo relações duradouras e baseadas na confiança.

Seja para deslocamentos corporativos, viagens personalizadas ou operações de fretamento de grande escala, a JalesTur é a parceira ideal para quem busca profissionalismo, organização e alto padrão de serviço.

Description:

Name: Free Enterprise
Description:
Free Enterprise is a family owned and operated, veteran-owned, group transportation provider. We handle your ride, so you can relax and enjoy the journey! 

Free Enterprise was founded in 1976 as an extension of our family transportation operation that has a longevity that is truly rare. We began our work in transportation in 1915, hauling mail for the United States Postal Service, and have been running continuous and uninterrupted service ever since 
( sodreltrucklines.com ). Sodrel Truck Lines also moves high-value freight. 

In addition to our motorcoach group charter operations, we also move students as a school bus transportation provider for an Indiana school district ( mystudenttransit.com ). 

The key to building a great company that stands the test of time, is to build and inspire a great team. At Free Enterprise our most prized asset has always been the members or our team. Every person at Free Enterprise plays an integral part in making sure that your experience is one that won't soon be forgotten. Each step of the way, we have you and your needs in mind.

Name: mob.e
Description:
mob.e is an innovative start-up established in 2023 in the province of Bergamo, Italy. The company aims to create an innovative hardware and software infrastructure for electric mobility in areas characterized by high tourist potential.

mob.e focusses on the large lakes in Lombardy, through the conception, installation and management of a series of multifunctional kiosks.e located near tourist centres for the fruition of various electric inter-modality and experiential tourism services.

In cooperation with a number of third-party service providers and the local and regional public administration, mob.e acts as an integrator for the management of shared fleets of electric cars, bikes, scooters and boats, as well as for the recharging of private electric cars.

Focusing on the tourism component of the target territories, mob.e also offers a series of ancillary products aimed at the use of tourist services that exploit the mobility offer, such as ad-hoc routes as well as proximity marketing for local tourism activities. 

The first project will be launched in spring 2024 in the Lake Iseo area, in collaboration with companies already active in the interconnection with the railway and airport infrastructures of the surroundings. 

At a later stage, mob.e aims to expand to other territories with similar characteristics and potential, starting with the large Lombardy basins of Garda, Como, and Maggiore.

Name: MagRev Hyperloop
Description:
We are the MagRev Hyperloop Team, a student-led research and development initiative at Middle East Technical University (METU) dedicated to advancing the future of high-speed ground transportation.

Founded by motivated engineering and science students and advised by Prof. Melik Dölen and Prof. Ulaş Yaman from METU’s Department of Mechanical Engineering, our mission is to design and test innovative Hyperloop technologies that can redefine sustainable mobility.

Our current work focuses on research, prototyping, and experimental testing in areas such as magnetic levitation, propulsion systems, structural design, and systems integration. Our long-term vision is to represent METU in major international competitions and contribute to the global Hyperloop ecosystem.

Beyond technical development, we aim to build collaborations with industry partners, sponsors, and research institutions to accelerate innovation and transform academic research into real-world applications.

 Mission: Develop and test Hyperloop technologies through multidisciplinary teamwork and research.
 Vision: Lead the advancement of sustainable, efficient, and safe transportation for the future.

If you are interested in supporting our journey, collaborating on R&D, or sponsoring our ongoing projects, we’d love to connect with you.

Name: EV-RENT.PL
Description:
Wszystko rozpoczęło się 5 lat temu, kiedy zakupiliśmy Tesle. Tesla była wyborem reprezentatywnym, oszczędnym i wpisywała się w nasze wartości. W swojej działalności pokonywaliśmy tysiące kilometrów każdego miesiąca. W 2017 roku pojechaliśmy do Estonii. Podczas podróży, spotkaliśmy się z ograniczeniem w infrastrukturze ładowania. Nagraliśmy o tym film, na nasz podróżniczo – lifestylowy kanał na YouTube o nazwie nieCODZIENNI, który wywołał duże zainteresowanie wśród widzów. Sami zauważyliśmy, że w Polsce nie ma żadnego kanału w temacie elektromobilności i brakuje miejsca, skąd można by uzyskać praktyczne informacje w tym zakresie. W odpowiedzi na to stworzyliśmy kanał o nazwie Daniel Grzyb, dedykowany tej tematyce. Od tamtego momentu nasze życie przewróciło się do góry nogami.

Jesteśmy związani z elektromobilnością zawodowo i z pasji. Przekazujemy swoją wiedzę i doświadczenie. Przejechaliśmy już pół miliona elektrycznych kilometrów, nagraliśmy ponad 700 filmów na YouTube, zorganizowaliśmy wiele szkoleń, zlotów, eventów. Uczymy elektromobilności, pokazujemy, jak użytkować na co dzień samochody elektryczne i nimi podróżować. Promujemy i rozwijamy elektromobilność w naszym kraju.

Z miłości do EV, powstało EV RENT.
EV RENT to kolejna forma promowania samochodów elektrycznych przez nas. To nie jest zwykła wypożyczalnia. To miejsce tworzone z pasją prosto z serca. Chcemy jeszcze bardziej zarażać samochodami elektrycznymi. Oferujemy przejażdżki testowe z prezentacją obsługi Tesli, vouchery na przejażdżki w prezencie, wynajmy na doby, wozimy klientów Teslami do ślubu i na imprezy okolicznościowe, pomagamy w serwisie i transporcie samochodów, szkolimy, organizujemy eventy i doradzamy.

Kto wie, może elektromobilność udzieli się również Tobie? Jesteśmy gotowi także Ciebie nią zaczarować. Twórzmy razem wyjątkowe elektromobile społeczeństwo i rozprzestrzeniajmy elektromobilność dalej i dalej.

Skontaktuj się z nami, gwarantujemy kosmiczne, elektryczne wrażenia i wiele więcej!

As the only Finnish member of the Global Passenger Network (GPN), we meet strict international standards for safety, fleet quality, and customer care. Through GPN’s global network, we deliver seamless group travel solutions not only in Finland, but across Europe and beyond.

From sports teams and corporate events to cultural trips and international tours, our mission remains simple:
Ready when you are. Let’s travel better - together.

We offer a range of specialized services, including corporate travel for business executives, airport transfers for a smooth and punctual arrival, diplomatic and media transportation for high-security needs, and event and red-carpet chauffeur services for exclusive occasions. Additionally, we provide luxury city tours and private chauffeur services, delivering tailored travel solutions for leisure and business clients alike.

Experience world-class ground transportation with our global services, offering seamless and luxurious transportation solutions in the most sought-after destinations. Name: relaxcar
Description:
relaxcar, seit 2022 unter diesem Namen bekannt, hat seine Wurzeln im Jahr 1985, als das Unternehmen ursprünglich als Taxi Richter gegründet wurde. Seit der Gründung befindet sich das Unternehmen in Familienbesitz und wird bis heute als inhabergeführter Betrieb geführt. Diese langjährige Kontinuität und persönliche Leitung haben maßgeblich dazu beigetragen, relaxcar zu einem etablierten und vertrauenswürdigen Akteur in der Transportbranche zu machen.
Im Laufe der Jahre hat sich Relaxcar zunehmend auf die Krankenbeförderung spezialisiert. Wir bieten umfassende Transportlösungen für liegende, sitzende und rollstuhlgebundene Patienten an. Zu unseren Leistungen gehören Krankenfahrten, Dialysefahrten, Einweisungen sowie Fahrten zu Bestrahlungen. Unsere Vertragspartner sind vor allem Krankenhäuser und Behinderteneinrichtungen, mit denen wir eng zusammenarbeiten, um den bestmöglichen Service zu gewährleisten.
Neben der Krankenbeförderung ist relaxcar auch im Personennahverkehr tätig und übernimmt Spezialaufträge wie den Transport von medizinisch wichtigen Blutproben. Darüber hinaus organisieren wir VIP-Transporte für Veranstaltungen, Hochzeiten und Familienfeiern. Unser Service erstreckt sich auch auf den Schienenersatzverkehr sowie Taxifahrten auf Bestellung.
Mit unserer breiten Palette an Dienstleistungen und unserer langjährigen Erfahrung gehören wir zu den Marktführern in der Region. Jedes Anliegen unserer Kunden wird sorgfältig geplant und individuell betreut, um höchste Zufriedenheit zu gewährleisten. relaxcar steht für Zuverlässigkeit, Sicherheit und einen persönlichen Service, der sich stets an den Bedürfnissen unserer Kunden orientiert.

Name: Riverside Travel (Dorset) Limited
Description:
Riverside Travel (Dorset) Limited is a family run business based in Blandford Forum, Dorset. Our fleet comprises of a variety of taxis & minibuses for hire with a driver, with seating capacity for up to 16 passengers. Our professional and friendly drivers will ensure that you have a safe and comfortable journey.

Since the company was formed in 1994, it has built a strong relationship with local schools, including Bryanston school, Archbishop Wake and Pimperne Primary as well as the general public. The company works closely with Dorset Council, providing school transport on a daily basis for the special educational needs department and adult social care. As well as the day to day school transport, we operate a regular minibus services for Bryanston School staff transporting them to & from work and provide regular taxis for the students. 

In March 2017, we added our first wheelchair accessible vehicle to the fleet. Moving forward, we have added numerous wheelchair accessible vehicles to our fleet and now ensure that a minimum of 25% of our fleet is wheelchair accessible.  In August 2021, Riverside Travel became AFB Bournemouth's official disabled transport provider.

In recent years, we have worked with Crossways Travel providing feeder transport for their coach trips.

Today, we have a fleet of over 40 vehicles available for all occasions.
 
All of our taxis and minibuses are regularly tested and maintained to the highest standard, by MVS Blandford Ltd, to ensure safety and comfort.
 
Although, we are based in Blandford Forum, we serve surrounding towns and villages in Dorset such as Shaftesbury, Gillingham, Sturminster Newton and many more.

Description:

To maintain a secure and equitable environment, Beemo employs Web 3.0 technology, granting network participants a substantial role in governance decisions.
Our framework has its roots in five years of dedicated research into the equitable integration of autonomous vehicles. At Beemo, we firmly believe that the anticipated advantages of autonomous vehicles can be realised today. We are dedicated to charting a course toward more sustainable and equitable solutions that foster and empower local communities.
Our team includes professionals in planning, design, and engineering and has vast experience in distributed protocols, urban planning, community engagement, and the development of crowdsourced infrastructure.

Our intention is to work with you and create new collaborations.

•	Features of our company; As Ramazan Transport, we have 50 closed box and refrigerated vehicles. All our vehicles have ADR with their license and installations. Our compartmented trailers have a temperature control between +25 and -25 degrees and 2 different degrees separately and have a dangerous load carrying capacity. In every service we provide, we use the 'seyir' application as a logistic load tracking system and we are integrated with ‘project44’.

•	Activities of our company; As Ramazan Transport, we provide refrigerated, closed body and partial transportation services in the field of international transportation and transportation as import and export. We carry out transit loads from Europe to Asia and from Asia to Europe. The European countries where we operate; Slovakia, Czech Republic, Poland, Lithuania, Latvia, Estonia, Finland, Sweden, Denmark, Germany, Netherlands, Belgium, France, England, Switzerland, Austria, Hungary, Spain and 3rd World countries; Azerbaijan, Georgia, Armenia, Iran, Kazakhstan, Turkmenistan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan.

Our company, which has been providing international transportation services for over 20 years, has taken its place in the transportation sector with its respected and reliable image in the first years of its establishment. It is ready to provide the best service for all your export and import transportation needs with its experienced staff, investments and implemented transportation system. Name: UPRIDES
Description:
Uprides is not just another ride-hailing platform  it’s a mobility ecosystem designed to empower drivers, benefit riders, and connect communities.
At the heart of Upides is fairness and opportunity. With a 0% commission model, drivers keep what they earn, gaining financial independence and motivation to deliver better service. Riders, in turn, enjoy more affordable fares and a transparent experience that values trust and accessibility.
But Uprides goes beyond transportation. It’s built to connect people, culture, and learning. Through our integrated ecosystem, users can discover training centers, career growth opportunities, and even explore historical and cultural landmarks during their journeys  turning every ride into a meaningful experience.
Uprides aims to create a sustainable, community-driven future where technology serves people, not the other way around. We believe mobility should empower not exploit. That’s why we’re building a platform where everyone wins: drivers earn more, customers pay less, and communities grow stronger together.
Uprides isn’t just moving people. we’re moving purpose, progress, and possibility  

#FairRidesForAll #MobilityForEveryone #EarnMoreDriveFree #RideWithPurpose

Description:
Tíz éve a külföldre utazó magyarok szolgálatában – a Homan Transport Kft. kisbuszai naponta közlekednek Ausztria, Németország, Svájc, Hollandia, Belgium és Luxemburg egész területén, továbbá Franciaország és Csehország egyes útvonalain. Háztól házig telekocsi szolgáltatásunk, mely akár nehezen megközelíthető, vidéki címekre is igénybe vehető, védjegyünkké vált a nemzetközi személyszállítás piacán.

Kiváló sofőreink mellett erős irodai háttércsapat is dolgozik a gördülékeny utazási élmény megteremtéséért: utasaink számára a hét minden napján, reggeltől estig elérhetőek vagyunk, a felmerülő igényeket rugalmasan kezeljük, és nagy hangsúlyt fektetünk az időben történő, alapos tájékoztatásra. 

Szolgáltatásaink között nemzetközi csomagküldést, és a kisállattal való utazás lehetőségét is biztosítjuk – a maradéktalan kényelem érdekében ugyancsak háztól házig szállítással.

Name: Tomorrow Mobility Solutions
Description:
Implementing Automated Public Transport solutions can be complex. To succeed, you need focused, unbiased expertise to navigate the technical, economic, and operational realities.
Tomorrow Mobility Solutions is a specialized, independent consultancy that accelerates the adoption of Automated Public Transport. We are the expert partner for Public Transport Operators, Public Transport Authorities, and City Governments, turning ambitious plans into operational reality.

Our Unparalleled Expertise
Our exclusive focus on this niche provides expertise you won't find at a generalist firm. We offer deep, vendor-neutral guidance built on hands-on experience from over 25 automated mobility projects across Europe and Asia.
Founded by Aleksi Tepponen (M.Sc. Automotive Engineering), our strategies are proven in the real world, from deploying AVs above the Arctic Circle in Norway (-20°C) to projects in Japan (+40°C). We bridge the gap between innovative technology and real-world application, helping you successfully launch deployments and avoid common problems.

Our Mission
We envision a future where public transport is so efficient and user-friendly that it becomes the natural choice over private cars. Our mission is to integrate Automated Vehicles into public transport systems to make this vision a reality.

Schedule Your Consultation
Ready to move from vision to action? Visit our website to schedule your initial consultation and build a roadmap for your deployment.
https://tomorrowmobilitysolutions.com/contact-us

Name: Asia Car Service
Description:
Asia Car Service specializes in managed ground transportation in Asia.  Based in Hong Kong, we locally operate in over 150 cities across 25 countries and regions in Asia, with professional chauffeur teams trained to our strict SLAs and using our proprietary mobile application.  Operating since 2005, ACS combines geographic scope, localized expertise and dispatch management, and integrated technology features to deliver industry-leading value to our clients.  

Our business clientele includes multinational corporations, SMEs, and many of the largest brands in limousine transportation, travel management, private aviation, executive security, and event management.   

We enable our clients to safely streamline and scale their Asia transportation operations. In a region known for ground travel instability and inflexible business practices, ACS stands apart.  Operationally, ACS is committed to reliability, seamless ease of use, helpful communication, and uniform high-quality service tailored to each client's specifications. At the same time our technology platforms and integrated software solutions offer exceptional user interface for near-demand reservation, booking management, ride tracking, and billing.

Our services are fully supported by a locally based 24hr central booking and administration office, staffed with highly trained fluent English transportation specialists. We offer a full suite of ancillary services including airport fast-track, airport lounge, executive security, private language assistants, corporate event management, and VIP concierge services.

Name: Gluebus
Description:
Gluebus is making (drunk) driving obsolete.

Gluebus is a mobility on demand service that allows our customer to book the bus ticket completely online. We offer the lowest price on the market thanks to our algorithm that pools the requests and defines the bus journeys based on the tickets sold, maximizing the bus saturation and, thus minimizing the CPO.

By relying on third-party partners the supply is much easier to find and scale, thanks to our algorithm we provide an immediate feedback to the customer regarding the availability of the journey and its cost, thanks to our cost effective mobility on-demand business model we cast 50% of all our competitors and we offer to our events organizers partners a fast, flexible and hassle free way to propose a service the their customer, boosting also their revenues (less people drive, more people consume).

Name: Flota Sugamuxi S.A.
Description:
Con más de 50 años de experiencia en el sector de transporte terrestre, Flota Sugamuxi S.A. se ha consolidado como una empresa líder en conectar regiones y brindar soluciones de movilidad confiables en Colombia. Fundada en 1965, nuestra misión ha sido garantizar un servicio de calidad, seguridad y confort para pasajeros en rutas intermunicipales, escolares y empresariales.

Somos parte del Grupo Libertadores, un referente en innovación tecnológica y excelencia en transporte. Esto nos permite ofrecer una flota moderna, diseñada para garantizar la seguridad y comodidad de nuestros usuarios en cada trayecto.

Nuestro compromiso no solo se enfoca en la movilidad eficiente, sino también en el desarrollo sostenible y la seguridad vial. Gracias a un equipo humano altamente capacitado, trabajamos día a día para superar las expectativas de nuestros clientes y contribuir al progreso económico y social de las comunidades que conectamos.

¿Qué nos hace diferentes?
 Más de cinco décadas de trayectoria ininterrumpida en el sector.
 Una flota moderna y segura, con estándares que cumplen las más altas normativas.
 Especialización en servicios de transporte intermunicipal, escolar y empresarial.
 Atención personalizada y un enfoque centrado en el cliente.
 Compromiso con la sostenibilidad y el respeto por el medio ambiente.

Cobertura:
Operamos en regiones clave como Boyacá, Casanare, Santander, Meta, Norte de Santander, Arauca y Bogotá D.C., conectando ciudades, municipios y destinos turísticos con un servicio seguro y eficiente.

Nuestro propósito:
Proveer soluciones de transporte innovadoras y responsables, que mejoren la experiencia del usuario y contribuyan al bienestar de la sociedad colombiana.

Confía en nosotros para tus viajes.
En Flota Sugamuxi S.A., la seguridad, la calidad y la satisfacción de nuestros pasajeros son nuestra prioridad. Estamos listos para llevarte donde necesites!

Name: VasEnBus
Description:
*VasEnBus está inactiva desde mayo de 2025. 

VasEnBus es una startup que ofrece soluciones tecnológicas de movilidad y servicios de transporte a empresas, colegios y universidades, ayuntamientos y particulares. 

Con nuestro software, impulsado por algoritmos, creamos y optimizamos rutas fijas y directas para ofrecer una alternativa sostenible y eficiente de movilidad, especialmente en trayectos donde el transporte público es ineficiente o inexistente (trayectos intermunicipales en áreas metropolitanas y rurales).

Nos enfocamos en movilidad recurrente, por motivos de trabajo o estudios, y facilitamos el uso compartido de los turismos (VTC y Taxi) y autobuses entre varias empresas y particulares para minimizar costes, emisiones y crear trayectos directos.  

Los pasajeros reservan sus viajes desde la aplicación, y las organizaciones tienen acceso a dashboards e informes en tiempo real, para ver el impacto de la movilidad compartida.

Creemos en un futuro con menos tráfico, menos emisiones, menos tiempo en el transporte y más calidad de vida.

By early 1990’s CEC expanded operations into the wedding car business, we started off with two vehicles and progressed to 10 vehicles, at this point in time we were the Number -1 suppliers of wedding transport to the whole of Essex.

As the years went on we then progressed into mini cabs and started off with radio controls and only 5 drivers from a small office in Newbury Park. We are now one of the most reputed companies in our area and work with many authorities and corporate clients as well as our normal day to day customers taking mini cabs from A To B.
The business has come a long way and has continued to grow its operations further into all aspects of transport such as mini buses, couriers and wheel chair accessible vehicles and chauffeur services.

Name: YVR Skylynx
Description:
Launching its operations in 2018, YVR Skylynx is British Columbia’s leading provider of intercity shuttle bus transportation between Downtown Vancouver, Vancouver Airport, Squamish and Whistler. As a proud partner of the YVR Vancouver International Airport, YVR Skylynx provides a safe, affordable and premium travel experience serving more than 150,000+ passengers per annum. The Skylynx Whistler shuttle bus service is the only brand that shares the same iconic title as the YVR Vancouver International Airport.       

The Skylynx fleet of private motor coach buses come equipped with free Wi-Fi, on-board charging ports and a full-service washroom to ensure all our passengers stay connected and have an enjoyable travel experience. As always, premium reclining seats with fitted footrests and extra leg room are standard amenities that our Skylynx travelers appreciate as our professional drivers chauffeur them to their destination on the scenic Sea-to-Ski Highway.     

Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, YVR Skylynx shares a strong commitment in maintaining industry-leading standards to provide the highest levels of safety, customer service and quality transportation. Come talk to our friendly staff at our Skylynx Kiosk located at the International Arrivals of the Vancouver Airport or call us at our dedicated Call Centre at +1 (604) 326-1616.  

With up to 16 departures a day between Vancouver and Whistler, you are bound to find your next trip to Whistler with YVR Skylynx!

Name: HAI VAN GROUP
Description:
Thành lập năm 1994, sau hơn 2 thập kỷ, hiện Hải Vân đã trở thành một trong những công ty vận tải hành khách hàng đầu tại Việt Nam ở phân khúc cao cấp, với hơn 1.000 nhân viên. Hải Vân có trụ sở chính tại Hà Nội và mạng lưới cung cấp dịch vụ rộng khắp cả nước.Với sứ mệnh cung cấp dịch vụ vận tải đẳng cấp, tử tế và đáng tin cậy cho mọi khách hàng, chúng tôi không chỉ thường xuyên cập nhật xu hướng vận tải mới nhất trên thế giới để ứng dụng, cho ra đời những sản phẩm, dịch vụ độc đáo, mà còn luôn đầu tư nghiên cứu, thấu hiểu để đáp ứng tốt nhất mọi nhu cầu của mọi khách hàng. Với cam kết mạnh mẽ đảm bảo an toàn chất lượng, chúng tôi luôn định kỳ chăm sóc, bảo dưỡng các phương tiện vận tải theo tiêu chuẩn nghiêm ngặt. Đội ngũ lái xe của Hải Vân – những người bạn đường tin cậy và bảo vệ mọi khách hàng đều là những tài xế có kinh nghiệm, được chúng tôi tuyển chọn cẩn trọng và trải qua quá trình đào tạo bài bản, chuẩn mực. Nhằm nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ hơn nữa và kịp thời điều chỉnh khi không phù hợp, Hải Vân đã tự xây dựng hệ thống thu nhận phản hồi của khách hàng để hoàn thiện hơn nữa dịch vụ của chúng tôi.
Với Hải Vân, hạnh phúc là được phục vụ khách hàng mọi lúc, mọi nơi, mọi yêu cầu một cách hoàn hảo. Chúng tôi mời bạn trải nghiệm dịch vụ đặc biệt của Hải Vân!

Name: First Class Limousine Service Poland
Description:
First Class-Limousine Service to firma specjalizująca się w zapewnianiu luksusowego transportu dla swoich klientów. Nasza firma oferuje szeroki wybór pojazdów, w tym limuzyny, samochody luksusowe i autobusy, które mogą pomieścić zarówno pojedyncze osoby, jak i duże grupy.

Nasze usługi transportowe są idealne dla wszelkiego rodzaju wydarzeń, takich jak wesela, uroczystości rodzinne, biznesowe spotkania, podróże lotniskowe i wiele innych. Nasza flota jest dobrze utrzymana i zawsze przygotowana, aby zapewnić naszym klientom maksymalny komfort i bezpieczeństwo podczas podróży.

Nasi kierowcy są wykwalifikowani i doświadczeni w prowadzeniu luksusowych pojazdów, zapewniając naszym klientom nie tylko wygodne, ale również bezpieczne przejazdy. Nasza firma jest również zobowiązana do zapewnienia najwyższej jakości obsługi klienta, aby zapewnić naszym klientom niesamowite doświadczenie podróżowania.

W First Class-Limousine Service wiemy, że każdy klient jest wyjątkowy, dlatego też oferujemy dostosowane do indywidualnych potrzeb i preferencji rozwiązania transportowe. Nasza firma jest po to, aby zapewnić naszym klientom najwyższy poziom luksusu, wygody i bezpieczeństwa podczas podróży.

Name: Tisdale Bus Lines
Description:
Founded in 1965 by the visionary Joe Adamo, Tisdale Bus Lines has been more than just a transportation company; it's been a promise – a commitment to facilitating memorable journeys while ensuring your utmost safety and satisfaction. Over the years, our legacy has been built on the trust of countless travelers who chose us for our unwavering dedication to excellence.

Our modern fleet, composed of state-of-the-art 56-passenger MCI motorcoaches and nimble 24-passenger Blue Bird mini-buses, is designed to take you where you need to go while minimizing our ecological footprint. Every vehicle is a testament to our pledge to go beyond mere regulatory requirements, mirroring our ethos of always delivering more than expected.

Whether you're a mining team heading to a remote site, a sports team en route to your next victory, students on an educational trip, or a joyful wedding party looking forward to the big day, we cater to your unique transportation needs. With operational bases in South Porcupine, Sudbury, and North Bay, we are always within reach, ensuring that Northern Ontario remains connected and accessible.

At the heart of our success lies our unparalleled team. Every member, from our expert drivers to our responsive support staff, is dedicated to making your journey smooth, comfortable, and utterly unforgettable. Our commitment to customer satisfaction isn't just a business objective; it's a personal promise from all of us at Tisdale Bus Lines.

Choose Tisdale for your next trip. Let's journey together, confidently.

Name: Seturn
Description:
O sindicato representa legalmente as empresas de transporte coletivo urbano de passageiros da cidade e atua na fiscalização e acompanhamento das empresas associadas. Conta com uma sede administrativa, pontos de atendimento fixos e uma unidade móvel que circula por diferentes locais da cidade, oferecendo serviços aos usuários.
 Além disso, há uma ampla rede de pontos de venda e recarga espalhados pela cidade, facilitando o acesso de quem utiliza o sistema de bilhetagem eletrônica.
 Com o cartão eletrônico, o usuário paga menos na tarifa e ainda pode realizar integrações temporais entre as linhas com apenas uma passagem. É uma opção mais segura, prática e higiênica, com tecnologia de pagamento por aproximação e uso individual.
 O cartão está disponível em três modalidades:
Estudantil (para alunos do ensino infantil ao superior)
Vale-Transporte (para trabalhadores)
Cidadão (para o público em geral)

Name: Shuttle Buses
Description:
We are one of the largest employers in the local area with a workforce of over 60 employees. Established in 1990 with the aim of providing reliable, high-quality bus and coach services throughout Ayrshire, we have since then grown to a fleet of over 50 vehicles. Our well-trained and motivated drivers are all vetted through Disclosure Scotland and cleared to work with both young and vulnerable people.

We operate many local services within Ayrshire, some are operated commercially and some are subsidised by Strathclyde Partnership for Transport. We also operate seven MyBus services for elderly and disabled people, as well as those without a local bus service, throughout Ayrshire and Renfrewshire.

As well as local bus services we also offer private coach hire through our subsidiary Shuttle Coaches. We can provide many different sizes and types of buses and coaches for hire, ranging from 16 to 70 seaters. All coaches are fitted with seat-belts and we can provide additional facilities such as toilets, air-conditioning and wheelchair access on certain vehicles within our fleet.

A large number of our service buses are built in Britain by Optare; our quality coaches are mainly Volvo and Mercedes models. Reliability is further enhanced by our own fully-equipped workshop where we carry out all our own maintenance.

Name: LPP d.o.o.
Description:
The most important task of the public company Ljubljanski potniški promet d.o.o. is to provide safe, reliable and smooth-running public transport in the area of the entire City Municipality of Ljubljana and sixteen suburban municipalities.

Our wish and goal is to make sure that buses become the best alternative to private cars since in this way we can remove private vehicles from urban areas to ensure a healthy environment for future generations.

To provide comfortable, safe and fast transport to Ljubljana’s citizens as well as those living in the suburban municipalities who travel to the city to work or school every day, it is necessary to work as a team and in coordination: this is the daily motto of the almost 1,000 employees of our company.

By purchasing new, modern, air-conditioned and environment- and disabled-friendly buses, along with regular training of the drivers, optimisation of the schedules and many other projects and measures for sustainable mobility, we provide public transport services of increasing quality. Consequently, a growing number of people are deliberately opting for public transport in Ljubljana and its surroundings.

Osnovna delatnost preduzeća je prevoz putnika u drumskom saobraćaju, i to : međunarodni prevoz; međumesni prevoz na teritoriji Srbije; prigradski prevoz na teritoriji grada Beograda ; lokalni prevoz na teritoriji Gradske opštine Lazarevac, opština Ljubovija i Mali Zvornik. Turistička agencija SP „Lastra“ d.o.o. Lazarevac osnovana je sa ciljem da na moderan i efikasan način organizuje Vaša putovanja na najzanimljivije turističke destinacije.

Name: Digital Roadways Group
Description:
Digital Roadways Group (DRG) helps asset owners to digitize drop-off and pick-up zones - to improve traveler experience, reduce congestion, and open new revenue opportunities. 

About Us

At the intersection of urban planning and technology, we're rethinking one of the city's most valuable and underutilized assets: the curb. In today’s bustling cities, the curb is more than just a place to park. It's a dynamic hub for deliveries, public transit, and new mobility options like scooters and bike shares. As demand for this limited space grows, so does the challenge of managing it efficiently and equitably.
Our mission is to transform city curbs from a source of congestion and confusion into a streamlined, intelligent network that works for everyone. We partner with cities to develop and implement data-driven solutions that improve safety, reduce traffic, and support local economies.

How We Do It

We use a blend of cutting-edge technology and deep urban planning expertise to bring clarity and control to the curb. Our platform provides real-time data on curb usage, helping city planners make informed decisions. We digitize complex parking rules and regulations, creating a transparent and flexible system that can adapt to the city’s evolving needs. From managing commercial loading zones to optimizing bus routes and ride-share pick-ups, our solutions are designed to make urban life smoother and more sustainable.

Our Vision

We envision a future where the curb is an intelligent, integrated part of the city's infrastructure—a space that moves seamlessly with the rhythm of urban life. By working together, we can create safer streets, cleaner air, and more vibrant communities. We believe that a smarter curb leads to a smarter city.

Name: Consórcio TransOeste
Description:
O Consórcio TransOeste é formado por empresas de transporte coletivo que operam diariamente em Divinópolis com um único propósito: fazer a cidade se mover.

Todos os dias, de madrugada até a noite, nossos ônibus estão nas ruas levando trabalhadores, estudantes, idosos, pessoas com deficiência e famílias inteiras para onde precisam ir. Por trás de cada viagem, existe gente de verdade trabalhando, planejando rotas, cuidando da frota, garantindo segurança e tentando fazer o melhor possível dentro da realidade do transporte público.

Sabemos que o transporte coletivo enfrenta desafios. Custos altos, demanda instável e expectativas legítimas da população fazem parte do dia a dia. Ainda assim, seguimos firmes, buscando equilíbrio, melhorias contínuas e diálogo aberto com o poder público e com a sociedade.

Acreditamos que transporte não é só ônibus na rua. É acesso à cidade, é oportunidade, é dignidade.

O TransOeste existe para servir Divinópolis, com responsabilidade, transparência e compromisso com quem depende do transporte público todos os dias.

Name: The Road Operators' Safety Council
Description:
The Road Operators Safety Council (ROSCO) is an organisation set out by bus & coach companies, trade unions and other industry bodies to promote and encourage UK road safety amongst its patrons and the general public. 

2025 marks the 70th anniversary of the launch of the safe driving awards which have been given to eligible bus and coach drivers since 1955. Founded by associations representing road transport employers and by trade unions representing employees. The ROSCO Safe Driving Awards scheme began in 1955 and superseded a previously existing scheme. A Conductors’ Award of Merit scheme was also started, which by 1960 had over 50,000 entrants.

The association has set out to support schemes within organisations that reward safe driving amongst the drivers and employers it represents. ROSCO’s goal is to promote road safety through safe driving.

Name: Somos Buses Jac
Description:
Nacida en la IX región, Buses Jac lleva más de 60 años uniendo el corazón del sur de Chile. Desde nuestros humildes inicios en Carahue hasta nuestra actual red que abarca desde la zona lacustre hasta Santiago, nuestra esencia sureña se mantiene intacta.

Nuestra misión va más allá del transporte; somos tejedores de historias, uniendo familias y comunidades. Cada viaje es una oportunidad para crear conexiones significativas, ya sea un estudiante regresando a casa o un turista descubriendo las maravillas del sur.

La preocupación por nuestros pasajeros es el motor que nos impulsa. Ofrecemos un servicio personalizado, accesible y seguro, entendiendo que cada viajero tiene una historia única.

En Buses Jac, no solo te llevamos a tu destino; te brindamos una experiencia donde el espíritu del sur de Chile se siente en cada kilómetro. Únete a nuestro viaje hacia un futuro donde la conexión humana y el progreso van de la mano, siempre con la calidez del sur en el corazón.

Name: GRUPO GARRIDO
Description:
El Grupo Garrido está conformado por distintas sociedades, intentando dar el servicio integral en el sector del taxi y demás.
 
El inicio se gesta con la compra de la primera licencia del Fundador en el año 1982.

A partir de esa fecha hasta hoy, hemos incorporado más de 10 compañias para dar el mayor servicio a nuestros clientes.
  
El grupo ronda, el vertijinoso número de los 200 empleados, que cada dia dan más fuerza y responsabilidad a la directiva para empujar más fuerte en el sector.
 
El grupo está gestionado  por la misma familia propietaria. Aspecto fundamental es la figura del hijo del fundador y persona que ya sigue los pasos de su padre en la dirección y gestión del grupo, aspecto no resuelto en la mayoría de empresas del sector. Por mentalidad ha incorporado nuevas tecnologías y aplica procesos mucho más automatizados que revierten en la generación de más rendimiento para el grupo, sin olvidar el espíritu de sacrificio y capacidad de trabajo heredados de su padre.
 
El objetivo actual del grupo es consolidar el importante crecimiento realizado en los últimos tres años. La política de recorte de gastos, optimizando los recursos del grupo y aplicando una política de servicio integral desde la obtención del carné de taxista, hasta proporcionar trabajo de conductor o facilitar la compra de una licencia y la posterior reparación de los vehículos, proporciona un control total del negocio. 
 
En condición de grupo dedicado en exclusiva al sector del taxi desde hace más de 30 años y con el fondo de comercio que esto conlleva, tenemos en estos momentos en nómina a más de 190 personas, gozamos de la confianza de nuestros proveedores de negocio y financieros, tenemos unas estrechas relaciones con empresas del sector, colaboramos con la Administración, y tenemos la ilusión y capacidad de mantenernos en una posición de liderazgo en el mercado a nivel de empresas del sector en España.

Sendo assim, todas as nossas publicações próprias acompanham um comentário crítico, de forma a proporcionar um bom entendimento por parte do leitor.

Somos totalmente apartidários, porém parciais quando se trata em defender melhores condições no planejamento urbano. Além disso, a Plamurb traduz notícias relevantes de alguns dos mais importantes jornais do planeta.

Defendemos sistemas sobre trilhos, trólebus, ciclovias, faixas e corredores para ônibus, melhores condições nas calçadas, acessibilidade plena, energias renováveis e menos poluidoras, um saneamento básico universal e a redução do espaço dos carros nas ruas. Além disso, fugimos do senso comum ao defender nosso ponto de vista e repudiamos a falácia do “privatiza tudo”, como a única saída para a melhoria dos serviços abordados pela página. Isso não existe.

Name: ARTIST Interreg Europe Project
Description: Sustainable mobility and public art, often undervalued and underfunded, can yield significant benefits when strategically combined. The ARTIST project aims to elevate public transport’s status and active mobility presence by integrating branding, design, and art. This approach leverages local assets, such as grassroots organizations and artists, to enrich public spaces and foster community pride. By investing in public art alongside public transport and active mobility, the project underscores the value of both enhancing commuter experiences and encouraging broader public transport use. ARTIST will share insights from creative transport experiments, showcase successful practices, and advocate for a community-centric approach to public transport and active mobility improvements. Activities include analyzing regional conditions, identifying best practices, and incorporating arts into the design of stations, vehicles, and routes. Partners will organize seminars, study visits, and local stakeholder meetings to present progress and gather feedback. The project will culminate in improved policy instruments supporting art in public transport and active mobility, with a joint policy report outlining lessons learned and recommendations for future implementation. The ultimate goals are to uplift sustainable mobility, reduce CO2 emissions, and utilize the diverse experiences of consortium partners from various regions at different stages of sustainable mobility implementation.

Name: Compagnie Sévigné
Description:
Entreprise familiale de transport de voyageur crée en 1976 par Joseph Calliari et dirigée, aujourd’hui, par sa fille Catherine Calliari. 

Compagnie Sévigné possède une flotte de 32 véhicules géolocalisés, de 1 à 63 places, allant du véhicule scolaire au grand tourisme, adaptés aux : 
- Transport scolaire (Public, Privée, IME)
- Navette d’entreprise
- Transport conventionné CPAM
- City-tours
- Transfert gare / aéroport 
- Transport de personne à mobilité réduite (jusqu'à 5 fauteuils roulants)
- Voyage toute distance
- Transport individuel haut de gamme. 

Compagnie Sévigné est située en région parisienne à 30 minutes des aéroports de Roissy CDG et Orly.

Compagnie Sévigné, depuis septembre 2021, utilise du HVO 100, carburant de synthèse 100% renouvelable dans l’intégralité de sa flotte Diesel, réduisant ses émissions polluantes de 90%. 

En 2022, Compagnie Sévigné signe la Charte OBJECTIF CO2, et utilise un lave-glace biodégradable à plus de 90% dans l’ensemble de ses véhicules.

Compagnie Sévigné est adhérente depuis 2019 à la FNTV (Fédération Nationale du Transport de Voyageurs), et depuis 2023, au regroupement des PME autocaristes RÉUNIR.

In a rapidly urbanizing world facing the impacts of climate change, traditional transportation infrastructure like bus networks and metros fall short in efficiency and user preference. • Dezvoltare Durabilă – vrem să dezvoltăm un business sustenabil care să adauge valoare tuturor celor care intră în contact cu noi.

Filosofia noastră de business se axează pe 4 axe principale:

Description:
About TLT Services 
TLT Services was founded in Thessaloniki in 2009, with a mission to provide highly qualified taxi services. Since then, we have established close cooperation with a trusted network of professional and experienced partners, including agencies and hotels, consistently meeting even the highest-level requirements. 
Our Fleet 
Today, our fleet numbers nearly 190 modern vehicles, designed to serve every type of transfer with safety, comfort, and reliability.
Taxi Services: Mercedes E-Class, Skoda Octavia, and other modern models, ensuring secure and luxury transfers. 
Limousine Services: Mercedes Benz S-Class, Audi A8, and long limousines. Our VIP services are the absolute touch of luxury and safety, delivered by vehicles that have recently joined our fleet. 
Group Transfers: MiniVans (up to 8 persons), Mini Buses (up to 18 persons), and Private Coach Buses (up to 48 persons), ideal for families, business groups, and larger events. 
Our Commitment
At TLT Services, our aim is to make our customers happy by offering the best and safest services possible.
TLT Services modern fleet consists of more than 200 vehicles including Taxi models such as Mercedes E Class, Skoda Octavia and more. Modern vehicles that guarantee secure and luxury transfers. Our VIP services are the absolute touch of luxury and safety.

Name: Sverigetaxi Östersund
Description:
Sverigetaxi Östersund <3 service, kvalité och mångfald.

Vi är ett lokalt taxibolag som varit verksam i Östersund sedan 1920.

Sverigetaxi Östersund kör barn, ungdomar och vuxna till och från skolan samt daglig verksamhet, varje dag. Vi levererar även färdtjänst, sjukresor i anpassade fordon och anropstyrd linjetrafik. När det är turistsäsong transporterar vi turister till våra fjäll för rekreation och njutning. 

Vi medverkar till utveckling och tillväxt genom att vara en samarbetspartner med högt anseende och en självklar del av kollektivtrafiken. 
Vi medverkar till utveckling och tillväxt i regionen bl.a. genom att vara en samarbetspartner med högt anseende och en självklar del av kollektivtrafiken. Våra tjänster och produkter kännetecknas av trygghet, kundnöjdhet och miljömedvetenhet. 
Vi är ca 180 anställda fördelat på förare, bokningscentral, trafikledare och övrig personal.

Sedan november 2017 framförs fordonets dieselbilar fossilfritt med hjälp av det fossilfria dieselbränslet HVO.

Name: Probus
Description:
Transport osób to usługa, która z definicji dotyczy dużego obszaru. Nasz nowoczesny tabor i doświadczeni kierowcy, przewożą pasażerów po całej Europie. Najczęściej zapewniamy transport pracowników z Polski do Niemiec, Holandii, Belgii i Francji. Przewozimy również pasażerów na trasach w obrębie całej UE, np. z Rumunii do Niemiec. 

Firmy najczęściej szukają naszych usług w następujących sytuacjach:

- transport podczas wycieczki pracowniczej,

- przewóz na targi branżowe,

- transfery na lotniska,

- przewozy konferencyjne,

- obsługa imprez firmowych.

Najczęściej pomagamy naszym Klientom w transporcie osób podczas:

- przewozów na imprezy rodzinne,

- wyjazdów na koncerty,

- obsługi imprez okolicznościowych,

- przewozów do ślubu i na wesela,

- wyjazdów na mecze i inne imprezy sportowe.

Zdajemy sobie sprawę, że inne potrzeby mają państwo młodzi szukający transportu dla gości weselnych, inne paczka przyjaciół, którzy chcą wynająć busa na krótki wyjazd narciarski, a inne firma szukająca niezawodnego transportu dla swoich pracowników, czy transferu z lotniska dla kadry kierowniczej.

W każdej sytuacji indywidualnie kalkulujemy cenę, dopasowując precyzyjnie usługę do potrzeb i budżetu Klienta. Nasza wykwalifikowana kadra posiada wszelkie niezbędne certyfikaty i uprawnienia, które są niezbędne do prowadzenia działalności przewozowej. Samochody i busy są świetnie wyposażone, dzięki czemu gwarantują komfort podróży na każdej trasie. To właśnie dlatego tak wiele firm, instytucji i osób prywatnych wybiera Pro-Bus jako swojego partnera w organizacji przejazdu lub wynajmie pojazdu.

Name: DirectRoute (Limerick) Ltd
Description:
On August 18th 2006, the National Roads Authority signed a Public Private Partnership (PPP) Contract with DirectRoute (Limerick) Ltd.
DirectRoute (Limerick) Ltd is a special purpose company that has been formed for this project and is owned by funds managed by Meridiam, 3i, and TIIC.

The Limerick PPP Project involves the design, construction, operation and maintenance of an approximately 10 km long tolled dual carriageway bypass to the south west of Limerick, connecting the phase 1 of the southern ring road to the existing N18 national highway heading west to Shannon and the international airport.
The Project includes a 675 metre long immersed tube tunnel under the River Shannon.
Since opening in 2010, the tunnel and road link have diverted a lot of traffic from the centre of Limerick City, easing congestion in the city, while boosting economic development with completion of a strategic transport corridor across the region.

Your tour will be private and tailored to your preferences, allowing you to enjoy a personalized and unique experience. Let us be your guide as we uncork the secrets of the vine and create lasting memories together. (TCP 42020-P)

Hello, I'm Neal Duncan, a passionate enologist who honed my skills at the prestigious University of Adelaide in South Australia. My wife, Val, and I have been immersed in the world of wine since 2011, and we have called Paso Robles home since 2014. My journey in the wine industry has been diverse, with experience ranging from cellar-hand to microbiologist, enologist, and winemaker. Val is a fluent Portuguese speaker and a wine hospitality expert, boasting achievements in WSET level 3 and Court of Masters Sommelier level 1. My previous role in wine supplies sales focused on the CA Central Coast, providing a unique perspective and appreciation of the exceptional wineries in the region. 
Cheers

Did you know that every year around 4000 people get sexually assaulted in cabs and cars through ridesharing apps in the US? And that only 20% of drivers are women?
 
For this reason, we decided to launch LadyCar. Thanks to its advanced security system, AI, and values, you will finally feel safe when you need a ride to an appointment or when you want to go home from a night out.
 
LadyCar's goals are simple:
- Ensure optimal safety for both passenger and driver through AI, ID checks, Face ID, and the ability to choose who drives you or who is your passenger
- Encourage more women to become drivers
- Build a trustworthy community around driving 
  
The LadyCar team.

History

We quickly expanded to include corporate shuttle and charter services, and are now one of the largest motorcoach and minibus operators in the Pacific Northwest. Description:
Länstrafiken i Norrbotten AB ägs av Regionala kollektivtrafikmyndigheten (RKM) i Norrbotten. RKM är organiserat som ett kommunalförbund med Region Norrbotten och länets 14 kommuner som medlemmar.

Varje år reser ca 2,5 miljoner resenärer med Länstrafikens bussar. Trafiken sköts av ca 30 fristående trafikföretag, som har avtal med Länstrafiken. Sammanlagt har trafikföretagen ca 400 anställda förare och 230 bussar.

Länstrafiken trafikerar 108 linjer där stomlinjerna är kärnan i det omfattande trafiknätet. Trafiknätet omfattar även lokala linjer och servicelinjer som står för servicen i varje kommun.

Name: Länstrafiken i Västerbotten AB
Description:
Länstrafiken i Västerbotten AB ägs sedan 2012-01-01 av Region Västerbotten. Enligt den nya lagen som trädde i kraft vid årsskiftet ska i varje län finnas en kollektivtrafikmyndighet. I Västerbotten finns den inom ramen för Region Västerbottens verksamhet. Se mera information om kollektivtrafikmyndigheten här: Kollektivtrafikmyndigheten

Länstrafikens uppdrag är att upphandla och genom entreprenadavtal med olika trafikutövare bedriva linjetrafik för personbefordran med tillhörande bussgodsbefordran på ett länstrafiknät inom Västerbotten och angränsande områden.

Länstrafiken bedriver även efterfrågestyrd kompletteringstrafik inom motsvarande områden. För en betydande del av länets invånare är goda allmänna kommunikationer av avgörande betydelse för resor till arbete, skola, service med mera. De allmänna kommunikationer som Länstrafiken tillhandahåller är en del av infrastrukturen och en grundläggande förutsättning för länets utveckling.

Name: A3P Fretamento e Turismo
Description:
Alan Franco, fundador da A3P Transporte, dedicou mais de 15 anos à gestão de pessoas em grandes multinacionais. Em 2016, perdeu o emprego durante uma crise no setor automotivo e, com dificuldades para se recolocar, decidiu empreender. Em fevereiro de 2017, iniciou um serviço de táxi executivo com um Honda Civic. Após meses difíceis, comprou uma van e fundou a A3P Transporte e Fretamento. 

A empresa cresceu rapidamente, com foco no cliente e atendimento diferenciado. Em novembro de 2017, adquiriu a terceira van com a ajuda de familiares. Em janeiro de 2018, perdeu contratos, mas logo encontrou um novo cliente, comprando um micro-ônibus financiado.

Com novas oportunidades, adquiriu ônibus parcelados, expandindo a frota para atender à demanda crescente. Em 2019, a A3P contava com 12 colaboradores e 10 veículos. Em 2020, a pandemia impulsionou o crescimento da empresa, que terminou o ano com 47 colaboradores e 40 veículos. 

Em 2021, a A3P expandiu ainda mais, fechando o ano com 70 colaboradores e 60 veículos. Em 2022, com foco em um grande cliente, a meta era atingir 100 veículos. Alan Franco e sua esposa Adriana são os diretores da empresa, que se destaca pela inovação, segurança e respeito à vida, além de manter o foco na gestão de pessoas e atendimento ao cliente.

Name: ProtAct-Us
Description:
Battling serious injuries and long-term consequences in road traffic remains one important issue in the overall goal of resilient future road transport (Vision Zero). Challenges of increasing personal transport in urban areas coupled with autonomous vehicles and shuttles, new mobility devices and the overall need to ensure the safety of vulnerable road users as well as all types of vehicle occupants’ require innovative approaches.
ProtAct-Us project aims at protecting all Road User Groups from serious injury and long-term physical, cognitive and mental health consequences of road crashes through innovatively interlinked research action between medical and engineering methods. ProtAct-Us enables therefore the development of efficient, resilient, inclusive and effective countermeasures as well as post-crash action for all relevant road transport means.
ProtAct-Us will work on the following goals and challenges:
- Medical data correlation, standardization and classification of long-term physical, cognitive and mental health consequences of road crashes;
- Robust and reliable assessment tools and methods allowing for effective countermeasure development for all road users;
- Reduction of long-term consequences and related social cost of road crash related injuries for all road users.
The ProtAct-Us solutions will influence new standards in respect of extending current injury coding system with relevant long-term aspects for physical, cognitive and mental health related injury, allowing new physical, as well as virtual, safety assessment procedures and adaption of rules and regulations to be implemented. Finally, scientifically wellfounded suggestion for future implementation into policy, regulatory, and standardization guidelines for an inclusive safety improvement approach for in- as well as post-crash will be provided.


Funded by the European Union, under the Horizon Europe Program, Grant No. 101147445 (ProtAct-Us).

Name: Gstaad Limousine Service
Description:
Gstaad Limousine Service is a distinctive brand of Taxi Simon, one of the leading transportation service providers in and around Gstaad. We built the limousine service team in 2016 in order to serve the more sophisticated chauffeured services needs our customers require. 

Taxi Simon was founded in 1971 by Simon von Grünigen, as a one-man business. Due to the increased popularity that the Saanenland enjoyed during the eighties and nineties, both the car pool as well as the destinations of the company grew more and more. In 2006, the business had to manage various different services, that Simon decided to give the operational lead to Zoran Mitic, who, as successor, shortly after took over Taxi Simon completely. Together with his sons, Mario and Marko, they restructured the business and built a fully integrated transportation business in Gstaad. Today, our company counts 15 luxurious Mercedes-Benz vehicles and over 20 part and full time drivers

Ever since, our team strives to provide the highest quality of services to their clients. We guarantee that you will be pleased with our professional staff and fully trained, multilingual chauffeurs. We offer a complete selection of the best and newest vehicles for all your transportation needs. Based in Gstaad, we offer our services across the whole of Switzerland and Europe. We guarantee the highest quality, discretion, safety, reliability, friendliness and comfort. Remember, it’s not where you go, but how you get there.

Today, we are proud to provide first class limousine services, tailor-made airport transfers, flexible event shuttle services and much more. Our first class limousine service is characterized by multilingual and trained drivers, the newest Mercedes-Benz sedans like the S-Class and Mercedes-Benz V-class minivans as well as a spirit, which strives for pure perfection in execution. It is a personalized service that suits your travel needs in any way you can imagine.

Name: nextbike España
Description:
nextbikeGmbH se fundó en 2004 y es el núcleo del grupo nextbike, con sede en Leipzig, Alemania. Con dos décadas de experiencia y más de 300 ubicaciones en más de 20 países, el grupo es el líder indiscutible del mercado europeo en sistemas de bicicletas compartidas y en la configuración sostenible de servicios de movilidad pública multimodal.
La misión del grupo nextbike es movilizar de forma activa y sencilla a las personas como parte integral del transporte público local. La gama incluye medios de transporte adecuados para las necesidades diarias, como bicicletas clásicas, bicicletas eléctricas y bicicletas de carga.
Desde 2018, nextbike está presente en España. La empresa opera múltiples sistemas, entre ellos el del área metropolitana de Barcelona (con alrededor de 2600 bicicletas eléctricas en 236 estaciones) y el de la región de Bilbao/Bizkaia, con 825 bicicletas eléctricas en 86 estaciones. Nextbike es el operador de referencia en sistemas públicos de bicicleta compartida en Europa y líder en España en despliegues multi-municipales. Actualmente operamos 14 sistemas distribuidos en 37 municipios del país, con un total de más de 7.400 bicicletas en servicio. Nextbike integra tecnología, operación, mantenimiento y service design para garantizar soluciones fiables, escalables y compatibles con el modelo de movilidad sostenible que están impulsando las ciudades españolas.

 For Businesses: We understand the importance of cost control and streamlined processes. Titan Urban enables you to pre-negotiate rates and access online trip reconciliation reports, simplifying expense reimbursement and optimizing your corporate travel budget.

 Our Mission: Titan Urban Transportation is driven by a singular purpose – to provide hotels, events, businesses, and business travelers with the ground transportation service they truly desire. We are committed to delivering a world-class experience, every step of the way.

Join us in transforming the way you and your organization approach transportation. Explore the possibilities with Titan Urban today and elevate your travel experience.

Name: Porrettana Rent S.r.l
Description:
Porrettana Rent diventa Multibrand Store

Porrettana Rent nasce con l’ambizione di migliorare la circolazione nel territorio, rendendo ogni viaggio più comodo e sicuro. Fin dal suo inizio, il nostro impegno è stato orientato a offrire soluzioni di mobilità che rispondano alle esigenze del territorio, ma oggi siamo pronti a fare un ulteriore passo avanti.

Con il nostro nuovo format Multibrand Store, ampliamo la nostra offerta, proponendo una selezione di veicoli delle migliori marche, garantendo un servizio di compravendita di alta qualità, sia per chi cerca un’auto nuova che per chi desidera una vettura usata certificata.
Siamo sempre alla ricerca di innovazione per offrire soluzioni che migliorino la qualità della vita delle persone, rendendo ogni spostamento più semplice e piacevole.

Ma non ci fermiamo solo alla vendita. La nostra missione si estende alla promozione del territorio: collaboriamo con partner locali, sponsorizziamo eventi e sosteniamo iniziative che contribuiscono alla crescita e al benessere della comunità. Ogni chilometro percorso dai nostri veicoli è una testimonianza del nostro impegno per un futuro più vivace, dinamico e in continua evoluzione.

Innovazione e qualità a portata di mano: il nostro obiettivo è rendere ogni viaggio straordinario, offrendo non solo automobili di alta classe, ma anche un servizio che mette sempre al centro le esigenze del cliente e della comunità. Con Porrettana Rent, ogni spostamento è un passo verso un futuro più sostenibile e prospero.

Name: ECHO AFC Transportation
Description:
For more than 30 years, ECHO AFC Transportation has supported the travel industry throughout North America with tour, charter, shuttle, metro, transit, para-transit, last mile transport services and more.

We operate and maintain a diverse fleet of new and late-model equipment and we continue to add new vehicles as we grow to support our private and public customers’ needs.

We pride ourselves on our strong local and regional presence throughout the State of Texas and currently operate from seven strategic locations statewide. ECHO AFC provides high-quality, fully-customizable ground transportation options for virtually every size and type of group transport including private and public schools and universities, churches, local clubs and corporations, professional sports teams, our nation’s military, and many more. Domestic and international destination event management planners and travel agencies rely on ECHO AFC for their ground transportation needs.

And, ECHO AFC partners with community and municipal transit agencies to provide affordable, reliable metro, rural and regional service to offer greater coverage and mobility, especially for ADA riders, on fixed and schedule service routes or commuter lines.

Name: JALESTUR TRANSPORTES E TURISMO
Description:
A Jalestur: Excelência em Transporte Executivo desde 2009

Desde sua fundação em 2009, a Jalestur surgiu para atender à crescente demanda do mercado por transporte executivo que oferecesse qualidade, segurança e conforto. Atuando em viagens de curta e longa distância, a empresa disponibiliza uma ampla gama de serviços: transporte executivo, traslados nacionais e internacionais, excursões, city tours e entregas de cargas especiais, sempre priorizando a satisfação do cliente.

A frota da Jalestur é um dos grandes diferenciais, sendo renovada regularmente com veículos modernos, nacionais e importados, que garantem sofisticação e confiabilidade em todas as viagens.

O compromisso com a excelência também é evidenciado na preparação da equipe. Os motoristas passam por treinamentos constantes e, para atender um público exigente e diverso, muitos deles são bilíngues, assegurando uma comunicação eficiente e de alta qualidade.

A pontualidade é outro pilar fundamental da empresa, proporcionando uma experiência tranquila e confiável. Esse cuidado com os horários reflete o respeito da Jalestur pelos seus clientes e contribui para viagens mais agradáveis e prazerosas.

Sempre inovando e buscando elevar o padrão do setor, a Jalestur reforça diariamente seu compromisso com a confiança e a excelência, consolidando-se como uma das melhores opções de transporte executivo no mercado.

Name: Aries Charter Transportation, Inc.
Description:
Aries Charter is a family-owned business that has been providing excellent customer service for 35 years. Aries operates a modern fleet of over 60 vehicles, including motor coaches, mini-buses, trolleys and transit buses. Aries is a certified Minority Business Enterprise with the State of Illinois, City of Chicago and National Minority Supplier Development Council.

Whether you need a 56 passenger coach bus rental for a corporate event, a trolley rental in Chicago for your wedding, a sprinter van rental for a night out, McCormick Place coach buses, or a luxury sedan to the airport, Aries Charter Transportation can get you safely to your destination and back.

Our professional chauffeurs have a minimum of 5 years experience, a majority have more than 10+ years in the industry. We strive for excellence in every aspect of service; safety, customer service, and appearance. Our chauffeurs in Chicago go through extensive training and are prepped to provide a discreet, smooth, reliable service. Your privacy and safety is our top priority.

A cette époque, « Les Transports Bartissol » assuraient la ligne régulière pour le transport interurbain de voyageurs entre les communes de Bages, Mas Sabole, Pollestres et Perpignan. Les Transports PAGES été une entreprise familiale située dans le canton d'Elne à Bages mais également, depuis 1995, au cœur des Aspres, à Thuir.  Repris par M. Michel PAGES, les transports PAGES ont évolué au cours des années. Actuellement, l'essentiel de l'activité est constitué par le transport public régulier scolaire assurant la desserte des établissements d'enseignement pour le compte du Conseil Régional. 
 Les Transports PAGES sont également partenaires de l'UDOGEC (enseignement catholique) qui lui confie les rotations vers les stades et les piscines pour les cours d'éducation physique et sportive. 
Les Autocars PAGES effectuent également les transports de tourisme et Grand Tourisme en autocar pour les particuliers ou les groupes (club du 3e âges, clubs sportifs, associations, CE, , ...). 
En Juillet 2022 Transports PAGES devient une filiale du groupe Keolis.
Pour ces voyages, Transports PAGES met à votre disposition des cars de 36 à 63 places équipés grand luxe avec toilettes, réfrigérateur, vidéo, climatisation et sièges inclinables.
Pour tout renseignement n'hésitez pas à nous contacter, nous nous ferons un plaisir de répondre à votre demande.

Name: Regionalverkehr Main-Kinzig GmbH
Description:
Wir, die Regionalverkehr Main-Kinzig GmbH, kurz RVMK, sind ein regionales Busunternehmen und ein 100-prozentiges Tochterunternehmen der Unternehmensgruppe Kreiswerke Main-Kinzig. 

Unsere rund 70 Beschäftigten sorgen auf der Straße und in der Verwaltung dafür, die Menschen im Main-Kinzig-Kreis Tag für Tag sicher von A nach B zu bringen. 

Wir binden die Gemeinden an die Verkehrsknotenpunkte des RMV in Gelnhausen, Wächtersbach und Bad Orb an. Neben den Regionallinien fahren wir auch die Stadtbusse in Gelnhausen. 

Unsere Flotte besteht aus 40 umweltschonenden Bussen der EURO-6-Norm. Künftig werden diese sukzessive gegen Fahrzeuge mit alternativen Antrieben ausgetauscht.

Die Bedienung erfolgt auf 15 Linien und mittels Anrufsammeltaxi (AST) in der Region. Ein weiteres Geschäftsfeld ist der Schienenersatzverkehr, wenn Zugverbindungen gestört sind - etwa aufgrund von Bauprojekten.  

Insgesamt legen wir im Jahr rund 1,7 Millionen Kilometer zurück und befördern rund 2,7 Millionen Menschen. Für die Sicherheit der Fahrzeuge sorgt die konzerneigene Kraft-Omnibus-Werkstatt, in der die Busse regelmäßig gewartet und instandgehalten werden.

Wir legen großen Wert darauf, Menschen eine berufliche Perspektive zu geben. 

Als Ausbildungsbetrieb übernehmen wir soziale Verantwortung. Junge Menschen für das Arbeitsleben zu qualifizieren und auch beruflichen Quereinsteigern Chancen zu bieten, bedeutet für uns weit mehr, als nur Fachwissen zu vermitteln.

Name: Grupo Sajotur
Description:
São João Turismo 

A sua história mostra um começo modesto, simples e de muito trabalho, através da criação de uma linha intermunicipal de ônibus ligando os municípios de Atibaia, Jundiaí e Jarinu. 

Foi em 1953 quando surgiu a Auto Viação Balzanelli. Em 1960 o comando da empresa foi entregue aos seus principais sucessores colaboradores, que partiram então, para a implantação da Empresa São João de Turismo Ltda., e com muita garra e uma filosofia empreendedora, conseguiram um crescimento sólido e bem estruturado, culminando com a implantação de sua Agência de viagens em 1975.

Sua história de mais de 45 anos, revelam bem que valeu a pena todo o trabalho dinâmico, sério e responsável que lhe foi dedicado desde os modestos tempos do seu início, chegando até o momento atual, como uma das mais respeitadas empresas/agências de turismo do Estado. 

O que não deixa de ser um certo orgulho para Jundiaí, afinal, os homens que a dirigem são jundiaienses e procuram acompanhar e participar, em todos os sentidos, do progresso da cidade.

Profissionalismo e treinamento constante dos funcionários, fazem da Sajotur uma das agências mais eficientes do interior do estado.

Em prédio próprio no centro de Jundiaí, nossas instalações oferecem conforto e comodidade para você ter um atendimento personalizado.

Engagée dans une démarche de développement durable, notre compagnie intègre des solutions innovantes telles que des bus à hydrogène, bio GNV et électriques, afin de répondre aux besoins croissants de mobilité de notre territoire. Oléane Mobilités propose une gamme complète de services adaptés aux besoins de l'Agglomération des Sables d'Olonne, incluant des navettes gratuites, des bus, ainsi qu'un service de location de vélos à assistance électrique.

En plus du transport urbain, nous proposons également un service de transport sur réservation.

Si vous aspirez à travailler dans un environnement paisible en bord de mer et souhaitez rejoindre une entreprise dynamique, bienveillante et à l'écoute de ses salariés, n'hésitez pas à intégrer l'équipe d'Oléane Mobilités !
Location: Les Sables-d’Olonne, Pays de la Loire

 NaoCab, c’est aussi une nouvelle vision du VTC : celle d’un modèle local, responsable et digital, où la technologie simplifie la mobilité sans en effacer l’humain.
Aujourd’hui basée à Nantes et sa belle région, NaoCab pose les bases d’une marque de transport nouvelle génération : fiable, élégante et durable.

We operate and maintain a diverse fleet of new and late-model equipment and we continue to add new vehicles as we grow to support our private and public customers’ needs.

We pride ourselves on our strong local and regional presence throughout the State of Texas and currently operate from seven strategic locations statewide. ECHO AFC provides high-quality, fully-customizable ground transportation options for virtually every size and type of group transport including private and public schools and universities, churches, local clubs and corporations, professional sports teams, our nation’s military, and many more. Domestic and international destination event management planners and travel agencies rely on ECHO AFC for their ground transportation needs.

Name: COLUMBUSS  COnnected Level 5 UnManned BUSeS
Description:
The COLUMBUSS autopilot objectifies and automates the operator in transport systems. Operating procedures are the system's algorithms. Thresholds are derived from human performance. The COLUMBUSS AI is transparent (white box), meaningful, and connects to existing certification processes, such as issuing a driver's license. This makes adoption easier, which supports commercialisation.

Real-time certification by continuously monitoring the autopilots’ performance will maintain and possibly improve the stability of transport systems.

Participation in the COLUMBUSS learning community entitles you to use shared sources of hardware and software.

COLUMBUSS is an initiative of robotTUNER, the province of Groningen and Metropole Region Rotterdam Den Haag.

Name: AB locações e logística
Description: "Fundada em 2020, a AB Locações & Logística tem um único objetivo: a eficiência no transporte. Para isso, investimentos maciços em renovação de frota e capacitação profissional são prioridades da empresa. A filosofia de trabalho se baseia em qualidade, segurança e a melhor relação custo–benefício para o cliente. Após estudos e análises do mercado no segmento de Transporte rodoviário, constatamos que a segurança e qualidade são os principais fatores, tornando-se exigências primordiais dos clientes que utilizam tais serviços. Baseando-se nestes princípios a empresa AB Locações & Logística foi criada, para proporcionar aos nossos clientes o que é fundamental no ramo. SEGURANÇA E QUALIDADE."

STRUL täcker Spårtrafiken som Roslagsbanan, Tunnelbanan, Bussar och Pendeltåget förstås. Från Norr till Söder, Öst till Väst.

Name: Verenigde Innovatieve Mobiliteitsdienstverleners (VIM)
Description:
Alleen als alle vervoermiddelen één systeem vormen, is duurzame mobiliteit een echt alternatief. 

Het goede nieuws is dat er al veel opties bestaan. Naast Openbaar Vervoer zijn er verschillende aanbieders van gedeelde mobiliteit beschikbaar, evenals vraag gestuurde diensten

Dus wat ontbreekt er nog? Deze vervoersopties moeten gemakkelijker gecombineerd kunnen worden voor gebruikers. Alle vervoermiddelen moeten deel uitmaken van één systeem om digitale toegang tot duurzame mobiliteit zo naadloos mogelijk te maken.

Name: Viser Mobility GmbH

Imagine proporcionar à sua equipe, clientes ou convidados uma experiência de transporte que vá além do deslocamento — com conforto, pontualidade e segurança em cada trajeto.
Na Van 24hs Turismo, não apenas levamos pessoas de um ponto ao outro: movimentamos histórias, negócios e momentos especiais.

Com anos de atuação no mercado de transporte executivo, oferecemos um serviço completo, adaptado às necessidades de quem valoriza excelência, discrição e eficiência. Nossa frota é composta por Vans e Micro-ônibus modernos, conduzidos por motoristas experientes e, quando necessário, bilíngues, garantindo um atendimento à altura do seu evento ou operação corporativa.

 Nossos serviços incluem:

 Traslados entre os aeroportos de Congonhas, Cumbica, Viracopos e o Porto de Santos
 City tour e receptivo em rodoviárias e aeroportos
 Viagens intermunicipais e interestaduais
 Transporte para casamentos, baladas e shows


Seja para reuniões estratégicas, eventos sociais ou operações diárias de transporte de colaboradores, oferecemos soluções sob medida para cada necessidade — com a tranquilidade de contar com uma equipe comprometida e disponível 24 horas.

Van 24hs Turismo: mobilidade inteligente para quem exige mais do transporte executivo.

 Solicite agora um atendimento personalizado:
(11) 2366-4197 | (11) 94756-2628

#TransporteExecutivo #MobilidadeCorporativa #Van24hsTurismo #EficiênciaLogística #ExperiênciaPremium

Name: MWM-Solutions GmbH
Description:
MWM-Solutions ist Ihre Agentur für Mobilitätsdienstleistungen. 

Wir sind spezialisiert auf kompetente Beratung, Planung und Umsetzung von Transport- und Logistikdienstleistungen für Großveranstaltungen und langfristige Mobilitätsprojekte.

Mit Unterstützung unserer eigenen Software NetFleet übernehmen wir die Operations in den Bereichen Disposition, Fleetmanagement und Projektmanagement bis hin zur statistischen Auswertung. 

Dabei haben wir langjährige Erfahrung mit allen wesentlichen Komponenten von On-Demand Verkehr, Fahrservice, Fuhrparkmanagement, Disposition von Fahrzeugen und Bussen, Transportlogistik, Automobilmarketing (insb. Sponsoring), Elektromobilität, sowie Driving Experiences und verfügen über ein breites Netzwerk exzellenter Partner.

Wir setzen innovative Projekte im Bereich integrierter Mobilität in ländlichen und suburbanen Räumen um. 2019 haben wir den "Hopper", den ersten vollwertigen On-Demand Verkehr in Hessen für die Kreisverkehrsgesellschaft Offenbach auf die Straße gebracht. Seit 2022 sind wir stolzer Betreiber des ODV DALLI im Landkreis Oder-Spree. Seit 2025 sind wir im Auftrag der Cottbusverkehr GmbH mit einem weiteren Rufbus Angebot in Landkreis Spree-Neiße unterwegs.

Name: GoAhead Kuwait

With over 14 years of time-tested experience and expertise in Automotive Leasing Services and Fleet Management, our parent company Al Mishraq has been providing dedicated fleet solutions across various industries.
GoAhead by Al Mishraq kick-started its journey with an ultimate goal to provide reliable and safe corporate transit that all kinds of businesses can rely on. Name: Evoke
Description:

We specialise in executive transfers, airport transport, event transport, and bespoke tours, ensuring every journey is effortless and tailored to our clients’ needs. Whether it’s a corporate engagement, a major event, or a private tour, our professional chauffeurs deliver punctual, discreet, and first-class service.

 100% Carbon-Neutral – Partnering with Greenfleet to offset emissions and promote responsible travel.

 Uncompromising Professionalism – Experienced chauffeurs, premium service, and seamless bookings.

 Reliable & Flexible – Punctual, personalised transport solutions for business, events, and leisure.

From airport transfers to tailored tours, Evoke ensures every trip is smooth, comfortable, and environmentally responsible.

For businesses seeking professional corporate transport or individuals looking for a refined travel experience, Evoke is the trusted choice.

 Aliança Tur — Transporte com Qualidade, Segurança e Responsabilidade.
