Name: Jaguaride
Description:
At Jaguaride, our mission is to transform the travel experience by providing economical, fast, and eco-friendly transportation options. We firmly believe that public transportation plays a crucial role in reducing carbon footprints and promoting a sustainable future.

As pioneers of shared intercity transport in Quebec, we have established an innovative model that combines comfort and efficiency. Our unique shuttle service connects the airport to both Montreal and Quebec City, offering a practical and accessible alternative for everyone. With competitive pricing and a high-quality travel experience, we are committed to meeting the diverse needs of our customers.

Our core values are rooted in sustainability, quality, and accessibility. We take pride in contributing to a more environmentally friendly future by offering mobility solutions that encourage collective transport.

Join us in our journey toward a greener world. Book your trip today or request a quote by visiting our website: www.jaguaride.com.

Name: Zippintella Pvt Ltd.
Description:
Zippi | Purpose-Driven Urban Mobility for the Next Billion

Zippi is India’s emerging mobility platform focused on solving the urban commute challenge through a women-inclusive and sustainable approach. We operate two-wheeler and auto-rickshaw taxi services in high-demand Tier 1 cities, starting with Hyderabad.

Our business model empowers women as driver-partners, bringing both social impact and operational efficiency. With a strong unit economics-first mindset, Zippi is designed to scale responsibly while unlocking income opportunities and reducing congestion and emissions.

We’re on a mission to become India’s most trusted last-mile ride solution — safe, green, and inclusive.

Now gearing up for growth. Let’s ride the future together.
#ImpactAtScale #MobilityForGood #ZippiRides

- Atendimento Personalizado: Valorizamos cada cliente e buscamos superar expectativas. Oferecer um atendimento personalizado para garantir uma experiência única em cada viagem.

Name: Taxi Dispatch

Our system supports everything you need:
 - Real-time driver tracking
 - Automated booking and dispatch

 - Seamless integration with major platforms and devices

Trusted by transport companies across the UK and beyond, Taxi Despatch empowers you with the tools to run your business more efficiently, save time, and serve customers better.

 Let's talk about how we can help your business run smarter

Name: Metropole Chauffeurs
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen bei Metropole Chauffeurs!

Metropole Chauffeurs wurde gegründet, um die Art des Reisens höchsten Ansprüchen gerecht werden zu lassen. Erwarten Sie von Ihrer Reise nicht nur das Ankommen am Ziel.

Erwarten Sie ruhig mehr!

Auf dem Papier sind wir vielleicht nur ein Limousinen Service wie viele andere. Was uns aber sicher zu etwas Besonderem macht, ist die Art, wie wir unsere Arbeit gestalten:

Wir lieben und leben Dienstleistung! 

Unter Beachtung vieler kleiner und großer Details, erschaffen wir für Sie einen zu 200% perfekten Service mit Vertrauens- und Verläßlichkeitsgarantie! 

„Geht nicht“ gibt es bei uns nicht. Unsere Aufgabe ist es, Sie zu fahren – und nicht, Sie stehen zu lassen. Darauf haben Sie mein Wort! 

Zusammen mit meinem Team, unserer Expertise und unserem First-Class Fuhrpark stehen wir für all Ihre Reiseanliegen zur Verfügung. 

Ihr Christian Buschbeck
Inhaber Metropole Chauffeurs

Name: World Elite Transport LLC
Description:
At World Elite Transport, we don’t just provide transportation — we deliver an exceptional experience that reflects the utmost in luxury, reliability, and professionalism. Serving the Virginia area since March 2024, we’ve built a reputation rapidly for excellence by consistently exceeding our clients’ expectations. Our commitment to top-tier service has made us the preferred choice for discerning individuals and businesses alike, and we look forward to expanding our services across state lines to better meet the needs of our growing clientele.

As of June 2025, World Elite Transport LLC is proud to be an active government contractor registered on SAM.gov — soon to be Veteran-Owned and 8(a) Certified. This positions us to provide our trusted, high-quality transportation services to government agencies and federal partners with enhanced capabilities and compliance. The future into building this company is endless and will continue to surprise you.  

We understand that each client has unique needs, and we tailor our services to meet them with precision and care. From moment-to-moment communication to punctual, seamless transportation, we ensure your journey is as smooth and enjoyable as possible. This dedication to personalized service is why our clients return time and time again, and why our name is synonymous with trust and dependability in the industry.

Whether it’s for a business event, special occasion, or simply a need for a reliable ride, we’re here to make your transportation experience unparalleled. Contact us today to discover how we can elevate your travel expectations.

Name: Network Travels
Description:
Network Travels is the largest bus operator in Assam and Northeast India. Established in 1992, the company was incorporated to provide connectivity by road through the roughest terrains to the most remote corners of the region. Our current fleet is the largest in Northeast India and stands strong with over 140 coaches. The fleet consists of both Non-AC and AC seater coaches ranging from deluxe seater coaches to super luxury seater-sleeper Bharat Benz coaches.

Under the banner of Network Travels, the company has expanded its wings to Tourism, Transport, Courier and Air Ticketing divisions. 

Network Travels is the first Government of India recognised Tour Operator in North East India. Our tourism handle specialises in tailor-made holidays as well as corporate tours around Northeast India and Bhutan.

Our transport division consists of a fleet of over 80 car-carrier trucks/trailers and specialises in transportation of automobiles pan India. Network Transport is an official and dedicated automobile transport partner for Maruti Suzuki India Ltd. We bring in vehicles from both the Gujarat and Haryana MSIL plants to their authorised depots and dealers across India.

Network Travels’ constant endeavour is to keep introducing new routes and providing connectivity to ease road travel. We give utmost attention to our passengers’ needs and continuously upgrade our vehicles for maximum comfort and safety. Today, Network Travels has become a household name for anyone travelling for work, leisure or using our logistics for delivery of goods across the borders of Northeast India.

We prioritize safety and offer competitive pricing through the Association. No matter your group size, we’ll find the right bus for you. Your safety is our top priority as we swiftly get you to your destination.


Our Mission
At Express Service, we are dedicated to providing safe, dependable transportation at affordable rates. The safety and comfort of our customers are our top priorities, guiding every aspect of our service.

Our Vision

SOTO Y ALONSO es una empresa de transporte de pasajeros por carretera con más de 80 años de experiencia, especializada en movilidad inteligente y con un profundo compromiso con la calidad y la seguridad. Fundada en 1937, nuestra trayectoria nos ha permitido expandir y diversificar nuestros servicios en diferentes áreas del transporte: desde rutas de largo recorrido y traslados metropolitanos hasta servicios de transporte escolar y traslados corporativos.

Nuestra prioridad es ofrecer un servicio de excelencia en cada trayecto, fundamentado en la comodidad, puntualidad y seguridad para todos nuestros pasajeros.

Estamos comprometidos en seguir innovando y consolidando nuestra posición de liderazgo en el sector. Si deseas desarrollar tu carrera en una empresa que valore el talento y fomente el crecimiento profesional, Soto y Alonso es tu lugar!

Name: SpeediShuttle LLC
Description:

Choose us as your preferred provider for airport shuttle services in Hawaii and enjoy the luxury of our fleet of Mercedes-Benz passenger vans. Our shuttles are equipped with zoned air conditioning, 6-foot clearance, and comfortable leather seating to ensure a more comfortable travel experience.

With SpeediShuttle, your journey to paradise begins at the airport. We offer transportation services to and from Honolulu, Big Island, Maui, Kauai, and more. Whether you're heading to a resort, returning to the airport, or going on an excursion, we'll be there to take care of your transportation needs.

We also provide cruise shuttles and private car service for those looking for a more personalized travel experience. Additionally, we offer Island Tours to help you explore the beauty of Hawaii.

Travel with peace of mind and convenience with SpeediShuttle. Experience the best in ground transportation in Hawaii.

Name: Little Rock Coaches/Champion Coaches
Description:
Introducing Little Rock Coaches - Your Trusted Motorcoach Company! 

We take pride in providing top-notch transportation services with our fleet of 19 motorcoaches, one limo bus, and one 14-passenger van. Whether you're planning a corporate event, group excursion, or family trip, we've got you covered!

Our motorcoaches are equipped with all the amenities to ensure a comfortable journey:
 WiFi
 110 outlets
 DVD players
 Microphones
 Reading lights
 Air conditioning systems
 Bathrooms
 Reclining seats
 Giant cargo bays

Not only do we offer the best facilities, but we also have the most helpful drivers in the state, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable experience for all passengers.

Rest assured, our buses are certified by both the Department of Transportation and the Department of Defense, meeting the highest safety standards. In the rare event of a mechanical issue, our manager is available 24/7 to address any concerns promptly. We prioritize your safety and comfort above all else.

We have established a strong network of partner companies across the United States, ready to assist us should the need arise. Additionally, our safety rating is "Satisfactory," the highest rating given by the DOT. We encourage you to check the safety score of any motorcoach company you consider doing business with.

Choose Little Rock Coaches for reliable, comfortable, and safe transportation services. Let us take care of your travel needs, so you can focus on enjoying the journey!

Contact us today to book your next adventure!

Name: PREMIER TOUR - AIRPORT TRANSPORT CONSTANȚA - OTOPENI / MIHAIL KOGĂLNICEANU
Description:
Premier Tour is a private business based in Constanta, Romania. We specialize in providing shuttle service and private transfers to and from Bucharest Otopeni Airport, Mihail Kogălniceanu, or any other destinations of your choice. At Premier Tour, we believe that our services are more than just a simple transfer; we provide an experience that is designed to meet and exceed our clients' expectations.
We aim to make our clients' travel experience as stress-free and comfortable as possible. Our shuttle services are available 24/7, and we pride ourselves on punctuality and reliability. We understand that time is precious, and that is why we have designed our services to help our clients save time and avoid the stress of navigating unfamiliar destinations. With our experienced and professional drivers, you can rest assured that you will arrive at your destination on time and in comfort.
One of the key benefits of our shuttle services is that they are customizable to meet our clients' specific needs. Whether you need a transfer to or from the airport, a business meeting, or a leisure activity, we can create a package that suits your preferences. Our aim is to provide a tailored experience that meets your unique requirements.
At Premier Tour, we believe that the journey should be as enjoyable as the destination. That is why our fleet consists of modern, comfortable, and well-maintained vehicles. We understand that the quality of the vehicle can make all the difference in a long journey, and we take pride in our commitment to providing top-of-the-line vehicles for our clients. Our drivers are also trained to provide excellent customer service, ensuring that your journey is as pleasant as possible.
At Premier Tour, we value transparency and honesty in our business practices. We believe that clear communication is essential for building trust with our clients, and we strive to provide all the necessary information upfront. Our pricing is straightforward, with no hidden fees.

A medida que la empresa iba siendo reconocida sumó servicios como transportación de personal de empresas, para finalmente especializarse en el servicio ejecutivo. Fue en 1991 cuando se firmó el decreto de apertura de este sistema de transporte en nuestro país.

Esos fueron los orígenes de los servicios diferenciados ejecutivos en Argentina, que comenzaron a marcar una diferencia de calidad con los tradicionales colectivos de larga distancia, que no ofrecían más que la transportación.

En esos tiempos Expreso Alberino ya estaba dentro del establishment del transporte de ejecutivos de empresas, fue entonces cuando la firma tomó la decisión de especializarse en destinos de larga distancia interurbanos. Así fue que en el año 1992 comenzó la primera línea desde Buenos Aires y luego sumaría destinos como Santa Rosa, Trenque Lauquen y General Pico.

Name: Mykonos Transfer 24h by Tms
Description:
Καλώς ήρθατε στην MYKONOS TRANSFER24

Η απόλυτη ικανοποιησή σας, είναι η επιθυμία μας και ο στόχος μας.

Μέσα από την πολυετή εμπειρία μας, έχουμε την δυνατότητα να σας παρέχουμε την πλήρη κάλυψη των μετακινησεών σας, της ασφαλειά σας, καθώς διαθέτουμε εκπαιδευμένο έμπιστο προσωπικό, που μπορεί να σας καλύψει με ασφαλείς μετακινήσεις σ'όλο το νησί, καλύπτοντας τις επιθυμίες σας με απόλυτη εχεμύθεια, βασικό χαρακτηριστικό της εταιρείας μας. 

24 ώρες ιδιωτικοί σωφέρ

Από την αφιξή σας στην Μύκονο μέχρι και την αναχωρησή σας, σας παρέχουμε επί 24ώρου βάσεως, άρτια εκπαιδευμένους ιδιωτικούς σωφέρ.
Τα χαρακτηριστικά τους, που τους διατηρούν στο χώρο της 24ωρης μεταφοράς των VIP, εδώ και πολλά χρόνια είναι ο άψογος επαγγελματισμός τους και η εξειδίκευση στον τομέα τους.

Μεταφορά στην Μύκονο
(από σημείο σε σημείο)

Σας καλοσορίζουμε στην αφιξή σας, στο νησί μας μ'απόλυτη συνέπεια, για να σας μεταφέρουμε στο τόπο διαμονής σας, και γενικά όπου επιθυμείτε.

Είμαστε έτοιμοι να σας βοηθήσουμε (άριστα στην Αγγλική γλώσσα) όσον αναφορά την παραμονή σας, με κάθε λεπτομέρεια για τέλειες διακοπές.
Ενήμεροι για κάθε αλλαγή στο οδικό δίκτυο ,για τα μέρη που γνωρίζει μόνο ένας ντόπιος, για πληροφορίες που ένας τουριστικός οδηγός δεν δύναται να περιέχει.

Γύρος της Μυκόνου

Το νησί των ανέμων , έχει χαρακτηριστεί το πιο κοσμοπολίτικο νησί του Αιγαίου.
Αναλαμβάνουμε να σας μεταφέρουμε σε κάθε σπιθαμή της κοσμοπολίτικης Μυκόνου, στη Μικρή Βενετία του νησιού μας, στους Κάτω Μύλους, στα Ματόγιαννα μέχρι και την Ψαρού.

Αεροδρόμιο,λιμάνι (Άφιξη/Αναχώριση)

Με μία απλή επαφή μαζί μας,το εξαιρετικά εξειδικευμένο προσωπικό μας, μπορεί χωρίς να ασχοληθείτε και να ταλαιπωρηθείτε, να κανονίσει την άφιξη και την αναχωρησή σας

Νεόνυμφοι/Group

Στο πλάι σας με διακριτικότητα, στην πιο ευτυχισμένη μέρα της ζωής σας.
Έχοντας την ικανότητα να οργανώσουμε, άψογα την μετακίνηση και διαμονή των καλεσμένων σας, πάντα μ'ασφάλεια και εχεμύθεια, με δική σας επιλογή τα αυτοκίνητα που επιθυμείτε.

Name: Brent Community Transport
Description:
Brent Community Transport (BCT) is a voluntary organisation, registered charity and a registered company limited by Guarantee. Established in 1975, BCT has been providing affordable and accessible transport solutions to the community, groups and individuals. Being very community centric we rely on funding to help deliver projects.

The overall responsibility of this organisation rests with the Management Committee, which is elected annually at our AGM. The CEO oversees the day-to-day running of the organisation and reports bi-monthly to the management committee trustees.

Mission Statement
Our mission is to help overcome social exclusion experienced by the most disadvantaged persons in our community by providing affordable and accessible transport to individuals, voluntary, community, statutory organisations and commercial sectors.
We aim to provide sustainable transport solutions and are continuously monitoring the effects of our organization on the environment by putting in place measures to reduce our carbon footprint.

Description:
KD Autotrolej d.o.o. Rijeka prometuje na 50 linija i povezuje 12 općina i gradova sa županijskim središtem (grad Rijeka). Godišnje se preveze oko 45.000.000 putnika i ostvari preko 7.000.000 kilometara.

U sastavu voznog parka KD Autotrolej d.o.o. Rijeka danas ima 171 vozilo, odnosno 97 solo vozila, 51 zglobno, 23 minibus (10 SPP), 3 kombi vozila (2 za prijevoz osoba s invaliditetom) i jedan turistički autobus na kat za razgledavanje grada. Od ovog broja, kako je naznačeno, na stlačeni prirodni plin (SPP) je ukupno 49 vozila, dok ostala vozila kao pogonsko gorivo koriste dizel.
The utility company Autotrolej Ltd of Rijeka provides transport over 50 routes, connecting 13 towns and municipalities with the centre of the county (the city of Rijeka). About 45,000,000 passengers are transported annually and it covers over 10,000,000 kilometres.

Autotrolej Ltd’s fleet currently consists of 171 vehicles, i.e. 97 rigid vehicles, 51 articulated vehicles, 23 minibuses (10 CNG), 3 vans (2 for the transport of people with disabilities) and 1 double-decker tourist bus for sightseeing the city. Of this number, as indicated, there is a total of 49 vehicles that run on compressed natural gas (CNG). The remaining vehicles run on diesel.

Safer AI-driven safety features, real-time GPS tracking, and highly trained chauffeurs ensure security and peace of mind on every journey.

Name: Wizi
Description:
Wizi is more than just a taxi company — it’s a forward-thinking mobility brand that’s reshaping ground transportation with innovation and a commitment to premium quality. Originally founded in 2006 under the Cammeo name, the company quickly became a pioneer in the regional taxi industry, introducing ride-sharing options before they became global trends. It also launched the region’s first taxi mobile app with real-time tracking and transparent fare estimates, and in 2015, introduced Croatia’s first franchise model for taxi services.

In 2023, the company rebranded as Wizi, with a new visual identity, signaling its evolution into a sleek, tech-driven, customer-first transportation service. Wizi's core values — fearless, innovative, agile, professional, and transparent — drive every aspect of the business, from the design of its services to the experience it provides to riders and partners.

Today, Wizi operates in 27 cities across Croatia, Slovenia, and North Macedonia, including major hubs like Zagreb, Ljubljana, and Skopje. With millions of passengers served annually, Wizi continues to grow its presence across the region. Its modern mobile app enables 24/7 ride booking with features like real-time ride tracking, upfront pricing, flexible payment options, and important safety measures such as share-your-ride, hidden phone numbers, lost-item support, and post-ride feedback.

For businesses, Wizi offers reliable and professional transport for employees, clients, and events, with benefits like scheduled rides, priority allocation, unified monthly invoicing, and dedicated support. Drivers and partners also enjoy strong support through low commissions, flexible working hours, training, and tools for managing fleets.

With 19 years of experience and over 30 million kilometers driven annually, Wizi is a trusted leader in tech-powered ground transportation. Its story is one of innovation, growth, and a passion for making urban mobility better — for everyone, everywhere.

Name: Sunderland Public Transport User Group
Description:
The Sunderland Public Transport Users Group (SPTUG) is an independent, non-party organisation representing passengers and transport workers across Sunderland and the wider North East.

Formed in 2024, SPTUG provides a strong, democratic voice for local communities in shaping a safe, reliable, and affordable public transport network. We work closely with the North East Combined Authority (NECA), Sunderland City Council, Nexus, and the North East Mayor’s office to improve connectivity, accessibility, and sustainability across our city and region.

SPTUG actively campaigns for:

The Washington Metro Loop and improvements to the Durham Coast Line

Public control and accountability of bus and rail services

A 24-hour concessionary travel scheme from age 60

Integrated ticketing and multi-modal contactless travel

Better links between buses, Metro, taxis, cycling, and walking

Stronger safety, accessibility, and real-time passenger information

Environmental sustainability, reducing car dependence and air pollution

Membership of SPTUG is open to all who live or work in Sunderland or nearby areas and share our aims. We hold open meetings bi-monthly at the Fans’ Museum, Sunderland, and collaborate with the North East Public Transport Users Group (NEPTUG) and national partners such as the National Pensioners Convention (NPC) and local transport unions (GMB, Unite, RMT, PCS, and UCU).

Through research, consultation responses, and active dialogue with decision-makers, SPTUG champions the needs of passengers and workers alike—promoting a transport system that is fair, green, and accessible for everyone.

 Get involved.
 Together we can deliver a cleaner, better-connected Sunderland.

Name: S.A.I. Treviglio - Società Autolinee Interprovinciali s.r.l.
Description:
Nel 1920, i fratelli Luigi e Francesco Marini, tornati dal conflitto bellico, organizzano il primo trasporto di passeggeri nella città di Treviglio. Incoraggiati da spirito imprenditoriale e da preparazione tecnica, i fratelli Marini decisero di adattare all'uso per il trasporto dei passeggeri alcuni camion residuato bellico, gettando così le basi per il futuro sviluppo della S.A.I. Treviglio srl. L'occasione d'impresa per far nascere la prima linea di trasporto pubblico è data dalla grande affluenza di pellegrini provenienti da Milano al Santuario della Madonna di Caravaggio. In breve tempo, gli automezzi aumentano, sino a raggiungere le 30 unità con altrettanti conducenti che si dedicano al trasporto dei passeggeri, al noleggio degli automezzi e al servizio taxi, per i percorsi commissionati dai privati. In seguito, l'azienda istituisce servizi di linea per il trasporto delle maestranze dirette alle fabbriche del Linificio di Villa d'Almè, Cassano e Fara Gera d'Adda, della Pirelli, Falk, Magneti Marelli di Milano.
Oggi S.A.I. TREVIGLIO dispone di una flotta di circa 80 mezzi utilizzati per il trasporto extraurbano transitando nella Provincia di Bergamo, Milano e Brescia.
Nello specifico nella Provincia di Bergamo operiamo nell’area SUD sviluppando circa 2.000.000 Km annui transitando da 47 comuni.
Disponiamo inoltre di 15 moderni autobus Gran Turismo da 8 a 85 posti per il servizio da Noleggio Con Conducente.

Name: ReliaWheels LLC
Description:
At ReliaWheels LLC, we believe every ride matters. Based in Brook Park, Ohio, we provide safe, reliable, and compassionate wheelchair and non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) services to individuals, families, and healthcare facilities across the region.

Whether it’s a trip to dialysis, a hospital discharge, a therapy appointment, or a family arranging transportation for a loved one, our mission is simple: connect people to care with dignity, reliability, and compassion.

What Sets Us Apart

Wheelchair & Accessible Transportation: WC19 crash-tested and certified equipment, including the Traversa Transport Chair.

Trusted Drivers: All drivers are background-checked, CPR-certified, and trained to ensure patient safety and comfort.

On-Time & Professional: We pride ourselves on punctuality and clear communication with facilities and passengers.

Easy Scheduling: Through our dispatch system and Bambi Portal, trips can be booked and tracked seamlessly.

Facility Partnerships: Nursing homes, assisted living centers, dialysis & therapy clinics, hospitals, and case managers trust us as their transportation partner.

Our Promise

Every ride is sanitized, climate-controlled, and supported by trained professionals who understand that transportation is more than just a ride—it’s peace of mind.

At ReliaWheels, Reliability Meets Compassion.

 Follow us for updates, community impact stories, and to learn more about how we’re helping people across Ohio stay connected to the care they need.

#ReliaWheels #TransportationYouCanTrust #WheelchairTransportation #MedicalTransportation #AccessibleTransportation #NEMT #HealthcareSupport #MobilitySolutions #CommunityCare

Name: GlyDee Electric Drive Inc.
Description:
2050 is the Mandate. GlyDee is the Architecture.

Canada is legally bound to reach Net-Zero emissions by 2050, with a mandatory requirement that 100% of new passenger vehicle sales be zero-emission by 2035. This national transformation faces a critical failure point: Charging Anxiety. Without a reliable, strategic & national charging skeleton, Canada cannot meet its climate obligations.

GlyDee is the Venture Architect providing the operational & digital infrastructure necessary to transition Canada from high-level policy to ground-level execution.

STRATEGIC GOVERNANCE & EXECUTION
GlyDee is steered by a Board of Strategic Advisors with over 25 years of institutional experience in P&L oversight, venture architecture & federal-level negotiations. Our leadership ensures every project is executed with the discipline required to manage high-stakes national infrastructure. By maintaining a governance-first approach, we bridge the gap between innovation & the rigid requirements of federal mandates.

OUR PILLARS: THE NET-ZERO SKELETON

1. Eliminating Charging Anxiety: We architect high-availability, AI-driven charging hubs designed to give every Canadian the confidence to go electric, eliminating "charging deserts" nationwide.

2. Federal Policy Realization: We bridge the gap between the Canadian Net-Zero Emissions Accountability Act & the physical power grid, ensuring infrastructure rollout matches the 2030 & 2035 milestones.

3. Strategic Capital Optimization: Backed by expertise in Capital Procurement ($5M+ project frameworks) and $50M+ P&L management, we ensure capital—both private & public—is deployed with maximum efficiency to hit national ZEV targets.

THE COMMITMENT
GlyDee provides the Strategic Architecture necessary for Canada to lead the global shift to green energy. We are engaging with Tier-1 investors, municipal leaders & technology partners to roll out a national footprint ready for the 2050 horizon.

The mission is 2050. The roadmap is GlyDee.

Name: Aerocab Perú | Transfer & Taxi Corporativo
Description:
En Aerocab Perú somos una empresa con más de ocho años de experiencia en el sector de transporte ejecutivo y turístico, dedicada a brindar un servicio de movilidad segura, puntual y de calidad superior para personas, empresas y viajeros que buscan confianza en cada trayecto.

Nuestra esencia se basa en la excelencia del servicio y la atención personalizada, entendiendo que cada cliente tiene necesidades únicas. Por eso, diseñamos soluciones de transporte adaptadas a cada contexto: desde traslados corporativos y ejecutivos, hasta servicios turísticos para visitantes nacionales e internacionales que desean conocer el Perú con total seguridad y confort.

Nos distinguimos por ofrecer una experiencia donde la elegancia, la responsabilidad y la puntualidad son nuestra carta de presentación. Cada conductor de Aerocab representa los valores que sustentan nuestra marca: confianza, profesionalismo, respeto y compromiso con la calidad.

A lo largo de estos años, hemos consolidado relaciones con empresas corporativas, instituciones y aliados estratégicos que valoran un servicio transparente, serio y eficiente. Entendemos que en el mundo empresarial, la movilidad no solo traslada personas, sino también oportunidades, relaciones y crecimiento.
Por eso, trabajamos para ser un socio estratégico en movilidad ejecutiva y turística, conectando empresas, personas y destinos con seguridad y excelencia.

En Aerocab, creemos que el éxito de una empresa comienza con la confianza en sus aliados. Nuestra visión es construir una red de transporte que impulse el desarrollo empresarial, el turismo responsable y la movilidad sostenible en el Perú.

Cada viaje con nosotros es más que un traslado: es una experiencia que combina tecnología, atención humana y compromiso real.
Nos impulsa la convicción de que la movilidad debe ser más que un servicio: debe ser un vínculo de confianza y progreso compartido.

Name: GetGəl
Description:
Ölkəmizin istənilən bölgəsinə gediş imkanı artıq Sizin smartfonunuzda! Şəhəri seçin, vaxtı və yeri qeyd edin və maksimum rahatlıqla səyahət edin. Ucuz səyahət etmək və gedişlərdən pul qazanmaq indi çox asandır!
Sərnişinlərə:
Getgəl ilə regionlara səyahət etmək düşündüyünüzdən daha sərfəlidir, sadəcə tətbiqə daxil olun və getmək istədiyiniz istiqaməti seçin. Yerinizi əvvəlcədən bron edin və səyahətinizdən həzz alın.
● Bütün regionlara səyahət etmək imkanı
Azərbaycanın istənilən bölgəsinə asanlıqla səyahət edin.
● Vaxta qənaət edin
Səyahətinizə istədiyiniz vaxtda başlamağı təklif edirik, qeyd etdiyiniz vaxtda gözləmədən gedişə başlaya bilərsiniz.
● Qiymətləri müqayisə etmək imkanı
Siz seçdiyiniz istiqamətlər üçün sürücülərin təklif etdiyi qiymətlər arasında seçim edə bilərsiniz və sizin qiymət seçiminiz heç bir keyfiyyət meyarına təsir etmir.
● Etibarlılıq
Sizi əmin edə bilərik ki, sürücülərdən tələb olunan bütün hüquqi sənədlər şirkətimiz tərəfindən tam şəkildə yoxlanılıb.
● Sürücü ilə birbaşa əlaqə
Siz tədbiqdən çıxmadan sürücüyə yaza və ya mobil nömrənizlə əlaqə saxlaya bilərsiniz.

● Qiymətləndirmə
Tətbiqdə gedişin sonunda səyahətinizin keyfiyyətini qiymətləndirə bilərsiniz. Siz həmçinin səfər axtararkən hər bir sürücünün reytinqini yoxlaya bilərsiniz.

Sürücülərə:
Getgəl sizə vaxt itirmədən, sərnişin axtarmadan və onları saatlarla gözləmədən pul qazanmağa imkan verir. Sadəcə tədbiqi yükləyin və gedişlərinizə başlayın.

● Fərdiləşdirin
İstənilən nəqliyyat növü ilə işləyə bilərsiniz. Nə vaxt, harada və nə qədər qazanmaq istədiyinizə siz qərar verirsiniz.

● Getdiyiniz məkana uyğunlaşdırın
Siz həm Bakıdan rayonlara, həm də rayonlararası səfərlər edə bilərsiniz.

● Tənha səfərlərə son verin
 
İndi tətbiq vasitəsilə bölgələri gəzərək, sərinişin taparaq pul qazanmaq imkanınız var.

● Asanlıqla qeydiyyatdan keçin
Tətbiqi quraşdırdıqdan sonra siz sürücü kimi qeydiyyata davam edə bilərsiniz və bu seçim hətta sərnişin kimi qeydiyyatdan keçsəniz belə mövcuddur.

Established in 1997, Sparksman Transportation is a people transportation company committed to Safety and Service. We operate primarily in north-eastern Alberta from the Thorhild and Smoky Lake counties in the south, north to Slave Lake, Fort McMurray, Conklin and Fort McKay. Since our incorporation, Sparksman has been providing seamless and complete transportation services across Alberta, and our flexibility allows us to focus on taking care of our specific customer’s needs by working closely with them to ensure they receive unique, personalized service. We recognize that no two partnerships have the same requirements.

In addition to our Transportation Services, we are also a Licensed Class 2 Driver Training School, providing classroom and on-road training. Additionally, we offer the School Bus Driver Improvement Program ('S' Endorsement), First Aid Training, and many other in-house courses, developed to support our own drivers and those of our customers.

If you are looking for a people transportation service provider, look no further than Sparksman Transportation! And if you are looking for a rewarding career as a bus driver, reach out and start your journey with us!

Name: Gomywayride Services Ltd.
Description:
My name is Mastar Caesar, a Nigerian. It began in 2012 when I visited Lagos for the first time after 15 years away from Nigeria. My goal was to travel as much as possible all over Nigeria, so I bought a car and made some friends in Lagos.

Driving up and down the Highways, I kept picking up travelers. They told me getting to various parts of Nigeria was difficult unless you had your own car, and the only other option was the public bus, which is slow, expensive and much time wasting at the park. These buses will not move until their passengers are complete, thereby staying hours at the park waiting for the buses to get full.

Then, I was looking for a project to cut my teeth into web development. I did a Google search to see if there were any good carpool solutions to get around Nigeria without stress, there were none. I decided to build a simple website to help connect car owners and people looking for rides going the same way. Few days later, Gomywayride Services Ltd was created.

The website got over 10,000 members in its first launched, it grew through word of mouth as a side project and still growing today. In 2017 I decided to quit my job and relocated to Nigeria to focus on growing the service into a business. Between 2017 and 2019, I focused on improving the platform, which attracted another 10,000 members. I also launched mobile apps to help people organize rides on the Gomywayride Services Ltd platform. In the middle of 2019, I reached a crossroads. With a killer product, over 50,000 members and 2,600,000 km shared. I had evolved the original concept of Gomywayride Services Ltd to an online platform for people to prearrange rides, and has enabled thousands of people to trust each other and travel together.The Gomywayride Services Ltd Platform is constantly growing, and thanks to member feedback.

Our vision is to live in a world where we all share useful things/valuable supplies to better preserve the earth. Our mission is simple: to fill empty car seats

Name: Volteryde
Description:
Revolutionizing Urban Transport in Ghana

Volteryde Electric Transport is Ghana's first electric bus service, providing reliable, comfortable, and eco-friendly transportation solutions for urban commuters.

 OUR MISSION
To transform Ghana's urban mobility by offering scheduled, trackable, and safe electric bus services that connect working professionals and students with their destinations efficiently.

 WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT
 100% Electric Fleet - Zero emissions, comfortable rides
 Mobile App Platform - Real-time tracking, seat booking, mobile money payments
 Fixed Schedules - Reliable departures every 15-30 minutes
 Professional Service - Trained drivers, maintained vehicles, customer support
 Target Routes - University campuses, business districts, residential areas

 SOLVING REAL PROBLEMS
• 25+ million Ghanaians depend on unreliable trotros daily
• 86% of urban transport lacks schedules or safety standards
• No technology integration for booking or tracking
• Safety concerns with overcrowded, poorly maintained vehicles

 OUR SOLUTION
Modern electric buses with:
- Real-time GPS tracking through mobile app
- Comfortable seating with AC and WiFi
- Mobile money integration (MTN, Telecel, AirtelTigo)
- Predictable schedules and route optimization
- Professional customer service

 TARGET MARKET
- Working professionals (25-34 years) seeking reliable commute options
- University students needing affordable, safe transportation
- Corporate clients requiring shuttle services
- Urban families prioritizing comfort and safety

 EXPANSION PLAN
Phase 1: Greater Accra
Phase 2: Business districts and residential areas
Phase 3: Secondary cities (Kumasi, Tema, Takoradi)

Join us in building the future of sustainable urban mobility in Ghana!

#ElectricTransport #UrbanMobility #Ghana #Sustainability #Technology

Name: Tawseeleh
Description:
The effectiveness of smart transportation solutions lies in being futuristic, so today (Tawseeleh) is building tomorrow’s opportunities

Many daily commuters, including employees, students, and others, often face challenges in their transportation routines. Recognizing this, we believe that optimizing transportation can enhance individuals' focus on work. Hence, we advocate for fostering connections and encouraging participation in carpooling as a solution.

 Presently, Tawseeleh enables users to share their journeys with others following the same route but heading to different destinations. This can be achieved by either rotating between group vehicles (e.g., using Ahmed's car in the first week, Sami's car in the second week, and so on) or utilizing a single individual's vehicle, with the associated fuel costs shared among the passengers. Embracing this collaborative approach, Tawseeleh aims to transform the daily commute into a shared and cost-effective experience for all participants.

Name: Neighborly Rideshare
Description:
Neighborly Rideshare is a local software platform that connects independent drivers with riders in the Bloomington-Normal community.

We are not a transportation employer. Drivers who use the Neighborly Rideshare platform operate as independent contractors, choosing when and how they participate. Our role is to provide the technology, tools, and operational framework that support safe, transparent, and efficient ride coordination at a local level.

What makes Neighborly Rideshare different is our community-first approach. We believe mobility platforms should scale responsibly while remaining rooted in the communities they serve. Our model prioritizes local relationships, clear expectations, and systems designed to support both drivers and riders without extracting value from the community.

Neighborly Rideshare is part of the broader Neighborly Services ecosystem—an initiative focused on building scalable systems that operate locally, empower independent operators, and keep people at the center of technology.

Our mission is to support accessible, reliable local mobility through a platform built on trust, transparency, and community alignment.

Your details are treated with the highest level of confidentiality because we understand that your privacy is priceless. Every reservation is encrypted, secure, and designed to give you complete confidence.
 
At AR Vital Direction, travel is more than going from point A to B—it’s about safety, sophistication, and privacy. Every mile brings confidence and comfort.
 
Your journey, our promise. Safe. Secure. Sophisticated. Confidential. Elegant. Reliable. Timeless. Exceptional.

Founded in 2013, Loon Limo has swiftly risen to become a trusted name in premium business class transportation. With over 15 years of hands-on experience in customer service, we have built this company with one goal in mind: to deliver an exceptional, tailored experience that meets the exacting standards of our corporate clients.

We didn’t rush into the market; we took our time to understand it, to learn from it, and to perfect our approach. Our success isn’t by accident—it’s the result of strategic planning, an unwavering commitment to quality, and an understanding of what our clients truly need.

Name: Grupo Coletivo
Description:
Com uma longa e sólida história, o Grupo Coletivo nasceu de um forte propósito: transportar pessoas e facilitar a vida de milhares de habitantes, diariamente.

Com posição relevante em todos os segmentos em que opera, o Grupo Coletivo atua no transporte urbano e rodoviário de passageiros, estando presente em praticamente 10% do Estado de Pernambuco.

Dispondo de uma das mais novas frotas do território pernambucano, a Coletivo atua também, com destaque e liderança, em outros segmentos de negócios, sendo eles: Turismo, Locação e Fretamento.

A ação conjunta nesses segmentos garante sinergias de negócios que promovem um modelo de transporte baseado em qualidade, segurança, eficiência e pontualidade à comunidade na qual está inserida, sem descuidar da limpeza e higiene.

A empresa Ônibus Coletivos e Transportes LTDA., fundada em 1988, cobre uma grande parte das linhas regulares do município de Caruaru e da região, contribuindo para a movimentação da economia regional.

Nos últimos anos, a Coletivo foi reconhecida com o prêmio Top Marcas – as marcas de que Caruaru mais gosta, título concedido pelo Jornal Vanguarda através da JM Consultoria e Pesquisa, em razão do alto grau de reputação, penetração e conhecimento do nome no mercado. Esse reconhecimento só foi atribuído a um pequeno grupo de empresas, graças ao reconhecimento do público usuário dos nossos serviços.

Dessa forma, está consolidada como marca expressiva, sendo empresa sólida e prestigiada pelos clientes. Assim sendo, a Coletivo avança, aprimora-se e cresce cada vez mais, como um dos mais conhecidos símbolos do empreendedorismo regional, presentes nas estradas desta imensa região.

Que fazer parte do nosso time e embarcar nessa com a gente? Trabalhe conosco: coletivos.com.br/trabalhe-conosco

Está conformada por compañías que representan marcas reconocidas a nivel nacional e internacional, tales como: Ace, Alamo, Amerirent, Avis, Budget, Dollar, Economy, Enterprise, Europcar, Fox Rent A Car, Gold Car, Hertz, Honda, Interrent, Meta, National, Nelly, Payless, Sixt y Thrifty.

Su misión es fortalecer el desarrollo del sector, garantizar estándares de calidad y promover una movilidad segura, eficiente y confiable para todos los usuarios.

Desde su fundación en 1967, ANDRI se ha consolidado como una plataforma clave para:

 Garantizar estándares de calidad, seguridad y cumplimiento legal en el servicio de alquiler de vehículos.
 Representar al sector frente a entidades gubernamentales, aeroportuarias y turísticas.
 Impulsar la innovación, el servicio al cliente y el desarrollo del turismo sostenible.
 Velar por los intereses tanto de las empresas afiliadas como de los usuarios finales.

Una muestra más de cómo la unión del sector privado puede generar impacto positivo a nivel nacional.

Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer un servicio cómodo, moderno y puntual, tanto para viajeros individuales como para grupos o empresas.

Contamos con una flota de autobuses equipada con tecnología de última generación, asientos reclinables, climatización, WiFi y todos los elementos necesarios para que cada trayecto sea una experiencia segura y agradable.

Además de nuestras rutas regulares, ofrecemos servicio de alquiler de autobuses para traslados corporativos, excursiones, eventos especiales y más. Trabajamos con empresas, colegios, agencias de viajes y particulares, adaptándonos a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente.

En Busbam creemos que viajar no es solo trasladarse de un lugar a otro, sino vivir momentos, crear recuerdos y conectar con lo que más importa. Por eso, cuidamos cada detalle, desde la atención al cliente hasta la puntualidad en nuestras salidas.

 Conecta con nosotros y descubre cómo podemos hacer tu próximo viaje más sencillo, cómodo y seguro.

Its wide-ranging services cater to government agencies, private companies, and tourism organizations, offering flexible transportation solutions tailored to each client’s needs.

In addition to its transport operations, Plachiva works closely with Tropical Voyages Co., Ltd., reinforcing its presence in the tourism and hospitality sector. The company invests in continuous staff training, driver safety programs, and vehicle maintenance systems to uphold its reputation for punctuality, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.

With a forward-thinking mindset, Plachiva is actively exploring EV (electric vehicle) integration, aligning with Thailand’s shift toward sustainable transportation. This includes partnering with clients and government agencies to support carbon reduction goals and prepare for the future of green mobility.

Nous proposons uniquement des prestations haut de gamme pour une clientèle exigeante
-	Notre chauffeur est un professionnel formé et en tenue.
-	Il vous prévient de son arrivée 30 minutes avant la prise en charge.

-	Nous mettons à votre disposition des boissons, confiseries, matériel Covid (masque, gel, lingettes), chargeurs de téléphone, tablette et journal local.

Toutes nos prestations font l'objet d'une réservation préalable, à l'issue de laquelle nous vous transmettons un devis, comprenant l'intégralité de vos demandes et le tarif fixe de la prestation souhaitée.

Name: Fairpay Inc.
Description:
We are a San Francisco based start up offering Mobility-as-a-Service (Maas) to commuters by connecting them to our listing service that features independent business owners of Taxis, Limousines and TNC drivers (Rideshare like Uber/Lyft). 

Our apps on Play and Apple stores facilitate fare transactions allowing riders to pay in cash or thru card. Since we are a listing service, we strictly follow AB5, the California regulation pertaining to independent contractors. This allows us to offer 100% of customer fares to drivers on our network and avoid the pitfalls of Prop 22. We are a subscription service so this allows us to keep revenue predictable and thus manage our bottom line in a way that is unheard of from pioneers of the ride hailing business.

Fairpay Inc. is focused in growing in California and have started  onboarding drivers in  the San Francisco Bay Area. We intend to grow the revenue of the very people who are front and center of the business, while keeping fares affordable for commuters. We do not have surge pricing, predatory schemes to attract vehicles and leave them hanging, nor do we charge the riders for driver's healthcare and other fees. 

Fairpay is what our name suggests and we hope to live up to these ideals while growing the business beyond California's borders.

Name: Federation of Drivers and Conductors(FEDCO)
Description:
Federation of Drivers and Conductors (FEDCO), a society group established
in 2015 with a noble mission to uplift and support the informal group of drivers
and conductors in Kenya's public service vehicle sector. At FEDCO, we
recognize the vital role these individuals play in our society, and our primary
objective is to address their wellness needs, social empowerment, and
capacity building.
Our commitment to supporting this neglected human capital starts with
formalizing their workspaces and providing them with a platform to voice their
concerns and challenges. We advocate for their rights and interests by
offering legal representation, ensuring fair working conditions, and fostering a
sense of unity and camaraderie among our members.
We understand the risks and uncertainties that come with this line of work,
which is why we prioritize the well-being of our members. FDC proudly
provides comprehensive insurance coverage, ensuring financial security and
peace of mind for drivers and conductors and their families.
In addition to addressing the immediate needs of our members, we believe in
empowering them for a better future. FEDCO facilitates capacity building
through various training programs. Our focus areas include road safety
training to enhance driving skills, first aid training to handle emergency
situations effectively, and customer service training to promote
professionalism and improve passenger experience.
By actively working towards the welfare, empowerment, and development of
drivers and conductors, FDC aims to create a sustainable and inclusive public
service vehicle sector in Kenya. We collaborate with relevant stakeholders,
government bodies, and industry experts to advocate for positive change and
create a conducive working environment.
As you explore our website, we invite you to learn more about our initiatives,
achievements, and ongoing projects. Whether you are a driver, conductor,
industry professional, or concerned citizen, we encourage you to

Name: Waiheke Executive Transport
Description:
Waiheke Executive Transport is a family-owned business that’s been part of this island’s story for over 20 years. We’ve watched Waiheke grow from a quiet getaway into one of New Zealand’s most loved destinations – and we’ve grown right alongside it. In that time, we’ve built up one of the largest fleets on the island, assembled a team of experienced local driver guides, and completed thousands of successful tours and transfers.

Why Visitors Trust Us
Our goal is simple: we want you to experience the very best of Waiheke with complete peace of mind. Every one of our drivers is a trained, professional tour guide who knows the island inside out. Our modern fleet of coaches, shuttles, and sedans is regularly maintained and monitored in real-time, so we always know where our vehicles are and can respond quickly to any situation.

What really sets us apart is having staff in our main office ready to take your calls and make changes on the fly. Ferries run late, plans shift, and groups don’t always move as one – we’ve become experts at adapting. Whether it’s picking up latecomers from another sailing, arranging early departures, or adding a scenic detour, our team makes it happen seamlessly.

How We Make It Easy
We monitor ferry arrivals in real-time and park right outside the terminal for quick, stress-free loading. Our drivers will meet you with a signboard and stay in mobile contact with your group throughout the day. With our large fleet, we always have backup vehicles ready and can respond to changes instantly.

Safety is our top priority. Our vehicles meet the highest standards, and after two decades on the island, we’ve built strong relationships with local vineyards, restaurants, and businesses – connections that help us create better experiences for you.

REAL LOCAL KNOWLEDGE
Our team doesn’t just work on Waiheke – we love this place. Our driver guides can share genuine local insights, recommend hidden gems, and adjust your route to show you the island at its best

Name: R. A. PASSAGENS
Description:
A R. A. Passagens é uma empresa dedicada exclusivamente ao transporte rodoviário de passageiros, oferecendo soluções práticas e acessíveis para quem precisa viajar com segurança, conforto e tranquilidade. Nosso propósito é facilitar o acesso a passagens de ônibus, tanto de forma online quanto presencial, garantindo uma experiência simples, confiável e acolhedora para cada cliente.

Entendemos que viajar vai muito além do deslocamento: é visitar a família, buscar novas oportunidades, viver momentos especiais e construir histórias. Por isso, trabalhamos com compromisso e responsabilidade, orientando o passageiro desde a escolha da melhor rota até a finalização da compra da passagem, sempre com atendimento humanizado, rápido e eficiente.

Para atender diferentes perfis de viajantes, oferecemos venda digital via WhatsApp e plataformas online, ideal para quem busca agilidade e praticidade, e também atendimento presencial, voltado a pessoas que preferem proximidade e suporte direto. Em ambos os casos, nossa prioridade é garantir clareza, respeito e total segurança na compra.

Nosso atendimento é personalizado, com suporte contínuo para esclarecer dúvidas, apresentar as melhores opções de horários e conduzir todo o processo de forma transparente. Prezamos pela confiança, pelo cuidado com cada detalhe da viagem e pelo compromisso de entregar um serviço honesto e responsável.

Mais do que vender passagens, a R. A. Passagens se dedica a conectar pessoas aos seus destinos com qualidade, atenção e credibilidade. Cada cliente é tratado com seriedade e atenção individual, porque acreditamos que a forma como cuidamos da jornada de cada um define quem somos como empresa.

R. A. Passagens – sua viagem começa com confiança.

Name: Busreisen Caspari GmbH
Description:
Die Busreisen Caspari GmbH ist ein Familienunternehmen in der dritten Generation, das seit seiner Gründung im Jahr 1975 kontinuierlich gewachsen ist. Mit Stolz können wir auf eine lange Tradition und Erfahrung in der Personenbeförderungsbranche zurückblicken, die uns zu einem verlässlichen Partner für unsere Kunden macht.

Das Unternehmen beschäftigt derzeit rund 105 engagierte Mitarbeiter und verfügt über einen modernen Fuhrpark von 65 Fahrzeugen. Diese ermöglichen es uns, eine breite Palette von Dienstleistungen anzubieten, die darauf abzielen, die Mobilität unserer Kunden sicher und effizient zu gestalten.

Unsere Tätigkeiten sind in zwei Geschäftsfelder unterteilt, um den vielfältigen Anforderungen unserer Kunden gerecht zu werden.

Einerseits bieten wir spezialisierte Dienstleistungen im Bereich der Beförderung von Menschen mit Behinderungen sowie den damit verbundenen Werksverkehr innerhalb der Betriebswerkstätten an. Dabei legen wir besonderen Wert auf ein Höchstmaß an Komfort, Sicherheit und barrierefreie Zugänglichkeit für unsere Fahrgäste.

Andererseits sind wir auch im Kraftomnibusbereich tätig und betreuen den öffentlichen Schüler- und Linienverkehr. Unser erfahrenes Team von Fahrern und Mitarbeiterinnen sorgt dafür, dass unsere Passagiere pünktlich, sicher und bequem an ihr Ziel gelangen. Wir legen großen Wert auf Kundenzufriedenheit und arbeiten kontinuierlich daran, unsere Dienstleistungen weiter zu verbessern und zu optimieren.

Als Familienunternehmen in der dritten Generation sind wir stolz darauf, Teil der Mobilitätslösungen in unserer Region zu sein. Wir sind bestrebt, die hohen Standards und Werte, die unser Unternehmen seit über vierzig Jahren auszeichnen, fortzusetzen und weiterzuentwickeln.

Name: Garden of Eden Limited
Description:
Garden of Eden Ltd came into existence in 1932, when Giuseppe Spiteri first purchased a 14-seater Chevrolet to use as a coach. Thanks to his resilient spirit and hard work, within just a year he upgraded his coach for a 29-seater Diamond-T bus. Over time, Giuseppe bought a Reo coach which he himself modified to hold up to 32 people. The Reo was later on replaced by a Bedford OB bus. This was the start of Garden of Eden’s journey to become one of Malta’s leading transport companies.

Over the years, Giuseppe’s youngest son, Angelo, took over the business and added a fleet of modernised coaches to their repertoire. Angelo and Giuseppe together built their very first minibus, as the demand for their services increased drastically. After some time, they started importing a selection of coaches and minibuses from the UK. By the early 1990s, Angelo’s sons took over their father’s business after his passing. Nowadays, Garden of Eden is known among a number of tour organisers and people for their stellar tour operations and affluent transport solutions it offers.


Garden of Eden branches into various fields related to transport. These include the Garden of Eden Garage — a repair shop that specialises in heavy-duty cars and commercial fleets. The Diamond Lounge Limo Coach, a state-of-the-art extravagant limousine coach ideal for corporate functions and private parties, and Location Malta, a company founded to present incoming and outgoing travellers with leisurely travel solutions

Name: ParkingMD
Description:
ParkingMD - Accessible Healthcare for Accessible Parking

ParkingMD is a leading telehealth platform dedicated to providing convenient, professional disability parking permit evaluations for individuals with qualifying medical conditions. We believe healthcare should be accessible to everyone, especially those who need it most.

What We Do:
We connect patients with licensed physicians for comprehensive disability parking permit evaluations through secure, HIPAA-compliant telehealth consultations. Our streamlined process eliminates the need for difficult trips to traditional medical offices, making healthcare truly accessible.

Who We Serve:
Individuals with medical conditions that significantly impact mobility, including:
✓ Difficulty walking 200+ feet without rest
✓ Users of mobility aids (wheelchairs, walkers, canes, crutches)
✓ Heart, lung, or circulatory conditions causing fatigue
✓ Neurological conditions (MS, Parkinson's, arthritis)
✓ Limb differences or amputations
✓ Temporary conditions from surgery or injury
Our Process:

Quick online eligibility check
Same-day appointments available via phone or video
Licensed physician evaluation (typically 10-15 minutes)
Medical certification provided within 24-48 hours
Easy submission to your local DMV

Why Choose ParkingMD:
✓ Expert medical guidance
✓ Fast approvals and processing
✓ 100% online application process
✓ Secure and confidential platform
✓ Money-back guarantee if not approved
✓ Licensed physician network in all states

Our Mission:
To break down barriers to healthcare access by providing dignified, professional disability parking permit evaluations through innovative telehealth solutions. We're committed to serving those who face mobility challenges with compassion and convenience.

Licensed physicians. Trusted process. Better accessibility.

Description:
Somos una empresa comprometida con la innovación y la calidad en el transporte privado de pasajeros. Nuestro enfoque se basa en un entendimiento profundo de las necesidades de cada actor del ecosistema de transporte, buscando siempre soluciones que generen valor y mejoren las condiciones del mercado.

A través de la implementación de tecnología avanzada y algoritmos de Inteligencia Artificial, optimizamos la asignación de carreras y automatizamos la gestión de gastos, asegurando así un servicio eficiente y preciso. Nos distinguimos por priorizar la seguridad y la selección de nuestros conductores, monitoreándolos constantemente con la retroalimentación de nuestros usuarios, garantizando que cada vehículo esté en óptimas condiciones para brindar una experiencia de transporte confiable y de alta calidad.

Nuestro objetivo es convertirnos en un radiotaxi tecnológico de referencia, con un enfoque único: empoderar a los conductores y titulares de vehículos, ofreciéndoles herramientas que les permitan tener un control total sobre sus operaciones. Creemos que la transparencia, la seguridad y la confianza son fundamentales para generar relaciones duraderas con nuestros clientes y colaboradores.

Estamos aquí para transformar la experiencia de cada viaje, creando un entorno donde la eficiencia se une con la personalización, y cada carrera se convierta en una solución que sume valor para todos.

Name: Premier EV Solutions LLC
Description:
About Premier EV Solutions
Mission Statement
"At Premier EV Solutions, we aim to redefine the personal driving industry by offering eco-friendly, luxurious, and customer-focused services. Our mission is to deliver a sustainable and superior travel experience that exceeds customer expectations."

Our Story
Founded by John Lee Gauntlett, Premier EV Solutions emerged from a desire for meaningful change. After retiring from a successful career in higher education, John assessed the rideshare landscape and saw room for improvement, particularly in environmental sustainability.

Inspired by visionaries like Elon Musk, John switched from gas-powered vehicles to electric Teslas. This eco-conscious choice resonated with customers, leading to increased demand for his services.

Products and Services
Short-Distance Rides: From 5 miles, ideal for city commuting.
Long-Distance Rides: Up to 3,000 miles for special journeys.
Luxury Experience: Ride in style with our Tesla fleet.
Eco-Friendly: Reduce your carbon footprint with our electric fleet.
Customer Focus
Our commitment to customer satisfaction sets us apart. Each ride leads to new customers who choose us again for our exceptional customer care.

Social Responsibility
Coming from a lower-income background, John is committed to giving back and building a better future for his family. This ethos is embedded in our company's DNA.

The Future
Currently operating with two cars, we plan to expand our fleet to offer more options, always prioritizing customer needs.

In summary, Premier EV Solutions is not just a rideshare company; we are a movement towards a more sustainable and customer-focused future.

Actuamos como intermediarios en la organización de rutas en autobús, colaborando con las mejores compañías de transporte.

Alianzas estratégicas: Trabajamos con organizadores de eventos de renombre como Elrow y Brunch Electronik para asegurar una experiencia fluida desde la salida hasta la llegada.
Nuestra misión:
Hacer que el transporte hacia los grandes eventos sea una parte esencial de la experiencia, permitiendo a los usuarios disfrutar del trayecto tanto como del destino. Cada viaje es una oportunidad para conectarse, celebrar y vivir momentos únicos.

Viaja con Rutabest y forma parte de la experiencia desde el primer kilómetro!

1991 óta a célunk, hogy ügyfeleink dolgozói, utasai és csoportjai biztonságosan, kényelmesen és pontosan jussanak el úti céljukhoz – legyen szó napi munkásjáratról, belföldi kirándulásról vagy nemzetközi utazásról.

Flottánk több mint 30 modern, 17–57 fős autóbuszból áll, amelyeket saját műhelyünkben szervizelünk és folyamatosan karbantartunk. Tapasztalt, több éves rutinnal rendelkező sofőrjeink és autókozmetikusaink gondoskodnak arról, hogy minden járatunk a legmagasabb színvonalon valósuljon meg.

Szolgáltatásaink közé tartozik:
 Dolgozói személyszállítás (rendszeres munkásjáratok)
 Kirándulások, osztálykirándulások, városnézések
 Csapatépítő és céges rendezvények szállítása
 Transzferek (pl. repülőtér, esküvő, események)

A Csababusz csapata az egyéni igényeket figyelembe véve, rugalmas menetrenddel és kedvező árakkal kínál megoldást mindenkinek, aki megbízható autóbusz-partnert keres.
Büszkék vagyunk arra, hogy ügyfeleink többsége hosszú évek óta velünk utazik — számukra a biztonság, pontosság és szakértelem a garancia.

Preis-Leistung:

Komfort:
Genießen Sie Ihre Geschäftsreisen künftig in der vertrauten Umgebung Ihres eigenen Fahrzeugs. Nutzen Sie die dazugewonnene Zeit um Ihrer beruflichen Tätigkeit nachzugehen oder tanken Sie Energie für anstehende Aufgaben und Herausforderungen.

Unsere Chauffeure:
Drivfect steht für Integrität und Zuverlässigkeit. Alle unsere festangestellten Chauffeure unterliegen einer strengen Schweigepflicht.
Außerdem besitzen sie seit mindestens drei Jahren die Fahrerlaubnis, einen Personen-Beförderungsschein und haben keinen Eintrag im Fahreignungsregister.

L’azienda, che fonda le sue radici nel secondo dopoguerra, nasce come officina e centro noleggio di bicicli. Alla fine degli anni ‘50 alle due attività si associa quella di Noleggio con Conducente sulla quale presto si concentrerà l’attenzione della famiglia che, dedicando al più recente interesse sempre maggiori energie e risorse, in breve svilupperà e migliorerà a tal punto la qualità e completezza del servizio che ne nascerà quel marchio che ancor oggi è riconosciuto quale sinonimo di eccellenza e imprescindibile punto di riferimento.
Autonoleggi Causin è specializzata nel Noleggio Con Conducente. Da oltre 60 anni siamo punto di riferimento importante: apprezzati dalla Clientela, stimati dai Partner, imitati dalla Concorrenza.
Ogni servizio offerto, sia esso un breve trasferimento o un lungo viaggio internazionale, nasce da un attento processo produttivo attraverso il quale il nostro personale competente e motivato segue nei minimi dettagli l’intero sviluppo del programma. Ci impegniamo ogni giorno con tenacia e serietà per:
Creare un valore importante per i nostri Clienti, seguendo una politica di sviluppo aziendale coerente e concreta.
Contribuire al benessere e alla crescita professionale di collaboratori e dipendenti, perché sempre si sentano partecipi e protagonisti.
Condividere con l’esterno elementi di innovazione nel pieno rispetto dei valori etici e della trasparenza.
L’attività di Autonoleggi Causin è focalizzata a mantenere la propria posizione di azienda leader nel settore del Noleggio Con Conducente attraverso uno sviluppo basato sull’esperienza e sull’innovazione, sulla sicurezza, sulla formazione e valorizzazione del personale, sulla regolare manutenzione dei mezzi e sul periodico rinnovamento del parco macchine.
Siamo guidati dalla cultura del cambiamento per migliorarci ed evolverci costantemente.

Description:
Tribür Caribbean is a premier ride-hailing platform dedicated to connecting riders with certified taxi drivers in Nassau, Bahamas. Our mission is to enhance the traditional taxi experience by providing a seamless, reliable, and convenient service through our user-friendly mobile application.

Our Services:

Pre-Order Booking: Schedule rides in advance to align with your plans.
On-Demand Booking: Request immediate pickups from the nearest available drivers.
Flexible Payment Options: Pay with cash or use your driver’s third-party cashless terminal for card payments.
Driver Benefits:

Zero Commission Subscription Plan: Drivers retain 100% of their earnings with our subscription-based model.
Price Autonomy: While Tribür provides fare suggestions based on government-regulated rates, drivers have the flexibility to set their own prices within the legal framework.
Safety and Quality Assurance:

Certified Taxi Drivers: All drivers are licensed professionals who have undergone thorough background checks and operate vehicles that meet Bahamian regulatory standards.
Vetted Vehicles: Regular inspections ensure all vehicles adhere to stringent safety and quality criteria.
Real-Time GPS Tracking: Monitor your trip from start to finish for added peace of mind.
Emergency Support: An in-app SOS button provides immediate access to emergency services or personal contacts.
Currently, Tribür Caribbean operates exclusively on the island of Nassau, Bahamas. We are committed to expanding our reach throughout the Bahamas, the Caribbean, and the United States.

Join Tribür Caribbean today to experience a new standard in ride-hailing, where safety, professionalism, and customer satisfaction are our top priorities.

Description:
Product: Natex Ride Hailing App
The Natex Ride Hailing App is a mobile application that allows users to book and pay for rides from their smartphone. The app is built on blockchain technology, providing users with a secure and transparent payment platform. The app is designed to work in hybrid mode, allowing users to pay for rides using either fiat currency or cryptocurrency, depending on local regulations and user preferences. In addition to standard ride hailing services, Natex also offers a play-to-earn program that allows riders to earn tokens by playing games within the app, which can be used for future rides or exchanged for other cryptocurrencies.

Service: Ride Hailing
The ride hailing service provided by Natex allows users to easily book and pay for rides from their smartphone. Users can select their pick-up and drop-off locations, choose the type of vehicle they prefer, and pay for the ride securely through the app. The app uses blockchain technology to ensure that all transactions are secure and transparent. Natex also offers a rewards program through its play-to-earn feature, which allows riders to earn tokens by playing games within the app, making the service more fun and rewarding for users. Overall, the Natex ride hailing service aims to provide a convenient, safe, and rewarding way for users to get around.

Name: Unlock Capital
Description:
As the cost of living continues to rise and salaries stagnate or even decrease, many individuals are facing financial constraints that require innovative solutions to maintain their quality of life. One increasingly popular approach is opting to live in boarding houses during the week in big cities, enabling individuals to escape to outer cities on weekends for a much-needed respite. To make this lifestyle more feasible and affordable, car sharing has emerged as the best transportation option. 

Car sharing offers a cost-effective means of transportation, making it an attractive alternative for individuals living in boarding houses who wish to venture out of the city on weekends. By sharing the costs of fuel, tolls, and maintenance among several individuals, it significantly reduces the financial strain associated with typical transportation methods. Additionally, car sharing provides flexibility and freedom to explore the outskirts and enjoy the scenic beauty and recreational activities available in outer cities. 

We invest in a cutting-edge AI camera technology, which takes safety to the next level. Our specialized AI camera is designed to track and alert drivers when it detects potential dangers or signs of fatigue. This advanced feature ensures that you are always in safe hands, allowing you to relax and enjoy your journey with peace of mind. Say goodbye to the difficult and analog Car Sharing.

Name: HYPE
Description:
At HYPE, we are passionate about showcasing the breathtaking beauty and cultural richness of Dalmatian Zagora to both residents and tourists. As a premier provider of transportation and tour services, we offer a wide range of meticulously crafted experiences that cater to diverse interests and preferences.

Our dedicated team of knowledgeable guides and drivers are committed to ensuring that every journey with us is filled with wonder, excitement, and unforgettable memories. Whether you're a fan of popular TV shows like "Game of Thrones" or "Star Trek," or simply seeking to immerse yourself in the enchanting landscapes and historic sites of the region, we have the perfect tour for you.

Embark on our "Game of Thrones" tour and step into the realm of Westeros, exploring iconic filming locations and unraveling the secrets of the hit series. For sci-fi enthusiasts, our "Star Trek" tour will transport you to futuristic realms, visiting locations that evoke the spirit of intergalactic adventures.

Suppose you're pursuing serenity and natural beauty. In that case, our "Chasing Sunset" tour will take you on a scenic journey through Dalmatian Zagora's captivating landscapes, where you can witness breathtaking sunsets and connect with the essence of the region.

We offer exclusive expeditions to Krka National Park and Plitvička jezera National Park. Immerse yourself in the cascading waterfalls, crystal-clear lakes, and lush greenery.

With our attention to detail and personalized approach, we ensure that each tour is a seamless blend of exploration, education, and relaxation. Our fleet of comfortable vehicles and professional drivers guarantee a safe and enjoyable travel experience, allowing you to immerse yourself in the wonders of Dalmatian Zagora fully.

Join us at HYPE and let us be your trusted guide to uncovering the hidden gems and awe-inspiring attractions that await you in Dalmatian Zagora. Together, we will create unforgettable moments and lifelong memories.

Our platform connects drivers with spare seats in their vehicles with riders who are headed in the same direction, enabling them to share the cost of the journey and enjoy a more social and environmentally friendly commute. With our easy-to-use technology, users can seamlessly match with the perfect carpool partner and coordinate all the details, from pick-up points to payment, through our in-app messaging feature. We prioritize safety and require all users to go through a verification process before joining. By carpooling with KudosCar, users can reduce traffic congestion, lower carbon emissions, save money, and make new connections. Join the carpooling revolution and become a part of our growing community today.

Built with modern technology, SafeDrop combines transportation management with safety-first innovation. Whether you’re a parent seeking secure transport, a student looking for convenience, or a driver aiming to serve responsibly, SafeDrop is the bridge that connects safety, trust, and technology.

Our mission is simple: to make student transportation smarter, safer, and more transparent. With a focus on security, affordability, and efficiency, we are building the future of daily commutes.

SafeDrop isn’t just an app – it’s a commitment to safety and reliability for the next generation.

Description:
Benvenuti nella pagina ufficiale di Mr Mesina, il vostro partner di fiducia per il noleggio con conducente sulla costa orientale della Sardegna.

Con una solida esperienza nel settore dei trasporti, Mr Mesina si distingue per la sua dedizione nell'offrire servizi di taxi, autonoleggio, transfer ed escursioni che non sono solo un mezzo per spostarsi, ma un'esperienza di viaggio a tutto tondo. La nostra missione è trasformare ogni tragitto in un momento di relax e scoperta, permettendovi di esplorare le bellezze della costa orientale sarda con la massima comodità e senza pensieri.

Perché scegliere Mr Mesina?

Affidabilità e Prestigio: Ci impegniamo a mantenere standard elevati in ogni aspetto del nostro servizio, dalla manutenzione dei veicoli alla formazione professionale dei nostri autisti. La vostra sicurezza e soddisfazione sono al centro di ciò che facciamo.

Esperienza Locale: Conosciamo la Sardegna come le nostre tasche. Sia che desideriate un trasferimento efficiente dall'aeroporto, sia che vogliate avventurarvi in una escursione personalizzata, vi guidiamo attraverso i paesaggi mozzafiato e le gemme nascoste della nostra isola con consigli esperti e un tocco personale.

Servizi Personalizzati: Ogni viaggiatore è unico, e così dovrebbe essere ogni viaggio. Offriamo soluzioni su misura per soddisfare le vostre esigenze specifiche, assicurandoci che il vostro tempo con noi sia esattamente come lo desiderate.

Unitevi a noi nel viaggio.

La vostra avventura in Sardegna inizia qui. Che siate in viaggio per affari o per piacere, Mr Mesina è qui per assicurarvi che ogni momento passato sulla strada sia confortevole, sicuro e indimenticabile. Seguite la nostra pagina per aggiornamenti, storie di viaggio e offerte esclusive.

Per informazioni e prenotazioni, visitate il nostro sito web o contattateci direttamente. Siamo qui per rendere il vostro viaggio semplicemente straordinario.

Og hvorfor har jeg taget buskørekort og blevet busvognmand - det er meget simpelt. Jeg tog buskort i 2022, da min datter var ved Flying Superkids og dem vil jeg gerne ud og køre med. Plus evt. andre jeg kender eller har en relation til der skulle en tur ud i det blå. Og i 2024 er jeg bare blevet så glad for at køre med mennesker, at jeg gerne vil være med til at vælge mine ture - så derfor blev jeg så også vognmand.

Så jeg håber, at du vil kontakte mig hvis i skal på en tur med oplevelse...

Venlig hilsen
Karsten - AARHUS TURIST

Name: Article 15 Transportation, LLC
Description:
Uber and Lyft introduced a new business model that disrupted the transportation industry. Once people saw this new alternative to taxicabs, this new way of going from place to place quickly became popular all over the nation. This new business model was dubbed as "ridesharing." Ridesharing in and of itself is a phenomenal business model when done correctly. Since their rise in popularity in 2012-2014, Uber and Lyft have been the only names in the business, thus allowing them to maintain control of the market and where it ends up even though they're in direct competition.

When the Coronavirus pandemic began in 2020, it brought nearly everything to a grinding halt. Many drivers stopped working and were left with a lot of uncertainty, not to mention little to no benefits compared to the traditional workforce. As cities and states around the nation started opening back up, many of those places struggled to return back to pre-pandemic levels of driver activity in the ridesharing business. Not to mention recent world events contributing to rising costs for drivers all over the world. Simply put: there hasn't been enough of an incentive to bring drivers back on the road despite the fact that there is an ever-growing demand from riders. 

It's time to reimagine ridesharing and that's exactly where we come in. We've developed a business model that adapts more quickly to ever-changing market conditions. It maintains a similar affordability that riders often enjoyed in the pre-pandemic market, while offering drivers an increased compensation plan. They'll earn more per-mile while they have a passenger in the vehicle, increased base pay for minimum fare trips, and an ability to build a schedule with regular riders that they've built a good rapport. Our mission is to bring the ridesharing model back to the fortitude and innovation it once had.

OUR DIFFERENCE
It is our mission of more than 20 years in listening and serving families across the nation that we continue to advance and improve our services understanding how critical our role is in this industry of mental health and wellness.

We also convey to the child that their parents and/or guardians have entrusted us with their care. We consider ourselves to be part of the child’s healing and recovery journey using a therapeutic approach to best of our ability in our interaction so to have the child arrive at the facility being conditioned for their specific program with minimum trauma by training the staff in AAU (Adolescent Awareness and Understanding).

Description:
SHUTTO is a disruptive premium transportation company dedicated to redefining intercity travel in Texas. We operate luxury Mercedes-Benz Sprinter vans designed for comfort, safety, and reliability, currently connecting Austin and San Antonio — with plans to expand service to Dallas and Houston, completing the Texas Triangle.

Our core product is city-to-city passenger transportation, offering multiple daily departures between Austin and San Antonio. Passengers enjoy a premium experience with spacious seating, onboard Wi-Fi, USB charging ports, air conditioning, and professional drivers committed to punctuality and hospitality. Tickets can be purchased easily through our mobile app (available on the App Store and Google Play) or via our website www.shutto.us
, where users can explore routes, select schedules, purchase tickets, and board using QR codes for a seamless, tech-driven experience.

Beyond our regular routes, SHUTTO provides special services for corporate events, private groups, weddings, conferences, and customized trips — a truly made-to-measure mobility solution for those who need flexibility and exclusivity. This includes point-to-point transfers, full-day charters, and group logistics planning, making SHUTTO the preferred partner for businesses and event organizers.

Our approach is intentionally disruptive, challenging traditional transportation options and offering travelers a new, tech-enabled, and elevated way to connect between cities. We build partnerships with local businesses, coworking spaces, social clubs, and event venues to offer exclusive discounts and referral programs, leveraging influencers and opinion leaders to amplify awareness.

With a vision to grow to 20+ vans before the FIFA World Cup in 2026, SHUTTO is positioning itself as a key player in the future of Texas mobility — combining premium service, cutting-edge technology, and a commitment to connecting cities and people with style, punctuality, and trust.

Mit viel Einfühlungsvermögen und langjähriger Erfahrung haben wir uns auf die Beförderung von Rollstuhlfahrern, Schülern, Senioren und auf Flughafentransfers spezialisiert.

Uns ist bewusst, dass Mobilität ein entscheidender Faktor für die Lebensqualität ist, und deshalb setzen wir alles daran, unseren Fahrgästen ein Höchstmaß an Sicherheit und Komfort zu bieten.
