Name: Mellow Cab
Description:
Mellow Cab is a live event pedicab transportation service and experience. 

We work with the most experienced, professional, colorful, and customer service oriented pedicab operators to bring a quality fleet that suites your unique needs and style. 

WHY PEDICABS?

Pedicabs provide a functional and value-added service. With their karaoke inspiring sound systems, our "party bikes" keep the hype going from point A to B. Your patrons don't want to feel like they are on an ADA shuttle  - they want something different and unique - they want a new, photo-worthy experience showing that they are having the time of their life at your event. 

Pedicabs offer a range of benefits over other festival transportation alternatives:
- Pedicabs operate silently and don't make a fuss when they go in "reverse"
- Pedicabs do not stir up dust on dirt or gravel paths
- Pedicabs are electric, which means they're environmentally conscious and do not produce exhaust
- Pedicabs are highly maneuverable and have a very tight turn radius
- Pedicabs are operated by seasoned professionals with years of experience working on varied terrain amidst large crowds of pedestrians
- Pedicabs can easily transport six passengers

WHY MELLOW CAB?

Mellow Cab is the only owner-operator pedicab transportation service provider. 
By serving as both the contractor and service, we are able to a provide a more equitable arrangement with the Event without over-saturating the grounds. Our model puts emphasis on meeting the attendance demands of an event with the appropriate number of quality operators. By emphasizing quality over quantity, our service inherently becomes more crowd-friendly, safer, and prioritizes patron-care. Last but not least, Mellow Cab emphasizes the experiential side of our service is constantly trying to create a more photo-worthy and unique experience for your patrons. A pedicab ride could be your patron's first or last impression at the Event, and we want to make it a memorable one.

Name: Siri Limo
Description:
Siri Limo, officially known as Siri Limousine LLC, is San Diego's premier provider of high-end ground passenger transportation. Our mission is to provide reliable, professional, and stylish Premium Black SUV services to corporate clients and event organizers across Southern California.

Our History: 16 Years of Expertise, A Modern Focus
Originally established in 2009, Siri Limousine LLC has built a strong 16-year legacy in luxury ground transportation. In recent years, under the renewed leadership and partnership of Sary Barbakh and Semih Yavuz, the company underwent a complete strategic transformation.

We transitioned from a traditional limousine service to a modern, scalable operation specializing in large-capacity Black SUV logistics, culminating in our unique Branded Vehicle Options for high-profile events. This evolution combines our long-standing commitment to excellence with cutting-edge, event-focused solutions.

Our Core Commitment
Every ride is tailored to provide first-class service and a seamless experience based on these principles:

Premium Fleet: Our fleet exclusively features late-model, meticulously maintained Black SUVs.

Reliable & On-Time: We prioritize punctuality and professional, discreet service for executives and VIPs.

Scalable Capacity: We leverage a wide network of professional drivers to scale our capacity up to 50+ SUVs for large-scale events and conventions.

Unique Service Offering: Branded Vehicle Options
We offer a unique opportunity to transform your event transportation into a moving branding experience. Our Branded Vehicle Option allows clients to display their company's logo or custom design on our luxury SUVs during major San Diego events, combining top-tier transportation with high-visibility marketing.

This team, with its diverse skill set and unwavering determination, embodies the essence of humanity and altruism, always ready to respond, and consistently ensuring that those in dire straits are not left alone.
